2Kings22:20 Choncho taona, Ine ndidzakutenga kupita kwa makolo ako ndipo udzayikidwa mʼmanda mwako mwamtendere. Maso ako sadzaona mavuto onse amene ndidzabweretse pamalo pano.’ ” Ndipo anthu aja anabwerera nakafotokoza mawu amenewa kwa mfumu." 
2Kings23:1 Pamenepo mfumu inayitanitsa akuluakulu onse a ku Yuda ndi Yerusalemu. 
2Kings23:2 Mfumuyo inapita ku Nyumba ya Yehova pamodzi ndi anthu onse a ku Yuda, ndi onse okhala mu Yerusalemu, ansembe ndi aneneri, ndiponso anthu ena onse kuyambira wamngʼono mpaka wamkulu. Mfumuyo inawerenga mawu onse a mʼBuku la Chipangano limene linapezeka mʼNyumba ya Yehova, anthu onse akumva." 
2Kings23:3 Mfumu inayimirira pambali pa chipilala ndi kuchita pangano pamaso pa Yehova kuti idzatsatira Yehova ndi kusunga malamulo, mawu ndi malangizo ake ndi mtima wonse ndi moyo wonse, kukwaniritsa mawu a mʼpanganoli, olembedwa mʼbukuli. Pamenepo anthu onse anadzipereka kutsatira panganoli." 
2Kings23:4 Mfumu inalamula wansembe wamkulu Hilikiya, ansembe othandizana naye ndi alonda a pa khomo kuti achotse mʼNyumba ya Yehova ziwiya zonse zopembedzera Baala ndi Asera ndiponso mafano a zinthu zamlengalenga. Yosiya anazitentha kunja kwa Yerusalemu, ku minda ya ku Chigwa cha Kidroni ndipo phulusa lake anapita nalo ku Beteli." 
2Kings23:5 Iye anachotsa ansembe a mafano amene anayikidwa ndi mafumu a Yuda kuti azifukiza lubani ku malo opembedzera mafano a ku mizinda ya ku Yuda ndi kumalo ozungulira Yerusalemu, amene ankafukiza lubani kwa Baala, dzuwa, mwezi, nyenyezi ndi zinthu zonse zamlengalenga." 
2Kings23:6 Anachotsa fano la Asera mʼNyumba ya Yehova napita nalo kunja kwa Yerusalemu, ku Chigwa cha Kidroni, nalitentha kumeneko. Anapera fanolo ndi kukataya phulusa lake pa manda a anthu wamba." 
2Kings23:7 Iye anagwetsanso tinyumba ta ochita zachiwerewere, timene tinali mʼNyumba ya Yehova, kumene akazi ankalukirako mikanjo yovala popembedza Asera." 
2Kings23:8 Yosiya anabweretsanso ansembe onse kuchokera mʼmizinda ya Yuda, nawononga malo opembedzera mafano, kuyambira ku Geba mpaka ku Beeriseba, kumene ansembe ankafukizako lubani. Anagwetsa nyumba za milungu zimene zinali pa chipata cha Yoswa, bwanamkubwa wa mzindawo, kumanzere kwa chipata cha mzinda." 
2Kings23:9 Ngakhale kuti ansembe a ku malo opembedzera mafanowo sanawalole kuti atumikire pa guwa lansembe la Yehova mu Yerusalemu, koma ankadya buledi wopanda yisiti pamodzi ndi ansembe anzawo." 
2Kings23:10 Mfumu Yosiya anawononganso Tofeti, amene anali ku Chigwa cha Hinomu, kuti wina aliyense asagwiritse ntchito malowo popereka mwana wake wamwamuna kapena wamkazi pa moto kwa Moleki." 
2Kings23:11 Anachotsa pa chipata cholowera ku Nyumba ya Yehova akavalo amene mafumu a Yuda anawapereka ngati nsembe kwa dzuwa. Akavalo anali pafupi ndi bwalo la chipinda cha mkulu wina wotchedwa Natani-Meleki. Ndipo Yosiya anatentha magaleta opembedzera dzuwa. 
2Kings23:12 Anagwetsa maguwa amene mafumu a Yuda anawamanga pa denga pafupi ndi chipinda chapamwamba cha Ahazi, ndiponso maguwa amene Manase anamanga mʼmabwalo awiri a Nyumba ya Yehova. Yosiya anawachotsa kumeneko nawaphwanya ndi kutaya zidutswa zake mʼChigwa cha Kidroni." 
2Kings23:13 Mfumuyo inawononga malo opembedzera mafano amene ali kummawa kwa Yerusalemu cha kumpoto kwa Phiri la Chiwonongeko. Maguwawa Solomoni mfumu ya Israeli inamangira Asitoreti, fano lalikazi lonyansa la Asidoni, Kemosi, fano lonyansa la Amowabu, ndi Moleki, fano lonyansa la anthu a ku Amoni." 
2Kings23:14 Yosiya anaphwanya miyala ya chipembedzo ndiponso anadula mitengo ya fano la Asera ndipo anakwirira malowo ndi mafupa a anthu. 
2Kings23:15 Ngakhalenso guwa lansembe la ku Beteli, malo opembedzera mafano amene anapanga Yeroboamu mwana wa Nebati, amene anachimwitsa Israeli, Yosiya anawononga guwalo ndi malo opembedzera mafanowo. Iye anatentha malo opembedzera mafanowo ndi kuwapera ndipo anatenthanso fano la Asera." 
2Kings23:16 Kenaka Yosiya anayangʼanayangʼana ndipo ataona manda amene anali pomwepo, mʼmbali mwa phiri, analamula kuti afukule mandawo ndi kutulutsa mafupa kuti awatenthe paguwapo kuti alidetse, potsatira mawu a Yehova amene munthu wa Mulungu analoseratu za zimenezi." 
2Kings23:17 Mfumu inafunsa kuti, “Kodi chizindikiro cha manda chimene ndikuwaonawo ndi chayani?” Anthu a mu mzindamo anayankha kuti, “Ndi chizindikiro cha manda a munthu wa Mulungu wochokera ku Yuda amene ananeneratu zimene inu mwalichita guwa lansembe la Beteli.”" 
2Kings23:18 Mfumuyo inati, “Alekeni manda amenewo, munthu asachotse mafupa ake.” Choncho anawasiya mafupa akewo pamodzi ndi mafupa a mneneri wa ku Samariya uja." 
2Kings23:19 Monga momwe Yosiya anachitira ku Beteli, anachotsa ndi kuwononga nyumba za milungu zonse ndi malo opembedzera mafano amene mafumu anamanga mʼmizinda ya ku Samariya omwe anakwiyitsa Yehova." 
2Kings23:20 Yosiya anapha ansembe onse amene ankatumikira ku malo opembedzera mafano, anawaphera pa maguwa awo ndi kutentha mafupa awo. Kenaka iye anapita ku Yerusalemu." 
2Kings23:21 Mfumu inalamula anthu onse kuti, “Chitani Chikondwerero cha Paska kulemekeza Yehova Mulungu wanu, motsatira zomwe zalembedwa mʼBuku la Chipangano.”" 
2Kings23:22 Paska yotere inali isanachitikepo kuyambira nthawi ya oweruza amene anatsogolera Israeli, kapenanso nthawi yonse ya mafumu a Yuda sipanachitikenso Paska ngati imeneyo." 
2Kings23:23 Koma mʼchaka cha 18 cha Mfumu Yosiya, Paska imeneyi anachitira Yehova mu Yerusalemu." 
2Kings23:24 Kuwonjezera apa, Yosiya anachotsa anthu a mawula, woyankhula ndi mizimu ya anthu akufa, milungu ya mʼnyumba, mafano ndiponso zinthu zonse zonyansa zopezeka mu Yuda ndi Yerusalemu. Iye anachita izi pokwaniritsa lamulo lolembedwa mʼbuku limene Hilikiya analipeza mʼNyumba ya Yehova." 
2Kings23:25 Yosiyayo asanalowe ufumu, ngakhale atamwalira, panalibenso mfumu ina yofanana naye imene inatembenukira kwa Yehova monga anachitira, ndi mtima wake wonse, ndi moyo wake wonse, ndi mphamvu zake zonse, motsatira Malamulo onse a Mose." 
2Kings23:26 Komabe Yehova sanachotse mkwiyo wake woopsa, umene anali nawo pa Yuda chifukwa cha zonse zimene anachita Manase poputa mkwiyo wa Mulungu." 
2Kings23:27 Choncho Yehova anati, “Ndidzawachotsanso anthu a ku Yuda pamaso panga monga ndinachotsera anthu a ku Israeli ndipo ndidzawukana mzinda wa Yerusalemu, mzinda umene ndinawusankha, pamodzi ndi Nyumba ino imene ndinati, ‘Dzina langa lidzakhala mʼmenemo.’ ”" 
2Kings23:28 Ntchito zina za Yosiya ndi zonse zimene anachita, kodi sizinalembedwe mʼbuku la mbiri ya mafumu a Yuda?" 
2Kings23:29 Yosiya akanali mfumu, Farao wotchedwa Neko, mfumu ya Igupto, anapita ku Mtsinje wa Yufurate kukathandiza mfumu ya ku Asiriya. Mfumu Yosiya anapita kukachita naye nkhondo, koma Neko anakumana naye ndi kumupha ku Megido." 
2Kings23:30 Atumiki a Yosiyayo ananyamula mtembo wake mu galeta kuchokera ku Megido mpaka ku Yerusalemu ndipo anamuyika mʼmanda akeake. Ndipo anthu a mʼdzikomo anatenga Yehowahazi mwana wa Yosiya namudzoza, ndipo iye analowa ufumu mʼmalo mwa abambo ake." 
2Kings23:31 Yehowahazi anakhala mfumu ali ndi 23 ndipo analamulira mu Yerusalemu miyezi itatu. Amayi ake anali Hamutali, mwana wa Yeremiya wa ku Libina." 
2Kings23:32 Iye anachita zoyipa pamaso pa Yehova monga momwe anachitira makolo ake. 
2Kings23:33 Farao Neko anamuyika mʼndende ku Ribula mʼdziko la Hamati kuti asalamulirenso mu Yerusalemu. Farao analamula Yuda kuti azikhoma msonkho wa siliva wolemera makilogalamu 3,400, ndiponso golide wolemera makilogalamu 34." 
2Kings23:34 Farao Neko anayika Eliyakimu mwana wa Yosiya kuti akhale mfumu mʼmalo mwa abambo ake Yosiya, ndipo anasintha dzina lake kukhala Yehoyakimu. Koma iye anatenga Yehowahazi kupita naye ku Igupto ndipo anakafera kumeneko." 
2Kings23:35 Yehoyakimu anapereka kwa Farao Neko siliva ndi golide amene anamufuna uja. Koma kuti iye apereke zimenezi, amankhometsa msonkho mʼdziko mwakemo ndipo amalandira siliva ndi golide kuchokera kwa anthu a mʼdzikomo molingana ndi chuma cha munthu aliyense." 
2Kings23:36 Yehoyakimu anali wa zaka 25 pamene anakhala mfumu ndipo analamulira mu Yerusalemu zaka 11. Amayi ake anali Zebuda, mwana wa Pedaya wa ku Ruma." 
2Kings23:37 Iye anachita zoyipa pamaso pa Yehova monga momwe anachitira makolo ake. 
2Kings24:1 Pa nthawi ya ulamuliro wa Yehoyakimu, Nebukadinezara mfumu ya Babuloni anadzathira nkhondo dzikolo ndipo Yehoyakimu anakhala pansi pa ulamuliro wake zaka zitatu. Koma kenaka anasintha maganizo ake nawukira Nebukadinezara." 
2Kings24:2 Yehova anatumiza magulu a Ababuloni, Aaramu, Amowabu ndi Aamoni, kudzathira nkhondo Yuda. Iye anawatumiza kudzawononga Yuda molingana ndi mawu amene Yehova ananeneratu kudzera mwa aneneri ake." 
2Kings24:3 Ndithu, izi zinachitikira Yuda monga momwe Yehova analamulira nʼcholinga choti awachotse pamaso pake chifukwa cha machimo a Manase ndi zonse zimene anachita," 
2Kings24:4 kuphatikizapo kukhetsa magazi a anthu osalakwa. Chifukwa iye anadzaza Yerusalemu ndi magazi a anthu osalakwa ndipo Yehova sanafune kumukhululukira. 
2Kings24:5 Ntchito zina za Yehoyakimu ndi zonse zimene anachita, kodi sizinalembedwe mʼbuku la mbiri ya mafumu a Yuda?" 
2Kings24:6 Yehoyakimu anamwalira ndipo anayikidwa mʼmanda pamodzi ndi makolo ake. Ndipo Yehoyakini mwana wake analowa ufumu mʼmalo mwake. 
2Kings24:7 Mfumu ya Igupto sinatulukenso mʼdziko lake chifukwa mfumu ya Babuloni inalanda mayiko onse kuchokera ku Mtsinje wa ku Igupto mpaka ku Mtsinje wa Yufurate. 
2Kings24:8 Yehoyakini anakhala mfumu ali ndi zaka 18 ndipo analamulira mu Yerusalemu miyezi itatu. Amayi ake anali Nehusita mwana wa Elinatani wa ku Yerusalemu. 
2Kings24:9 Iye anachita zoyipa pamaso pa Yehova monga anachitira abambo ake. 
2Kings24:10 Nthawi imeneyo ankhondo a Nebukadinezara mfumu ya Babuloni anabwera ku Yerusalemu nazinga mzindawo ndi misasa ya nkhondo 
2Kings24:11 ndipo Nebukadinezara anafika ku mzindawo pamene ankhondo ake anawuzinga. 
2Kings24:12 Yehoyakini mfumu ya Yuda pamodzi ndi amayi ake, atumiki ake, anthu ake olemekezeka ndiponso akuluakulu onse anadzipereka kwa mfumu ya ku Babuloni. Mfumu ya Babuloni inagwira Yoyakini ukapolo mʼchaka chachisanu ndi chitatu cha ufumu wake." 
2Kings24:13 Monga ananenera Yehova, Nebukadinezara anachotsa chuma chonse cha mʼNyumba ya Yehova ndiponso cha mʼnyumba ya mfumu ndipo anatenga ziwiya zonse zagolide za ku Nyumba ya Yehova zimene Solomoni mfumu ya Israeli anapanga." 
2Kings24:14 Anatenga anthu onse a mu Yerusalemu kupita nawo ku ukapolo. Akuluakulu onse pamodzi ndi anthu ankhondo, anthu onse aluso ndi amisiri osula onse pamodzi analipo 10,000. Osauka okha ndiye anatsala mʼdzikomo." 
2Kings24:15 Nebukadinezara anatenga Yehoyakini ngati kapolo kupita naye ku Babuloni. Mu Yerusalemu anatenganso amayi a mfumu, akazi ake, akuluakulu ake ndiponso anthu olemekezeka mʼdzikomo." 
2Kings24:16 Mfumu ya Babuloni inatumizanso ku Babuloni anthu ankhondo 70,000, anthu amphamvu ndi okonzeka kupita ku nkhondo, anthu aluso ndi amisiri osula 1,000." 
2Kings24:17 Iye analonga ufumu Mataniya, malume wa Yoyakini mʼmalo mwake ndipo anasintha dzina lake kuti akhale Zedekiya." 
2Kings24:18 Zedekiya anakhala mfumu ali ndi zaka 21 ndipo analamulira mu Yerusalemu zaka 11. Amayi ake anali Hamutali mwana wa Yeremiya wa ku Libina. 
2Kings24:19 Iye anachita zoyipa pamaso pa Yehova monga anachitira Yehoyakimu. 
2Kings24:20 Zonsezi zinachitikira Yerusalemu ndi Yuda chifukwa cha mkwiyo wa Mulungu ndipo pa mapeto pake anawachotsa pamaso pake. Ndipo Zedekiya anawukira mfumu ya Babuloni. 
2Kings25:1 Choncho mʼchaka chachisanu ndi chinayi cha ulamuliro wa Zedekiya, mwezi wakhumi, pa tsiku lakhumi la mwezi, Nebukadinezara mfumu ya Babuloni anabwera ndi gulu lake lonse la ankhondo, nadzathira nkhondo mzinda wa Yerusalemu. Iye anamanga misasa kunja kwa mzindawo ndipo anamanga mitumbira ya nkhondo kuzungulira mzindawo." 
2Kings25:2 Mzindawo anawuzinga mpaka chaka cha khumi ndi chimodzi cha Mfumu Zedekiya. 
2Kings25:3 Pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chinayi pa mwezi wachinayi, njala inakula kwambiri mu mzindamo kotero kuti anthu analibe chakudya." 
2Kings25:4 Pamenepo khoma la mzindawo linabowoledwa ndipo gulu lonse la ankhondo linathawa usiku kudzera pa chipata cha pakati pa makoma awiri pafupi ndi munda wa mfumu, ngakhale kuti Ababuloni anali atazinga mzindawo. Iwo anathawira cha ku Araba," 
2Kings25:5 koma gulu la ankhondo la ku Babuloni linalondola mfumu Zedekiya ndi kumupeza mʼchigwa cha ku Yeriko. Ankhondo onse anamusiya yekha nabalalika. 
2Kings25:6 Anagwidwa napita naye kwa mfumu ya ku Babuloni ku Ribula, kumene anagamula mlandu wa Zedekiyayo." 
2Kings25:7 Iwo anapha ana a Zedekiya iyeyo akuona. Kenaka anakolowola maso a Zedekiya namumanga ndi unyolo wamkuwa ndi kupita naye ku Babuloni. 
2Kings25:8 Mwezi wachisanu, pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri la mwezi, mʼchaka cha 19 cha Nebukadinezara, mfumu ya Babuloni, Nebuzaradani, mkulu wa asilikali oteteza mfumu, nduna ya mfumu ya Babuloni, anabwera ku Yerusalemu." 
2Kings25:9 Iye anatentha Nyumba ya Yehova, nyumba ya mfumu pamodzi ndi nyumba zonse za mu Yerusalemu. Anatentha nyumba iliyonse yofunika." 
2Kings25:10 Gulu lonse la ankhondo la ku Babuloni limene linali ndi mkulu wa asilikali oteteza mfumu ija, linagumula malinga ozungulira Yerusalemu." 
2Kings25:11 Nebuzaradani mkulu wa asilikali uja anatenga anthu amene anatsala mu mzindamo, ndi ena amene anathawira kwa mfumu ya Babuloni, pamodzi ndi ena onse kupita nawo ku ukapolo ku Babuloni." 
2Kings25:12 Koma mkulu wa asilikaliyo anasiya anthu ena osauka kwambiri mʼdzikomo kuti azisamalira minda ya mpesa ndi minda ina. 
2Kings25:13 Ababuloni anaphwanya zipilala zamkuwa, maphaka ndiponso mbiya ya mkuwa zimene zinali mʼNyumba ya Yehova ndipo anatenga mkuwawo napita nawo ku Babuloni." 
2Kings25:14 Iwo anatenganso miphika, mafosholo, mbaniro za nyale, mbale ndi ziwiya zonse zamkuwa zimene ankagwiritsa ntchito potumikira mʼNyumbayo." 
2Kings25:15 Mkulu wa asilikali uja anatenganso zofukizira lubani ndi mbale zowazira magazi. Zonsezi zinali zopangidwa ndi golide wabwino kwambiri kapena siliva. 
2Kings25:16 Mkuwa wochokera ku zipilala ziwiri zija, mbiya ija ndi maphaka aja, zimene Solomoni anapanga mʼNyumba ya Yehova, kuchuluka kwake kunali kosawerengeka." 
2Kings25:17 Chipilala chilichonse chinali chotalika mamita asanu ndi atatu. Mutu wa mkuwa umene unali pamwamba pa chipilalacho unali mita imodzi ndi theka ndipo unakongoletsedwa ndi ukonde wa makangadza a mkuwa amene anazungulira mutuwo. Chipilala chachiwiri chinali chofanana ndi chinacho, ndipo chinali ndi ukonde." 
2Kings25:18 Mkulu wa asilikali uja anagwira ukapolo mkulu wa ansembe Seraya, Zefaniya wachiwiri wa mkulu wa ansembe ndi alonda atatu apakhomo." 
2Kings25:19 Mwa anthu amene anali mu mzindamo, anatenga mkulu amene ankalamulira ankhondo ndiponso alangizi asanu a mfumu. Anatenganso mlembi wa mtsogoleri wa ankhondo amene ankalemba anthu ntchito ya usilikali mʼdzikomo pamodzi ndi anthu ake 60 amene anali mu mzindamo." 
2Kings25:20 Nebuzaradani mkulu wa asilikali uja anawatenga onsewo napita nawo kwa mfumu ya Babuloni ku Ribula. 
2Kings25:21 Ku Ribulako, mʼdziko la Hamati, mfumu ya ku Babuloni inalamula kuti awakwapule ndi kuwapha. Choncho Ayuda anatengedwa ukapolo kuwachotsa mʼdziko lawo." 
2Kings25:22 Nebukadinezara mfumu ya Babuloni anasankha Gedaliya mwana wa Ahikamu, mwana wa Safani, kukhala woyangʼanira anthu amene anatsala ku Yuda." 
2Kings25:23 Atsogoleri onse ankhondo ndi anthu awo atamva kuti mfumu ya Babuloni yasankha Gedaliya kukhala bwanamkubwa, anabwera kwa Gedaliya ku Mizipa. Atsogoleriwo mayina awo anali awa: Ismaeli mwana wa Netaniya, Yohanani mwana wa Kareya, Seraya mwana wa Tanihumeti wa ku Netofa ndi Yaazaniya mwana wa Maakati, pamodzi ndi anthu awo." 
2Kings25:24 Gedaliya analumbira powatsimikizira iwo ndi anthu awo. Iye anati, “Musachite mantha ndi atsogoleri Ababuloniwa. Khalani mʼdziko muno ndipo tumikirani mfumu ya Babuloni. Mukatero zinthu zidzakuyenderani bwino.”" 
2Kings25:25 Koma pa mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri, Ismaeli mwana wa Netaniya, mwana wa Elisama, wa banja laufumu, anabwera ndi anthu khumi ndipo anapha Gedaliya pamodzi ndi Ayuda ndi anthu a ku Babuloni amene anali naye limodzi ku Mizipa." 
2Kings25:26 Chifukwa cha zimenezi, anthu onse kuyambira wamngʼono mpaka wamkulu, pamodzi ndi atsogoleri a ankhondo anathawira ku Igupto chifukwa choopa Ababuloni." 
2Kings25:27 Pa chaka cha 37 cha ukapolo wa Yehoyakini mfumu ya Yuda, chaka chimene Evili-Merodaki anakhala mfumu ya Babuloni, anamasula Yehoyakini mʼndende pa mwezi wa 12 pa tsiku la 27." 
2Kings25:28 Anamukomera mtima namukweza kupambana mafumu ena onse amene anali naye ku Babuloni. 
2Kings25:29 Choncho Yoyakini anavula zovala zake za ku ndende, ndipo ankadya ndi mfumu masiku onse a moyo wake." 
2Kings25:30 Mfumu inkamupatsa Yehoyakini chakudya tsiku lililonse pa moyo wake wonse. 
1Chronicles1:1 Adamu, Seti, Enosi" 
1Chronicles1:2 Kenani, Mahalaleli, Yaredi," 
1Chronicles1:3 Enoki, Metusela, Lameki, Nowa." 
1Chronicles1:4 	Ana a Nowa, Semu, Hamu ndi Yafeti." 
1Chronicles1:5 	Ana aamuna a Yafeti anali: Gomeri, Magogi, Madai, Yavani, Tubala, Mesaki ndi Tirasi." 
1Chronicles1:6 	Ana aamuna a Gomeri anali: Asikenazi, Rifati ndi Togarima" 
1Chronicles1:7 	Ana aamuna a Yavani anali: Elisa, Tarisisi, Kitimu ndi Rodanimu." 
1Chronicles1:8 	Ana aamuna a Hamu anali: Kusi, Miziraimu, Puti ndi Kanaani" 
1Chronicles1:9 	Ana aamuna a Kusi anali: Seba, Havila, Sabita, Raama ndi Sabiteka Ana aamuna a Raama anali: Seba ndi Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:10 	Kusi anali abambo a Nimurodi amene anali wankhondo wamphamvu kwambiri pa dziko lapansi. 
1Chronicles1:11 	Igupto ndiye kholo la Aludi, Aanami, Alehabu, Anafutu," 
1Chronicles1:12 	Apaturusi, Akasilu (kumene kunachokera Afilisti) ndi Akafitori." 
1Chronicles1:13 	Kanaani anabereka mwana wake wachisamba Sidoni, ndipo anaberekanso Ahiti," 
1Chronicles1:14 Ayebusi, Aamori, Agirigasi" 
1Chronicles1:15 Ahivi, Aariki, Asini" 
1Chronicles1:16 	Aaravadi, Azemari ndi Ahamati." 
1Chronicles1:17 	Ana aamuna a Semu anali: Elamu, Asuri, Aripakisadi, Ludi ndi Aramu. Ana aamuna a Aramu anali: Uzi, Huri, Geteri ndi Mesaki." 
1Chronicles1:18 	Aripakisadi anabereka Sela ndipo Selayo anabereka Eberi: 
1Chronicles1:19 	Eberi anabereka ana aamuna awiri: wina anamutcha Pelegi, chifukwa pa nthawiyo anthu a pa dziko lapansi anagawikana. Dzina la mʼbale wake linali Yokitani." 
1Chronicles1:20 	Yokitani anabereka Alimodadi, Selefi, Hazari-Maveti, Yera," 
1Chronicles1:21 Hadoramu, Uzali, Dikila" 
1Chronicles1:22 Obali, Abimaeli, Seba," 
1Chronicles1:23 	Ofiri, Havila ndi Yobabu. Onsewa anali ana aamuna a Yokitani." 
1Chronicles1:24 	Semu, Aripakisadi, Sela" 
1Chronicles1:25 	Eberi, Pelegi, Reu" 
1Chronicles1:26 	Serugi, Nahori, Tera" 
1Chronicles1:27 	ndi Abramu (amene ndi Abrahamu). 
1Chronicles1:28 	Ana a Abrahamu ndi awa: Isake ndi Ismaeli. 
1Chronicles1:29 	Zidzukulu zake zinali izi: Nebayoti ndiye anali mwana woyamba wa Ismaeli, kenaka Kedara, Adibeeli, Mibisamu," 
1Chronicles1:30 Misima, Duma, Masa, Hadadi, Tema," 
1Chronicles1:31 	Yeturi, Nafisi ndi Kedema. Awa anali ana a Ismaeli." 
1Chronicles1:32 	Ana a Ketura mzikazi wa Abrahamu anali awa: Zimurani, Yokisani, Medani, Midiyani, Isibaki ndi Suwa. Ana a Yokisani ndi awa: Seba ndi Dedani" 
1Chronicles1:33 	Ana aamuna a Midiyani anali, Efai, Eferi, Hanoki, Abida ndi Elida. Onsewa anali zidzukulu za Ketura." 
1Chronicles1:34 	Abrahamu anabereka Isake. Ana a Isake anali awa: Esau ndi Israeli. 
1Chronicles1:35 	Ana aamuna a Esau anali awa: Elifazi, Reueli, Yeusi, Yolamu ndi Kora." 
1Chronicles1:36 	Ana a Elifazi anali awa: Temani, Omari, Zefo, Gatamu ndi Kenazi: Amene anabereka ndi Timna: Amaleki." 
1Chronicles1:37 	Ana a Reueli anali awa: Nahati, Zera, Sama ndi Miza." 
1Chronicles1:38 	Ana a Seiri anali awa: Lotani, Sobala, Zibeoni, Ana, Disoni, Ezeri ndi Disani." 
1Chronicles1:39 	Ana aamuna a Lotani anali awa: Hori ndi Homamu. Timna anali mlongo wake wa Lotani. 
1Chronicles1:40 	Ana aamuna a Sobala anali awa: Alivani, Manahati, Ebala, Sefo ndi Onamu. Ana aamuna a Zibeoni anali awa: Ayiwa ndi Ana." 
1Chronicles1:41 	Mwana wa Ana anali Disoni. Ana a Disoni anali awa: Hemudani, Esibani, Itirani ndi Kerani" 
1Chronicles1:42 	Ana aamuna a Ezeri anali awa: Bilihani, Zaavani ndi Yaakani. Ana aamuna a Disani anali awa: Uzi ndi Arani." 
1Chronicles1:43 	Awa ndi mafumu amene ankalamulira dziko la Edomu, mfumu iliyonse ya Israeli isanayambe kulamulira kumeneko: Bela mwana wa Beori, mzinda wake ankawutcha Dinihaba." 
1Chronicles1:44 	Bela atamwalira, Yobabu mwana wa Zera wochokera ku Bozira analowa ufumu mʼmalo mwake." 
1Chronicles1:45 	Yobabu atamwalira, Husamu wochokera ku dziko la Atemani, analowa ufumu mʼmalo mwake." 
1Chronicles1:46 	Husamu atamwalira, Hadadi mwana wa Bedadi, amene anagonjetsa Amidiyani mʼdziko la Mowabu, analowa ufumu mʼmalo mwake. Mzinda wake unkatchedwa Aviti." 
1Chronicles1:47 	Hadadi atamwalira, Samila wochokera ku Masireka analowa ufumu mʼmalo mwake." 
1Chronicles1:48 	Samila atamwalira, Sauli wochokera ku Rehoboti wa ku Mtsinje analowa ufumu mʼmalo mwake." 
1Chronicles1:49 	Sauli atamwalira, Baala-Hanani mwana wa Akibori analowa ufumu mʼmalo mwake." 
1Chronicles1:50 Pamene Baala-Hanani anamwalira, Hadadi analowa ufumu mʼmalo mwake. Mzinda wake unkatchedwa Pau, ndipo dzina la mkazi wake linali Mehatabeli mwana wa Matiredi, mwana wamkazi wa Me-Zahabu." 
1Chronicles1:51 	Hadadi anamwaliranso. Mafumu a ku Edomu anali: Timna, Aliva, Yeteti," 
1Chronicles1:52 Oholibama, Ela, Pinoni," 
1Chronicles1:53 Kenazi, Temani, Mibezari," 
1Chronicles1:54 Magidieli ndi Iramu. Awa anali mafumu a ku Edomu. 
1Chronicles2:1 	Ana a Israeli anali awa: Rubeni, Simeoni, Levi, Yuda, Isakara, Zebuloni," 
1Chronicles2:2 	Dani, Yosefe, Benjamini, Nafutali, Gadi ndi Aseri." 
1Chronicles2:3 	Ana a Yuda anali awa: Eri, Onani ndi Sela. Ana atatu awa anabereka ndi mkazi wa Chikanaani, Batisuwa. Eri, mwana woyamba wa Yuda anali woyipa kwambiri pamaso pa Yehova, kotero Yehova anamupha." 
1Chronicles2:4 	Mpongozi wake Tamara anamuberekera Perezi ndi Zera. Ana onse a Yuda analipo asanu. 
1Chronicles2:5 	Ana a Perezi anali awa: Hezironi ndi Hamuli. 
1Chronicles2:6 	Ana a Zera anali awa: Zimuri, Etani, Hemani, Kalikoli ndi Dara. Onse analipo asanu." 
1Chronicles2:7 	Mwana wa Karimi anali Akani, amene anabweretsa mavuto pakati pa Israeli pamene anatenga zinthu zoyenera kuwonongedwa." 
1Chronicles2:8 	Mwana wa Etani anali Azariya. 
1Chronicles2:9 	Ana amene anabadwa kwa Hezironi anali: Yerahimeeli, Ramu ndi Kelubai." 
1Chronicles2:10 	Ramu anabereka Aminadabu ndipo Aminadabu anali abambo ake a Naasoni, mtsogoleri wa fuko la Yuda." 
1Chronicles2:11 Naasoni anabereka Salima, Salima anabereka Bowazi," 
1Chronicles2:12 	Bowazi anabereka Obedi ndipo Obedi anabereka Yese. 
1Chronicles2:13 	Yese anabereka Eliabu mwana wake woyamba, wachiwiri Abinadabu, wachitatu Simea," 
1Chronicles2:14 wachinayi Netaneli, wachisanu Radai," 
1Chronicles2:15 wachisanu ndi chimodzi Ozemu ndi wachisanu ndi chiwiri Davide. 
1Chronicles2:16 Alongo awo anali Zeruya ndi Abigayeli. Ana atatu a Zeruya anali Abisai Yowabu ndi Asaheli. 
1Chronicles2:17 	Abigayeli anali amayi ake a Amasa amene abambo ake anali Yeteri wa fuko la Ismaeli. 
1Chronicles2:18 Kalebe mwana wa Hezironi anabereka ana mwa Azuba mkazi wake (ndi mwa Yerioti). Ana a mkaziyo anali awa: Yeseri, Sobabu ndi Aridoni." 
1Chronicles2:19 Azuba atamwalira, Kalebe anakwatira Efurata, amene anamuberekera Huri." 
1Chronicles2:20 	Huri anabereka Uri ndipo Uri anabereka Bezaleli. 
1Chronicles2:21 Patapita nthawi, Hezironi anagona ndi mwana wamkazi wa Makiri abambo ake a Giliyadi (iye anamukwatira ali ndi zaka 60) ndipo anamuberekera Segubu." 
1Chronicles2:22 Segubu anabereka Yairi, amene anali ndi mizinda 23 ku Giliyadi." 
1Chronicles2:23 	(Koma Gesuri ndi Aramu analanda Havoti Yairi komanso Kenati ndi madera ake onse ozungulira, mizinda makumi asanu ndi umodzi). Onsewa anali adzukulu, a Makiri abambo ake a Giliyadi." 
1Chronicles2:24 	Atamwalira Hezironi ku Kalebe Efurata, Abiya mkazi wa Hezironi anamuberekera Asihuri abambo a Tekowa." 
1Chronicles2:25 	Ana a Yerahimeeli, mwana woyamba wa Hezironi anali: Ramu, mwana wake woyamba, Buna, Oreni, Ozemu ndi Ahiya." 
1Chronicles2:26 	Yerahimeeli anali ndi mkazi wina amene dzina lake linali Atara, amene anali amayi a Onamu." 
1Chronicles2:27 	Ana a Ramu, mwana woyamba wa Yerahimeeli, anali awa: Maazi, Yamini ndi Ekeri." 
1Chronicles2:28 	Ana a Onamu anali awa: Shamai ndi Yada. Ana a Shamai anali awa: Nadabu ndi Abisuri. 
1Chronicles2:29 	Mkazi wa Abisuri anali Abihaili, amene anamuberekera Ahibani ndi Molidi." 
1Chronicles2:30 	Ana a Nadabu anali awa: Seledi ndi Apaimu. Koma Seledi anamwalira wopanda ana. 
1Chronicles2:31 	Ana a Apaimu anali awa: Isi, amene anabereka Sesani. Sesani anabereka Ahilai." 
1Chronicles2:32 	Ana a Yada, mʼbale wa Samai, anali awa: Yereri ndi Yonatani. Koma Yeteri anamwalira wopanda ana." 
1Chronicles2:33 	Ana a Yonatani anali awa: Peleti ndi Zaza. Amenewa anali adzukulu a Yerahimeeli. 
1Chronicles2:34 	Sesani sanabereke ana aamuna koma aakazi okhaokha. Iye anali ndi wantchito wa ku Igupto, dzina lake Yariha." 
1Chronicles2:35 	Sesani anapereka mwana wake wamkazi kwa Yariha wantchito wake kuti amukwatire ndipo anamuberekera Atayi. 
1Chronicles2:36 	Atayi anali abambo ake a Natani, Natani anali abambo ake a Zabadi," 
1Chronicles2:37 	Zabadi anali abambo a Efilali, Efilali anali abambo a Obedi," 
1Chronicles2:38 	Obedi anali abambo a Yehu, Yehu anali abambo a Azariya," 
1Chronicles2:39 	Azariya anali abambo a Helezi, Helezi anali abambo a Eleasa," 
1Chronicles2:40 	Eleasa anali abambo ake a Sisimai, Sisimai anali abambo a Salumu," 
1Chronicles2:41 	Salumu anali abambo a Yekamiya, Yekamiya anali abambo a Elisama." 
1Chronicles2:42 	Ana a Kalebe mʼbale wa Yerahimeeli anali awa: Mesa mwana wachisamba, anali abambo a Zifi, ndipo mwana wake Maresa anali abambo a Hebroni." 
1Chronicles2:43 	Ana a Hebroni anali awa: Kora, Tapuwa, Rekemu ndi Sema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Sema anali abambo ake Rahamu ndipo Rahamu anali abambo a Yorikeamu. Rekemu anali abambo a Samai. 
1Chronicles2:45 	Mwana wa Samai anali Maoni, ndipo Maoni anali abambo a Beti Zuri." 
1Chronicles2:46 	Efai, mzikazi wa Kalebe, anali amayi a Harani, Moza ndi Gazezi. Harani anali abambo a Gazezi." 
1Chronicles2:47 	Ana a Yahidai anali awa: Regemu, Yotamu, Gesani, Peleti, Efai ndi Saafi." 
1Chronicles2:48 Maaka mzikazi wa Kalebe anali mayi Seberi ndi Tirihana. 
1Chronicles2:49 Iye anaberekanso Saafi abambo a Madimena ndi Seva abambo a Makibena ndi Gibeya. Mwana wamkazi wa Kalebe anali Akisa. 
1Chronicles2:50 	Izi zinali zidzukulu za Kalebe. Ana a Huri mwana wachisamba wa Efurata anali awa: Sobala abambo a Kiriati Yearimu," 
1Chronicles2:51 	Salima abambo a Betelehemu ndi Harefu abambo ake a Beti-Gadera. 
1Chronicles2:52 	Zidzukulu za Sobala abambo a Kiriati Yearimu zinali izi: Harowe, theka la banja la Manahati," 
1Chronicles2:53 	ndipo mabanja a Kiriati-Yeyarimu anali awa: Aitiri, Aputi, Asumati ndi Amisirai. Azorati ndi Aesitaoli anachokera kwa amenewa." 
1Chronicles2:54 	Zidzukulu za Salima zinali izi: Betelehemu, Anetofati, Atiroti-Beti-Yowabu, theka la banja la Manahati, Azori," 
1Chronicles2:55 ndiponso mabanja a alembi amene amakhala ku Yabesi: Atiroti, Asimeati ndiponso Asukati. Awa ndi Akeni amene anachokera kwa Hamati, kholo la Arekabu." 
1Chronicles3:1 	Ana aamuna a Davide amene anabadwira ku Hebroni anali awa: Woyamba anali Amnoni, amayi ake anali Ahinoamu wa ku Yezireeli; wachiwiri anali Danieli, amayi ake anali Abigayeli wa ku Karimeli;" 
1Chronicles3:1 	Ana aamuna a Davide amene anabadwira ku Hebroni anali awa: Woyamba anali Amnoni, amayi ake anali Ahinoamu wa ku Yezireeli; wachiwiri anali Danieli, amayi ake anali Abigayeli wa ku Karimeli;" 
1Chronicles3:2 	wachitatu anali Abisalomu, mwana wa Maaka mwana wa Talimai mfumu ya Gesuri; wachinayi anali Adoniya amayi ake anali Hagiti;" 
1Chronicles3:3 	wachisanu anali Sefatiya, amayi ake anali Abitali; wachisanu ndi chimodzi anali Itireamu, amayi ake anali Egila." 
1Chronicles3:4 Ana asanu ndi mmodzi awa a Davide anabadwira ku Hebroni kumene analamulirako zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri ndi miyezi isanu ndi umodzi. Davide analamuliranso mu Yerusalemu kwa zaka 33," 
1Chronicles3:5 ndipo ana amene anabadwira ku Yerusalemuko anali awa: Samua, Sobabu, Natani ndi Solomoni. Ana anayi awa anali a Batisuwa mwana wa Amieli." 
1Chronicles3:6 Anaberekanso Ibihari, Elisua, Elipeleti," 
1Chronicles3:7 Noga, Nefegi, Yafiya," 
1Chronicles3:8 Elisama, Eliada ndi Elifeleti, onse analipo asanu ndi anayi." 
1Chronicles3:9 	Onsewa anali ana a Davide, osawerengera ana a azikazi. Ndipo mlongo wawo anali Tamara." 
1Chronicles3:10 	Mwana wa Solomoni anali Rehabiamu, Rehabiamu anabereka Abiya, Abiya anabereka Asa, Asa anabereka Yehosafati," 
1Chronicles3:11 	Yehosafati anabereka Yehoramu, Yehoramu anabereka Ahaziya, Ahaziya anabereka Yowasi," 
1Chronicles3:12 	Yowasi anabereka Amaziya, Amaziya anabereka Azariya, Azariya anabereka Yotamu," 
1Chronicles3:13 	Yotamu anabereka Ahazi, Ahazi anabereka Hezekiya, Hezekiya anabereka Manase," 
1Chronicles3:14 	Manase anabereka Amoni, Amoni anabereka Yosiya." 
1Chronicles3:15 	Ana a Yosiya anali awa: Yohanani mwana wake woyamba, Yehoyakimu mwana wake wachiwiri, Zedekiya mwana wake wachitatu, Salumu mwana wake wachinayi." 
1Chronicles3:16 	Ana a Yehoyakimu: Yekoniya ndi Zedekiya mwana wake. 
1Chronicles3:17 	Zidzukulu za Yekoniya wa mʼndende zinali izi: mwana wake Silatieli," 
1Chronicles3:18 	Malikiramu, Pedaya, Senazara, Yekamiya, Hosama ndi Nedabiya." 
1Chronicles3:19 	Ana a Pedaya anali awa: Zerubabeli ndi Simei. Ana a Zerubabeli anali awa: Mesulamu ndi Hananiya. Mlongo wawo anali Selomiti. 
1Chronicles3:20 	Panalinso ana ena asanu awa: Hasubu, Oheli, Berekiya, Hasabiya ndi Yusabu-Hesedi." 
1Chronicles3:21 	Zidzukulu za Hananiya zinali izi: Pelatiya ndi Yesaiya, ndiponso ana a Refaya, ana a Arinani, ana a Obadiya ndi ana a Sekaniya." 
1Chronicles3:22 	Zidzukulu za Sekaniya zinali izi: Semaya ndi ana ake: Hatusi, Igala, Bariya, Neariya ndi Safati. Onse anali asanu ndi mmodzi." 
1Chronicles3:23 	Ana a Neariya anali awa: Eliyoenai, Hezekiya ndi Azirikamu. Onse anali atatu." 
1Chronicles3:24 	Ana a Eliyoenai: Hodaviya, Eliyasibu, Pelaya, Akubu, Yohanani, Delaya ndi Anani, onse anali asanu ndi awiri." 
1Chronicles4:1 	Ana a Yuda anali awa: Perezi, Hezironi, Karimi, Huri ndi Sobali." 
1Chronicles4:2 	Reaya mwana wa Sobala anabereka Yahati, ndipo Yahati anabereka Ahumai ndi Lahadi. Awa anali mabanja a Azorati." 
1Chronicles4:3 	Ana a Etamu anali awa: Yezireeli, Isima ndi Idibasi. Dzina la mlongo wawo linali Hazeleliponi." 
1Chronicles4:4 	Penueli anabereka Gedori, ndipo Ezeri anabereka Husa. Awa anali ana a Huri, mwana wachisamba wa Efurata ndi abambo a Betelehemu." 
1Chronicles4:5 	Asihuri abambo a Tekowa anali ndi akazi awiri, Hela ndi Naara." 
1Chronicles4:6 	Naara anamuberekera Ahuzamu, Heferi, Temani ndi Haahasitari. Awa ndiwo anali ana a Naara." 
1Chronicles4:7 	Ana a Hela: Zereti, Zohari, Etinani," 
1Chronicles4:8 ndi Kozi, amene anali abambo ake a Anubi ndi Hazo-Beba ndi mabanja a Ahariheli mwana wa Harumi." 
1Chronicles4:9 Yabesi anali munthu wolemekezeka kwambiri kuposa abale ake. Amayi ake anamutcha Yabesi kutanthauza kuti, “Chifukwa ndinamubala ndi ululu wambiri.”" 
1Chronicles4:10 Yabesi analira kwa Mulungu wa Israeli kuti, “Mundidalitse ndipo mukulitse dziko langa! Dzanja lanu likhale pa ine ndipo mundisunge kuti choyipa chisandigwere ndi kundisautsa.” Ndipo Mulungu anamupatsa chopempha chakecho." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kelubi, mʼbale wa Suha, anabereka Mehiri, amene anabereka Esitoni." 
1Chronicles4:12 	Esitoni anabereka Beti-Rafa, Paseya ndi Tehina amene anabereka Iri Nahasi. Amenewa ndiwo anthu a ku Reka." 
1Chronicles4:13 	Ana a Kenazi anali awa: Otanieli ndi Seraya. Ana a Otanieli anali awa: Hatati ndi Meonotai. 
1Chronicles4:14 	Meonotai anabereka Ofura. Seraya anabereka Yowabu, amene anabereka Ge-Harasimu. Anawatcha dzina ili chifukwa anthu ake anali amisiri." 
1Chronicles4:15 	Ana a Kalebe mwana wa Yefune anali awa: Iru, Ela ndi Naama. Mwana wa Ela anali Kenazi." 
1Chronicles4:16 	Ana a Yehaleleli anali awa: Zifi, Zifa, Tiriya ndi Asareli." 
1Chronicles4:17 	Ana a Ezara anali awa: Yeteri, Meredi, Eferi ndi Yaloni. Mmodzi mwa akazi a Meredi anabereka Miriamu, Samai ndi Isiba abambo ake a Esitemowa." 
1Chronicles4:18 	(Mkazi wake wa Chiyuda anabereka Yaredi abambo ake a Gedori, Heberi abambo ake a Soko ndi Yekutieli abambo a Zanowa). Awa anali ana a mwana wamkazi wa Farao, Bitia, amene Meredi anakwatira." 
1Chronicles4:19 	Ana a mkazi wa Hodiya, mlongo wa Nahamu anali awa: abambo ake a Keila wa ku Garimi ndi Esitemowa wa ku Maaka." 
1Chronicles4:20 	Ana a Simeoni anali awa: Amnoni, Rina, Beni-Hanani ndi Tiloni. Ana a Isi anali awa: Zoheti ndi Beni-Zoheti." 
1Chronicles4:21 	Ana a Sela mwana wa Yuda anali awa: Eri amene anabereka Leka, Laada amene anabereka Maresa ndi mabanja a anthu owomba nsalu zofewa ndi zosalala a ku Beti-Asibeya," 
1Chronicles4:22 Yokimu, anthu a ku Kozeba, ndiponso Yowasi ndi Sarafi, amene ankalamulira Mowabu ndi Yasibu-Lehemu. (Nkhani zimenezi ndi zakalekale)." 
1Chronicles4:23 	Iwo anali owumba mbiya amene ankakhala ku Netaimu ndi Gederi. Ankakhala kumeneko ndi kumatumikira mfumu. 
1Chronicles4:24 	Ana a Simeoni anali awa: Nemueli, Yamini, Yaribu, Zera ndi Sauli;" 
1Chronicles4:25 	Salumu anali mwana wa Sauli, Mibisamu anali mwana wa Salumu ndipo Misima anali mwana wa Mibisamu." 
1Chronicles4:26 	Zidzukulu za Misima zinali izi: Hamueli, Zakuri ndi Simei." 
1Chronicles4:27 Simei anali ndi ana aamuna 16 ndi ana aakazi 6, koma abale ake sanabereke ana ambiri; kotero banja lawo silinakule ngati anthu ena a ku Yuda." 
1Chronicles4:28 Iwo amakhala ku Beeriseba, Molada, Hazari-Suwali," 
1Chronicles4:29 Biliha, Ezemu, Toladi," 
1Chronicles4:30 Betueli, Horima, Zikilagi," 
1Chronicles4:31 Beti-Marikaboti, Hazari-Susimu, Beti-Biri ndi Saaraimu. Iyi inali mizinda yawo mpaka pa nthawi ya ulamuliro wa Davide." 
1Chronicles4:32 Midzi yowazungulira inali Etamu, Aini, Rimoni, Tokeni ndi Asani, midzi isanu" 
1Chronicles4:33 ndi midzi yonse yozungulira mizinda imeneyi mpaka ku Baala. Awa anali malo awo okhalapo. Ndipo anasunga mbiri ya makolo awo. 
1Chronicles4:34 Mesobabu, Yamuleki, Yosa mwana wa Amaziya," 
1Chronicles4:35 Yoweli, Yehu mwana wa Yosibiya, mwana wa Seraya, mwana wa Asieli," 
1Chronicles4:36 komanso Eliyoenai, Yaakoba, Yesohaya, Asaya, Adieli, Yesimieli, Benaya," 
1Chronicles4:37 ndiponso Ziza mwana wa Sifi, mwana wa Aloni, mwana wa Yedaya, mwana wa Simiri, mwana wa Semaya." 
1Chronicles4:38 Anthu amene atchulidwawa anali atsogoleri a mabanja awo. Mabanja awo anakula kwambiri 
1Chronicles4:39 ndipo anakafika ku malire a Gedori ku chigwa cha kummawa kufuna msipu wodyetsa ziweto zawo. 
1Chronicles4:40 Anapeza msipu wobiriwira ndi wabwino ndipo dziko linali lalikulu, la mtendere ndi bata. Kumeneko kunkakhala fuko la Hamu poyamba." 
1Chronicles4:41 Anthu amene mayina awowa alembedwa, anabwera pa nthawi ya Hezekiya mfumu ya Yuda. Iwo anathira nkhondo fuko la Hamu mʼmalo awo amene amakhala komanso Ameuni amene anali kumeneko ndipo anawononga onsewo kotero kuti mbiri yawo simvekanso mpaka lero lino. Kotero iwo anakhala mʼmalo awo chifukwa kunali msipu wa ziweto zawo." 
1Chronicles4:42 Ndipo anthu 500 a fuko la Simeoni, motsogozedwa ndi Pelatiya, Neariya, Refaya ndi Uzieli, ana a Isi, analanda dziko lamapiri la Seiri." 
1Chronicles4:43 Iwo anapha Aamaleki otsala amene anali atapulumuka ndipo akukhala kumeneko mpaka lero lino. 
1Chronicles5:1 Ana a Rubeni mwana woyamba wa Israeli (iye anali woyamba kubadwa, koma atagona ndi mkazi wamngʼono wa abambo ake, ulemu wake wokhala mwana woyamba unaperekedwa kwa ana a Yosefe. Kotero iye sanalembedwe pa mndandanda wa mayina ngati mwana woyamba kubadwa," 
1Chronicles5:2 ndipo ngakhalenso Yuda anali wamphamvu kwambiri pakati pa abale ake, ndi kuti wolamulira anachokera mwa iye, ulemu wa mwana woyamba kubadwa unaperekedwa kwa Yosefe)" 
1Chronicles5:3 ana a Rubeni mwana woyamba wa Israeli ndi awa: Hanoki, Palu, Hezironi, ndi Karimi." 
1Chronicles5:4 	Ana a Yoweli anali awa: Semaya, Gogi, Simei," 
1Chronicles5:5 	Mika, Reaya, Baala," 
1Chronicles5:6 	ndiponso Beeri, amene Tigilati-Pileseri mfumu ya Asuri anamugwira ukapolo. Mtsogoleri wa fuko la Rubeni anali Beeri." 
1Chronicles5:7 	Abale awo mwa mabanja awo, potsata mndandanda wa mʼbado wawo, ndi awa: Yeiyeli, mtsogoleri, Zekariya," 
1Chronicles5:8 ndiponso Bela mwana wa Azazi, mwana wa Sema, mwana wa Yoweli. Iwo ankakhala ku Aroeri mpaka ku Nebo ndi Baala-Meoni." 
1Chronicles5:9 	Iwo anakhala cha kummawa mpaka kukafika polowera mʼchipululu cha mbali ina ya Mtsinje wa Yufurate, chifukwa ziweto zawo zinaswana kwambiri mʼdziko la Giliyadi." 
1Chronicles5:10 	Pa nthawi ya Sauli anachita nkhondo ndi Ahagiri ndi kuwagonjetsa. Tsono iwo anakhala mʼmatenti a Ahagiri ku dera lonse la kummawa kwa Giliyadi. 
1Chronicles5:11 	Anthu a fuko la Gadi anakhala moyandikana ndi fuko la Rubeni ku Basani mpaka ku Saleka: 
1Chronicles5:12 	Mtsogoleri wawo ku Basani anali Yoweli, wachiwiri anali Safamu, kenaka Yanayi ndi Safati." 
1Chronicles5:13 	Abale awo mwa mabanja awo anali awa: Mikayeli, Mesulamu, Seba, Yorayi, Yakani, Ziya ndi Eberi, onse ali asanu ndi awiri." 
1Chronicles5:14 	Amenewa ndiwo anali ana a Abihaili, mwana wa Huri, mwana wa Yarowa, mwana wa Giliyadi, mwana wa Mikayeli, mwana wa Yesisayi, mwana wa Yahido, mwana wa Buzi." 
1Chronicles5:15 	Ahi mwana wa Abdieli, mwana wa Guni, anali mtsogoleri wa banja la makolo awo." 
1Chronicles5:16 Fuko la Gadi linakhala ku Giliyadi, ku Basani ndi midzi yozugulira, madera onse a msipu a ku Saroni mpaka kumene amalekezera." 
1Chronicles5:17 Mayina onsewa analembedwa potsata mndandanda wa mibado yawo pa nthawi ya ulamuliro wa Yotamu mfumu ya Yuda ndi Yeroboamu mfumu ya Israeli. 
1Chronicles5:18 Mafuko a Rubeni, Gadi ndi theka la Manase, anali ndi anthu 44, 760 okonzeka kulowa usilikali; anthu amatupi amphamvu, amene amatha kugwiritsa ntchito chishango ndi lupanga, amene amatha kugwiritsa ntchito uta, amene anaphunzitsidwa kumenya nkhondo." 
1Chronicles5:19 Iwo anachita nkhondo ndi Ahagiri, Yeturi, Nafisi ndi Nodabu." 
1Chronicles5:20 Iwowo anathandizidwa polimbana nawo ndipo Mulungu anapereka Ahagiri mʼmanja mwawo; popeza iwo anafuwulira kwa Mulungu pa nkhondopo. Iye anayankha mapemphero awo chifukwa anamudalira. 
1Chronicles5:21 Choncho iwo analanda ziweto za Ahagiri: ngamira 50,000, nkhosa ndi mbuzi 250,000 ndi abulu 2,000. Ndiponso anagwira akapolo 100,000," 
1Chronicles5:22 enanso ambiri anaphedwa, chifukwa nkhondoyo inali ya Mulungu. Ndipo iwo anakhala mʼdzikomo mpaka pa nthawi ya ukapolo." 
1Chronicles5:23 Theka la fuko la Manase linkakhala ku dziko la kummawa kuyambira ku Basani mpaka ku Baala-Herimoni, kumene ndi ku Seniri (Phiri la Herimoni) ndipo anthuwo anali ochuluka kwambiri." 
1Chronicles5:24 Atsogoleri a mabanja awo anali awa: Eferi, Isi, Elieli, Azirieli, Yeremiya, Hodaviya ndi Yahidieli. Iwo anali asilikali olimba mtima, anthu otchuka, ndiponso atsogoleri a mabanja awo." 
1Chronicles5:25 Koma iwo anali osakhulupirika kwa Mulungu wa makolo awo ndipo anadzipereka okha kwa milungu ya anthu okhala mʼdzikomo amene Mulungu anawawononga pamene iwowo ankafika. 
1Chronicles5:26 Kotero Mulungu wa Israeli anayika mkwiyo mwa Puli mfumu ya Asuri (ameneyu ndi Tigilati-Pileseri mfumu ya Asuri) amene anatenga fuko la Rubeni, Gadi ndi theka la fuko la Manase kupita nawo ku ukapolo. Iye anapita nawo ku Hala, Habori, Hara ndi ku mtsinje wa Gozani, kumene ali mpaka lero lino." 
1Chronicles6:1 	Ana a Levi anali awa: Geresoni, Kohati ndi Merari." 
1Chronicles6:2 	Ana a Kohati anali awa: Amramu, Izihari, Hebroni ndi Uzieli." 
1Chronicles6:3 	Ana a Amramu anali awa: Aaroni, Mose ndi Miriamu. Ana a Aaroni anali awa: Nadabu, Abihu, Eliezara ndi Itamara" 
1Chronicles6:4 	Eliezara anabereka Finehasi, Finehasi anabereka Abisuwa," 
1Chronicles6:5 	Abisuwa anabereka Buki, Buki anabereka Uzi." 
1Chronicles6:6 	Uzi anabereka Zerahiya, Zerahiya anabereka Merayoti," 
1Chronicles6:7 	Merayoti anabereka Amariya, Amariya anabereka Ahitubi." 
1Chronicles6:8 	Ahitubi anabereka Zadoki, Zadoki anabereka Ahimaazi." 
1Chronicles6:9 	Ahimaazi anabereka Azariya, Azariya anabereka Yohanani," 
1Chronicles6:10 	Yohanani anabereka Azariya (uyu ndi amene anatumikira monga wansembe mʼNyumba ya Mulungu imene Solomoni anamanga mu Yerusalemu)," 
1Chronicles6:11 	Azariya anabereka Amariya, Amariya anabereka Ahitubi," 
1Chronicles6:12 	Ahitubi anabereka Zadoki, Zadoki anabereka Salumu," 
1Chronicles6:13 	Salumu anabereka Hilikiya, Hilikiya anabereka Azariya," 
1Chronicles6:14 	Azariya anabereka Seraya, ndipo Seraya anabereka Yehozadaki." 
1Chronicles6:15 	Yehozadaki anagwidwa ukapolo pamene Yehova analola Nebukadinezara kuti agwire ukapolo Yuda ndi Yerusalemu. 
1Chronicles6:16 	Ana a Levi anali awa: Geresomu, Kohati ndi Merari." 
1Chronicles6:17 	Mayina a ana a Geresomu ndi awa: Libini ndi Simei. 
1Chronicles6:18 	Ana a Kohati anali awa: Amramu, Izihari, Hebroni ndi Uzieli." 
1Chronicles6:19 	Ana a Merari anali awa: Mahili ndi Musi. Mayina a mabanja a fuko la Levi olembedwa potsata makolo awo ndi awa: 
1Chronicles6:20 	Ana a Geresomu ndi awa: Libini, Yehati, Zima," 
1Chronicles6:21 	Yowa, Ido, Zera ndi Yeaterai." 
1Chronicles6:22 	Zidzukulu za Kohati ndi izi: Aminadabu, Kora, Asiri," 
1Chronicles6:23 	Elikana, Ebiyasafu, Asiri," 
1Chronicles6:24 	Tahati, Urieli, Uziya ndi Sauli." 
1Chronicles6:25 	Zidzukulu za Elikana ndi izi: Amasai, Ahimoti," 
1Chronicles6:26 	Elikana, Zofai, Nahati," 
1Chronicles6:27 	Eliabu, Yerohamu, Elikana ndi Samueli." 
1Chronicles6:28 	Ana a Samueli ndi awa: Mwana wake woyamba anali Yoweli, wachiwiri anali Abiya." 
1Chronicles6:29 	Zidzukulu za Merari ndi izi: Mahili, Libini, Simei, Uza," 
1Chronicles6:30 	Simea, Hagiya ndi Asaya." 
1Chronicles6:31 Awa ndi anthu amene Davide anawayika kuti aziyangʼanira mayimbidwe mʼNyumba ya Yehova, Bokosi la Chipangano litabwera kudzakhala mʼmenemo." 
1Chronicles6:32 Iwo ankatumikira akuyimba nyimbo pa khomo la malo opatulika, tenti ya msonkhano, mpaka Solomoni atamanga Nyumba ya Yehova mu Yerusalemu. Iwo ankagwira ntchito zawo potsata malamulo amene anawapatsa." 
1Chronicles6:33 Mayina a anthuwo, pamodzi ndi ana awo, anali awa: Ochokera ku banja la Kohati: Hemani, katswiri woyimba, anali mwana wa Yoweli, mwana wa Samueli," 
1Chronicles6:34 	mwana wa Elikana, mwana wa Yerohamu, mwana wa Elieli, mwana wa Towa," 
1Chronicles6:35 	mwana wa Zufi, mwana wa Elikana, mwana wa Mahati, mwana wa Amasai," 
1Chronicles6:36 	mwana wa Elikana, mwana wa Yoweli, mwana wa Azariya, mwana wa Zefaniya," 
1Chronicles6:37 	mwana wa Tahati, mwana wa Asiri, mwana wa Ebiyasafu, mwana wa Kora," 
1Chronicles6:38 	mwana wa Izihari, mwana wa Kohati, mwana wa Levi, mwana wa Israeli;" 
1Chronicles6:39 	ndi Asafu mʼbale wake, amene ankatumikira ku dzanja lake lamanja: Asafu anali mwana wa Berekiya, mwana wa Simea," 
1Chronicles6:40 	mwana wa Mikayeli, mwana wa Baaseya, mwana wa Malikiya," 
1Chronicles6:41 	mwana wa Etini, mwana wa Zera, mwana wa Adaya," 
1Chronicles6:42 	mwana wa Etani, mwana wa Zima, mwana Simei," 
1Chronicles6:43 	mwana wa Yahati, mwana wa Geresomu, mwana wa Levi;" 
1Chronicles6:44 	ndipo abale awo ena anali a banja la Merari amene amatumikira ku dzanja lake lamanzere: Etani anali mwana wa Kisi, mwana wa Abidi, mwana wa Maluki," 
1Chronicles6:45 	mwana wa Hasabiya, mwana wa Amaziya, mwana wa Hilikiya," 
1Chronicles6:46 	mwana wa Amizi, mwana wa Bani, mwana wa Semeri," 
1Chronicles6:47 	mwana wa Mahili, mwana wa Musi, mwana wa Merari, mwana wa Levi." 
1Chronicles6:48 Abale awo Alevi anapatsidwa ntchito zina zonse ku malo opatulika ku nyumba ya Mulungu. 
1Chronicles6:49 Koma Aaroni ndi zidzukulu zake anali amene amapereka nsembe pa guwa lansembe zopsereza ndi pa guwa lansembe zofukiza pamodzi ndi zonse zimene zimachitika ku malo opatulika kwambiri, kuchita mwambo wopepesera Israeli, potsata zonse zimene Mose mtumiki wa Mulungu anawalamulira." 
1Chronicles6:50 	Ana a Aaroni ndi zidzukulu zake anali awa: Eliezara, Finehasi, Abisuwa," 
1Chronicles6:51 	Buki, Uzi, Zerahiya," 
1Chronicles6:52 	Merayoti, Amariya, Ahitubi," 
1Chronicles6:53 	Zadoki ndi Ahimaazi. 
1Chronicles6:54 Malo amene iwo anapatsidwa kuti likhale dziko lawo ndi awa: (Malowa anapatsidwa kwa zidzukulu za Aaroni zimene zinali za banja la Kohati, chifukwa malo oyamba kugawidwa anali awo)." 
1Chronicles6:55 Iwo anapatsidwa Hebroni mʼdziko la Yuda ndi madera odyetsera ziweto ozungulira malowa. 
1Chronicles6:56 Koma minda ndi midzi yozungulira mzindawo zinapatsidwa kwa Kalebe mwana wa Yefune. 
1Chronicles6:57 Kotero zidzukulu za Aaroni zinapatsidwa Hebroni (mzinda wopulumukirako), ndi Libina, Yatiri, Esitemowa," 
1Chronicles6:58 Hileni, Debri," 
1Chronicles6:59 Asani, Yuta ndi Beti-Semesi pamodzi ndi madera odyetsera ziweto ozungulira malowa." 
1Chronicles6:60 Ndipo ku fuko la Benjamini anapatsidwa Gibiyoni, Geba, Alemeti ndi Anatoti, pamodzi ndi madera odyetsera ziweto ozungulira malowa. Mizinda imene anapatsidwa ku banja la Kohati onse pamodzi inalipo 13." 
1Chronicles6:61 Zidzukulu zotsala za Kohati anazigawira midzi khumi kuchokera ku mabanja a fuko la theka la Manase. 
1Chronicles6:62 Zidzukulu za Geresomu banja ndi banja zinapatsidwa mizinda 13 kuchokera ku mafuko a Isakara, Aseri ndi Nafutali, ndi gawo lina la fuko la Manase limene lili ku Basani." 
1Chronicles6:63 Zidzukulu za Merari banja ndi banja zinapatsidwa mizinda khumi ndi iwiri kuchokera ku mafuko a Rubeni, Gadi ndi Zebuloni." 
1Chronicles6:64 Kotero Aisraeli anapatsa Alevi mizindayi ndi madera a msipu ozungulira malowa. 
1Chronicles6:65 Kuchokera ku mafuko a Yuda, Simeoni ndi Benjamini anawapatsa mizinda imene inawatchula kale mayina." 
1Chronicles6:66 Mabanja ena a Kohati anapatsidwanso malo kuchokera ku fuko la Efereimu. 
1Chronicles6:67 Kuchokera ku dziko lamapiri la Efereimu anapatsidwa Sekemu (mzinda wopulumukirako) ndi Gezeri," 
1Chronicles6:68 Yokineamu, Beti-Horoni," 
1Chronicles6:69 Ayaloni ndi Gati-Rimoni, pamodzi ndi madera odyetsera ziweto ozungulira." 
1Chronicles6:70 Ndipo kuchokera ku theka la fuko la Manase, Aisraeli anapereka Aneri ndi Bileamu pamodzi ndi madera odyetsera ziweto kwa mabanja ena onse a Kohati." 
1Chronicles6:71 	Ageresomu analandira malo awa: Kuchokera ku theka la fuko la Manase, analandira Golani ku Basani ndiponso Asiteroti, ndi malo awo odyetsera ziweto;" 
1Chronicles6:72 	Kuchokera ku fuko la Isakara analandira Kedesi, Daberati," 
1Chronicles6:73 	Ramoti ndi Anemu, pamodzi ndi malo ake odyetsera ziweto;" 
1Chronicles6:74 	kuchokera ku fuko la Aseri analandira Masala, Abidoni," 
1Chronicles6:75 	Hukoki ndi Rehobu, pamodzi ndi malo ake odyetsera ziweto;" 
1Chronicles6:76 	ndipo kuchokera ku fuko la Nafutali analandira Kedesi ku Galileya, Hamoni ndi Kiriyataimu, pamodzi ndi malo ake odyetsera ziweto." 
1Chronicles6:77 	Amerari (Alevi ena onse) analandira madera awa: kuchokera ku fuko la Zebuloni, iwo analandira Yokineamu, Karita, Rimono ndi Tabori, pamodzi ndi malo ake odyetsera ziweto;" 
1Chronicles6:78 	Kuchokera ku fuko la Rubeni kutsidya kwa Yorodani, kummawa kwa Yeriko, analandira Bezeri ku chipululu, Yaza," 
1Chronicles6:79 	Kedemoti ndi Mefaati, pamodzi ndi malo ake odyetsera ziweto;" 
1Chronicles6:80 	ndipo kuchokera ku fuko la Gadi analandira Ramoti ku Giliyadi, Mahanaimu," 
1Chronicles6:81 Hesiboni ndi Yazeri, pamodzi ndi malo ake odyetsera ziweto." 
1Chronicles7:1 	Ana a Isakara anali awa: Tola, Puwa, Yasubu ndi Simironi ndipo onse analipo anayi." 
1Chronicles7:2 	Ana a Tola ndi awa: Uzi, Refaya, Yerieli, Yahimai, Ibisamu ndi Samueli. Awa anali atsogoleri a mabanja awo. Pa nthawi ya ulamuliro wa Davide zidzukulu za Tola zomwe zinali anthu odziwa kumenya nkhondo zinalipo 22,600." 
1Chronicles7:3 	Mwana wa Uzi anali Izirahiya. Ana a Izirahiya anali: Mikayeli, Obadiya, Yoweli ndi Isiya. Onse asanu anali atsogoleri a mabanja." 
1Chronicles7:4 	Monga mwa chiwerengero cha mabanja awo, panali anthu 36,000 odziwa kumenya nkhondo, pakuti iwo anali ndi akazi ndi ana ambiri." 
1Chronicles7:5 	Abale awo onse a mʼbanja la Isakara amene anali odziwa kumenya nkhondo analipo 87,000, olembedwa potsata mibado yawo." 
1Chronicles7:6 	Ana atatu a Benjamini anali awa: Bela, Bekeri ndi Yediaeli." 
1Chronicles7:7 	Ana a Bela anali awa: Eziboni, Uzi, Uzieli, Yerimoti ndi Iri. Iwowa anali atsogoleri a mabanja awo ndipo onse pamodzi analipo asanu. Pa mndandanda wa mʼbado wawo panali anthu 22,034 odziwa kumenya nkhondo." 
1Chronicles7:8 	Ana a Bekeri anali awa: Zemira, Yowasi, Eliezara, Eliyoenai, Omiri, Yeremoti, Abiya, Anatoti ndi Alemeti. Onsewa anali ana a Bekeri." 
1Chronicles7:9 	Pa mndandanda wa mʼbado wawo panali atsogoleri a mabanja ndi anthu 20,200 odziwa kumenya nkhondo." 
1Chronicles7:10 	Mwana wa Yediaeli anali Bilihani. Ana a Bilihani anali awa: Yeusi, Benjamini, Ehudi, Kenaana, Zetani, Tarisisi ndi Ahisahara." 
1Chronicles7:11 	Ana onsewa a Yediaeli anali atsogoleri a mabanja. Analipo anthu 17,200 amene anali okonzeka kupita ku nkhondo." 
1Chronicles7:12 	Asupi ndi Ahupi anali zidzukulu za Iri, ndipo Ahusimu anali zidzukulu za Aheri." 
1Chronicles7:13 	Ana a Nafutali anali awa: Yahazieli, Guni, Yezeri ndi Salumu, zidzukulu za Biliha." 
1Chronicles7:14 	Ana a Manase anali awa: Asirieli ndi mwana amene anabereka kwa mzikazi wake wa ku Aramu. Mzikazi yemweyo anaberekanso Makiri abambo ake a Giliyadi. 
1Chronicles7:15 	Makiri anatenga mkazi wa banja la Ahupi ndi Asupi. Mlongo wake anali Maaka. Mwana wake wina anali Zelofehadi, amene anabereka ana aakazi okhaokha." 
1Chronicles7:16 	Maaka mkazi wa Makiri anabereka mwana wamwamuna ndipo anamutcha Perezi. Mʼbale wake anamutcha Seresi, ndipo ana ake anali Ulamu ndi Rakemu." 
1Chronicles7:17 	Mwana wa Ulamu anali Bedani. Awa anali ana a Giliyadi mwana wa Makiri, mwana wa Manase." 
1Chronicles7:18 	Mlongo wake Hamoleketi anabereka Isihodi, Abiezeri ndi Mahila." 
1Chronicles7:19 	Ana a Semida anali: Ahiyani, Sekemu, Likihi ndi Aniyamu." 
1Chronicles7:20 	Ana a Efereimu anali awa: Sutela, Beredi, Tahati, Eliada, Tahati," 
1Chronicles7:21 	Zabadi, Sutela. Ezeri ndi Eladi anaphedwa ndi anthu a ku Gati, pamene anabwera kudzalanda zoweta zawo." 
1Chronicles7:22 Efereimu, abambo awo, anawalira masiku ambiri, ndipo abale ake anabwera kudzamutonthoza." 
1Chronicles7:23 Kenaka anagona ndi mkazi wake, ndipo anakhala woyembekezera nabala mwana wamwamuna. Anamutcha dzina lake Beriya, chifukwa tsoka linagwera banja lake." 
1Chronicles7:24 	Mwana wake wamkazi anali Seera, amene anamanga mzinda wa Beti-Horoni Wakumunsi, Wakumtunda kudzanso Uzeni-Seera." 
1Chronicles7:25 	Mwana wina wa Efereimu anali Refa amene zidzukulu zake zinali Resefu, Tela, Tahani," 
1Chronicles7:26 	Ladani, Amihudi, Elisama," 
1Chronicles7:27 	Nuni ndi Yoswa. 
1Chronicles7:28 Malo amene ankakhala anali Beteli ndi midzi yozungulira, cha kummawa kunali Naarani, Gezeri ndi midzi yake ya kumadzulo ndi Sekemu ndi midzi yake mpaka ku Aya ndi midzi yake." 
1Chronicles7:29 Mʼmbali mwa malire a Manase munali Beti-Seani, Taanaki, Megido ndi Dori, pamodzi ndi midzi yake. Zidzukulu za Yosefe mwana wa Israeli zimakhala mʼmizinda imeneyi." 
1Chronicles7:30 	Ana a Aseri anali awa: Imuna, Isiva, Isivi ndi Beriya. Mlongo wawo anali Sera." 
1Chronicles7:31 	Ana a Beriya anali awa: Heberi ndi Malikieli amene anabereka Birizaiti. 
1Chronicles7:32 	Heberi anabereka Yafuleti, Someri, Hotamu ndi Suwa, mlongo wawo." 
1Chronicles7:33 	Ana a Yafuleti anali awa: Pasaki, Bimuhali ndi Asivati. Awa anali ana a Yafuleti." 
1Chronicles7:34 	Ana a Someri anali awa: Ahi, Rohiga, Yehuba ndi Aramu." 
1Chronicles7:35 	Ana a mʼbale wake Helemu anali awa: Zofa, Imuna, Selesi ndi Amali." 
1Chronicles7:36 	Ana a Zofa anali awa: Suwa, Harineferi, Suwali, Beri, Imula," 
1Chronicles7:37 	Bezeri, Hodi, Sama, Silisa, Itirani ndi Bera." 
1Chronicles7:38 	Ana a Yeteri anali awa: Yefune, Pisipa ndi Ara." 
1Chronicles7:39 	Ana a Ula anali awa: Ara, Hanieli ndi Riziya." 
1Chronicles7:40 Onsewa anali zidzukulu za Aseri, atsogoleri a mabanja, anthu omveka, ankhondo olimba mtima, ndi akuluakulu pakati pa atsogoleri anzawo. Chiwerengero cha anthu odziwa kumenya nkhondo chomwe chinalembedwa chinali 26,000." 
1Chronicles8:1 	Benjamini anabereka Bela mwana wake woyamba, wachiwiri Asibeli, wachitatu Ahara," 
1Chronicles8:2 	wachinayi Noha ndipo wachisanu Rafa. 
1Chronicles8:3 	Ana a Bela anali awa: Adari, Gera, Abihudi," 
1Chronicles8:4 Abisuwa, Naamani, Ahowa," 
1Chronicles8:5 	Gera, Sefufani ndi Hiramu." 
1Chronicles8:6 	Zidzukulu za Ehudi, zimene zinali atsogoleri a mabanja a amene amakhala ku Geba ndipo zinasamutsidwa kupita ku Manahati zinali izi:" 
1Chronicles8:7 	Naamani, Ahiya ndi Gera, amene anawasamutsa ndipo anabereka Uza ndi Ahihudi." 
1Chronicles8:8 Saharaimu anabereka ana ku Mowabu atalekana ndi akazi ake, Husimu ndi Baara." 
1Chronicles8:9 Mwa mkazi wake Hodesi anabereka Yobabu, Zibiya, Mesa, Malikamu," 
1Chronicles8:10 Yeusi, Sakiya ndi Mirima. Awa ndiye ana ake, atsogoleri a mabanja awo." 
1Chronicles8:11 	Mwa mkazi wake Husimu anabereka Abitubi ndi Elipaala. 
1Chronicles8:12 	Ana a Elipaala anali awa: Eberi, Misamu, Semedi (amene anamanga mizinda ya Ono ndi Lodi ndi midzi yake yozungulira)" 
1Chronicles8:13 	ndiponso Beriya ndi Sema, amene anali atsogoleri a mabanja a amene ankakhala ku Ayaloni ndipo anathamangitsa nzika za ku Gati." 
1Chronicles8:14 Ahiyo, Sasaki, Yeremoti," 
1Chronicles8:15 Zebadiya, Aradi, Ederi," 
1Chronicles8:16 	Mikayeli, Isipa ndi Yoha anali ana a Beriya." 
1Chronicles8:17 Zebadiya, Mesulamu, Hiziki, Heberi," 
1Chronicles8:18 	Isimerai, Iziliya ndi Yobabu anali ana a Elipaala." 
1Chronicles8:19 Yakimu, Zikiri, Zabidi," 
1Chronicles8:20 Elienai, Ziletai, Elieli," 
1Chronicles8:21 	Adaya, Beraya ndi Simirati anali ana a Simei." 
1Chronicles8:22 Isipani, Eberi, Elieli," 
1Chronicles8:23 Abidoni, Zikiri, Hanani," 
1Chronicles8:24 Hananiya, Elamu, Anitotiya," 
1Chronicles8:25 	Ifideya ndi Penueli anali ana a Sasaki. 
1Chronicles8:26 Samuserai, Sehariya, Ataliya," 
1Chronicles8:27 Yaaresiya, Eliya ndi Zikiri anali ana a Yerohamu." 
1Chronicles8:28 Onsewa anali atsogoleri a mabanja, anthu otchuka potsata mibado yawo, ndipo ankakhala mu Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles8:29 	Yeiyeli amene amabereka Gibiyoni ankakhala ku Gibiyoni. Dzina la mkazi wake linali Maaka," 
1Chronicles8:30 ndipo mwana wake woyamba anali Abidoni, motsatana ndi Zuri, Kisi, Baala, Neri, Nadabu," 
1Chronicles8:31 Gedori, Ahiyo, Zekeri" 
1Chronicles8:32 	ndi Mikiloti, amene anabereka Simea. Iwowa ankakhalanso ku Yerusalemu ndi abale awo." 
1Chronicles8:33 	Neri anabereka Kisi. Kisi anabereka Sauli, ndipo Sauli anabereka Yonatani, Maliki-Suwa, Abinadabu ndi Esibaala." 
1Chronicles8:34 	Mwana wa Yonatani anali Meri-Baala, amene anabereka Mika." 
1Chronicles8:35 	Ana a Mika anali awa: Pitoni, Meleki, Tareya ndi Ahazi." 
1Chronicles8:36 Ahazi anabereka Yehoyada, Yehoyada anabereka Alemeti, Azimaveti ndi Zimuri, ndipo Zimuri anabereka Moza." 
1Chronicles8:37 	Moza anabereka Bineya. Ana ake anali Rafa, Eleasa ndi Azeli." 
1Chronicles8:38 	Azeli anali ndi ana asanu ndi mmodzi, ndipo mayina awo anali awa: Azirikamu, Bokeru, Ismaeli, Seariya, Obadiya ndi Hanani. Onsewa anali ana a Azeli." 
1Chronicles8:39 	Ana a Eseki mʼbale wake anali awa: Mwana wake woyamba Ulamu, wachiwiri Yeusi ndipo wachitatu Elifeleti." 
1Chronicles8:40 	Ana a Ulamu anali asilikali olimba mtima amene amadziwa kugwiritsa ntchito uta. Iwo anali ndi ana ndi adzukulu ambiri ndipo onse analipo 150. Onsewa anali adzukulu a Benjamini. 
1Chronicles9:1 Aisraeli onse analembedwa potsata mibado yawo mʼbuku la mafumu a Aisraeli. Anthu a ku Yuda anatengedwa kunka ku ukapolo ku Babuloni chifukwa cha kusakhulupirika kwawo. 
1Chronicles9:2 Tsono anthu oyamba kukhala mʼmadera awo anali Aisraeli wamba, ansembe, Alevi ndi otumikira ku Nyumba ya Yehova." 
1Chronicles9:3 Anthu a ku Yuda, Benjamini ndi Efereimu ndiponso Manase amene anakhala mu Yerusalemu anali awa:" 
1Chronicles9:4 	Utai mwana wa Amihudi, mwana wa Omuri, mwana wa Imuri, mwana wa Bani, chidzukulu cha Perezi mwana wa Yuda." 
1Chronicles9:5 	A banja la Siloni: Asaya mwana wake woyamba pamodzi ndi ana ake. 
1Chronicles9:6 	A banja la Zera: Yeueli. Anthu ochokera ku Yuda analipo 690. 
1Chronicles9:7 	A fuko la Benjamini: Salu mwana wa Mesulamu, mwana wa Hodaviya, mwana wa Hasenuya;" 
1Chronicles9:8 	Ibineya mwana wa Yerohamu; Ela mwana wa Uzi, mwana wa Mikiri; ndi Mesulamu mwana wa Sefatiya, mwana wa Reueli mwana wa Ibiniya." 
1Chronicles9:9 	Anthu ochokera ku Benjamini monga analembedwera mwa mibado yawo, analipo 956. Anthu onsewa anali atsogoleri a mabanja awo." 
1Chronicles9:10 	Ansembe: Yedaya, Yehoyaribu; Yakini;" 
1Chronicles9:11 	Azariya mwana wa Hilikiya, mwana wa Mesulamu, mwana wa Zadoki mwana wa Merayoti, mwana wa Ahitubi, wamkulu woyangʼanira Nyumba ya Mulungu;" 
1Chronicles9:12 	Adaya mwana wa Yerohamu, mwana wa Pasi-Huri, mwana wa Malikiya; ndi Maasai mwana wa Adieli, mwana wa Yahizera, mwana wa Mesulamu, mwana wa Mesilemoti, mwana wa Imeri." 
1Chronicles9:13 	Ansembe amene anali atsogoleri a mabanja awo analipo 1,760. Anali anthu amphamvu ndi odziwa kutumikira mʼnyumba ya Mulungu." 
1Chronicles9:14 	Alevi: Semaya mwana wa Hasubu, mwana wa Azirikamu, mwana wa Hasabiya, wa mʼbanja la Merari;" 
1Chronicles9:15 Bakibakara, Heresi, Galali ndi Mataniya mwana wa Mika, mwana wa Zikiri, mwana wa Asafu;" 
1Chronicles9:16 	Obadiya mwana wa Semaya mwana wa Galali, mwana wa Yedutuni ndi Berekiya mwana wa Asa, mwana wa Elikana, amene ankakhala ku midzi ya Anetofati." 
1Chronicles9:17 	Alonda a pa makomo: Salumu, Akubu, Talimoni, Ahimani ndi abale awo. Mtsogoleri wawo anali Salumu." 
1Chronicles9:18 Amenewa amakhala pa chipata cha mfumu kummawa mpaka lero lino. Alonda a gulu la Alevi anali awa: 
1Chronicles9:19 Salumu mwana wa Kore, mwana wa Ebiyasafu, mwana wa Kora, pamodzi ndi abale ake a ku banja la makolo ake, Akora aja ankanyangʼanira khomo la Tenti monga ankachitira abambo awo polondera khomo la malo okhalapo Yehova." 
1Chronicles9:20 Masiku oyamba Finehasi mwana wa Eliezara anali woyangʼanira alonda apakhomo ndipo Yehova anali naye. 
1Chronicles9:21 Zekariya mwana wa Meselemiya anali mlonda woyangʼanira pa chipata cha tenti ya msonkhano. 
1Chronicles9:22 Onse amene anasankhidwa kukhala alonda pa khonde analipo 212. Iwo analembedwa mwa mibado yawo ku midzi yawo. Davide ndi mneneri Samueli ndiwo anawayika mʼmalo awo antchito chifukwa cha kukhulupirika kwawo. 
1Chronicles9:23 Iwo ndi zidzukulu zawo anali oyangʼanira zipata za nyumba ya Yehova imene imatchedwa Tenti. 
1Chronicles9:24 Alonda apakhomowa anali mbali zonse zinayi: kummawa, kumadzulo, kumpoto ndi kummwera." 
1Chronicles9:25 Abale awo a ku midzi yawo amabwera nthawi ndi nthawi kudzagwira ntchito yawo kwa masiku asanu ndi awiri. 
1Chronicles9:26 Koma atsogoleri akuluakulu anayi a alonda, amene anali Alevi, anapatsidwa udindo woyangʼanira zipinda ndi chuma cha nyumba ya Mulungu." 
1Chronicles9:27 Iwo amakhala usiku wonse atayima mozungulira Nyumba ya Mulungu, chifukwa anayenera kuyilondera. Ndipo anali ndi kiyi wotsekulira mmawa uliwonse." 
1Chronicles9:28 Ena amayangʼanira zipangizo zimene amagwiritsa ntchito pa ntchito mʼNyumba ya Mulungu. Iwo amaziwerenga zikamalowetsedwa ndi potulutsidwa. 
1Chronicles9:29 Ena anapatsidwa udindo wosamalira zipangizo ndi zinthu zina zonse za ku malo opatulika, pamodzi ndi ufa, vinyo, mafuta, lubani ndi zonunkhira." 
1Chronicles9:30 Koma ansembe ena amasakaniza zonunkhirazo. 
1Chronicles9:31 Mlevi wotchedwa Matitiya mwana woyamba wa Salumu wa mʼbanja la Kora, anapatsidwa udindo woyangʼanira zophikidwa mʼziwaya." 
1Chronicles9:32 Abale ake ena a mʼbanja la Akohati amaphika buledi wa pa Sabata lililonse amene amayikidwa pa tebulo. 
1Chronicles9:33 Atsogoleri a mabanja a Alevi, amene anali ndi luso loyimba, amakhala mʼzipinda za Nyumba ya Mulungu ndipo samagwira ntchito zina chifukwa ankatumikira usana ndi usiku." 
1Chronicles9:34 Onsewa anali atsogoleri a mabanja a Alevi, akuluakulu monga analembedwera pa mibado yawo, ndipo ankakhala mu Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles9:35 	Yeiyeli abambo a Gibiyoni ankakhala ku Gibiyoni. Dzina la akazi awo linali Maaka," 
1Chronicles9:36 ndipo mwana wawo woyamba kubadwa anali Abidoni, motsatana ndi Zuri, Kisi, Baala, Neri, Nadabu," 
1Chronicles9:37 Gedori, Ahiyo, Zekariya ndi Mikiloti." 
1Chronicles9:38 	Mikiloti anabereka Simeamu. Iwonso ankakhala ndi abale awo ku Yerusalemu. 
1Chronicles9:39 	Neri anabereka Kisi, Kisi anabereka Sauli, ndipo Sauli anabereka Yonatani, Maliki-Suwa, Abinadabu ndi Esibaala." 
1Chronicles9:40 	Mwana wa Yonatani anali Meri-Baala, amene anabereka Mika." 
1Chronicles9:41 	Ana a Mika anali: Pitoni, Meleki, Tahireya ndi Ahazi." 
1Chronicles9:42 Ahazi anabereka Yara, Yara anabereka Alemeti, Azimaveti ndi Zimuri, ndipo Zimiri anabereka Moza." 
1Chronicles9:43 	Moza anabereka Bineya. Ana ake anali Refaya, Eleasa ndi Azeli." 
1Chronicles9:44 	Azeli anali ndi ana asanu ndi mmodzi ndipo mayina awo anali awa: Azirikamu, Bokeru, Ismaeli, Seariya, Obadiya ndi Hanani. Awa anali ana a Azeli." 
1Chronicles10:1 Tsono Afilisti anachitanso nkhondo ndi Aisraeli ndipo Aisraeli anathawa Afilistiwo, kotero kuti ambiri anaphedwa pa phiri la Gilibowa." 
1Chronicles10:2 Afilisti anapanikiza kwambiri Sauli ndi ana ake, ndipo anapha Yonatani, Abinadabu ndi Maliki-Suwa." 
1Chronicles10:3 Nkhondo inakula kwambiri mozungulira Sauli ndipo pamene anthu amauta anamupeza, anamuvulaza." 
1Chronicles10:4 Tsono Sauli anawuza mnyamata wake wonyamula zida zake kuti, “Solola lupanga lako undiphe, kuopa kuti anthu osachita mdulidwewa angabwere ndi kudzandizunza ine.” Koma mnyamata wonyamula zida uja anachita mantha kwambiri ndipo sanathe kutero. Choncho Sauli anatenga lupanga lake lomwe nagwerapo." 
1Chronicles10:5 Mnyamata wonyamula zida zake uja ataona kuti Sauli wafa, nayenso anadzigwetsera pa lupanga lake nafa." 
1Chronicles10:6 Motero Sauli ndi ana ake atatu anafa, pamodzi ndi banja lake lonse anafera limodzi." 
1Chronicles10:7 Pamene Aisraeli onse amene anali mʼchigwa anaona kuti gulu lankhondo lathawa komanso kuti Sauli ndi ana ake aphedwa, nawonso anathawa kusiya mizinda yawo. Ndipo Afilisti anabwera kudzakhalamo." 
1Chronicles10:8 Mmawa mwake, Afilisti atabwera kudzatenga zinthu za anthu ophedwa, anapeza Sauli ndi ana ake atafa pa phiri la Gilibowa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Iwo anamuvula zovala zake, natenga mutu wake ndi zida zake zankhondo. Ndipo anatumiza amithenga mʼdziko lonse la Afilisti kukafalitsa nkhani yabwinoyi kwa mafano awo ndi kwa anthu awo." 
1Chronicles10:10 Iwo anayika zida zake zankhondo mʼnyumba zopembedzera milungu yawo ndipo anapachika mutu wake mʼnyumba ya Dagoni. 
1Chronicles10:11 Pamene anthu onse okhala ku Yabesi Giliyadi anamva zimene Afilisti anachitira Sauli," 
1Chronicles10:12 anthu awo onse olimba mtima anapita kukatenga mitembo ya Sauli ndi ana ake ndipo anabwera nayo ku Yabesi. Anakwirira mafupa awo pansi pa mtengo wabwemba ku Yabesi, ndipo anasala kudya masiku asanu ndi awiri." 
1Chronicles10:13 Sauli anafa chifukwa anali wosakhulupirika pamaso pa Yehova. Iye sanasunge mawu a Yehova, pakuti anakafunsira nzeru kwa woyankhula ndi mizimu ya anthu akufa," 
1Chronicles10:14 sanafunsire nzeruzo kwa Yehova. Choncho Yehova anamupha ndi kupereka ufumu kwa Davide mwana wa Yese. 
1Chronicles11:1 Aisraeli onse anasonkhana pamaso pa Davide ku Hebroni ndipo anati, “Ife ndife abale anu." 
1Chronicles11:2 Kale lija, ngakhale pamene Sauli anali mfumu, inu ndinu amene munkatsogolera Aisraeli pa nkhondo zawo. Ndipo Yehova Mulungu wanu anakuwuzani kuti, ‘Iwe udzaweta anthu anga Aisraeli, ndipo udzakhala mfumu yawo.’ ”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Akuluakulu onse a Israeli atafika kwa Mfumu Davide ku Hebroni, iye anachita nawo pangano pamaso pa Yehova, ndipo anamudzoza Davide kukhala mfumu ya Israeli, monga momwe Yehova analonjezera kudzera mwa Samueli." 
1Chronicles11:4 Davide ndi Aisraeli onse anapita ku Yerusalemu (ku Yebusi). Ayebusi amene ankakhala kumeneko 
1Chronicles11:5 anamuwuza Davide kuti, “Simulowa muno.” Komabe Davide analanda linga la Ziyoni, limene ndi mzinda wa Davide." 
1Chronicles11:6 Davide anali atanena kuti “Aliyense amene adzatsogolere kukathira nkhondo Ayebusi adzakhala mkulu wa asilikali.” Yowabu mwana wa Zeruya ndiye anayamba kupita, motero anakhala mkulu wa asilikali." 
1Chronicles11:7 Tsono Davide anakhazikika mu lingamo, ndipo mzindawu anawutcha Mzinda wa Davide." 
1Chronicles11:8 Iye anamanga malo onse ozungulira, kuyambira ku matsitso ozungulira khoma. Ndipo Yowabu anakonzanso mbali ina ya mzindawu." 
1Chronicles11:9 Ndipo mphamvu za Davide zinkakulirakulira chifukwa anali ndi Yehova Wamphamvuzonse. 
1Chronicles11:10 Awa ndiye anali atsogoleri amphamvu a Davide. Iwo pamodzi ndi Aisraeli onse, anathandiza kulimbikitsa ufumu wake kuti ukwanire madera onse, monga momwe Yehova analonjezera." 
1Chronicles11:11 Nawa mayina a ankhondo amphamvu a Davide: Yasobeamu Mhakimoni anali mkulu wa atsogoleri. Iye anapha ndi mkondo ankhondo 300 nthawi imodzi. 
1Chronicles11:12 Wotsatana naye anali Eliezara mwana wa Dodo Mwahohi, mmodzi mwa ankhondo atatu amphamvu." 
1Chronicles11:13 Iye anali ndi Davide ku Pasi-Damimu pamene Afilisti anasonkhana kudzachita nkhondo. Ankhondo anathawa Afilistiwo pamalo pamene panali munda wodzaza ndi barele. 
1Chronicles11:14 Koma awiriwo anayima pakati pa mundawo. Iwo anawuteteza, nakantha Afilistiwo ndipo Yehova anawapambanitsa koposa." 
1Chronicles11:15 Atatu mwa atsogoleri makumi atatu aja anabwera kwa Davide ku thanthwe ku phanga la Adulamu pamene gulu la Afilisti linali litamanga misasa mʼchigwa cha Refaimu. 
1Chronicles11:16 Nthawi imeneyo Davide anali mu linga, ndipo boma la Afilisti linali ku Betelehemu." 
1Chronicles11:17 Davide analakalaka madzi ndipo anati, “Haa, pakanapezeka munthu wokanditungira madzi a mʼchitsime chomwe chili pafupi ndi chipata cha ku Betelehemu!”" 
1Chronicles11:18 Choncho anthu atatuwa anadutsa mizere ya Afilisti, natunga madzi amene anali mʼchitsime chomwe chinali pafupi ndi chipata cha ku Betelehemu nabwera nawo kwa Davide. Koma iye anakana kumwa. Mʼmalo mwake anathira pansi pamaso pa Yehova." 
1Chronicles11:19 Iye anati, “Inu Mulungu, musalole kuti ine ndichite chinthu ichi! Kodi ndimwe magazi a anthu amene anayika miyoyo yawo pachiswe?” Chifukwa iwo anayika miyoyo yawo pachiswe kuti abweretse madziwo, Davide sanamwe. Zimenezi ndi zimene anachita anthu amphamvu atatuwo." 
1Chronicles11:20 Abisai mʼbale wa Yowabu ndiye anali mtsogoleri wa anthu atatuwa. Iye anapha ndi mkondo ankhondo 300. Choncho iyeyo anali wotchuka pakati pa anthu atatu aja. 
1Chronicles11:21 Iye analandira ulemu woposa atatuwo. Kotero anakhala mtsogoleri wawo ngakhale kuti iyeyo sanali mʼgulu la anthu atatu aja. 
1Chronicles11:22 Benaya mwana wa Yehoyada wa ku Kabizeeli anali munthu wolimba mtima amene anachita zinthu zamphamvu. Iye anakantha ankhondo awiri otchuka a ku Mowabu. Tsiku lina kukuzizira kwambiri, iye analowa mʼdzenje ndi kuphamo mkango." 
1Chronicles11:23 Ndipo iye anakanthanso Mwigupto amene anali wotalika mamita awiri ndi theka. Ngakhale kuti Mwiguptoyo anali ndi mkondo wofanana ndi ndodo yowombera nsalu mʼdzanja mwake, Benaya anapita kukamenyana naye ali ndi chibonga chokha mʼmanja. Iye analanda mkondo mʼdzanja la Mwiguptoyo ndi kumupha ndi mkondo wake womwe." 
1Chronicles11:24 Izi ndi zamphamvu zimene Benaya mwana wa Yehoyada anachita. Iyeyo analinso wotchuka ngati anthu atatu amphamvu aja. 
1Chronicles11:25 Iye ankalemekezedwa kuposa wina aliyense mwa anthu makumi atatu, koma sanali mʼgulu la anthu atatu aja. Ndipo Davide anamuyika kukhala woyangʼanira asilikali omuteteza." 
1Chronicles11:26 	Ankhondo amphamvuwa anali: Asaheli mʼbale wa Yowabu, Elihanani mwana wa Dodo wa ku Betelehemu," 
1Chronicles11:27 	Samoti Mharori, Helezi Mpeloni." 
1Chronicles11:28 	Ira mwana wa Ikesi wa ku Tekowa, Abiezeri wa ku Anatoti," 
1Chronicles11:29 	Sibekai Mhusati, Ilai Mwahohi," 
1Chronicles11:30 	Maharai Mnetofa, Heledi mwana wa Baana Mnetofa," 
1Chronicles11:31 	Itai mwana wa Ribai wa ku Gibeya ku Benjamini, Benaya Mpiratoni," 
1Chronicles11:32 	Hurai wa ku zigwa za Gaasi, Abieli Mwaribati," 
1Chronicles11:33 	Azimaveti Mbaharumi, Eliyahiba Msaaliboni," 
1Chronicles11:34 	ana a Hasemu Mgizoni, Yonatani mwana wa Sage Mharari," 
1Chronicles11:35 	Ahiamu mwana wa Sakari Mharari, Elifali mwana wa Uri," 
1Chronicles11:36 	Heferi Mmekerati, Ahiya Mpeloni," 
1Chronicles11:37 	Heziro wa ku Karimeli Naara mwana wa Ezibai," 
1Chronicles11:38 	Yoweli mʼbale wa Natani, Mibihari mwana wa Hagiri," 
1Chronicles11:39 	Zeleki Mwamoni, Naharai wa ku Beeroti, mnyamata wonyamula zida za Yowabu mwana wa Zeruya." 
1Chronicles11:40 	Ira Mwitiri, Garebu Mwitiri," 
1Chronicles11:41 	Uriya Mhiti, Zabadi mwana wa Ahilai," 
1Chronicles11:42 	Adina mwana wa Siza Mrubeni, amene anali mtsogoleri wa Arubeni ndi anthu makumi atatu pamodzi naye," 
1Chronicles11:43 	Hanani mwana wa Maaka, Yehosafati Mmitini," 
1Chronicles11:44 	Uziya Mwasiterati, Sama ndi Yeiyeli ana a Hotamu Mwaroeri," 
1Chronicles11:45 	Yediaeli mwana wa Simiri, ndi Yoha Mtizi mʼbale wake," 
1Chronicles11:46 	Elieli Mhavati, Yeribai ndi Yosaviya ana a Elinaamu, Itima Mmowabu," 
1Chronicles11:47 Elieli, Obedi ndi Yaasieli Mmeobai." 
1Chronicles12:1 Nawa anthu amene anabwera kwa Davide ali ku Zikilagi pamene iye anathamangitsidwa ndi Sauli mwana wa Kisi (iwowo anali mʼgulu la asilikali amene ankamuthandiza pa nkhondo. 
1Chronicles12:2 Iwo anali ndi mauta ndipo amadziwa kuponya mivi komanso miyala, ndipo amatha kuponyera dzanja lamanja kapena lamanzere. Iwo anali abale ake a Sauli ochokera ku fuko la Benjamini." 
1Chronicles12:3 Mtsogoleri wawo anali Ahiyezeri ndi Yowasi ana a Semaya wa ku Gibeya; Yezieli ndi Peleti ana a Azimaveti; Beraka, Yehu wa ku Anatoti," 
1Chronicles12:4 ndi Isimaiya wa ku Gibiyoni, munthu wamphamvu mʼgulu la anthu makumi atatu aja, yemwenso anali mtsogoleri wawo; Yeremiya, Yahazieli, Yohanani, Yozabadi wa ku Gederi," 
1Chronicles12:5 Eluzai, Yerimoti, Bealiya, Semariya ndi Sefatiya Mharufi;" 
1Chronicles12:6 Elikana, Isiya, Azareli, Yowezeri ndi Yasobeamu a ku banja la Kora;" 
1Chronicles12:7 ndi Yowela ndi Zebadiya ana a Yerohamu wa ku Gedori. 
1Chronicles12:8 Asilikali ena a fuko la Gadi anathawira kwa Davide ku linga lake ku chipululu. Iwo anali asilikali olimba mtima, okonzekera nkhondo ndipo amadziwa kugwiritsa ntchito chishango ndi mkondo. Iwowo anali woopsa ngati mikango ndipo anali aliwiro ngati ngoma zamʼmapiri." 
1Chronicles12:9 	Mtsogoleri wawo anali Ezeri, wotsatana naye anali Obadiya, wachitatu anali Eliabu," 
1Chronicles12:10 	wachinayi anali Misimana, Yeremiya anali wachisanu," 
1Chronicles12:11 	wachisanu ndi chimodzi anali Atai, Elieli anali wachisanu ndi chiwiri," 
1Chronicles12:12 	wachisanu ndi chitatu anali Yohanani, Elizabadi anali wachisanu ndi chinayi," 
1Chronicles12:13 wakhumi anali Yeremiya ndipo Makibanai anali wa 11. 
1Chronicles12:14 Anthu a fuko la Gadi amenewa anali atsogoleri; angʼonoangʼono amalamulira anthu 100 pamene akuluakulu amalamulira anthu 1,000." 
1Chronicles12:15 Awa ndi amene anawoloka Yorodani mwezi woyamba pamene mtsinje unali utasefukira mbali zonse, ndipo anathamangitsa aliyense amene amakhala mʼchigwa, mbali ya kumadzulo ndi kummawa." 
1Chronicles12:16 Anthu ena a fuko la Benjamini ndi ena ochokera ku Yuda anabweranso kwa Davide pamene anali ku linga lake. 
1Chronicles12:17 Davide anapita kukakumana nawo ndipo anati, “Ngati mwabwera kwa ine mwamtendere, kuti mundithandize, ndakonzeka kugwirizana nanu. Koma ngati mwabwera kudzandipereka kwa adani anga, ngakhale kuti sindinalakwe, Mulungu wa makolo anthu aone izi ndipo akuweruzeni.”" 
1Chronicles12:18 Kenaka Mzimu anabwera pa Amasai, mtsogoleri wa anthu makumi atatu aja ndipo anati: “Inu Davide, ife ndife anu! Tili nanu limodzi, inu mwana wa Yese! Kupambana, Kupambana kwa inu, ndiponso kupambana kukhale kwa iwo amene akukuthandizani pakuti Mulungu wanu adzakuthandizani.” Kotero Davide anawalandira ndipo anawayika kukhala atsogoleri a magulu ake a ankhondo." 
1Chronicles12:19 Anthu ena a fuko la Manase anathawira kwa Davide pamene anapita ndi Afilisti kukamenyana ndi Sauli. (Iye ndi anthu ake sanathandize Afilisti chifukwa, atsogoleri awo atakambirana, anamubweza Davide. Iwo anati, “Ife tidzawonongedwa ngati uyu adzabwerera kwa mbuye wake Sauli).”" 
1Chronicles12:20 Davide atapita ku Zikilagi, anthu a fuko la Manase amene anathawira kwa iye anali awa: Adina, Yozabadi, Yediaeli, Mikayeli, Yozabadi, Elihu ndi Ziletai; atsogoleri a magulu a anthu 1,000 a ku Manase." 
1Chronicles12:21 Iwowa anathandiza Davide kulimbana ndi magulu achifwamba, pakuti onsewa anali asilikali olimba mtima ndipo anali atsogoleri mʼgulu lake la ankhondo." 
1Chronicles12:22 Tsiku ndi tsiku anthu amabwera kudzathandiza Davide, mpaka anakhala ndi gulu lalikulu la ankhondo, ngati gulu la ankhondo a Mulungu." 
1Chronicles12:23 Nachi chiwerengero cha magulu a anthu ankhondo amene anabwera kwa Davide ku Hebroni kudzapereka ufumu wa Sauli kwa iye, monga momwe ananenera Yehova:" 
1Chronicles12:24 	Anthu a fuko la Yuda onyamula chishango ndi mkondo analipo 6,800;" 
1Chronicles12:25 	Anthu a fuko la Simeoni, asilikali okonzekera nkhondo analipo 7,100;" 
1Chronicles12:26 Anthu a fuko la Levi analipo 4,600," 
1Chronicles12:27 mtsogoleri Yehoyada wa banja la Aaroni anabweranso ndi anthu 3,700," 
1Chronicles12:28 	ndi Zadoki, mnyamata wankhondo wolimba mtima, anabwera ndi akuluakulu 22 ochokera mʼbanja lake;" 
1Chronicles12:29 	Anthu a fuko la Benjamini, abale ake a Sauli analipo 3,000 ndipo ambiri anali ndi Sauli ku nyumba yake pa nthawiyi;" 
1Chronicles12:30 	Anthu a fuko la Efereimu, asilikali olimba mtima, otchuka pa mabanja awo analipo 20,800;" 
1Chronicles12:31 	Anthu a fuko latheka la Manase amene anawayitana kuti adzakhazikitse nawo ufumu wa Davide analipo 18,000;" 
1Chronicles12:32 	Anthu a fuko la Isakara amene ankazindikira nthawi ndipo amadziwa zimene Israeli ankayenera kuchita, analipo atsogoleri 200 pamodzi ndi abale awo onse amene amawatsogolera." 
1Chronicles12:33 	Anthu a fuko la Zebuloni, analipo 5,000. Iwowa anali asilikali odziwa bwino nkhondo, okhala ndi zida za mtundu uliwonse, okonzekera kudzathandiza Davide ndi mtima umodzi." 
1Chronicles12:34 	Anthu a fuko la Nafutali, analipo atsogoleri 1,000 pamodzi ndi anthu 37,000 onyamula zishango ndi mikondo;" 
1Chronicles12:35 	Anthu a fuko la Dani, okonzekera nkhondo analipo 28,600." 
1Chronicles12:36 	Anthu a fuko la Aseri, asilikali odziwa bwino nkhondo, okonzekeradi nkhondo analipo 40,000;" 
1Chronicles12:37 Ndipo kuchokera kummawa kwa Yorodani, anthu a fuko la Rubeni, Gadi ndi theka la fuko la Manase, amene anali ndi zida za mtundu uliwonse analipo 120,000." 
1Chronicles12:38 Onsewa anali anthu odziwa kumenya nkhondo amene anadzipereka ku magulu awo. Iwo anabwera ku Hebroni ali otsimikiza kudzamuyika Davide kukhala mfumu ya Aisraeli. Aisraeli ena onse anali ndi mtima umodzinso womuyika Davide kukhala mfumu. 
1Chronicles12:39 Anthuwa anakhala ndi Davide masiku atatu akudya ndi kumwa pakuti mabanja awo anawapatsa zakudya. 
1Chronicles12:40 Komanso anthu oyandikana nawo ochokera ku Isakara, Zebuloni ndi Nafutali anabweretsa zakudya pa abulu, ngamira, nyulu ndi ngʼombe. Panali ufa wambiri, makeke ankhuyu, ntchintchi za mphesa, vinyo, mafuta, ngʼombe, nkhosa ndi mbuzi, popeza munali chimwemwe mu Israeli." 
1Chronicles13:1 Davide anakambirana ndi akuluakulu ake, atsogoleri a anthu 1,000 ndi atsogoleri a anthu 100." 
1Chronicles13:2 Ndipo anati kwa gulu lonse la Israeli, “Ngati kukukomerani komanso ngati chili chifuniro cha Yehova Mulungu wathu, tiyeni titumize uthenga kulikonse kumene kuli abale athu ena onse ku dziko lonse la Israeli ndiponso kwa ansembe ndi Alevi amene ali nawo mʼmidzi yawo ndi madera odyetsera ziweto, kuti abwere adzakhale nafe." 
1Chronicles13:3 Tiyeni tibweretsenso Bokosi la Mulungu wathu kuno kwathu, pakuti nthawi ya Sauli sitinafunse za bokosili.”" 
1Chronicles13:4 Gulu lonse linavomereza izi, pakuti anthu onse anaona kuti kunali kofunika kutero." 
1Chronicles13:5 Kotero Davide anasonkhanitsa Aisraeli onse, kuchokera ku mtsinje wa Sihori ku Igupto mpaka ku Lebo Hamati, kuti abweretse Bokosi la Mulungu kuchokera ku Kiriati-Yearimu." 
1Chronicles13:6 Davide pamodzi ndi Aisraeli onse anapita ku Baalahi (Kiriati-Yearimu) ku Yuda kukatenga Bokosi la Yehova Mulungu, amene amakhala pakati pa akerubi. Limeneli ndiye Bokosi la Chipangano lomwe limadziwika ndi Dzina lake." 
1Chronicles13:7 Iwo anachotsa Bokosi la Mulungu ku nyumba ya Abinadabu pa ngolo yatsopano. Uza ndi Ahiyo ndiwo ankayendetsa ngoloyo. 
1Chronicles13:8 Davide pamodzi ndi Aisraeli onse ankakondwerera ndi mphamvu zawo zonse pamaso pa Mulungu, poyimba nyimbo pogwiritsa ntchito azeze, apangwe, matambolini, maseche ndi malipenga." 
1Chronicles13:9 Atafika pa malo opunthira tirigu ku Kidoni, Uza anatambalitsa dzanja lake kuti agwire bokosilo, chifukwa ngʼombe zinkafuna kugwa." 
1Chronicles13:10 Yehova anapsera mtima Uza ndipo anamukantha chifukwa chogwira bokosilo. Choncho iyeyo anafera pomwepo pamaso pa Mulungu. 
1Chronicles13:11 Ndipo Davide anakhumudwa chifukwa Yehova anakantha Uza ndipo mpaka lero malowo amatchedwa Perezi Uza. 
1Chronicles13:12 Tsiku limenelo Davide anachita mantha ndi Mulungu ndipo anafunsa kuti, “Kodi Bokosi la Mulungu lingafike bwanji kwathu?”" 
1Chronicles13:13 Iye sanapitenso nalo Bokosi la Mulungu ku Mzinda wa Davide. Mʼmalo mwake anapita nalo ku nyumba ya Obedi-Edomu Mgiti. 
1Chronicles13:14 Ndipo Bokosi la Mulungu linakhala mʼbanja la Obedi-Edomu mʼnyumba mwake kwa miyezi itatu ndipo Yehova anadalitsa nyumba yake ndi chilichonse chimene anali nacho. 
1Chronicles14:1 Hiramu mfumu ya ku Turo inatumiza amithenga kwa Davide pamodzi ndi mitengo ya mkungudza ndiponso amisiri a miyala ndi amisiri a matabwa kuti adzamumangire nyumba yaufumu. 
1Chronicles14:2 Choncho Davide anazindikira kuti Yehova wamukhazikitsa kukhala mfumu ya Israeli ndipo wakuza kwambiri ufumu wake chifukwa cha anthu ake, Aisraeli." 
1Chronicles14:3 Davide anakwatira akazi ena ambiri ku Yerusalemu ndipo anabereka ana aamuna ndi aakazi ambiri. 
1Chronicles14:4 Mayina a ana amene anaberekera ku Yerusalemu anali awa: Samua, Sobabu, Natani, Solomoni," 
1Chronicles14:5 Ibihari, Elisua, Elipeleti," 
1Chronicles14:6 Noga, Nefegi, Yafiya," 
1Chronicles14:7 Elisama, Beeliada ndi Elifeleti." 
1Chronicles14:8 Afilisti atamva kuti Davide wadzozedwa kukhala mfumu ya dziko lonse la Israeli, iwo anapita mwamphamvu kukamusakasaka. Koma Davide atamva zimenezi anapita kukakumana nawo." 
1Chronicles14:9 Ndipo Afilisti anabwera ndi kulanda zinthu mʼChigwa cha Refaimu. 
1Chronicles14:10 Davide anafunsa Mulungu kuti, “Kodi ndipite kukathira nkhondo Afilisti? Kodi mukawapereka mʼmanja mwanga?” Yehova anamuyankha kuti, “Pita, Ine ndidzawapereka mʼmanja mwako.”" 
1Chronicles14:11 Choncho Davide ndi anthu ake anapita ku Baala-Perazimu ndi kugonjetsa Afilistiwo. Iye anati, “Monga amasefukira madzi, Mulungu waphwanya adani anga ine ndikuona.” Motero anawatcha malowa Baala Perazimu." 
1Chronicles14:12 Afilisti anasiya milungu yawo kumeneko ndipo Davide analamulira kuti itenthedwe ndi moto. 
1Chronicles14:13 Nthawi inanso Afilisti anadzalanda katundu mu Chigwamo. 
1Chronicles14:14 Choncho Davide anafunsa Mulungu ndipo Mulunguyo anayankha kuti, “Usapite molunjika, koma uzungulire kumbuyo kwawo. Ukawathire nkhondo patsogolo pa mitengo ya mkandankhuku." 
1Chronicles14:15 Mukakangomva phokoso pa msonga za mitengo ya mkandankhuku, mukapite kukamenyana nawo, chifukwa izi zikasonyeza kuti Mulungu ali patsogolo panu kukantha ankhondo a Afilisti.”" 
1Chronicles14:16 Kotero Davide anachita zimene Mulungu anamulamulira ndipo anakantha ankhondo a Afilisti njira yonse kuchokera ku Gibiyoni mpaka ku Gezeri. 
1Chronicles14:17 Choncho mbiri ya Davide inafalikira dziko lonse, ndipo Yehova anachititsa kuti mayiko ena azimuopa."
