Psalms55:6 Ndinati, “Ndithu, ndikanakhala ndi mapiko ankhunda! Ndikanawulukira kutali ndi kukapuma." 
Psalms55:7 Ndikanathawira kutali ndi kukakhala mʼchipululu. 
Psalms55:8 Ndikanathamangira kumalo anga a chitetezo; kutali ndi mphepo yaukali ndi yamkuntho.” 
Psalms55:9 Sokonezani maganizo a oyipa, Inu Ambuye, tsutsani mawu awo; pakuti ine ndikuona chiwawa ndi mkangano mu mzinda." 
Psalms55:10 Usana ndi usiku iwo akuzungulirazungulira pa makoma ake; nkhwidzi ndi kuzunza kuli mʼkati mwake. 
Psalms55:11 Mphamvu zowononga zili pa ntchito mu mzinda; kuopseza ndi mabodza sizichoka mʼmisewu yake. 
Psalms55:12 Akanakhala mdani akundinyoza, ine ndikanapirira; akanakhala mdani akudzikweza yekha kutsutsana nane, ndikanakabisala." 
Psalms55:13 Koma iweyo mnzanga, mnzanga woyenda naye, bwenzi langa la pondaapanʼpondepo, ndi amene ukuchita zimenezi." 
Psalms55:14 Mnzanga amene nthawi ina tinkasangalala pa chiyanjano chokoma ku nyumba ya Mulungu. 
Psalms55:15 Mulole imfa itenge adani anga mwadzidzidzi; alowe mʼmanda ali amoyo pakuti choyipa chili pakati pawo. 
Psalms55:16 Koma ine ndinafuwulira kwa Mulungu, ndipo Yehova anandipulumutsa." 
Psalms55:17 Madzulo, mmawa ndi masana ndimalira mowawidwa mtima, ndipo Iye amamva mawu anga." 
Psalms55:18 Iye amandiwombola ine osavulazidwa pa nkhondo imene yafika kulimbana nane, ngakhale kuti ndi ambiri amene akunditsutsa." 
Psalms55:19 Mulungu amene ali pa mpando wake kwamuyaya, adzandimenyera nkhondo; adzawatsitsa adani anga, chifukwa safuna kusintha njira zawo zoyipa ndipo saopa Mulungu." 
Psalms55:20 Mnzanga woyenda naye wathira nkhondo abwenzi ake; iye akuphwanya pangano ake. 
Psalms55:21 Mawu ake ndi osalala kuposa batala komabe nkhondo ili mu mtima mwake; mawu ake ndi osalala kwambiri kuposa mafuta, komatu mawuwo ndi malupanga osololoka." 
Psalms55:22 Tulani nkhawa zanu kwa Yehova ndipo Iye adzakulimbitsani; Iye sadzalola kuti wolungama agwe. 
Psalms55:23 Koma Inu Mulungu mudzawatsitsa anthu oyipa kulowa mʼdzenje lachiwonongeko; anthu okhetsa magazi ndi anthu achinyengo sadzakhala moyo theka la masiku awo, koma ine ndimadalira Inu." 
Psalms56:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Potsata mayimbidwe a “Njiwa pa Mtengo wa Thundu wa Kutali.” Mikitamu ya Davide, pamene Afilisti anamugwira ku Gati. Mundichitire chifundo Inu Mulungu, pakuti anthu akundithamangitsa kwambiri; tsiku lonse akundithira nkhondo." 
Psalms56:2 Ondinyoza akundithamangitsa tsiku lonse, ambiri akumenyana nane monyada." 
Psalms56:3 Ndikachita mantha ndimadalira Inu. 
Psalms56:4 Mwa Mulungu, amene mawu ake ine ndimatamanda, mwa Mulungu ine ndimadaliramo; sindidzachita mantha. Kodi munthu amene amafa angandichite chiyani?" 
Psalms56:5 Tsiku lonse amatembenuza mawu anga; nthawi zonse amakonza zondivulaza. 
Psalms56:6 Iwo amakambirana, amandibisalira, amayangʼanitsitsa mayendedwe anga ndipo amakhala ndi chidwi chofuna kuchotsa moyo wanga." 
Psalms56:7 Musalole konse kuti athawe; mu mkwiyo wanu Mulungu mugwetse mitundu ya anthu. 
Psalms56:8 Mulembe za kulira kwanga, mulembe chiwerengero cha misozi yanga mʼbuku lanu. Kodi zimenezi sizinalembedwe mʼbuku lanulo?" 
Psalms56:9 Adani anga adzabwerera mʼmbuyo pamene ndidzalirira kwa Inu. Pamenepo ndidzadziwa kuti Mulungu ali ku mbali yanga. 
Psalms56:10 Mwa Mulungu amene mawu ake ndimawatamanda, mwa Yehova amene mawu ake ndimawatamanda," 
Psalms56:11 mwa Mulungu ine ndimadalira ndipo sindidzachita mantha. Kodi munthu angandichite chiyani? 
Psalms56:12 Ndiyenera kuchita zomwe ndinalumbira kwa Mulungu; ndidzapereka nsembe zanga zachiyamiko kwa inu. 
Psalms56:13 Pakuti mwawombola moyo wanga ku imfa ndi mapazi anga kuti ndingagwe, kuti ndiyende pamaso pa Mulungu mʼkuwala kwa moyo." 
Psalms57:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Potsata mayimbidwe a “Musawononge.” Ndakatulo ya Davide, pamene anathawa Sauli kupita ku phanga. Mundichitire chifundo, Inu Mulungu mundichitire chifundo, pakuti mwa Inu moyo wanga umathawiramo. Ndidzathawira mu mthunzi wa mapiko anu mpaka chiwonongeko chitapita." 
Psalms57:2 Ine ndikufuwulira kwa Mulungu Wammwambamwamba, kwa Mulungu amene amakwaniritsa cholinga chake pa ine." 
Psalms57:3 Mulungu amanditumizira kuchokera kumwamba ndi kundipulumutsa, kudzudzula iwo amene akundithamangitsa kwambiri. Mulungu amatumiza chikondi chake ndi kukhulupirika kwake." 
Psalms57:4 Ine ndili pakati pa mikango, ndagona pakati pa zirombo zolusa; anthu amene mano awo ndi milomo yawo ndi mivi, malilime awo ndi malupanga akuthwa." 
Psalms57:5 Mukwezekedwe Inu Mulungu, kuposa mayiko onse akumwamba; mulole kuti ulemerero wanu ukhale pa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Psalms57:6 Iwo anatchera mapazi anga ukonde ndipo ndinawerama pansi mosautsidwa. Anakumba dzenje mʼnjira yanga koma agweramo okha mʼmenemo. 
Psalms57:7 Mtima wanga ndi wokhazikika, Inu Mulungu mtima wanga ndi wokhazikika. Ndidzayimba nyimbo, nyimbo yake yamatamando." 
Psalms57:8 Dzuka moyo wanga! Dzukani zeze ndi pangwe! Ndidzadzuka mʼbandakucha. 
Psalms57:9 Ndidzakutamandani Ambuye, pakati pa mitundu ya anthu, ndidzayimba za Inu pakati pa mayiko." 
Psalms57:10 Pakuti chikondi chanu nʼchachikulu, kufikira ku mayiko akumwamba; kukhulupirika kwanu kwafika ku mitambo." 
Psalms57:11 Mukwezekedwe Inu Mulungu kuposa mayiko akumwamba, mulole kuti ulemerero wanu ukhale pa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Psalms58:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Potsata mayimbidwe a “Musawononge.” Ndakatulo ya Davide. Kodi inu olamulira mumayankhuladi molungama? Kodi mumaweruza mwachilungamo pakati pa anthu? 
Psalms58:2 Ayi, mʼmitima mwanu mumakonzekera zosalungama, ndipo manja anu amatulutsa zachiwawa pa dziko lapansi." 
Psalms58:3 Ngakhale kuchokera tsiku lawo lobadwa oyipa amasochera; kuchokera mʼmimba ya amayi awo, iwo ndi otayika ndipo amayankhula mabodza." 
Psalms58:4 Ululu wawo uli ngati ululu wa njoka, ngati uja wa mphiri imene yatseka mʼmakutu mwake." 
Psalms58:5 Imene simva liwu la munthu wamatsenga, ngakhale akhale wa luso lotani munthu wamatsengayo." 
Psalms58:6 Gululani mano mʼkamwa mwawo, Inu Mulungu, Yehova khadzulani mano a mikango!" 
Psalms58:7 Mulole kuti asowe ngati madzi oyenda pamene iwo akoka uta mulole kuti mivi yawo ikhale yosathwa. 
Psalms58:8 Akhale ngati nkhono imene imasungunuka pamene ikuyenda; ngati mwana wakufa asanabadwe, iwo asaone dzuwa." 
Psalms58:9 Miphika yanu isanagwire moto waminga ya mkandankhuku, kaya iyo ndi yobiriwira kapena yowuma, oyipa adzachotsedwa." 
Psalms58:10 Olungama adzasangalala poona kubwezera chilango, pamene adzasambitsa mapazi awo mʼmagazi a anthu oyipa." 
Psalms58:11 Ndipo anthu adzanena kuti, “Zoonadi, olungama amalandirabe mphotho; zoonadi kuli Mulungu amene amaweruza dziko lapansi.”" 
Psalms59:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Potsata mayimbidwe a “Musawononge.” Ndakatulo ya Davide. Pamene Sauli anatumiza anthu kuti akalondere nyumba ya Davide ndi cholinga choti amuphe. Landitseni kwa adani anga, Inu Mulungu; munditeteze kwa anthu amene auka kutsutsana nane." 
Psalms59:2 Landitseni kwa anthu ochita zoyipa ndipo mundipulumutse kwa anthu okhetsa magazi. 
Psalms59:3 Onani momwe iwo akundibisalira! Anthu owopsa agwirizana zolimbana nane; osati chifukwa cha mlandu kapena tchimo langa, Inu Yehova." 
Psalms59:4 Ine sindinachite cholakwa, koma iwo ndi okonzeka kundithira nkhondo. Dzukani kuti mundithandize; penyani mavuto anga!" 
Psalms59:5 Inu Yehova Mulungu Wamphamvuzonse, Mulungu wa Israeli, dzidzutseni nokha kuti mulange anthu a mitundu ina yonse; musaonetse chifundo chanu kwa anthu oyipa achinyengowa." 
Psalms59:6 Iwo amabweranso madzulo akuchita phokoso ngati agalu ndi kumangoyendayenda mu mzinda. 
Psalms59:7 Onani zomwe amalavula mʼkamwa mwawo; iwo amalavula malupanga kuchokera pa milomo yawo, ndipo amanena kuti, “Ndani angatimve?”" 
Psalms59:8 Koma Inu Yehova, mumawaseka, mumayinyoza mitundu yonseyo." 
Psalms59:9 Inu mphamvu yanga, ine ndiyangʼana kwa inu; Inu Mulungu, ndinu linga langa." 
Psalms59:10 	Mulungu wanga wachikondi. Mulungu adzapita patsogolo panga ndipo adzandilola kunyada pa iwo amene amandinyoza. 
Psalms59:11 Koma musawaphe, Inu Ambuye chishango chathu, kuopa kuti anthu anga angayiwale. Mwa mphamvu zanu, lolani kuti azingoyendayenda ndipo muwatsitse." 
Psalms59:12 Chifukwa cha machimo a pakamwa pawo chifukwa cha mawu a milomo yawo, iwo akodwe mʼkunyada kwawo. Chifukwa cha matemberero ndi mabodza amene ayankhula" 
Psalms59:13 muwawononge mu ukali (wanu) muwawononge mpaka atheretu. Pamenepo zidzadziwika ku malekezero a dziko lapansi kuti Mulungu amalamulira Yakobo. 
Psalms59:14 Iwo amabweranso madzulo, akuchita phokoso ngati agalu ndi kumangoyenda mu mzinda." 
Psalms59:15 Iwo amayendayenda kufuna chakudya ndipo amawuwa ngati sanakhute. 
Psalms59:16 Koma ine ndidzayimba za mphamvu yanu, mmawa ndidzayimba zachikondi chanu; pakuti ndinu linga langa, pothawirapo panga mʼnthawi ya mavuto." 
Psalms59:17 Inu mphamvu yanga, ndiyimba matamando kwa inu; Inu Mulungu, ndinu linga langa, Mulungu wanga wachikondi." 
Psalms60:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Potsata mayimbidwe a “Kakombo wa Pangano.” Mikitamu ya Davide yophunzitsira. Pamene anamenyana ndi Mesopotamiya ndi Aramu-Zoba, ndi pamene Yowabu anabwerera ndi kukantha Aedomu 12,000 mʼChigwa cha Mchere. Inu Mulungu mwatikanatu ife, ndipo mwatiwonongera otiteteza. Inu mwatikwiyira, tsopano tibwezeretseni mwakale!" 
Psalms60:2 Inu mwagwedeza dziko ndipo mwalingʼamba, konzani mingʼalu yake pakuti ikugwedezeka kwambiri." 
Psalms60:3 Inu mwaonetsa anthu anu nthawi za mavuto; inu mwatipatsa vinyo amene watichititsa kudzandira. 
Psalms60:4 Koma kwa iwo amene amaopa Inu, Inu mwakweza mbendera kuti tisonkhanireko pothawa uta." 
Psalms60:5 Tipulumutseni ndi kutithandiza ndi dzanja lanu lamanja, kuti iwo amene mumawakonda apulumutsidwe." 
Psalms60:6 Mulungu wayankhula kuchokera ku malo ake opatulika: “Mwakupambana ndidzagawa Sekemu ndipo ndidzayeza malire a chigwa cha Sukoti. 
Psalms60:7 Giliyadi ndi wanga, Manase ndi wanganso; Efereimu ndi chipewa changa chodzitetezera, Yuda ndi ndodo yanga yaufumu" 
Psalms60:8 Mowabu ndi mbale yanga yosambira, pa Edomu ndidzaponyapo nsapato yanga, pa Filisitiya ndidzafuwula mwakupambana.”" 
Psalms60:9 Adzandifikitse ndani ku mzinda wotetezedwa? Ndani adzanditsogolera ku Edomu? 
Psalms60:10 Kodi si Inu Mulungu, Inu amene mwatikana ife ndipo simutuluka pamodzi ndi magulu athu ankhondo." 
Psalms60:11 Tipatseni chithandizo kuti tilimbane ndi mdani wathu, pakuti thandizo lochokera kwa munthu ndi lopanda phindu." 
Psalms60:12 Chifukwa cha Mulungu, ife tidzapeza chipambano ndipo tidzapondaponda adani athu." 
Psalms61:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Salimo la Davide. Loyimbidwa ndi zipangizo za zingwe. Imvani kulira kwanga, Inu Mulungu; mvetserani pemphero langa." 
Psalms61:2 Kuchokera ku malekezero a dziko lapansi ine ndimayitana Inu ndimayitana pomwe mtima wanga ukufowoka; tsogolereni ku thanthwe lalitali kuposa ineyo. 
Psalms61:3 Pakuti Inu mwakhala pothawirapo panga, nsanja yolimba polimbana ndi adani anga." 
Psalms61:4 Ine ndikulakalaka kukhala mʼtenti yanu kwamuyaya ndi kupeza chitetezo mu mthunzi wa mapiko anu. 
Psalms61:5 Pakuti Inu Mulungu mwamva malumbiro anga; mwandipatsa cholowa cha iwo amene amaopa dzina lanu. 
Psalms61:6 Wonjezerani masiku a moyo wa mfumu, zaka zake kwa mibado yochuluka." 
Psalms61:7 Iye akhale pa mpando waufumu pamaso pa Mulungu kwamuyaya; ikani chikondi chanu ndi kukhulupirika kwanu kuti zimuteteze. 
Psalms61:8 Kotero ndidzayimba matamando kwamuyaya pa dzina lanu ndi kukwaniritsa malumbiro anga tsiku ndi tsiku. 
Psalms62:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Kutsata mayimbidwe a Yedutuni. Salimo la Davide. Moyo wanga umapeza mpumulo mwa Mulungu yekha; chipulumutso changa chimachokera kwa Iye. 
Psalms62:2 Iye yekhayo ndiye thanthwe langa ndi chipulumutso changa; Iye ndi linga langa, choncho sindidzagwedezeka." 
Psalms62:3 Kodi nonsenu mudzalimbana naye munthu mpaka liti? Kodi mudzamugwetsa pansi ngati khoma losalimba, ngati mpanda wogwedezeka?" 
Psalms62:4 Iwo akufunitsitsa kumugwetsa kuti achoke pa malo ake apamwamba. Iwo amakondweretsedwa ndi mabodza. Ndi pakamwa pawo amadalitsa koma mʼmitima yawo amatemberera. 
Psalms62:5 Peza mpumulo mwa Mulungu yekhayo iwe moyo wanga; chiyembekezo changa chichokera mwa Iye. 
Psalms62:6 Iye yekhayo ndiye thanthwe langa ndi chipulumutso changa; Iyeyo ndi linga langa; sindidzagwedezeka. 
Psalms62:7 Chipulumutso changa ndi ulemu wanga zimachokera kwa Mulungu: Iye ndiye thanthwe langa lamphamvu; Mulungu ndiye pothawira panga. 
Psalms62:8 Dalirani Iye nthawi zonse, inu anthu; khuthulani mitima yanu kwa Iye, pakuti Mulungu ndiye pothawirapo pathu. Sela" 
Psalms62:9 Anthu wamba ndi mpweya chabe; anthu apamwamba ndi bodza chabe; ngati atayezedwa pa sikelo iwo ndi chabe; iwowo pamodzi ndi mpweya ndi chabe 
Psalms62:10 Musadalire kulanda mwachinyengo kapena katundu wobedwa; ngakhale chuma chanu chichuluke, musayike mtima wanu pa icho." 
Psalms62:11 Mulungu wayankhula kamodzi, ine ndamvapo zinthu ziwiri; choyamba nʼchakuti Inu Mulungu ndinu wamphamvu," 
Psalms62:12 komanso Inu Ambuye, chikondi chanu nʼchosasinthika. Chachiwiri nʼchakuti mumamuchitira munthu molingana ndi ntchito zake." 
Psalms63:1 Salimo la Davide. Pamene anali mʼchipululu cha Yuda. Inu Mulungu, ndinu Mulungu wanga, moona mtima ine ndimakufunafunani; moyo wanga uli ndi ludzu lofuna Inu, thupi langa likulakalaka inu, mʼdziko lowuma ndi lotopetsa kumene kulibe madzi." 
Psalms63:2 Inu ndinakuonani ku malo anu opatulika ndipo ndinapenya mphamvu zanu ndi ulemerero wanu. 
Psalms63:3 Chifukwa chikondi chanu ndi choposa moyo, milomo yanga idzakulemekezani." 
Psalms63:4 Ndidzakutamandani masiku onse a moyo wanga, ndipo mʼdzina lanu ndidzakweza manja anga." 
Psalms63:5 Mudzakhutitsa moyo wanga ndi zonona. Ine ndidzakutamandani ndi mawu anthetemya. 
Psalms63:6 Pa bedi panga ndimakumbukira inu; ndimaganiza za Inu nthawi yonse ya usiku. 
Psalms63:7 Chifukwa ndinu thandizo langa, ine ndimayimba mu mthunzi wa mapiko anu." 
Psalms63:8 Moyo wanga umakangamira Inu; dzanja lanu lamanja limandigwiriziza. 
Psalms63:9 Iwo amene akufunafuna moyo wanga adzawonongedwa; adzatsikira kunsi kozama kwa dziko lapansi. 
Psalms63:10 Iwo adzaperekedwa ku lupanga ndi kukhala chakudya cha ankhandwe. 
Psalms63:11 Koma mfumu idzakondwera mwa Mulungu; onse amene amalumbira mʼdzina la Mulungu adzalemekeza Mulunguyo, koma pakamwa pa anthu onama padzatsekedwa." 
Psalms64:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Salimo la Davide. Ndimvereni Mulungu pomwe ndikunena madandawulo anga; tetezani moyo wanga ku chiopsezo cha mdani. 
Psalms64:2 Ndibiseni ku chiwembu cha anthu oyipa, ku gulu laphokoso la anthu ochita zoyipa." 
Psalms64:3 Iwo amanola malilime awo ngati malupanga, amaponya mawu awo olasa ngati mivi." 
Psalms64:4 Iwo amaponya mivi yawo ali pa malo wobisala kwa munthu wosalakwa; amamulasa modzidzimutsa ndi mopanda mantha. 
Psalms64:5 Iwo amalimbikitsana wina ndi mnzake pa chikonzero chawo choyipa, amayankhula zobisa misampha yawo; ndipo amati, “Adzayiona ndani?”" 
Psalms64:6 Iwo amakonzekera zosalungama ndipo amati, “Takonza ndondomeko yabwino kwambiri!” Ndithu maganizo ndi mtima wa munthu ndi zachinyengo." 
Psalms64:7 Koma Mulungu adzawalasa ndi mivi; mwadzidzidzi adzakanthidwa. 
Psalms64:8 Iye adzatembenuza milomo yawoyo kuwatsutsa ndi kuwasandutsa bwinja; onse amene adzawaona adzagwedeza mitu yawo mowanyoza. 
Psalms64:9 Anthu onse adzachita mantha; adzalengeza ntchito za Mulungu ndi kulingalira mozama zomwe Iye wazichita. 
Psalms64:10 Lolani wolungama akondwere mwa Yehova ndi kubisala mwa Iye, owongoka mtima onse atamande Iye!" 
Psalms65:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Salimo la Davide. Nyimbo. Matamando akudikira Inu Mulungu mu Ziyoni; kwa inu malumbiro athu adzakwaniritsidwa. 
Psalms65:2 Inu amene mumamva pemphero, kwa inu anthu onse adzafika." 
Psalms65:3 Pamene tinathedwa nzeru ndi machimo, Inu munakhululukira mphulupulu zathu." 
Psalms65:4 Odala iwo amene inu muwasankha ndi kuwabweretsa pafupi kukhala mʼmabwalo anu! Ife tadzazidwa ndi zinthu zabwino za mʼNyumba mwanu, za mʼNyumba yanu yoyera." 
Psalms65:5 Mumatiyankha ife ndi ntchito zodabwitsa zachilungamo, Inu Mulungu Mpulumutsi wathu, chiyembekezo cha mathero onse a dziko lapansi ndi cha nyanja zomwe zili kutali kwambiri," 
Psalms65:6 amene munapanga mapiri ndi mphamvu zanu, mutadziveka nokha ndi mphamvu." 
Psalms65:7 Amene munakhalitsa bata nyanja kukokoma kwa mafunde ake, ndi phokoso la anthu a mitundu ina." 
Psalms65:8 Iwo amene akukhala kutali amaopa zizindikiro zozizwitsa zanu; kumene dzuwa limatulukira ndi kumene dzuwa limalowera. Inu mumafuna nyimbo zachimwemwe. 
Psalms65:9 Inu mumasamalira dziko lapansi ndi kulithirira; Inuyo mumalilemeretsa kwambiri. Mtsinje wa Mulungu ndi wodzaza ndi madzi kuti upereke tirigu kwa anthu, pakuti Inu munakhazikitsa zimenezi." 
Psalms65:10 Mwadzaza nthaka yake ndi madzi ndi kusalaza migula yake, mwayifewetsa ndi mvula yamawawa ndi kudalitsa mbewu zake." 
Psalms65:11 Inu mumaveka chaka ndi zinthu zochuluka, ndipo ngolo zanu zimasefukira ndi zinthu zochuluka." 
Psalms65:12 Malo a udzu a mʼchipululu amasefukira; mapiri avekedwa ndi chisangalalo. 
Psalms65:13 Madambo akutidwa ndi zoweta ndi zigwa zavekedwa ndi tirigu; izo pamodzi zikufuwula ndi kuyimba mwachimwemwe. 
Psalms66:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Salimo. Fuwulani kwa Mulungu ndi chimwemwe, dziko lonse lapansi!" 
Psalms66:2 Imbani ulemerero wa dzina lake; kumutamanda kwake kukhale kwaulemerero. 
Psalms66:3 Nenani kwa Mulungu, “Ntchito zanu ndi zoopsa ndithu! Mphamvu yanu ndi yayikulu kwambiri kotero kuti adani anu amawerama pamaso panu." 
Psalms66:4 Dziko lonse lapansi limaweramira inu; limayimba matamando kwa Inu; limayimba matamando pa dzina lanu.” Sela. 
Psalms66:5 Bwerani mudzaone zimene Mulungu wachita, ntchito zanu ndi zoopsa ndithu pakati pa anthu." 
Psalms66:6 Iye anasandutsa nyanja kukhala malo owuma, iwo anawoloka pa madzi ndi mapazi. Bwerani, tiyeni tikondwere mwa Iye." 
Psalms66:7 Iye amalamulira ndi mphamvu zake mpaka muyaya, maso ake amayangʼanira anthu a mitundu ina. Anthu owukira asadzitukumule." 
Psalms66:8 Tamandani Mulungu wathu, inu mitundu ya anthu, mulole kuti mawu a matamando ake amveke;" 
Psalms66:9 Iye watchinjiriza miyoyo yathu ndi kusunga mapazi athu kuti angaterereke. 
Psalms66:10 Pakuti Inu Mulungu munatiyesa; munatiyenga ngati siliva. 
Psalms66:11 Inu mwatilowetsa mʼndende ndi kutisenzetsa zolemera pa misana yathu. 
Psalms66:12 Inu munalola kuti anthu akwere pa mitu yathu; ife tinadutsa mʼmoto ndi mʼmadzi, koma Inu munatibweretsa ku malo a zinthu zochuluka." 
Psalms66:13 Ine ndidzabwera ku Nyumba yanu ndi nsembe zopsereza ndi kukwaniritsa malumbiro anga. 
Psalms66:14 Malumbiro amene milomo yanga inalonjeza ndi pakamwa panga panayankhula pamene ndinali pa mavuto. 
Psalms66:15 Ndidzapereka nsembe nyama zonenepa kwa Inu ndi chopereka cha nkhosa zazimuna; ndidzapereka ngʼombe zamphongo ndi mbuzi. Sela 
Psalms66:16 Bwerani ndipo mudzamve inu nonse amene mumaopa Mulungu. Ndidzakuwuzani zimene Iyeyo wandichitira. 
Psalms66:17 Ndinafuwula kwa Iye ndi pakamwa panga, matamando ake anali pa lilime panga." 
Psalms66:18 Ndikanasekerera tchimo mu mtima mwanga Ambuye sakanamvera; 
Psalms66:19 koma ndithu Mulungu wamvetsera ndipo watchera khutu ku mawu a kupempha kwanga. 
Psalms66:20 Matamando akhale kwa Mulungu amene sanakane pemphero langa kapena kuletsa chikondi chake pa ine! 
Psalms67:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Pa zoyimbira za zingwe. Salimo. Yehova atikomere mtima ndi kutidalitsa, achititse kuti nkhope yake itiwalire." 
Psalms67:2 Kuti njira zanu zidziwike pa dziko lapansi, chipulumutso chanu pakati pa mitundu yonse." 
Psalms67:3 Mitundu ya anthu ikutamandeni Inu Mulungu; mitundu yonse ya anthu ikutamandeni. 
Psalms67:4 Mitundu yonse ya anthu isangalale ndi kuyimba mwachimwemwe, pakuti inu mumaweruza mitundu ya anthu mwachilungamo ndi kutsogolera mitundu ya anthu a dziko lapansi." 
Psalms67:5 Mitundu ya anthu ikutamandeni Inu Mulungu; mitundu yonse ya anthu ikutamandeni. 
Psalms67:6 Nthaka yabereka zokolola zake; tidalitseni Mulungu wathu. 
Psalms67:7 Mulungu atidalitse kuti pamenepo malekezero onse a dziko lapansi apembedze Iyeyo. 
Psalms68:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Salimo la Davide. Adzuke Mulungu, adani ake amwazikane; adani ake athawe pamaso pake." 
Psalms68:2 Monga momwe mphepo imachotsera utsi; Inu muwawulutsire kutali. Monga phula limasungunukira pa moto, oyipa awonongeke pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Psalms68:3 Koma olungama asangalale ndi kukondwera pamaso pa Mulungu; iwo akondwere ndi kusangalala. 
Psalms68:4 Imbirani Mulungu imbirani dzina lake matamando, mukwezeni Iye amene amakwera pa mitambo; dzina lake ndi Yehova ndipo sangalalani pamaso pake." 
Psalms68:5 Atate wa ana amasiye, mtetezi wa akazi amasiye, ndiye Mulungu amene amakhala mʼmalo oyera." 
Psalms68:6 Mulungu amakhazikitsa mtima pansi osungulumwa mʼmabanja, amatsogolera amʼndende ndi kuyimba; koma anthu osamvera amakhala ku malo owuma a dziko lapansi." 
Psalms68:7 Pamene munatuluka kutsogolera anthu anu, Inu Mulungu, pamene munayenda kudutsa chipululu," 
Psalms68:8 dziko lapansi linagwedezeka, miyamba inakhuthula pansi mvula, pamaso pa Mulungu, Mmodzi uja wa ku Sinai. Pamaso pa Mulungu, Mulungu wa Israeli." 
Psalms68:9 Munapereka mivumbi yochuluka, Inu Mulungu; munatsitsimutsa cholowa chanu cholefuka." 
Psalms68:10 Anthu anu anakhala mʼmenemo ndipo munapatsa anthu osauka zimene zinkawasowa chifukwa cha ubwino wanu Mulungu. 
Psalms68:11 Ambuye analengeza mawu, ndipo gulu linali lalikulu la iwo amene anapita kukawafalitsa;" 
Psalms68:12 “Mafumu ndi ankhondo anathawa mwaliwiro; mʼmisasa anthu anagawana zolanda pa nkhondo. 
Psalms68:13 Ngakhale mukugona pakati pa makola a ziweto, mapiko a nkhunda akutidwa ndi siliva, nthenga zake ndi golide wonyezimira.”" 
Psalms68:14 Pamene Wamphamvuzonse anabalalitsa mafumu mʼdziko, zinali ngati matalala akugwa pa Zalimoni." 
Psalms68:15 Mapiri a Basani ndi mapiri aulemerero; mapiri a Basani, ndi mapiri a msonga zambiri." 
Psalms68:16 Muyangʼaniranji mwansanje inu mapiri a msonga zambiri, pa phiri limene Mulungu analisankha kuti azilamulira, kumene Yehova mwini adzakhalako kwamuyaya?" 
Psalms68:17 Magaleta a Mulungu ndi osawerengeka, ndi miyandamiyanda; Ambuye wabwera kuchokera ku Sinai, walowa mʼmalo ake opatulika." 
Psalms68:18 Pamene Inu munakwera mmwamba, munatsogolera a mʼndende ambiri; munalandira mphatso kuchokera kwa anthu, ngakhale kuchokera kwa owukira, kuti Inu Mulungu, mukhale kumeneko." 
Psalms68:19 Matamando akhale kwa Ambuye, kwa Mulungu Mpulumutsi wathu amene tsiku ndi tsiku amasenza zolemetsa zathu." 
Psalms68:20 Mulungu wathu ndi Mulungu amene amapulumutsa; Ambuye Wamphamvuzonse ndiye amene amatipulumutsa ku imfa. 
Psalms68:21 Ndithu Mulungu adzaphwanya mitu ya adani ake, zipewa za ubweya za iwo amene amapitiriza kuchita machimo awo." 
Psalms68:22 Ambuye akunena kuti, “Ndidzawabweretsa kuchokera ku Basani; ndidzawabweretsa kuchokera ku nyanja zozama." 
Psalms68:23 Kuti muviyike mapazi anu mʼmagazi a adani anu, pamene malilime a agalu anu akudyapo gawo lawo.”" 
Psalms68:24 Mayendedwe aulemu a anthu anu aonekera poyera, Inu Mulungu; mayendedwe olemekeza Mulungu wanga ndi Mfumu yanga yokalowa mʼmalo opatulika." 
Psalms68:25 Patsogolo pali oyimba nyimbo pakamwa, pambuyo pawo oyimba nyimbo ndi zipangizo; pamodzi ndi iwo pali atsikana akuyimba matambolini." 
Psalms68:26 Tamandani Mulungu mu msonkhano waukulu; tamandani Yehova mu msonkhano wa Israeli. 
Psalms68:27 Pali fuko lalingʼono la Benjamini, kuwatsogolera, pali gulu lalikulu la ana a mafumu a Yuda, ndiponso pali ana a mafumu a Zebuloni ndi Nafutali." 
Psalms68:28 Kungani mphamvu zanu Mulungu; tionetseni nyonga zanu, Inu Mulungu, monga munachitira poyamba." 
Psalms68:29 Chifukwa cha Nyumba yanu ku Yerusalemu, mafumu adzabweretsa kwa Inu mphatso." 
Psalms68:30 Dzudzulani chirombo pakati pa mabango, gulu la ngʼombe zazimuna pakati pa ana angʼombe a mitundu ya anthu. Mochititsidwa manyazi, abweretse mitanda ya siliva. Balalitsani anthu a mitundu ina amene amasangalatsidwa ndi nkhondo." 
Psalms68:31 Nthumwi zidzachokera ku Igupto; Kusi adzadzipereka yekha kwa Mulungu. 
Psalms68:32 Imbirani Mulungu Inu mafumu a dziko lapansi imbirani Ambuye matamando. Sela 
Psalms68:33 Kwa Iye amene amakwera pa mitambo yakalekale ya mmwamba amene amabangula ndi mawu amphamvu. 
Psalms68:34 Lengezani za mphamvu za Mulungu, amene ulemerero wake uli pa Israeli amene mphamvu zake zili mʼmitambo." 
Psalms68:35 Ndinu woopsa, Inu Mulungu mʼmalo anu opatulika; Mulungu wa Israeli amapereka mphamvu ndi nyonga kwa anthu ake. Matamando akhale kwa Mulungu!" 
Psalms69:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Salimo la Davide. Potsata mayimbidwe a “Akakombo.” Pulumutseni Inu Mulungu, pakuti madzi afika mʼkhosi" 
Psalms69:2 Ine ndikumira mʼthope lozama mʼmene mulibe popondapo. Ndalowa mʼmadzi ozama; mafunde andimiza. 
Psalms69:3 Ndafowoka ndikupempha chithandizo; kummero kwanga kwawuma gwaa, mʼmaso mwanga mwada kuyembekezera Mulungu wanga." 
Psalms69:4 Iwo amene amadana nane popanda chifukwa ndi ochuluka kuposa tsitsi la kumutu kwanga; ambiri ndi adani anga popanda chifukwa, iwo amene akufunafuna kundiwononga. Ndikukakamizidwa kubwezera zomwe sindinabe." 
Psalms69:5 Mukudziwa uchitsiru wanga, Inu Mulungu, kulakwa kwanga sikuli kobisika kwa Inu." 
Psalms69:6 Iwo amene amadalira Inu asanyozedwe chifukwa cha ine, Inu Ambuye Wamphamvuzonse. Iwo amene amafunafuna Inu asachititsidwe manyazi chifukwa cha ine, Inu Mulungu wa Israeli." 
Psalms69:7 Pakuti ndimapirira kunyozedwa chifukwa cha Inu, ndipo manyazi amaphimba nkhope yanga." 
Psalms69:8 Ndine mlendo kwa abale anga, munthu wakudza kwa ana aamuna a amayi anga;" 
Psalms69:9 pakuti changu chochitira nyumba yanu chandiphetsa ndipo chipongwe cha iwo amene amanyoza Inu chandigwera. 
Psalms69:10 Pamene ndikulira ndi kusala kudya, ndiyenera kupirira kunyozedwa;" 
Psalms69:11 pomwe ndavala chiguduli, anthu amandiseweretsa." 
Psalms69:12 Iwo amene amakhala pa chipata amandinena, ndipo ine ndine nyimbo ya zidakwa." 
Psalms69:13 Koma ndikupempha kwa Inu Ambuye, pa nthawi yanu yondikomera mtima; mwa chikondi chanu chachikulu Inu Mulungu, mundiyankhe pondipulumutsa." 
Psalms69:14 Mundilanditse kuchoka mʼmatope, musalole kuti ndimire, pulumutseni ine kwa iwo amene amadana nane, kuchoka mʼmadzi ozama." 
Psalms69:15 Musalole kuti chigumula chindimeze, kuya kusandimeze ndipo dzenje lisatseke pakamwa pake kundimiza." 
Psalms69:16 Ndiyankheni Inu Yehova mwa ubwino wanu wa chikondi chanu; mwa chifundo chanu chachikulu tembenukirani kwa ine. 
Psalms69:17 Musabisire nkhope yanu mtumiki wanu, ndiyankheni msanga, pakuti ndili pa mavuto." 
Psalms69:18 Bwerani pafupi ndi kundilanditsa; ndiwomboleni chifukwa cha adani anga. 
Psalms69:19 Inu mukudziwa momwe ndanyozedwera, kunyozedwa ndi kuchititsidwa manyazi; adani anga onse ali pamaso panu." 
Psalms69:20 Mnyozo waswa mtima wanga ndipo wandisiya wopanda thandizo lililonse; ndinafunafuna ena woti andichitire chisoni, koma panalibe ndi mmodzi yemwe woti anditonthoze, sindinapeze ndi mmodzi yemwe." 
Psalms69:21 Iwo anayika ndulu mʼchakudya changa ndi kundipatsa vinyo wosasa chifukwa cha ludzu. 
Psalms69:22 Chakudya chomwe chayikidwa patsogolo pawo chikhale msampha; chikhale chobwezera chilango ndiponso khwekhwe. 
Psalms69:23 Maso awo adetsedwe kotero kuti asaonenso ndipo misana yawo ipindike mpaka kalekale. 
Psalms69:24 Khuthulirani ukali wanu pa iwo; mkwiyo wanu woyaka moto uwathe mphamvu. 
Psalms69:25 Malo awo akhale wopanda anthu pasapezeke ndi mmodzi yemwe wokhala mʼmatenti awo. 
Psalms69:26 Pakuti iwo amazunza amene inu munamuvulaza ndi kuyankhula zowawa kwa amene munawapweteka. 
Psalms69:27 Awonjezereni kulakwa pa kulakwa kwawo, musalole kuti akhale ndi gawo pa chipulumutso chanu." 
Psalms69:28 Iwo afufutidwe mʼbuku la amoyo ndipo asalembedwe pamodzi ndi olungama. 
Psalms69:29 Ndikumva zowawa ndi kuzunzika; lolani chipulumutso chanu, Inu Mulungu, chinditeteze." 
Psalms69:30 Ine ndidzatamanda dzina la Mulungu mʼnyimbo, ndidzalemekeza Iye ndi chiyamiko." 
Psalms69:31 Izi zidzakondweretsa Yehova kupambana ngʼombe, kupambananso ngʼombe yayimuna, pamodzi ndi nyanga ndi ziboda zake." 
Psalms69:32 Wosauka adzaona ndipo adzasangalala, Inu amene mumafunafuna Mulungu, mitima yanu ikhale ndi moyo!" 
Psalms69:33 Yehova amamvera anthu osowa ndipo sanyoza anthu ake omangidwa. 
Psalms69:34 Kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi zitamanda Iye, nyanja ndi zonse zomwe zimayenda mʼmenemo," 
Psalms69:35 pakuti Mulungu adzapulumutsa Ziyoni ndi kumanganso mizinda ya Yuda, anthu adzakhala kumeneko ndipo dzikolo lidzakhala lawo;" 
Psalms69:36 ana atumiki ake adzalitenga kukhala cholowa chawo, ndipo iwo amene amakonda dzina lake adzakhala kumeneko." 
Psalms70:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Salimo la Davide. Pempho. Fulumirani Mulungu kundipulumutsa; Yehova bwerani msanga kudzandithandiza. 
Psalms70:2 Iwo amene akufunafuna moyo wanga achititsidwe manyazi ndi kusokonezedwa; onse amene akukhumba chiwonongeko changa abwezedwe mopanda ulemu. 
Psalms70:3 Onse amene akunena kwa ine kuti, “Aha, aha,” abwerere chifukwa cha manyazi awo." 
Psalms70:4 Koma onse amene akufunafuna Inu akondwere ndi kusangalala mwa Inu; iwo amene amakonda chipulumutso chanu nthawi zonse anene kuti, “Mulungu akuzike!”" 
Psalms70:5 Koma ine ndine wosauka ndi wosowa; bwerani msanga kwa ine Inu Mulungu. Inu ndinu thandizo langa ndi momboli wanga; Inu Yehova musachedwe. 
Psalms71:1 Mwa Inu Yehova ine ndathawiramo; musalole kuti ndichititsidwe manyazi. 
Psalms71:2 Mundilanditse ndi kundipulumutsa mwa chilungamo chanu, mutchere khutu lanu ndi kundipulumutsa." 
Psalms71:3 Mukhale thanthwe langa lothawirapo, kumene ine nditha kupita nthawi zonse; lamulani kuti ndipulumuke, pakuti Inu ndinu thanthwe langa ndi linga langa." 
Psalms71:4 Landitseni Inu Mulungu wanga, kuchoka mʼdzanja la oyipa, kuchoka mʼdzanja la oyipa ndi anthu ankhanza." 
Psalms71:5 Pakuti Inu mwakhala chiyembekezo changa, Inu Ambuye Wamphamvuzonse, chilimbikitso changa kuyambira ndili mwana." 
Psalms71:6 Kuyambira pamene ndinabadwa, ndakhala ndikudalira Inu; Inu munanditulutsa mʼmimba mwa amayi anga, ndipo ndidzakupembedzani nthawi zonse." 
Psalms71:7 Ine ndakhala chinthu chodabwitsa kwa anthu ambiri koma Inu ndinu wonditchinjiriza wamphamvu. 
Psalms71:8 Pakamwa panga padzaza ndi matamando anu, kulengeza ulemerero wanu tsiku lonse." 
Psalms71:9 Musanditaye pamene ndakalamba; musandisiye pamene mphamvu zanga zatha. 
Psalms71:10 Pakuti adani anga ayankhula motsutsana nane; iwo amene amadikira kuti andiphe amapangana pamodzi. 
Psalms71:11 Iwo amati, “Mulungu wamusiya; mutsatireni ndi kumugwira, pakuti palibe amene adzamupulumutse.”" 
Psalms71:12 Musakhale kutali ndi ine Inu Mulungu, bwerani msanga, Inu Mulungu wanga; thandizeni." 
Psalms71:13 Ondineneza anga awonongeke mwa manyazi, iwo amene akufuna kundipweteka avale chitonzo ndi manyazi." 
Psalms71:14 Koma ine ndidzakhala ndi chiyembekezo mwa Inu nthawi zonse, ndidzakutamandani mowirikizawirikiza." 
Psalms71:15 Pakamwa panga padzafotokoza za chilungamo chanu, za chipulumutso chanu tsiku lonse, ngakhale sindikudziwa muyeso wake." 
Psalms71:16 Ndidzabwera ndi kulengeza za machitidwe amphamvu zanu Inu Ambuye Wamphamvuzonse. Ndidzalengeza chilungamo chanu, chanu chokha." 
Psalms71:17 Kuyambira ubwana wanga, Inu Mulungu mwakhala mukundiphunzitsa, ndipo mpaka lero ine ndikulengeza za ntchito zanu zodabwitsa" 
Psalms71:18 Ngakhale pamene ndakalamba ndipo imvi zili mbuu musanditaye Inu Mulungu, mpaka nditalengeza mphamvu zanu kwa mibado yonse yakutsogolo." 
Psalms71:19 Mphamvu zanu ndi kulungama kwanu zimafika mpaka kumwambamwamba. Ndani wofanana nanu Inu Mulungu, amene mwachita zazikulu?" 
Psalms71:20 Ngakhale mwandionetsa mavuto ambiri owawa, mudzabwezeretsanso moyo wanga; kuchokera kunsi kwa dziko lapansi, mudzandiukitsanso." 
Psalms71:21 Inu mudzachulukitsa ulemu wanga ndi kunditonthozanso. 
Psalms71:22 Ndidzakutamandani ndi zeze chifukwa cha kukhulupirika kwanu Mulungu, ndidzayimba matamando kwa Inu ndi pangwe, Inu Woyera wa Israeli." 
Psalms71:23 Milomo yanga idzafuwula ndi chimwemwe pamene ndidzayimba matamando kwa Inu amene mwandiwombola. 
Psalms71:24 Lilime langa lidzafotokoza za ntchito zanu zachilungamo tsiku lonse, pakuti iwo amene amafuna kundipweteka achititsidwa manyazi ndi kusokonezedwa." 
Psalms72:1 Salimo la Solomoni. Patsani mwana wa mfumu nzeru zanu zoweruzira mwa chilungamo, Inu Mulungu mupatseni mwana wa mfumu chilungamo chanu." 
Psalms72:2 Iye adzaweruza anthu anu mwachilungamo, anthu anu ozunzika mosakondera." 
Psalms72:3 Mapiri adzabweretsa chuma kwa anthu anu, timapiri tidzabweretsa zipatso zachilungamo." 
Psalms72:4 Iye adzateteza ozunzika pakati pa anthu ndi kupulumutsa ana a anthu osowa; adzaphwanya ozunza anzawo. 
Psalms72:5 Adzakhala ndi moyo pa mibado yonse, nthawi zonse pamene dzuwa ndi mwezi zikuwala." 
Psalms72:6 Iye adzakhala kugwa kwa mvula pa minda yolimidwa ngati mivumbi yothirira dziko lapansi. 
Psalms72:7 Mʼmasiku a munthu wolungama adzakhazikika; chuma chidzachuluka mpaka mwezi utaleka kuwala. 
Psalms72:8 Iye adzalamulira kuchokera ku nyanja ina mpaka ku nyanja ina ndiponso kuchokera ku mtsinje mpaka ku malekezero a dziko lapansi. 
Psalms72:9 Mafuko a mʼchipululu adzawerama pamaso pake ndipo adani ake adzanyambita fumbi. 
Psalms72:10 Mafumu a ku Tarisisi ndi a ku zilumba zakutali adzabweretsa mitulo kwa iye, mafumu a ku Seba ndi Seba adzapereka mphatso kwa iyeyo." 
Psalms72:11 Mafumu onse adzamuweramira ndipo mitundu yonse idzamutumikira. 
Psalms72:12 Pakuti iye adzawombola wosowa amene akulira, wozunzika amene alibe wina womuthandiza." 
Psalms72:13 Iye adzachitira chifundo anthu ofowoka ndi anthu osowa ndi kupulumutsa osowa ku imfa. 
Psalms72:14 Iye adzalanditsa iwo ku mazunzo ndi chiwawa pakuti magazi awo ndi amtengo wapatali pamaso pake. 
Psalms72:15 Iye akhale ndi moyo wautali; golide ochokera ku Seba apatsidwe kwa iye. Anthu amupempherere nthawi zonse ndi kumudalitsa tsiku lonse. 
Psalms72:16 Mulole kuti tirigu achuluke mʼdziko lonse; pamwamba pa mapiri pakhale tirigu. Zipatso zake zichuluke ngati za ku Lebanoni; zichuluke ngati udzu wakuthengo 
Psalms72:17 Dzina lake likhazikike kwamuyaya, lipitirire kukhala monga momwe limakhalira dzuwa. Mitundu yonse idzadalitsika kudzera mwa iye ndipo iwo adzamutcha iye wodala." 
Psalms72:18 Matamando akhale kwa Yehova Mulungu, Mulungu wa Israeli amene Iye yekha amachita ntchito zodabwitsa." 
Psalms72:19 Matamando akhale ku dzina lake laulemerero kwamuyaya dziko lonse lapansi lidzaze ndi ulemerero wake. Ameni ndi Ameni. 
Psalms72:20 Uku ndiko kumaliza kwa mapemphero a Davide mwana wa Yese. 
Psalms73:1 Salimo la Asafu. Mulungu ndi wabwino ndithu kwa Israeli, kwa iwo amene ndi oyera mtima." 
Psalms73:2 Koma kunena za ine, mapazi anga anali pafupi kuterereka; ndinatsala pangʼono kugwa." 
Psalms73:3 Pakuti ndinkachitira nsanje odzitamandira, pamene ndinaona mtendere wa anthu oyipa." 
Psalms73:4 Iwo alibe zosautsa; matupi awo ndi athanzi ndi amphamvu. 
Psalms73:5 Saona mavuto monga anthu ena; sazunzika ngati anthu ena onse. 
Psalms73:6 Nʼchifukwa chake kunyada kuli monga mkanda wa mʼkhosi mwawo; amadziveka chiwawa. 
Psalms73:7 Mʼmitima yawo yokhota mumachokera zolakwa; zoyipa zochokera mʼmaganizo awo sizidziwa malire. 
Psalms73:8 Iwowo amanyogodola ndi kumayankhula zoyipa; mwa kudzikuza kwawo amaopseza ena nʼkumati, “Tikuponderezani.”" 
Psalms73:9 Pakamwa pawo pamayankhula monyoza Mulungu kumwamba ndipo lilime lawo limayenda pa dziko lapansi. 
Psalms73:10 Nʼchifukwa chake anthu awo amapita kwa iwowo ndi kumwa madzi mochuluka. 
Psalms73:11 Iwo amati, “Kodi Mulungu angadziwe bwanji? Kodi Wammwambamwamba angadziwe kalikonse?”" 
Psalms73:12 Umu ndi mmene oyipa alili; nthawi zonse ali pabwino ndipo chuma chawo chimachulukirachulukira. 
Psalms73:13 Ndithudi ine ndawusunga pachabe mtima wanga woyera; pachabe ndasamba mʼmanja mwanga mwa kusalakwa kwanga. 
Psalms73:14 Tsiku lonse ndapeza mavuto; ndakhala ndi kulangidwa mmawa uliwonse. 
Psalms73:15 Ndikanati, “Ndidzayankhula motere,” ndikanachita chosakhulupirika kwa ana anu." 
Psalms73:16 Pamene ndinayesa kuti ndimvetse zonsezi, zinandisautsa kwambiri" 
Psalms73:17 kufikira nditalowa mʼmalo opatulika a Mulungu; pamenepo ndinamvetsa mathero awo. 
Psalms73:18 Zoonadi Inu munawayika pa malo woterera; Mumawagwetsa pansi kuti awonongeke. 
Psalms73:19 Mwamsangamsanga iwo amawonongedwa, amasesedwa kwathunthu ndi mantha!" 
Psalms73:20 Monga loto pamene wina adzuka, kotero pamene Inu muuka, Inu Ambuye, mudzawanyoza ngati maloto chabe." 
Psalms73:21 Pamene mtima wanga unasautsidwa ndi kuwawidwa mu mzimu mwanga," 
Psalms73:22 ndinali wopusa ndi wosadziwa; ndinali chirombo chopanda nzeru pamaso panu. 
Psalms73:23 Komabe ineyo ndili ndi Inu nthawi zonse; mumandigwira dzanja langa lamanja. 
Psalms73:24 Inu mumanditsogolera ndi malangizo anu ndipo pambuyo pake mudzanditenga ku ulemerero. 
Psalms73:25 Kodi kumwamba ndili ndi yani kupatula Inu? Ndipo dziko lapansi lilibe chilichonse chimene ndimachilakalaka koposa Inuyo. 
Psalms73:26 Thupi ndi mtima wanga zitha kufowoka, koma Mulungu ndiye mphamvu ya mtima wanga ndi cholandira changa kwamuyaya." 
Psalms73:27 Iwo amene ali kutali ndi Inu adzawonongeka; Inu mumawononga onse osakhulupirika pamaso panu. 
Psalms73:28 Koma kunena za Ine ndi kwabwino kukhala pafupi ndi Mulungu. Ndatsimikiza kuti Ambuye Yehova ndiwo pothawirapo panga ndipo ndidzalalika ntchito zanu zonse. 
Psalms74:1 Ndakatulo ya Asafu. Nʼchifukwa chiyani mwatitaya ife kwamuyaya, Inu Mulungu? Chifukwa chiyani mkwiyo wanu ukutukutira pa nkhosa za busa lanu?" 
Psalms74:2 Kumbukirani anthu amene munawagula kalekale, fuko la cholowa chanu, limene Inu munaliwombola, phiri la Ziyoni, kumene inuyo mumakhala." 
Psalms74:3 Tembenuzani mapazi kuloza ku mabwinja awa amuyaya chiwonongeko ichi chonse mdani wabweretsa pa malo opatulika. 
Psalms74:4 Adani anu anabangula pa malo pamene Inu munkakumana nafe; anayimika mbendera zawo monga zizindikiro zachigonjetso. 
Psalms74:5 Iwo anachita ngati anthu oti anyamula mbendera zawo kuti adule mitengo mʼnkhalango. 
Psalms74:6 Kenaka anaphwanya ndi nkhwangwa ndi akasemasema awo zonse zimene tinapachika. 
Psalms74:7 Iwo anatentha malo anu opatulika mpaka kuwagwetsa pansi; anadetsa malo okhalamo dzina lanu. 
Psalms74:8 Ndipo anati mʼmitima yawo, “Tawatha kwathunthu.” Anatentha malo aliwonse amene Mulungu amapembedzedwerako mʼdzikomo." 
Psalms74:9 Ife sitinapatsidwe chizindikiro chodabwitsa; palibe aneneri amene atsala ndipo palibe aliyense wa ife akudziwa kuti izi zidzatenga nthawi yayitali bwanji. 
Psalms74:10 Kodi mpaka liti, mdani adzanyoze Inu Mulungu? Kodi amaliwongowa adzapeputsa dzina lanu kwamuyaya?" 
Psalms74:11 Chifukwa chiyani mukubweza dzanja lanu lamanja? Litulutseni kuchoka pachifuwa chanu ndipo muwawononge! 
Psalms74:12 Koma Inu Mulungu, ndinu Mfumu yanga kuyambira kalekale; Mumabweretsa chipulumutso pa dziko lapansi." 
Psalms74:13 Ndinu amene munagawa nyanja ndi mphamvu yanu; munathyola mitu ya zirombo za mʼmadzi. 
Psalms74:14 Ndinu amene munaphwanya mitu ya Leviyatani ndi kuyipereka ngati chakudya cha zirombo za mʼchipululu. 
Psalms74:15 Ndinu amene munatsekula akasupe ndi mitsinje, munawumitsa mitsinje imene siphwa nthawi zonse." 
Psalms74:16 Masana ndi anu ndipo usiku ndi wanunso; Inuyo munakhazikitsa dzuwa ndi mwezi. 
Psalms74:17 Ndinu amene munakhazikitsa malire onse a dziko lapansi; munakhazikitsa chilimwe ndi dzinja. 
Psalms74:18 Kumbukirani momwe mdani wakunyozerani Inu Yehova, momwe anthu opusa apeputsira dzina lanu." 
Psalms74:19 Musapereke moyo wa nkhunda yanu ku zirombo zakuthengo; nthawi zonse musayiwale miyoyo ya anthu anu osautsidwa. 
Psalms74:20 Mukumbukire pangano lanu, pakuti malo obisika a mʼdziko asanduka mochitira zachiwawa zochuluka." 
Psalms74:21 Musalole kuti osautsidwa abwerere mwamanyazi; osauka ndi osowa atamande dzina lanu. 
Psalms74:22 Dzukani Inu Mulungu ndipo dzitetezeni pa mlandu; kumbukirani momwe opusa akukunyozerani tsiku lonse. 
Psalms74:23 Musalekerere phokoso la otsutsana nanu, chiwawa cha adani anu, chimene chikumveka kosalekeza." 
Psalms75:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe, potsata mayimbidwe a “Musawononge.” Salimo la Asafu. Nyimbo. Tikuthokoza Inu Mulungu, tikuthokoza, pakuti dzina lanu lili pafupi nafe, anthutu amafotokoza za ntchito zanu zodabwitsa." 
Psalms75:2 Mumati, “Ine ndimayika nthawi yoyenera, ndine amene ndimaweruza mwachilungamo." 
Psalms75:3 Pamene dziko lapansi ndi anthu ake onse anjenjemera, ndine amene ndimagwiriziza mizati yake molimba. Sela" 
Psalms75:4 Kwa odzitama ndikuti, ‘Musadzitamenso,’ ndipo kwa oyipa, ‘Musatukulenso nyanga zanu." 
Psalms75:5 Musatukule nyanga zanu motsutsana ndi kumwamba; musayankhule ndi khosi losololoka.’ ” 
Psalms75:6 Kugamula milandu sikuchokera kummawa kapena kumadzulo kapena ku chipululu. 
Psalms75:7 Koma ndi Mulungu amene amaweruza: Iyeyo amatsitsa wina, nakwezanso wina." 
Psalms75:8 Mʼdzanja la Yehova muli chikho chodzaza ndi vinyo wochita thovu, wosakanizidwa ndi zokometsera; Iye amamutsanulira pansi ndipo onse oyipa a dziko lapansi amamwa ndi senga zake zonse." 
Psalms75:9 Kunena za ine, ndidzalengeza izi kwamuyaya; ndidzayimba matamando kwa Mulungu wa Yakobo." 
Psalms75:10 Ndidzadula nyanga za onse oyipa koma nyanga za olungama zidzakwezedwa. 
Psalms76:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Pa zoyimbira za zingwe. Salimo la Asafu. Mulungu amadziwika mu Yuda; dzina lake ndi lotchuka mu Israeli. 
Psalms76:2 Tenti yake ili mu Salemu, malo ake okhalamo mu Ziyoni." 
Psalms76:3 Kumeneko Iye anathyola mivi yowuluka, zishango ndi malupanga, zida zankhondo. Sela" 
Psalms76:4 Wolemekezeka ndinu, wamphamvu kuposa mapiri amene ali ndi nyama zambiri." 
Psalms76:5 Anthu owuma mtima amagona atalandidwa chuma, Iwowo amagona tulo tawo totsiriza; palibe mmodzi wamphamvu amene angatukule manja ake." 
Psalms76:6 Pa kudzudzula kwanu, Inu Mulungu wa Yakobo, kavalo pamodzi ndi galeta zimakhala chete zitagona pansi." 
Psalms76:7 Inu nokha ndiye muyenera kuopedwa. Angathe kuyima pamaso panu ndani mukakwiya? 
Psalms76:8 Kuchokera kumwamba Inu munalengeza chiweruzo, ndipo dziko linaopa ndi kukhala chete," 
Psalms76:9 pamene Inu Mulungu munadzuka kuti muweruze, kupulumutsa onse osautsidwa mʼdziko. Sela" 
Psalms76:10 Zoonadi, ukali wanu pa anthu umakubweretserani matamando ndipo opulumuka ku ukali wanu mumawasunga pafupi nanu." 
Psalms76:11 Chitani malumbiro kwa Yehova Mulungu wanu ndipo muwakwaniritse; anthu onse omuzungulira abweretse mphatso kwa Iye amene ayenera kuopedwa. 
Psalms76:12 Iye amaswa mzimu wa olamulira; amaopedwa ndi mafumu a dziko lapansi. 
Psalms77:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Potsata mayimbidwe a Yedutuni. Salimo la Asafu. Ndinafuwulira Mulungu kupempha thandizo; ndinafuwula mokweza kwa Mulungu kuti anditcherere khutu. 
Psalms77:2 Pamene ndinali pa masautso ndinafunafuna Ambuye; usiku ndinatambasula manja mosalekeza ndipo moyo wanga unakana kutonthozedwa. 
Psalms77:3 Ndinakumbukira Inu Mulungu, ndipo ndinabuwula; ndinasinkhasinkha ndipo mzimu wanga unalefuka. Sela" 
Psalms77:4 Munagwira zikope zanga kuti ndisagone ndipo ndinavutika kwambiri kuti ndiyankhule. 
Psalms77:5 Ndinaganizira za masiku akale, zaka zamakedzana;" 
Psalms77:6 Ndinakumbukira nyimbo zanga usiku. Mtima wanga unasinkhasinkha ndipo mzimu wanga unafunsa kuti," 
Psalms77:7 “Kodi Ambuye adzatikana mpaka muyaya? Kodi Iwo sadzaonetsanso kukoma mtima kwawo? 
Psalms77:8 Kodi Chikondi chake chosatha chija chatheratu? Kodi malonjezo ake alephera nthawi yonse? 
Psalms77:9 Kodi Mulungu wayiwala kukhala wokoma mtima? Kodi mu mkwiyo wake waleka chifundo chake?” 
Psalms77:10 Ndipo ndinaganiza, “Pa izi ine ndidzapemphanso: zaka za dzanja lamanja la Wammwambamwamba." 
Psalms77:11 Ine ndidzakumbukira ntchito za Yehova; Ine ndidzakumbukira zodabwitsa zanu za kalekale. 
Psalms77:12 Ndidzakumbukira ntchito zanu ndi kulingalira zodabwitsa zanu.” 
Psalms77:13 Njira zanu Mulungu ndi zoyera. Kodi ndi mulungu uti ali wamkulu kuposa Mulungu wathu? 
Psalms77:14 Inu ndinu Mulungu wochita zodabwitsa; Mumaonetsera mphamvu yanu pakati pa mitundu ya anthu. 
Psalms77:15 Ndi dzanja lanu lamphamvu munawombola anthu anu, zidzukulu za Yakobo ndi Yosefe. Sela" 
Psalms77:16 Madzi anakuonani Mulungu, madzi anakuonani ndipo anachita mantha; nyanja yozama inakomoka." 
Psalms77:17 Mitambo inakhuthula madzi ake pansi, mu mlengalenga munamveka mabingu; mivi yanu inawuluka uku ndi uku." 
Psalms77:18 Bingu lanu linamveka mʼmphepo ya kamvuluvulu, mphenzi yanu inawalitsa dziko lonse; dziko lapansi linanjenjemera ndi kugwedezeka." 
Psalms77:19 Njira yanu inadutsa pa nyanja, njira yanu inadutsa pa madzi amphamvu, ngakhale zidindo za mapazi anu sizinaoneke." 
Psalms77:20 Inu munatsogolera anthu anu ngati gulu la nkhosa mwa dzanja la Mose ndi Aaroni. 
Psalms78:1 Ndakatulo ya Asafu. Inu anthu anga imvani chiphunzitso changa; mvetserani mawu a pakamwa panga. 
Psalms78:2 Ndidzatsekula pakamwa panga mʼmafanizo, ndidzayankhula zinthu zobisika, zinthu zakalekale" 
Psalms78:3 zimene tinazimva ndi kuzidziwa, zimene makolo athu anatiwuza." 
Psalms78:4 Sitidzabisira ana awo, tidzafotokozera mʼbado wotsatira ntchito zotamandika za Yehova, mphamvu zake, ndi zozizwitsa zimene Iye wachita." 
Psalms78:5 Iye anapereka mawu wodzichitira umboni kwa Yakobo ndi kukhazikitsa lamulo mu Israeli, zimene analamulira makolo athu kuphunzitsa ana awo," 
Psalms78:6 kotero kuti mʼbado wotsatira uthe kuzidziwa, ngakhale ana amene sanabadwe, ndi kuti iwo akafotokozere ana awonso." 
Psalms78:7 Choncho iwo adzakhulupirira Mulungu ndipo sadzayiwala ntchito zake koma adzasunga malamulo ake. 
Psalms78:8 Iwo asadzakhale monga makolo awo, mʼbado wosamvera ndi wowukira, umene mitima yake inali yosamvera Mulungu, umene mizimu yake inali yosakhulupirika kwa Iye." 
Psalms78:9 Anthu a ku Efereimu, ngakhale ananyamula mauta, anathawabe pa nthawi ya nkhondo;" 
Psalms78:10 iwo sanasunge pangano la Mulungu ndipo anakana kukhala mʼmoyo wotsatira lamulo lake. 
Psalms78:11 Anayiwala zimene Iye anachita, zozizwitsa zimene anawaonetsa." 
Psalms78:12 Iyeyo anachita zodabwitsa makolo athu akuona, mʼdziko la Igupto, mʼchigawo cha Zowani." 
Psalms78:13 Anagawa nyanja pakati ndi kudutsitsapo iwowo, Iye anachititsa madzi kuyima chilili ngati khoma." 
Psalms78:14 Anawatsogolera ndi mtambo masana ndi kuwala kwa moto usiku wonse. 
Psalms78:15 Iye anangʼamba miyala mʼchipululu ndi kuwapatsa madzi ochuluka ngati a mʼnyanja zambiri; 
Psalms78:16 Anatulutsa mitsinje kuchokera mʼmingʼalu ya miyala ndi kuyenda madzi ngati mitsinje. 
Psalms78:17 Komabe iwowo anapitiriza kumuchimwira Iye, kuwukira Wammwambamwamba mʼchipululu." 
Psalms78:18 Ananyoza Mulungu mwadala pomuwumiriza kuti awapatse chakudya chimene anachilakalaka. 
Psalms78:19 Iwo anayankhula motsutsana naye ponena kuti, “Kodi Mulungu angatipatse chakudya mʼchipululu?" 
Psalms78:20 Iye atamenya thanthwe madzi anatuluka, ndipo mitsinje inadzaza ndi madzi. Koma iye angatipatsenso ife chakudya? Kodi angapereke nyama kwa anthu akewa?”" 
Psalms78:21 Yehova atawamva anakwiya kwambiri; moto wake unayaka kutsutsana ndi Yakobo, ndipo mkwiyo wake unauka kutsutsana ndi Israeli," 
Psalms78:22 pakuti iwo sanakhulupirire Mulungu kapena kudalira chipulumutso chake. 
Psalms78:23 Komabe Iye anapereka lamulo kwa mitambo mmwamba ndi kutsekula makomo a mayiko akumwamba; 
Psalms78:24 anagwetsa mana kuti anthu adye, anawapatsa tirigu wakumwamba." 
Psalms78:25 Anthu anadya buledi wa angelo, Iye anawatumizira chakudya chonse chimene akanatha kudya." 
Psalms78:26 Anamasula mphepo ya kummwera kuchokera kumwamba, ndi kutsogolera mphepo ya kummwera mwa mphamvu zake." 
Psalms78:27 Iye anawagwetsera nyama ngati fumbi, mbalame zowuluka ngati mchenga wa mʼmbali mwa nyanja." 
Psalms78:28 Anazibweretsa kwa iwo mʼkati mwa misasa yawo, kuzungulira matenti awo onse." 
Psalms78:29 Iwo anadya mpaka anatsala nazo zochuluka pakuti Iye anawapatsa zimene anazilakalaka. 
Psalms78:30 Koma iwowo anasiya kudya chakudya anachilakalakacho, chakudya chili mʼkamwa mwawobe," 
Psalms78:31 mkwiyo wa Mulungu unawayakira; Iye anapha amphamvu onse pakati pawo, kugwetsa anyamata abwino kwambiri mu Israeli." 
Psalms78:32 Ngakhale zinali chomwechi, iwo anapitirira kuchimwa; ngakhale anaona zozizwitsa zakezo iwowo sanakhulupirirebe." 
Psalms78:33 Kotero Mulungu anachepetsa masiku awo kuti azimirire ngati mpweya. Iye anachepetsa zaka zawo kuti zithere mʼmasautso. 
Psalms78:34 Mulungu atawapha, iwo amamufunafuna Iyeyo; iwo ankatembenukiranso kwa Iye mwachangu." 
Psalms78:35 Ankakumbukira kuti Mulungu ndiye Thanthwe lawo, kuti Mulungu Wammwambamwamba ndiye Mpulumutsi wawo." 
Psalms78:36 Komabe ankamuthyasika ndi pakamwa pawo, kumunamiza ndi malilime awo;" 
Psalms78:37 Mitima yawo sinali yokhazikika pa Iye, iwo sanakhulupirike ku pangano lake." 
Psalms78:38 Komabe Iye anali wachifundo; anakhululukira mphulupulu zawo ndipo sanawawononge. Nthawi ndi nthawi Iye anabweza mkwiyo wake ndipo sanawutse ukali wake wonse. 
Psalms78:39 Iye anakumbukira kuti iwo anali anthu chabe, mphepo yopita imene sibwereranso." 
Psalms78:40 Nthawi zambiri iwo ankamuwukira Iye mʼchipululu ndi kumumvetsa chisoni mʼdziko lopanda kanthu! 
Psalms78:41 Kawirikawiri iwo ankamuyesa Mulungu; ankamuputa Woyera wa Israeli. 
Psalms78:42 Sanakumbukire mphamvu zake, tsiku limene Iye anawawombola kwa ozunza," 
Psalms78:43 tsiku limene Iyeyo anaonetsa poyera zizindikiro zozizwitsa zake mu Igupto, zozizwitsa zake mʼchigawo cha Zowani." 
Psalms78:44 Iye anasandutsa mitsinje yawo kukhala magazi; Iwo sanathe kumwa madzi ochokera mʼmitsinje yawo. 
Psalms78:45 Iye anawatumizira magulu a ntchentche zimene zinawawononga, ndiponso achule amene anawasakaza." 
Psalms78:46 Iye anapereka mbewu zawo kwa ziwala, zokolola zawo kwa dzombe." 
Psalms78:47 Iye anawononga mphesa zawo ndi matalala ndiponso mitengo yawo yankhuyu ndi chisanu. 
Psalms78:48 Iye anapereka ngʼombe zawo ku matalala, zoweta zawo ku zingʼaningʼani." 
Psalms78:49 Anakhuthula moto wa ukali wake pa iwo, anawapsera mtima nawakwiyira nʼkuwabweretsera masautso. Zimenezi zinali ngati gulu la angelo osakaza." 
Psalms78:50 Analolera kukwiya, sanawapulumutse ku imfa koma anawapereka ku mliri." 
Psalms78:51 Anakantha ana oyamba kubadwa a Igupto, zipatso zoyamba kucha za mphamvu zawo mʼmatenti a Hamu" 
Psalms78:52 Koma Iye anatulutsa anthu ake ngati ziweto; anawatsogolera ngati nkhosa kudutsa mʼchipululu. 
Psalms78:53 Anawatsogolera bwinobwino kotero kuti analibe mantha koma nyanja inamiza adani awo. 
Psalms78:54 Kotero anawafikitsa ku malire a dziko lake loyera, ku dziko lamapiri limene dzanja lake lamanja linawatengera." 
Psalms78:55 Iye anathamangitsa mitundu ya anthu patsogolo pawo ndipo anapereka mayiko awo kwa Aisraeli kuti akhale awo; Iye anakhazikitsa mafuko a Israeli mʼnyumba zawo. 
Psalms78:56 Koma iwo anayesa Mulungu ndi kuwukira Wammwambamwamba; sanasunge malamulo ake. 
Psalms78:57 Anakhala okanika ndi osakhulupirika monga makolo awo, anapotoka monga uta wosakhulupirika." 
Psalms78:58 Anakwiyitsa Iyeyo ndi malo awo opembedzera mafano; anawutsa nsanje yake ndi mafano awo. 
Psalms78:59 Pamene Mulungu anamva zimenezi, anakwiya kwambiri; Iye anakana Israeli kwathunthu." 
Psalms78:60 Anasiya nyumba ya ku Silo, tenti imene Iyeyo anayimanga pakati pa anthu." 
Psalms78:61 Anatumiza mphamvu zake ku ukapolo, ulemerero wake mʼmanja mwa adani." 
Psalms78:62 Anapereka anthu ake ku lupanga; anakwiya kwambiri ndi cholowa chake. 
Psalms78:63 Moto unanyeketsa anyamata awo, ndipo anamwali awo analibe nyimbo za ukwati;" 
Psalms78:64 ansembe awo anaphedwa ndi lupanga, ndipo amayi awo amasiye sanathe kulira." 
Psalms78:65 Kenaka Ambuye anakhala ngati akudzuka kutulo, ngati munthu wamphamvu wofuwula chifukwa cha vinyo." 
Psalms78:66 Iye anathamangitsa adani ake; anawachititsa manyazi ku nthawi zonse. 
Psalms78:67 Kenaka Iye anakana matenti a Yosefe, sanasankhe fuko la Efereimu;" 
Psalms78:68 Koma anasankha fuko la Yuda, phiri la Ziyoni limene analikonda." 
Psalms78:69 Iye anamanga malo ake opatulika ngati zitunda, dziko limene analikhazikitsa kwamuyaya." 
Psalms78:70 Anasankha Davide mtumiki wake ndi kumuchotsa pakati pa makola ankhosa; 
Psalms78:71 kuchokera koyangʼanira nkhosa anamubweretsa kuti akhale mʼbusa wa anthu ake, Yakobo, wa Israeli cholowa chake." 
Psalms78:72 Ndipo Davide anawaweta ndi mtima wolungama; ndi manja aluso anawatsogolera. 
Psalms79:1 Salimo la Asafu. Inu Mulungu, anthu a mitundu ina alowerera mʼcholowa chanu; ayipitsa Nyumba yanu yoyera, asandutsa Yerusalemu kukhala bwinja." 
Psalms79:2 Iwo anapereka mitembo ya atumiki anu kwa mbalame zamlengalenga ngati chakudya, matupi a oyera mtima anu kwa zirombo za dziko lapansi." 
Psalms79:3 Akhetsa magazi monga madzi kuzungulira Yerusalemu yense, ndipo palibe wina woti ayike mʼmanda anthu akufa." 
Psalms79:4 Ife ndife chinthu chonyozeka kwa anansi athu, choseketsa ndi cholalatiridwa kwa iwo amene atizungulira." 
Psalms79:5 Mpaka liti Inu Yehova? Kodi mudzakwiya mpaka muyaya? Kodi mpaka liti nsanje yanu idzayaka ngati moto? 
Psalms79:6 Khuthulirani ukali wanu pa anthu a mitundu ina amene sakudziwani Inu, pa maufumu amene sayitana pa dzina lanu;" 
Psalms79:7 pakuti iwo ameza Yakobo ndi kuwononga dziko lawo. 
Psalms79:8 Musatilange chifukwa cha machimo a makolo athu chifundo chanu chibwere msanga kukumana nafe, pakuti tili ndi chosowa chachikulu." 
Psalms79:9 Tithandizeni Inu Mulungu Mpulumutsi wathu, chifukwa cha ulemerero wa dzina lanu; tipulumutseni ndi kutikhululukira machimo athu chifukwa cha dzina lanu." 
Psalms79:10 Chifukwa chiyani anthu a mitundu ina akuti, “Ali kuti Mulungu wawo?” Ife tikuona, zidziwike pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina kuti mumabwezera chilango chifukwa cha magazi amene anakhetsedwa a atumiki anu." 
Psalms79:11 Kubuwula kwa anthu a mʼndende kufike pamaso panu; ndi mphamvu ya dzanja lanu muwasunge amene aweruzidwa kuti aphedwe. 
Psalms79:12 Mubwezere kwa anansi athu kasanu nʼkawiri kunyoza kumene ananyoza Inu Ambuye. 
Psalms79:13 Pamenepo ife anthu anu, nkhosa za pabusa panu, tidzakutamandani kwamuyaya, kuchokera mʼbado ndi mʼbado tidzafotokoza za matamando anu." 
Psalms80:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Potsata mayimbidwe a “Kakombo wa Pangano.” Salimo la Asafu. Tcherani khutu Inu mʼbusa wa Israeli, Inu amene mumatsogolera Yosefe monga nkhosa; Inu amene mumakhala pa mpando waufumu pakati pa akerubi, walani" 
Psalms80:2 kwa Efereimu, Benjamini ndi Manase. Utsani mphamvu yanu; bwerani ndi kutipulumutsa." 
Psalms80:3 Tibwezereni mwakale Inu Mulungu; nkhope yanu itiwalire kuti tipulumutsidwe. 
Psalms80:4 Inu Mulungu Wamphamvuzonse, mpaka liti mkwiyo wanu udzanyeka kutsutsana ndi mapemphero a anthu anu?" 
Psalms80:5 Mwawadyetsa buledi wa misozi; mwachitisa iwo kumwa misozi yodzaza mbale. 
Psalms80:6 Mwachititsa kuti tikhale gwero la mikangano pakati pa anansi athu, ndipo adani athu akutinyoza." 
Psalms80:7 Tibwezereni mwakale Inu Mulungu Wamphamvuzonse, nkhope yanu itiwalire kuti tipulumutsidwe." 
Psalms80:8 Munatulutsa mpesa kuchoka ku Igupto; munathamangitsa anthu a mitundu ina ndi kuwudzala mpesawo. 
Psalms80:9 Munawulimira munda wamphesawo, ndipo unamera ndi kudzaza dziko." 
Psalms80:10 Mapiri anaphimbidwa ndi mthunzi wake, mikungudza yamphamvu ndi nthambi zake." 
Psalms80:11 Unatambalitsa nthambi zake mpaka ku nyanja, mphukira zake mpaka ku mtsinje." 
Psalms80:12 Chifukwa chiyani mwagwetsa makoma ake kuti onse amene akudutsa athyole mphesa zake? 
Psalms80:13 Nguluwe zochokera mʼnkhalango zikuwononga ndipo zirombo za mthengo zimawudya. 
Psalms80:14 Bweraninso kwa ife Inu Mulungu Wamphamvuzonse! Yangʼanani pansi muli kumwambako ndipo muone! Uyangʼanireni mpesa umenewu," 
Psalms80:15 muzu umene dzanja lanu lamanja ladzala, mwana amene inu munamukuza nokha." 
Psalms80:16 Mpesa wanu wadulidwa ndi kutenthedwa ndi moto; pakudzudzula kwanu anthu anu awonongeka. 
Psalms80:17 Dzanja lanu likhale pa munthu amene ali ku dzanja lanu lamanja, mwana wa munthu amene mwalera nokha." 
Psalms80:18 Ndipo ife sitidzatembenukira kumbali kuchoka kwa Inu; titsitsimutseni ndipo tidzayitana pa dzina lanu. 
Psalms80:19 Tibwezereni mwakale Inu Yehova Mulungu Wamphamvuzonse nkhope yanu itiwalire kuti tipulumutsidwe. 
Psalms81:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Potsata mayimbidwe a gititi. Salimo la Asafu. Imbani mwachimwemwe kwa Mulungu mphamvu yathu; Fuwulani mokweza kwa Mulungu wa Yakobo! 
Psalms81:2 Yambani nyimbo, imbani tambolini imbani pangwe wolira bwino ndi zeze." 
Psalms81:3 Imbani lipenga la nyanga ya nkhosa yayimuna pa mwezi watsopano, ndi pamene mwezi waoneka wonse, pa tsiku la phwando;" 
Psalms81:4 ili ndi lamulo kwa Israeli, langizo la Mulungu wa Yakobo." 
Psalms81:5 Iye anapereka lamulolo kwa zidzukulu za Yosefe pamene anatuluka kulimbana ndi Igupto, kumene tinamva chiyankhulo chimene sitinachidziwe." 
Psalms81:6 Iye akunena kuti, “Ine ndinachotsa zolemetsa pa mapewa awo; Manja awo anamasulidwa mʼdengu." 
Psalms81:7 Pa mavuto anu munayitana ndipo ndinakulanditsani, ndinakuyankhani kuchokera mʼmitambo ya mabingu; ndinakuyesani pa madzi a ku Meriba. Sela" 
Psalms81:8 “Imvani anthu anga, ndipo ndidzakuchenjezani ngati mungathe kumvetsera, Inu Israeli!" 
Psalms81:9 Musadzakhale ndi mulungu wachilendo pakati panu; musadzagwadire mulungu wina. 
Psalms81:10 Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu, amene ndinakutulutsani mʼdziko la Igupto. Yasamani kukamwa kwanu ndipo ndidzakudyetsani." 
Psalms81:11 “Koma anthu anga sanandimvere; Israeli sanandigonjere. 
Psalms81:12 Kotero ndinawasiya ndi mitima yawo yosamverayo kuti atsate zimene ankafuna. 
Psalms81:13 “Anthu anga akanangondimvera, Israeli akanatsatira njira zanga," 
Psalms81:14 nʼkanafulumira motani kuti ndigonjetse adani awo ndi kutembenuza mkono wanga kulimbana ndi amaliwongo! 
Psalms81:15 Iwo amene amadana ndi Yehova akanakhwinyata pamaso pake, ndipo chilango chawo chinakakhala mpaka kalekale." 
Psalms81:16 Koma inu mukanadyetsedwa tirigu wabwino kwambiri; ndikanakukhutitsani ndi uchi wochokera pa thanthwe.” 
Psalms82:1 Salimo la Asafu. Mulungu akutsogolera msonkhano waukulu; Iye akuweruza pakati pa “milungu.” 
Psalms82:2 “Mudzateteza osalungama mpaka liti, ndi kukondera anthu oyipa?" 
Psalms82:3 Tetezani anthu ofowoka ndi amasiye; mukhazikitse ufulu wa anthu osauka ndi ozunzika. 
Psalms82:4 Landitsani anthu ofowoka ndi osowa; apulumutseni mʼdzanja la anthu oyipa. 
Psalms82:5 “Iwo sadziwa kanthu, sazindikira kalikonse. Amayendayenda mu mdima; maziko onse a dziko lapansi agwedezeka." 
Psalms82:6 “Ndinati, ‘Inu ndinu Mulungu, nonsenu ndinu ana a Wammwambamwamba.’" 
Psalms82:7 Koma mudzafa ngati anthu wamba; mudzagwa ngati wolamula wina aliyense.” 
Psalms82:8 Dzukani Inu Mulungu, weruzani dziko lapansi, pakuti mayiko onse ndi cholowa chanu." 
Psalms83:1 Nyimbo. Salimo la Asafu. Inu Mulungu musakhale chete; musangoti phee, Mulungu musangoti duu." 
Psalms83:2 Onani adani anu akuchita chiwawa, amene amadana nanu autsa mitu yawo." 
Psalms83:3 Mochenjera iwo akukambirana za chiwembu kutsutsana ndi anthu anu; Iwo akukonzekera kutsutsana ndi omwe mumawakonda. 
Psalms83:4 Iwo akunena kuti, “Bwerani” akutero, “Tiyeni tiwononge mtundu wonsewu kuti dzina la Israeli lisakumbukikenso.”" 
Psalms83:5 Ndi mtima umodzi akukonzekera chiwembu; Iwo achita mgwirizano kutsutsana nanu: 
Psalms83:6 Matenti a Edomu ndi Aismaeli, Mowabu ndi Ahagiri," 
Psalms83:7 Agebala, Aamoni ndi Aamaleki, Afilisti, pamodzi ndi anthu a ku Turo." 
Psalms83:8 Ngakhalenso Aasiriya aphatikizana nawo kupereka mphamvu kwa ana a Loti. Sela 
Psalms83:9 Muwachitire zomwe munachitira Amidiyani, monga munachitira Sisera ndi Yabini ku mtsinje wa Kisoni." 
Psalms83:10 Amene anawonongedwa ku Endori ndi kukhala ngati zinyalala. 
Psalms83:11 Anthu awo otchuka muwachite zomwe munachita Orebu ndi Zeebu ana a mafumu muwachite zomwe munachita Zeba ndi Zalimuna," 
Psalms83:12 amene anati, “Tiyeni tilande dziko la msipu la Mulungu.”" 
Psalms83:13 Muwasandutse fumbi lowuluka, Inu Mulungu wanga, ngati mankhusu owuluka ndi mphepo." 
Psalms83:14 Monga moto umatentha nkhalango, kapena malawi a moto kuyatsa phiri," 
Psalms83:15 kotero muwathamangitse ndi mphepo yamkuntho, ndi kuwachititsa mantha ndi namondwe." 
Psalms83:16 Muphimbe nkhope zawo ndi manyazi kuti adzafunefune dzina lanu Yehova. 
Psalms83:17 Achite manyazi ndi mantha nthawi zonse; awonongeke mwa manyazi. 
Psalms83:18 Adziwe kuti Inu amene dzina lanu ndi Yehova, ndinu nokha Wammwambamwamba pa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Psalms84:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Potsata mayimbidwe a Gititi. Salimo la ana a Kora. Malo anu okhalamo ndi okomadi, Inu Yehova Wamphamvuzonse!" 
Psalms84:2 Moyo wanga ukulakalaka, mpaka kukomoka, kufuna mabwalo a Yehova; Mtima wanga ndi thupi langa zikufuwulira Mulungu wamoyo." 
Psalms84:3 Ngakhale timba wapeza nyumba yokhalamo, ndiponso namzeze wadzipezera yekha chisa, kumene amagonekako ana ake pafupi ndi guwa lanu la nsembe, Inu Yehova Wamphamvuzonse, Mfumu yanga ndi Mulungu wanga." 
Psalms84:4 Odala amene amakhala mʼNyumba yanu; nthawi zonse amakutamandani. Sela 
Psalms84:5 Odala amene mphamvu yawo ili mwa Inu, mitima yawo ikufunitsitsa kuyenda mʼmisewu yopita ku Ziyoni." 
Psalms84:6 Pamene akudutsa chigwa cha Baka, amachisandutsa malo a akasupe; mvula ya chizimalupsa imadzazanso mayiwe ake." 
Psalms84:7 Iwo amanka nakulirakulira mphamvu mpaka aliyense ataonekera pamaso pa Mulungu mu Ziyoni. 
Psalms84:8 Imvani pemphero langa, Inu Yehova Mulungu Wamphamvuzonse; mvereni Inu Mulungu wa Yakobo. Sela" 
Psalms84:9 Yangʼanani chishango chathu, Inu Mulungu; yangʼanani mokoma mtima pa wodzozedwa wanu." 
Psalms84:10 Nʼkwabwino kukhala mʼmabwalo anu tsiku limodzi kuposa kukhala kwina kwake kwa zaka 1,000; Ine ndingakonde kukhala mlonda wa pa khomo la Nyumba ya Mulungu wanga kuposa kukhala mʼmatenti a anthu oyipa." 
Psalms84:11 Pakuti Yehova Mulungu ndi dzuwa ndi chishango; Yehova amapereka chisomo ndi ulemu; Iye sawamana zinthu zabwino iwo amene amayenda mwangwiro. 
Psalms84:12 Inu Yehova Wamphamvuzonse, wodala ndi munthu amene amakhulupirira Inu." 
Psalms85:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Salimo la ana a Kora. Yehova munakomera mtima dziko lanu; munabwezeretsa ulemerero wa Yakobo. 
Psalms85:2 Munakhululukira mphulupulu za anthu anu ndi kuphimba machimo awo onse. Sela 
Psalms85:3 Munayika pambali ukali wanu wonse ndi kutembenuka kuchoka ku mkwiyo wanu woopsa. 
Psalms85:4 Tibwezeretseninso mwakale Inu Mulungu Mpulumutsi wathu, ndipo mutichotsere mkwiyo wanu." 
Psalms85:5 Kodi mudzatikwiyira mpaka liti? Kodi mudzapitiriza kukwiya pa mibado yathu yonse? 
Psalms85:6 Kodi simudzatitsitsimutsanso, kuti anthu anu asangalale mwa Inu?" 
Psalms85:7 Tionetseni chikondi chanu chosatha, Inu Yehova, ndipo tipatseni chipulumutso chanu." 
Psalms85:8 Ndidzamvetsera zimene Yehova Mulungu adzanena; Iye amalonjeza mtendere kwa anthu ake, oyera mtima ake, koma musawalole kuti abwerere ku zopusa." 
Psalms85:9 Ndithu chipulumutso chake chili pafupi ndi iwo amene amaopa Iye, kuti ulemerero wake ukhale mʼdziko lathu." 
Psalms85:10 Chikondi ndi kukhulupirika zimakumana pamodzi; chilungamo ndi mtendere zimapsompsonana. 
Psalms85:11 Kukhulupirika kumatumphuka kuchokera ku dziko lapansi, ndipo chilungamo chimayangʼana pansi kuchokera kumwamba." 
Psalms85:12 Ndithu Yehova adzapereka chimene chili chabwino, ndipo dziko lathu lidzapereka zokolola zake." 
Psalms85:13 Wolungama amapita patsogolo pake ndi kukonza njira za mapazi ake. 
Psalms86:1 Pemphero la Davide. Ndimvereni Yehova ndipo mundiyankhe, pakuti ndine wosauka ndi wosowa." 
Psalms86:2 Yangʼanirani moyo wanga, pakuti ndine wodzipereka kwa Inu. Inu ndinu Mulungu wanga; pulumutsani mtumiki wanu amene amadalira Inu. Inu ndinu Mulungu wanga." 
Psalms86:3 Mundichitire chifundo, Inu Ambuye, pakuti ndikuyitana Inu tsiku lonse." 
Psalms86:4 Bweretsani chimwemwe kwa mtumiki wanu, Ambuye, pakuti ndimadalira Inu." 
Psalms86:5 Inu Ambuye, ndinu wokhululuka ndi wabwino, wodzaza ndi chikondi kwa onse amene amayitana Inu." 
Psalms86:6 Yehova imvani pemphero langa; mvetserani kulira kwanga kofuna chifundo. 
Psalms86:7 Pa tsiku la mavuto anga ndidzayitana Inu, pakuti Inu mudzandiyankha." 
Psalms86:8 Pakati pa milungu palibe wina wofanana nanu Ambuye; palibe ntchito zolingana ndi ntchito zanu. 
Psalms86:9 Mitundu yonse ya anthu imene munayipanga idzabwera ndi kudzalambira pamaso panu Ambuye; iwo adzabweretsa ulemerero pa dzina lanu. 
Psalms86:10 Pakuti ndinu wamkulu ndipo mumachita zodabwitsa; Inu nokha ndiye Mulungu. 
Psalms86:11 Ndiphunzitseni njira yanu Yehova, ndipo ndidzayenda mʼchoonadi chanu; patseni mtima wosagawikana kuti ndilemekeze dzina lanu." 
Psalms86:12 Ndidzakutamandani Ambuye Mulungu wanga, ndi mtima wanga wonse; ndidzalemekeza dzina lanu kwamuyaya." 
Psalms86:13 Pakuti chikondi chanu nʼchachikulu kwa ine; mwandipulumutsa ku malo ozama a manda. 
Psalms86:14 Inu Mulungu wanga, anthu odzikuza akundithira nkhondo; anthu ankhanza akufuna kundipha, amene salabadira za Inu." 
Psalms86:15 Koma Ambuye ndinu Mulungu wachifundo ndi wokoma mtima, wosakwiya msanga, wodzaza ndi chikondi ndi wokhulupirika." 
Psalms86:16 Tembenukirani kwa ine ndipo ndichitireni chifundo; perekani mphamvu zanu kwa mtumiki wanu ndipo pulumutsani mwana wa mdzakazi wanu. 
Psalms86:17 Mundionetse chizindikiro cha ubwino wanu kuti adani achione ndi kuchititsidwa manyazi, pakuti Yehova mwandithandiza ndi kunditonthoza." 
Psalms87:1 Salimo la Ana a Kora. Iye wakhazikitsa maziko ake pa phiri loyera; 
Psalms87:2 Yehova amakonda zipata za Ziyoni kupambana malo onse okhalamo a Yakobo. 
Psalms87:3 Za ulemerero wako zimakambidwa, Iwe mzinda wa Mulungu: Sela" 
Psalms87:4 “Ndidzanena za Rahabe ndi Babuloni pakati pa iwo amene amandidziwa. Dzikonso la Filisitiya, Turo pamodzi ndi Kusi, ndipo ndidzati, ‘Uyu anabadwira mʼZiyoni.’ ”" 
Psalms87:5 Ndithudi, za Ziyoni adzanena kuti, “Uyu ndi uyo anabadwira mwa iye, ndipo Wammwambamwamba adzakhazikitsa iyeyo.”" 
Psalms87:6 Yehova adzalemba mʼbuku la kawundula wa anthu a mitundu ina: “Uyu anabadwira mʼZiyoni.” Sela 
Psalms87:7 Oyimba ndi ovina omwe adzati, “Akasupe anga onse ali mwa iwe.”" 
Psalms88:1 Salimo la ana a Kora. Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Potsata mayimbidwe a nyimbo yoti: “Pa Matenda ndi pa Mazunzo.” Ndakatulo ya Hemani, wa banja la Ezara. Inu Yehova, Mulungu amene mumandipulumutsa, usana ndi usiku ndimalira pamaso panu." 
Psalms88:2 Pemphero langa lifike pamaso panu; tcherani khutu lanu kuti mumve kulira kwanga. 
Psalms88:3 Pakuti ndili ndi mavuto ambiri ndipo moyo wanga ukuyandikira ku manda. 
Psalms88:4 Ndikuwerengedwa pamodzi ndi iwo amene akutsikira ku dzenje; ndine munthu wopanda mphamvu. 
Psalms88:5 Ndayikidwa pambali pamodzi ndi anthu akufa, monga ophedwa amene agona mʼmanda, amene Inu simuwakumbukiranso, amene achotsedwa pa chisamaliro chanu." 
Psalms88:6 Mwandiyika pansi pa dzenje penipeni, mʼmalo akuya a mdima waukulu." 
Psalms88:7 Ukali wanu ukundipsinja kwambiri, mwandiopseza kwambiri ndi mafunde anu onse. Sela" 
Psalms88:8 Mwandichotsa pakati pa abwenzi anga enieni ndipo mwachititsa kuti ndikhale chonyansa kwa iwo. Ndatsekerezedwa ndipo sindingathe kuthawa; 
Psalms88:9 	maso anga ada ndi chisoni. Ndimayitana Inu Yehova tsiku lililonse; ndimakweza manja anga kwa Inu. 
Psalms88:10 Kodi mumaonetsa zozizwitsa zanu kwa anthu akufa? Kodi iwo amene afa amaukanso ndi kutamanda Inu? Sela 
Psalms88:11 Kodi chikondi chanu chimalalikidwa mʼmanda, za kukhulupirika kwanu ku malo a chiwonongeko?" 
Psalms88:12 Kodi zozizwitsa zanu zimadziwika ku malo a mdima, kapena ntchito zanu zolungama ku dziko la anthu oyiwalika?" 
Psalms88:13 Inu Yehova, Ine ndimalirira thandizo; mmawa mapemphero anga amafika pamaso panu." 
Psalms88:14 Inu Yehova nʼchifukwa chiyani mukundikana ndi kundibisira nkhope yanu? 
Psalms88:15 Kuyambira ubwana wanga ndakhala ndikuzunzika pafupi kufa; ndakhala ndikuchita mantha ndipo ndine wothedwa nzeru. 
Psalms88:16 Ukali wanu wandimiza; zoopsa zanu zandiwononga. 
Psalms88:17 Tsiku lonse zimandizungulira ngati chigumula; zandimiza kwathunthu. 
Psalms88:18 Inu mwatenga anzanga ndi okondedwa anga kuwachotsa pamaso panga; mdima ndiye bwenzi langa lenileni. 
Psalms89:1 Ndakatulo ya Etani, wa banja la Ezara. Ndidzayimba za chikondi chachikulu cha Yehova kwamuyaya; ndi pakamwa panga ndidzachititsa kuti kukhulupirika kwanu kudziwike ku mibado yonse." 
Psalms89:2 Ndidzalalikira kuti chikondi chanu chidzakhazikika mpaka muyaya, kuti Inu munakhazikitsa kukhulupirika kwanu kumwamba kwenikweniko." 
Psalms89:3 Inu munati, “Ndachita pangano ndi wosankhidwa wanga, ndalumbira kwa Davide mtumiki wanga kuti," 
Psalms89:4 ‘Ndidzakhazikitsa zidzukulu zako mpaka muyaya. Ndidzachititsa kuti mpando wako waufumu ukhazikike ku mibado yonse,’ ” Sela." 
Psalms89:5 Mayiko akumwamba amatamanda zozizwitsa zanu Yehova, kukhulupirika kwanunso, mu msonkhano wa oyera mtima anu." 
Psalms89:6 Pakuti ndani mu mlengalenga angalingane ndi Yehova? Ndani wofanana ndi Yehova pakati pa zolengedwa zakumwamba? 
Psalms89:7 Mu msonkhano wa oyera mtima Mulungu amaopedwa kwambiri; Iye ndiye wochititsa mantha kupambana onse amene amuzungulira. 
Psalms89:8 Inu Yehova Mulungu Wamphamvuzonse, ndani wofanana nanu? Yehova ndinu wamphamvu ndipo kukhulupirika kwanu kwakuzungulirani." 
Psalms89:9 Mumalamula nyanja ya mafunde awukali; pamene mafunde ake awundana Inu mumawakhalitsa bata. 
Psalms89:10 Munaphwanya Rahabe monga munthu wophedwa; ndi dzanja lanu lamphamvu munabalalitsa adani anu. 
Psalms89:11 Mayiko akumwamba ndi anu ndiponso dziko lapansi ndi lanu; munapanga dziko lonse ndi zonse zili mʼmenemo. 
Psalms89:12 Munalenga Kumpoto ndi Kummwera; Tabori ndi Herimoni akuyimba ndi chimwemwe pa dzina lanu. 
Psalms89:13 Mkono wanu ndi wamphamvu; dzanja lanu ndi lamphamvu, dzanja lanu lamanja ndi lopambana." 
Psalms89:14 Chilungamo ndi chiweruzo cholungama ndiye maziko a mpando wanu waufumu; chikondi ndi kukhulupirika zimayenda patsogolo panu. 
Psalms89:15 Ndi odala amene aphunzira kuyamika Inu, amene amayenda mʼkuwunika kwa nkhope yanu Yehova." 
Psalms89:16 Amakondwera mʼdzina lanu tsiku lonse lathunthu; amasangalala koposa mʼchilungamo chanu. 
Psalms89:17 Pakuti Inu ndiye ulemerero wawo ndi mphamvu yawo ndipo mwa kukoma mtima kwanu Inu mumakweza nyanga yathu. 
Psalms89:18 Ndithudi, chishango chathu ndi cha Yehova, Mfumu yathu kwa Woyerayo wa Israeli." 
Psalms89:19 Kale munayankhula mʼmasomphenya, kwa anthu anu okhulupirika munati, “Ndapatsa mphamvu wankhondo; ndakweza mnyamata wochokera pakati pa anthu." 
Psalms89:20 Ndamupeza mtumiki wanga Davide; ndamudzoza ndi mafuta opatulika. 
Psalms89:21 Dzanja langa lidzamuchirikiza; zoonadi, mkono wanga udzamupatsa mphamvu." 
Psalms89:22 Adani sadzamulamula kuti apereke msonkho; anthu oyipa sadzamusautsa. 
Psalms89:23 Ndidzaphwanya adani ake pamaso pake ndi kukantha otsutsana naye. 
Psalms89:24 Chikondi changa chokhulupirika chidzakhala naye, ndipo kudzera mʼdzina langa nyanga yake idzakwezedwa." 
Psalms89:25 Ndidzayika dzanja lake pa nyanja, dzanja lake lamanja pa mitsinje." 
Psalms89:26 Iyeyo adzafuwula kwa Ine kuti, ‘Ndinu Atate anga, Mulungu wanga, Thanthwe ndi Chipulumutso changa.’" 
Psalms89:27 Ndidzamuyika kuti akhale mwana wanga woyamba kubadwa; wokwezedwa kwambiri pakati pa mafumu a dziko lapansi. 
Psalms89:28 Ndidzamusungira chifundo changa kwamuyaya, ndipo pangano langa ndi iye silidzatha." 
Psalms89:29 Ine ndidzakhazikitsa zidzukulu zake mpaka muyaya, mpando wake waufumu ngati masiku a miyamba." 
Psalms89:30 “Ngati ana ake adzataya lamulo langa ndi kusatsatira malangizo anga," 
Psalms89:31 ngati adzaswa malamulo anga ndi kulephera kusunga ziphunzitso zanga," 
Psalms89:32 Ine ndidzalanga tchimo lawo ndi ndodo, mphulupulu zawo powakwapula." 
Psalms89:33 Koma sindidzachotsa chikondi changa pa iye, kapena kukhala wosakhulupirika kwa iyeyo." 
Psalms89:34 Sindidzaswa pangano langa kapena kusintha zimene milomo yanga yayankhula. 
Psalms89:35 Ndinalumbira kamodzi mwa kuyera kwanga ndipo sindidzanama kwa Davide," 
Psalms89:36 kuti zidzukulu zake zidzakhale kwamuyaya ndipo mpando wake waufumu udzakhazikika pamaso panga ngati dzuwa; 
Psalms89:37 udzakhazikika kwamuyaya monga mwezi, mboni yokhulupirika mʼmitambo. Sela" 
Psalms89:38 “Koma tsopano Inu mwamukana, mwamutaya, mwamukwiyira kwambiri wodzozedwa wanu." 
Psalms89:39 Mwakana pangano ndi mtumiki wanu ndipo mwadetsa mʼfumbi chipewa chake chaufumu. 
Psalms89:40 Inu mwagumula makoma ake onse ndipo mwasandutsa bwinja malinga ake. 
Psalms89:41 Onse amene amadutsa amalanda zinthu zake; iye wakhala chotonzedwa cha anansi ake. 
Psalms89:42 Mwakweza dzanja lamanja la adani ake; mwachititsa kuti adani ake akondwere. 
Psalms89:43 Mwabunthitsa lupanga lake, simunamuthandize pa nkhondo." 
Psalms89:44 Inu mwathetsa kukongola kwa ulemerero wake ndipo mwagwetsa pansi mpando wake waufumu. 
Psalms89:45 Mwachepetsa masiku a unyamata wake; mwamuphimba ndi chofunda chochititsa manyazi. Sela 
Psalms89:46 “Mpaka liti Yehova? Kodi mudzadzibisa mpaka kalekale? Mpaka liti ukali wanu udzayaka ngati moto? 
Psalms89:47 Kumbukirani kuti masiku a moyo wanga ndi ochepa pakuti munalenga kwachabe anthu onse! 
Psalms89:48 Kodi ndi munthu uti angakhale ndi moyo ndi kusaona imfa? Kapena kudzipulumutsa yekha ku mphamvu ya manda? Sela 
Psalms89:49 Inu Ambuye kodi chili kuti chikondi chanu chachikulu choyamba chija, chimene mwa kukhulupirika kwanu munalumbira kwa Davide?" 
Psalms89:50 Kumbukirani, Ambuye momwe mtumiki wanu wanyozedwera, momwe ndakhalira ndi kusunga mu mtima mwanga mawu a pangano a anthu a mitundu yonse," 
Psalms89:51 mawu achipongwe amene adani anu akhala akunyoza, Inu Yehova, ndi mawu amene akhala akunyoza mayendedwe onse a wodzozedwa wanu." 
Psalms89:52 	“Matamando akhale kwa Yehova mpaka muyaya!” Ameni ndi Ameni. 
Psalms90:1 Pemphero la Mose munthu wa Mulungu. Ambuye, mwakhala muli malo athu okhalamo pa mibado yonse." 
Psalms90:2 Mapiri asanabadwe, musanalenge nʼkomwe dziko lapansi ndi dziko lonse, kuyambira muyaya mpaka muyaya Inu ndinu Mulungu." 
Psalms90:3 Inu mumabwezera anthu ku fumbi, mumati, “Bwerera ku fumbi iwe mwana wa munthu.”" 
Psalms90:4 Pakuti zaka 1,000 pamaso panu zili ngati tsiku limene lapita kapena ngati kamphindi ka usiku." 
Psalms90:5 Inu mumasesa anthu mʼtulo ta imfa, iwo ali ngati udzu watsopano wa mmawa," 
Psalms90:6 ngakhale kuti mmawa umaphuka watsopano, pofika madzulo wauma ndi kufota." 
Psalms90:7 Ife tathedwa ndi mkwiyo wanu; ndipo taopsezedwa ndi kuyipidwa kwanu. 
Psalms90:8 Mwayika mphulupulu zathu pamaso panu, machimo athu obisika poonekera pamaso panu." 
Psalms90:9 Masiku athu onse amatha ali pansi pa ukali wanu; timatsiriza zaka zathu ndi kubuwula. 
Psalms90:10 Kuchuluka kwa masiku athu ndi 70, kapena 80 ngati tili ndi mphamvu; komabe zaka zonsezi ndi za mavuto ndi nkhawa, zimatha mofulumira ndipo ife timawulukira kutali." 
Psalms90:11 Kodi ndani amadziwa mphamvu ya mkwiyo wanu? Pakuti ukali wanu ndi waukulu ngati ulemu umene uyenera Inu. 
Psalms90:12 Tiphunzitseni kuwerenga masiku athu molondola, kuti tikhale ndi mtima wanzeru." 
Psalms90:13 Lezani mtima Inu Yehova! Kodi mudzatikwiyira mpaka liti? Achitireni chifundo atumiki anu. 
Psalms90:14 Mutikhutitse mmawa ndi chikondi chanu chosatha, kuti tiyimbe ndi chimwemwe ndi kukhala okondwa masiku athu onse." 
Psalms90:15 Tisangalatseni masiku ambiri monga masiku amene mwatisautsa, kwa zaka zambiri monga momwe tinaonera mavuto." 
Psalms90:16 Ntchito zanu zionetsedwe kwa atumiki anu, kukongola kwanu kwa ana awo." 
Psalms90:17 Kukoma mtima kwa Ambuye Mulungu wathu kukhale pa ife; tikhazikitsireni ntchito ya manja athu; inde, khazikitsani ntchito ya manja athu." 
Psalms91:1 Iye amene amakhala mu mthunzi wa Wammwambamwamba adzapuma mu mthunzi wa Wamphamvuzonse. 
Psalms91:2 Ndidzanena za Yehova, “Iye ndiye pothawira panga ndi linga langa, Mulungu wanga amene ndimadalira.”" 
Psalms91:3 Ndithu, Iye adzakupulumutsa ku msampha wa mlenje ndi ku mliri woopsa;" 
Psalms91:4 Adzakuphimba ndi nthenga zake, ndipo udzapeza malo othawira mʼmapikomo; kukhulupirika kwake kudzakhala chishango chako ndi lihawo." 
Psalms91:5 Sudzachita mantha ndi zoopsa za usiku, kapena muvi wowuluka masana," 
Psalms91:6 kapena mliri umene umayenda mu mdima, kapena zowononga za pa nthawi ya masana." 
Psalms91:7 Anthu 1,000 atha kufa pambali pako, anthu 10,000 kudzanja lako lamanja, koma zoopsazo sizidzafika pafupi ndi iwe." 
Psalms91:8 Udzapenya ndi maso ako ndipo udzaona mmene anthu oyipa amalangidwira. 
Psalms91:9 Pakuti wasankha Wammwambamwamba kukhala malo ako okhalamo; wavomera Yehova kukhala kothawira kwako. 
Psalms91:10 Choncho palibe choyipa chimene chidzakugwera, zoopsa sizidzafika pafupi ndi tenti yako." 
Psalms91:11 Pakuti adzalamulira angelo ake za iwe, kuti akutchinjirize mosamala pa njira zako zonse;" 
Psalms91:12 ndipo adzakunyamula ndi manja awo, kuti phazi lako lisagunde pa mwala." 
Psalms91:13 Udzapondaponda mkango ndi njoka, udzapondereza mkango wamphamvu ndiponso chinjoka." 
Psalms91:14 “Chifukwa iye amandikonda,” akutero Yehova, “Ndidzamulanditsa; ndidzamuteteza pakuti wavomereza dzina langa." 
Psalms91:15 Adzandiyitana, ndipo ndidzamuyankha; ndidzakhala naye pa mavuto, ndidzamupulumutsa ndi kumulemekeza." 
Psalms91:16 Ndidzamupatsa moyo wautali ndi kumupulumutsa.” 
Psalms92:1 Salimo. Nyimbo ya pa tsiku la Sabata. Nʼkwabwino kutamanda Yehova ndi kuyimbira nyimbo dzina lanu, Inu Wammwambamwamba," 
Psalms92:2 Kulengeza chikondi chanu mmawa, ndi kukhulupirika kwanu nthawi ya usiku," 
Psalms92:3 kuyimbira nyimbo choyimbira cha zingwe khumi ndi mayimbidwe abwino a zeze. 
Psalms92:4 Pakuti Inu mumandisangalatsa ndi ntchito zanu, Inu Yehova; Ine ndikuyimba mwachimwemwe pa ntchito ya manja anu." 
Psalms92:5 Ndi yayikuludi ntchito yanu Yehova, maganizo anu ndi ozamadi!" 
Psalms92:6 Munthu wopanda nzeru sadziwa, zitsiru sizizindikira," 
Psalms92:7 kuti ngakhale anthu oyipa aphuka ngati udzu ndipo anthu onse ochita zoyipa apindula, adzawonongedwa kwamuyaya." 
Psalms92:8 	Koma Inu Yehova, ndinu wokwezedwa kwamuyaya." 
Psalms92:9 Zoonadi adani anu Yehova, zoonadi adani anu adzawonongeka; onse ochita zoyipa adzabalalitsidwa." 
Psalms92:10 Inu mwakweza nyanga yanga ngati nyanga ya njati; mafuta abwino akhuthulidwa pamutu wanga. 
Psalms92:11 Maso anga aona kugonjetsedwa kwa olimbana nane, makutu anga amva za kugwa kwa amaliwongo anga oyipa." 
Psalms92:12 Anthu olungama adzaphuka ngati mtengo wa mgwalangwa, adzakula ngati mkungudza wa ku Lebanoni;" 
Psalms92:13 odzalidwa mʼnyumba ya Yehova, adzakula bwino mʼmabwalo a Mulungu wathu." 
Psalms92:14 Iwo adzaberekabe zipatso mu ukalamba wawo, adzakhala anthete ndi obiriwira," 
Psalms92:15 kulengeza kuti, “Yehova ndi wolungama; Iye ndiye Thanthwe langa, ndipo mwa Iye mulibe choyipa.”" 
Psalms93:1 Yehova akulamulira, wavala ulemerero; Yehova wavala ulemerero ndipo wadzimangirira mphamvu, dziko lonse lakhazikika kolimba; silingasunthidwe." 
Psalms93:2 Mpando wanu waufumu unakhazikika kalekale; Inu ndinu wamuyaya. 
Psalms93:3 Nyanja zakweza Inu Yehova, nyanja zakweza mawu ake; nyanja zakweza mafunde ake ochita mkokomo." 
Psalms93:4 Yehova ndi wamphamvu kupambana mkokomo wa madzi ambiri, ndi wamphamvu kupambana mafunde a nyanja, Yehova mmwamba ndi wamphamvu." 
Psalms93:5 Malamulo anu Yehova ndi osasinthika; chiyero chimakongoletsa nyumba yanu mpaka muyaya. 
Psalms94:1 Inu Yehova, ndinu Mulungu wobwezera chilango, Inu Mulungu amene mumabwezera chilango, wonetsani kuwala kwanu." 
Psalms94:2 Nyamukani, Inu woweruza wa dziko lapansi; bwezerani kwa odzikuza zowayenera." 
Psalms94:3 Kodi mpaka liti anthu oyipa Inu Yehova, mpaka liti anthu oyipa adzalumpha ndi chimwemwe?" 
Psalms94:4 Amakhuthula mawu onyada; onse ochita zoyipa ndi odzaza ndi kudzikuza. 
Psalms94:5 Amaphwanya anthu anu, Inu Yehova; amapondereza cholowa chanu." 
Psalms94:6 Amaphanso amayi a masiye ndi alendo okhala nawo mʼdziko; amapha ana amasiye. 
Psalms94:7 Iwo amati, “Yehova sakuona; Mulungu wa Yakobo salabadirako.”" 
Psalms94:8 Samalani, inu anthu opanda nzeru pakati pa anthu; zitsiru inu, kodi mudzakhala liti anzeru?" 
Psalms94:9 Kodi Iye amene anapanga khutu sangathe kumva? Kodi Iye amene anapanga diso sangathe kuona? 
Psalms94:10 Kodi Iye amene amalangiza mitundu ya anthu sangathenso kulanga? Kodi Iye amene amaphunzitsa munthu angasowe nzeru?
