Psalms94:11 Yehova amadziwa maganizo a munthu; Iye amadziwa kuti maganizowo ndi achabechabe. 
Psalms94:12 Wodala munthu amene Inu Yehova mumamulangiza, munthu amene mumamuphunzitsa kuchokera mulamulo lanu;" 
Psalms94:13 mumamupumitsa pa nthawi ya mavuto, mpaka woyipa atakumbiridwa dzenje." 
Psalms94:14 Pakuti Yehova sadzawakana anthu ake; Iye sadzasiya cholowa chake. 
Psalms94:15 Chiweruzo chidzakhazikikanso pa chilungamo, ndipo onse olungama mtima adzachitsata." 
Psalms94:16 Ndani adzadzuka chifukwa cha ine kulimbana ndi anthu oyipa? Ndani adzayimirira mʼmalo mwanga kulimbana ndi anthu ochita zoyipa? 
Psalms94:17 Yehova akanapanda kundithandiza, bwenzi nditakakhala msanga ku malo achete a imfa." 
Psalms94:18 Ndikanena kuti, “Phazi langa likuterereka,” chikondi chanu, Inu Yehova, chimandichirikiza." 
Psalms94:19 Pamene nkhawa inakula mʼkati mwanga, chitonthozo chanu chinabweretsa chimwemwe mʼmoyo mwanga." 
Psalms94:20 Kodi mpando waufumu woyipa ungathe kugwirizana nanu umene umabweretsa masautso chifukwa cha malamulo ake? 
Psalms94:21 Iwo amasonkhana pamodzi kulimbana ndi wolungama ndi kugamula kuti wosalakwa aphedwe. 
Psalms94:22 Koma Yehova wakhala linga langa, ndipo Mulungu ndiye thanthwe limene ndimathawirako." 
Psalms94:23 Iye adzawabwezera chifukwa cha machimo awo ndi kuwawononga chifukwa cha kuyipa kwawo; Yehova Mulungu wathu adzawawononga. 
Psalms95:1 Bwerani, tiyeni timuyimbire Yehova mwachimwemwe, tiyeni tifuwule kwa Thanthwe la chipulumutso chathu" 
Psalms95:2 Tiyeni tibwere pamaso pake ndi chiyamiko ndipo mupembedzeni Iyeyo ndi zida zoyimbira ndi nyimbo. 
Psalms95:3 Pakuti Yehova ndi Mulungu wamkulu, mfumu yayikulu pamwamba pa milungu yonse." 
Psalms95:4 Mʼmanja mwake muli maziko ozama a dziko lapansi, ndipo msonga za mapiri ndi zake." 
Psalms95:5 Nyanja ndi yake, pakuti anayilenga ndi Iye, ndipo manja ake anawumba mtunda wowuma." 
Psalms95:6 Bwerani, tiyeni tiwerame pomulambira, tiyeni tigwade pamaso pa Yehova Mlengi wathu;" 
Psalms95:7 pakuti Iye ndiye Mulungu wathu ndipo ife ndife anthu a pabusa pake, ndi nkhosa za mʼdzanja lake. Lero ngati inu mumva mawu ake," 
Psalms95:8 musawumitse mitima yanu monga momwe munachitira pa Meriba, monga munachitira tsiku lija pa Masa mʼchipululu." 
Psalms95:9 Kumene makolo anu anandiyesa ndi kundiputa, ngakhale anaona zimene Ine ndinazichita." 
Psalms95:10 Kwa zaka makumi anayi ndinali wokwiya ndi mʼbado umenewo; ndipo ndinati, “Iwo ndi anthu amene mitima yawo imasochera ndipo sanadziwe njira zanga.”" 
Psalms95:11 Choncho ndili chikwiyire, ndinalumbira kuti, “Iwowa sadzalowa ku malo anga a mpumulo.”" 
Psalms96:1 Imbirani Yehova nyimbo yatsopano; Imbirani Yehova dziko lonse lapansi. 
Psalms96:2 Imbirani Yehova, tamandani dzina lake; lalikirani chipulumutso chake tsiku ndi tsiku." 
Psalms96:3 Lengezani ulemerero wake pakati pa mayiko, ntchito zake zodabwitsa pakati pa mitundu yonse ya anthu." 
Psalms96:4 Pakuti wamkulu ndi Yehova ndipo ndi woyenera kwambiri kumutamanda; ayenera kuopedwa kupambana milungu yonse. 
Psalms96:5 Pakuti milungu yonse ya anthu a mitundu ina ndi mafano, koma Yehova analenga mayiko akumwamba." 
Psalms96:6 Ulemu ndi ufumu zili pamaso pake, mphamvu ndi ulemerero zili mʼmalo ake opatulika." 
Psalms96:7 Perekani kwa Yehova, inu mabanja a anthu a mitundu ina, perekani kwa Yehova ulemerero ndi mphamvu." 
Psalms96:8 Perekani kwa Yehova ulemerero woyenera dzina lake; bweretsani chopereka ndipo mulowe mʼmabwalo ake. 
Psalms96:9 Lambirani Yehova mu ulemerero wa chiyero chake; njenjemerani pamaso pake, dziko lonse lapansi." 
Psalms96:10 Nenani pakati pa mitundu ya anthu, “Yehova akulamulira.” Dziko lonse lakhazikika molimba, silingasunthidwe; Iye adzaweruza mitundu ya anthu molungama." 
Psalms96:11 Mayiko akumwamba asangalale, dziko lapansi likondwere; nyanja ikokome, ndi zonse zili mʼmenemo;" 
Psalms96:12 minda ikondwere pamodzi ndi chilichonse chili mʼmenemo. Pamenepo mitengo yonse ya mʼnkhalango idzayimba ndi chimwemwe; 
Psalms96:13 idzayimba pamaso pa Yehova, pakuti Iye akubwera kudzaweruza dziko lapansi; adzaweruza dziko lonse mwachilungamo ndi mitundu ya anthu onse mʼchoonadi." 
Psalms97:1 Yehova akulamulira, dziko lapansi lisangalale; magombe akutali akondwere." 
Psalms97:2 Mitambo ndi mdima waukulu zamuzungulira; chilungamo ndi kuweruza molungama ndiwo maziko a mpando wake waufumu. 
Psalms97:3 Moto umapita patsogolo pake ndi kunyeketsa amaliwongo kumbali zonse. 
Psalms97:4 Zingʼaningʼani zake zimawalitsa dziko lonse; dziko lapansi limaona ndipo limanjenjemera. 
Psalms97:5 Mapiri amasungunuka ngati phula pamaso pa Yehova, pamaso pa Ambuye a dziko lonse lapansi." 
Psalms97:6 Mayiko akumwamba amalengeza za chilungamo chake, ndipo mitundu yonse ya anthu imaona ulemerero wake." 
Psalms97:7 Onse amene amalambira mafano osema amachititsidwa manyazi, iwo amene amanyadira mafano; mulambireni, inu milungu yonse!" 
Psalms97:8 Ziyoni akumva ndipo akukondwera, midzi ya Yuda ikusangalala chifukwa cha maweruzo anu Yehova." 
Psalms97:9 Pakuti Inu Yehova ndi Wammwambamwamba pa dziko lonse lapansi; ndinu wokwezeka kupambana milungu yonse. 
Psalms97:10 Iwo amene amakonda Yehova adane ndi zoyipa pakuti Iye amayangʼanira miyoyo ya amene amamukhulupirira ndipo amawapulumutsa mʼdzanja la anthu oyipa 
Psalms97:11 Kuwala kumafika pa anthu olungama, ndi chimwemwe kwa olungama mtima." 
Psalms97:12 Kondwerani mwa Yehova Inu olungama ndipo tamandani dzina lake loyera. 
Psalms98:1 Salimo. Imbirani Yehova nyimbo yatsopano, pakuti Iyeyo wachita zinthu zodabwitsa; dzanja lake lamanja ndi mkono wake woyera zamuchitira chipulumutso." 
Psalms98:2 Yehova waonetsa chipulumutso chake ndipo waulula chilungamo chake kwa anthu a mitundu ina. 
Psalms98:3 Iye wakumbukira chikondi chake ndi kukhulupirika kwake pa Aisraeli; malekezero onse a dziko lapansi aona chipulumutso cha Mulungu wathu. 
Psalms98:4 Fuwulani mwachimwemwe kwa Yehova, dziko lonse lapansi, muyimbireni nyimbo mofuwula ndi mokondwera." 
Psalms98:5 Imbirani Yehova nyimbo ndi zeze, ndi zeze ndi mawu a kuyimba," 
Psalms98:6 ndi malipenga ndi kuliza kwa nyanga ya nkhosa yayimuna fuwulani mwachimwemwe pamaso pa Yehova Mfumu. 
Psalms98:7 Nyanja ikokome pamodzi ndi zonse zili mʼmenemo, dziko lonse ndi onse amene amakhala mʼmenemo." 
Psalms98:8 Mitsinje iwombe mʼmanja mwawo, mapiri ayimbe pamodzi mwachimwemwe;" 
Psalms98:9 izo ziyimbe pamaso pa Yehova, pakuti Iye akubwera kudzaweruza dziko lapansi. Adzaweruza dziko lonse mwachilungamo, ndi mitundu ya anthu mosakondera." 
Psalms99:1 Yehova akulamulira, mitundu ya anthu injenjemere; Iye wakhala pa mpando wake waufumu, pakati pa akerubi, dziko lapansi ligwedezeke." 
Psalms99:2 Mʼziyoni wamkulu ndi Yehova; Iye ndi wokwezeka pamwamba pa mitundu yonse ya anthu. 
Psalms99:3 Anthu atamande dzina lanu lalikulu ndi loopsa kwambiri, Iye ndi woyera." 
Psalms99:4 Mfumu yamphamvu, iyo imakonda chilungamo Inu mwakhazikitsa khalidwe losakondera; mwachita zolungama ndi zoyenera mwa Yakobo." 
Psalms99:5 Kwezani Yehova Mulungu wathu ndipo mulambireni pa mapazi ake; Iye ndi woyera. 
Psalms99:6 Mose ndi Aaroni anali ena mwa ansembe ake, Samueli anali pamodzi ndi iwo amene anayitana pa dzina lake; iwo anayitana Yehova ndipo Iyeyo anawayankha." 
Psalms99:7 Iye anayankhula nawo kuchokera mʼchipilala cha mtambo; iwo anasunga malamulo ake ndi zophunzitsa zomwe anawapatsa. 
Psalms99:8 Inu Yehova Mulungu wathu, munawayankha iwo; Inu kwa Israeli munali Mulungu wokhululuka, ngakhale munawalanga pa zochita zawo zoyipa." 
Psalms99:9 Kwezani Yehova Mulungu wathu ndipo mumulambire pa phiri lake loyera, pakuti Yehova Mulungu wathu ndi woyera." 
Psalms100:1 Salimo. Nyimbo yothokoza. Fuwulani kwa Yehova mwachimwemwe, inu dziko lonse lapansi." 
Psalms100:2 Mulambireni Yehova mosangalala; bwerani pamaso pake ndi nyimbo zachikondwerero. 
Psalms100:3 Dziwani kuti Yehova ndi Mulungu. Iye ndiye amene anatipanga ndipo ife ndife ake; ndife anthu ake, nkhosa za pabusa pake." 
Psalms100:4 Lowani ku zipata zake ndi chiyamiko ndi ku mabwalo ake ndi matamando; muyamikeni ndi kutamanda dzina lake. 
Psalms100:5 Pakuti Yehova ndi wabwino ndipo chikondi chake ndi chamuyaya; kukhulupirika kwake nʼkokhazikika pa mibado ndi mibado. 
Psalms101:1 Salimo la Davide. Ndidzayimba za chikondi ndi chiweruzo chanu cholungama; kwa Inu Yehova ndidzayimba matamando. 
Psalms101:2 Ndidzatsata njira yolungama; nanga mudzabwera liti kwa ine? Ndidzayenda mʼnyumba mwanga ndi mtima wosalakwa. 
Psalms101:3 Sindidzayika chinthu chilichonse choyipa pamaso panga. Ine ndimadana ndi zochita za anthu opanda chikhulupiriro; iwo sadzadziphatika kwa ine. 
Psalms101:4 Anthu a mtima wokhota adzakhala kutali ndi ine; ine sindidzalola choyipa chilichonse kulowa mwa ine. 
Psalms101:5 Aliyense wosinjirira mnansi wake mseri ameneyo ndidzamuletsa; aliyense amene ali ndi maso amwano ndi mtima wodzikuza, ameneyo sindidzamulekerera." 
Psalms101:6 Maso anga adzakhala pa okhulupirika mʼdziko, kuti akhale pamodzi ndi ine; iye amene mayendedwe ake ndi wosalakwa adzanditumikira." 
Psalms101:7 Aliyense wochita chinyengo sadzakhala mʼnyumba mwanga. Aliyense woyankhula mwachinyengo sadzayima pamaso panga. 
Psalms101:8 Mmawa uliwonse ndidzatontholetsa anthu onse oyipa mʼdziko; ndidzachotsa aliyense wochita zoyipa mu mzinda wa Yehova. 
Psalms102:1 Pemphero la munthu wosautsidwa, pamene walefuka, nakhuthulira pamaso pa Yehova kulira kwakeko. Yehova imvani pemphero langa; kulira kwanga kopempha thandizo kufike kwa Inu." 
Psalms102:2 Musandibisire nkhope yanu pamene ndili pa msautso. Munditcherere khutu; pamene ndiyitana ndiyankheni msanga. 
Psalms102:3 Pakuti masiku anga akupita ngati utsi; mafupa anga akunyeka ngati nkhuni zoyaka. 
Psalms102:4 Mtima wanga wakanthidwa ndipo ukufota ngati udzu; ndipo ndimayiwala kudya chakudya changa. 
Psalms102:5 Chifukwa cha kubuwula kwanga kofuwula ndatsala chikopa ndi mafupa okhaokha. 
Psalms102:6 Ndili ngati kadzidzi wa ku chipululu, monga kadzidzi pakati pa mabwinja." 
Psalms102:7 Ndimagona osapeza tulo; ndakhala ngati mbalame yokhala yokha pa denga. 
Psalms102:8 Tsiku lonse adani anga amandichita chipongwe; iwo amene amandinyoza, amagwiritsa ntchito dzina langa ngati temberero." 
Psalms102:9 Pakuti ndimadya phulusa ngati chakudya changa ndi kusakaniza chakumwa changa ndi misozi 
Psalms102:10 chifukwa cha ukali wanu waukulu, popeza Inu mwandinyamula ndi kunditayira kumbali." 
Psalms102:11 Masiku anga ali ngati mthunzi wa kumadzulo; Ine ndikufota ngati udzu. 
Psalms102:12 Koma Inu Yehova, muli pa mpando wanu waufumu kwamuyaya; kudziwika kwanu ndi kokhazikika ku mibado yonse." 
Psalms102:13 Inu mudzadzuka ndi kuchitira chifundo Ziyoni pakuti ndi nthawi yoti muonetse kukoma mtima kwanu pa iyeyo; nthawi yoyikika yafika. 
Psalms102:14 Pakuti miyala yake ndi yokondedwa kwa atumiki anu; fumbi lake lokha limawachititsa kuti amve chisoni. 
Psalms102:15 Mitundu ya anthu idzaopa dzina la Yehova, mafumu onse a dziko lapansi adzalemekeza ulemerero wanu." 
Psalms102:16 Pakuti Yehova adzamanganso Ziyoni ndi kuonekera mu ulemerero wake. 
Psalms102:17 Iye adzayankha pemphero la anthu otayika; sadzanyoza kupempha kwawo. 
Psalms102:18 Zimenezi zilembedwe chifukwa cha mibado ya mʼtsogolo, kuti anthu amene sanabadwe adzatamande Yehova:" 
Psalms102:19 “Yehova anayangʼana pansi kuchokera ku malo ake opatulika mmwamba, kuchokera kumwamba anayangʼana dziko lapansi," 
Psalms102:20 kuti amve kubuwula kwa anthu a mʼndende, kuti apulumutse amene anayenera kuphedwa.”" 
Psalms102:21 Kotero dzina la Yehova lidzalengezedwa mu Ziyoni ndi matamando ake mu Yerusalemu," 
Psalms102:22 pamene mitundu ya anthu ndi maufumu adzasonkhana kuti alambire Yehova. 
Psalms102:23 Iye anathyola mphamvu zanga pa nthawi ya moyo wanga; Iyeyo anafupikitsa masiku anga. 
Psalms102:24 Choncho Ine ndinati: “Musandichotse, Inu Mulungu wanga, pakati pa masiku a moyo wanga; zaka zanu zimakhalabe pa mibado yonse." 
Psalms102:25 Pachiyambi Inu munakhazikitsa maziko a dziko lapansi ndipo mayiko akumwamba ndi ntchito ya manja anu. 
Psalms102:26 Izi zidzatha, koma Inu mudzakhalapo; zidzatha ngati chovala. Mudzazisintha ngati chovala ndipo zidzatayidwa." 
Psalms102:27 Koma Inu simusintha, ndipo zaka zanu sizidzatha." 
Psalms102:28 Ana a atumiki anu adzakhala pamaso panu; zidzukulu zawo zidzakhazikika pamaso panu.” 
Psalms103:1 Salimo la Davide. Tamanda Yehova, iwe moyo wanga; ndi zonse zamʼkati mwanga zitamande dzina lake loyera." 
Psalms103:2 Tamanda Yehova, iwe moyo wanga, ndipo usayiwale zabwino zake zonse." 
Psalms103:3 Amene amakhululuka machimo ako onse ndi kuchiritsa nthenda zako zonse," 
Psalms103:4 amene awombola moyo wako ku dzenje ndi kukuveka chikondi ndi chifundo chake ngati chipewa chaufumu," 
Psalms103:5 amene akwaniritsa zokhumba zako ndi zinthu zabwino, kotero kuti umakhala wamphamvu zatsopano ngati mphungu." 
Psalms103:6 Yehova amachita chilungamo ndipo amaweruza molungama onse opsinjika. 
Psalms103:7 Iye anadziwitsa Mose njira zake, ntchito zake kwa Aisraeli." 
Psalms103:8 Yehova ndi wachifundo ndi wokoma mtima, wosakwiya msanga ndi wachikondi chochuluka." 
Psalms103:9 Iye sadzatsutsa nthawi zonse, kapena kusunga mkwiyo wake kwamuyaya;" 
Psalms103:10 satichitira molingana ndi machimo athu, kapena kutibwezera molingana ndi mphulupulu zathu." 
Psalms103:11 Pakuti monga kumwamba kuli kutali ndi dziko lapansi, koteronso chikondi chake nʼchachikulu kwa iwo amene amamuopa;" 
Psalms103:12 monga kummawa kutalikirana ndi kumadzulo, koteronso Iye watichotsera mphulupulu zathu kuti zikhale kutali nafe." 
Psalms103:13 Monga bambo amachitira chifundo ana ake, choncho Yehova ali ndi chifundo ndi iwo amene amamuopa;" 
Psalms103:14 pakuti Iye amadziwa momwe tinawumbidwira, amakumbukira kuti ndife fumbi." 
Psalms103:15 Kunena za munthu, masiku ake ali ngati udzu, amaphuka ngati duwa la mʼmunda;" 
Psalms103:16 koma mphepo imawombapo ndipo silionekanso ndipo malo ake sakumbukirikanso. 
Psalms103:17 Koma kuchokera muyaya mpaka muyaya chikondi cha Yehova chili ndi iwo amene amamuopa, ndi chilungamo chake chili ndi ana a ana awo;" 
Psalms103:18 iwo amene amasunga pangano lake ndi kukumbukira kumvera malangizo ake. 
Psalms103:19 Yehova wakhazikitsa mpando wake waufumu mmwamba ndipo ufumu wake umalamulira onse. 
Psalms103:20 Tamandani Yehova, inu angelo ake, amphamvu inu amene mumachita zimene amalamula, amene mumamvera mawu ake." 
Psalms103:21 Tamandani Yehova, zolengedwa zonse zakumwamba, inu atumiki ake amene mumachita chifuniro chake." 
Psalms103:22 Tamandani Yehova, ntchito yake yonse kulikonse mu ulamuliro wake. Tamanda Yehova, iwe moyo wanga." 
Psalms104:1 	Tamanda Yehova, iwe moyo wanga. Inu Yehova Mulungu wanga, ndinu wamkulu kwambiri; mwavala ulemerero ndi ufumu." 
Psalms104:2 Iye wadzifunditsa kuwala ngati chovala; watambasula miyamba ngati tenti 
Psalms104:3 ndipo wayika pa madzi mitanda ya chipinda chake. Iye amasandutsa mitambo kukhala galeta lake, ndi kuwuluka pa mapiko a mphepo." 
Psalms104:4 Amapanga mphepo kukhala amithenga ake, malawi amoto kukhala atumiki ake." 
Psalms104:5 Anakhazikitsa dziko lapansi pa maziko ake; silingasunthike. 
Psalms104:6 Munaliphimba ndi nyanja yozama ngati chovala; madzi anayimirira pamwamba pa mapiri. 
Psalms104:7 Koma pakudzudzula kwanu madzi anathawa, pa mkokomo wa bingu lanu iwo anamwazika;" 
Psalms104:8 Inu munamiza mapiri, iwo anatsikira ku zigwa kumalo kumene munawakonzera." 
Psalms104:9 Inu munayika malire ndipo sangathe kudutsa, iwo sadzamizanso dziko lapansi." 
Psalms104:10 Iye achititsa akasupe kutulutsa madzi kupita ku zigwa; madziwo amayenda pakati pa mapiri. 
Psalms104:11 Iwo amapereka madzi kwa zirombo zonse zakuthengo; abulu akuthengo amapha ludzu lawo. 
Psalms104:12 Mbalame zamlengalenga zimayika zisa mʼmbali mwa madzi; zimayimba pakati pa thambo. 
Psalms104:13 Iye amathirira mapiri kuchokera ku zipinda zake zapamwamba; dziko lapansi limakhutitsidwa ndi chipatso cha ntchito yake. 
Psalms104:14 Amameretsa udzu kuti ngʼombe zidye, ndi zomera, kuti munthu azilima kubweretsa chakudya kuchokera mʼdziko lapansi:" 
Psalms104:15 vinyo amene amasangalatsa mtima wa munthu, mafuta amene amachititsa nkhope yake kuwala, ndi buledi amene amapereka mphamvu." 
Psalms104:16 Mitengo ya Yehova ndi yothiriridwa bwino, mikungudza ya ku Lebanoni imene Iye anadzala." 
Psalms104:17 Mbalame zimamanga zisa zawo; kakowa ali ndi malo ake mʼmikungudzamo. 
Psalms104:18 Mapiri ataliatali ndi a mbalale; mʼmingʼalu ya miyala ndi mobisalamo mbira. 
Psalms104:19 Mwezi umasiyanitsa nyengo ndipo dzuwa limadziwa nthawi yake yolowera. 
Psalms104:20 Inu mumabweretsa mdima nukhala usiku, ndipo zirombo zonse za ku nkhalango zimatuluka." 
Psalms104:21 Mikango imabangula kufuna nyama, ndi kufunafuna chakudya chawo kuchokera kwa Mulungu." 
Psalms104:22 Dzuwa limatuluka ndipo iyo imapita kukabisala; imabwerera kukagona pansi mʼmapanga awo. 
Psalms104:23 Pamenepo munthu amapita ku ntchito yake, kukagwira ntchito yake mpaka madzulo." 
Psalms104:24 Ntchito zanu ndi zochulukadi Inu Yehova! Munazipanga zonse mwanzeru, dziko lapansi ladzaza ndi zolengedwa zanu." 
Psalms104:25 Kuli nyanja yayikulu ndi yotambalala, yodzaza ndi zolengedwa zosawerengeka, zamoyo zanu zazikulu ndi zazingʼono zomwe." 
Psalms104:26 Kumeneko sitima zapamadzi zimayenda uku ndi uku, ndiponso Leviyatani amene munamulenga kuti asewere kumeneko." 
Psalms104:27 Zonsezi zimayangʼana kwa Inu kuti muzipatse chakudya chawo pa nthawi yake yoyenera. 
Psalms104:28 Mukazipatsa, zimachisonkhanitsa pamodzi; mukatsekula dzanja lanu, izo zimakhutitsidwa ndi zinthu zabwino." 
Psalms104:29 Mukabisa nkhope yanu, izo zimachita mantha aakulu; mukachotsa mpweya wawo, zimafa ndi kubwerera ku fumbi." 
Psalms104:30 Mukatumiza mzimu wanu, izo zimalengedwa ndipo mumakozanso maonekedwe a dziko lapansi." 
Psalms104:31 Ulemerero wa Yehova ukhalebe mpaka muyaya; Yehova akondwere ndi ntchito ya manja ake; 
Psalms104:32 Iye amene amayangʼana dziko lapansi ndipo limanjenjemera, amene amakhudza mapiri ndipo amatuluka utsi." 
Psalms104:33 Ine ndidzayimbira Yehova moyo wanga wonse; ndidzayimbira matamando Mulungu wanga nthawi yonse imene ndili ndi moyo. 
Psalms104:34 Zolingalira zanga zikhale zomukomera Iye, pamene ndikusangalala mwa Yehova." 
Psalms104:35 Koma anthu ochimwa awonongeke pa dziko lapansi ndipo anthu oyipa asapezekenso. Tamanda Yehova, Iwe moyo wanga. Tamandani Yehova." 
Psalms105:1 Yamikani Yehova, itanani dzina lake; lalikirani pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina zimene Iye wachita." 
Psalms105:2 Imbirani Iye, imbani matamando kwa Iyeyo; fotokozani za machitidwe ake onse odabwitsa." 
Psalms105:3 Munyadire dzina lake loyera; mitima ya iwo amene amafunafuna Yehova ikondwere. 
Psalms105:4 Dalirani Yehova ndi mphamvu zake; funafunani nkhope yake nthawi yonse. 
Psalms105:5 Kumbukirani zodabwitsa zimene Iye anazichita, zozizwitsa zake ndi maweruzo amene anapereka," 
Psalms105:6 inu zidzukulu za Abrahamu mtumiki wake, inu ana a Yakobo, osankhika ake." 
Psalms105:7 Iye ndiye Yehova Mulungu wathu; maweruzo ake ali pa dziko lonse lapansi. 
Psalms105:8 Iyeyo amakumbukira pangano lake kwamuyaya, mawu amene analamula kwa mibado yonse," 
Psalms105:9 pangano limene Iye anapanga ndi Abrahamu, lumbiro limene analumbira kwa Isake." 
Psalms105:10 Iye analitsimikiza kwa Yakobo monga zophunzitsa, kwa Israeli monga pangano lamuyaya:" 
Psalms105:11 “Ndidzapereka kwa iwe dziko la Kanaani ngati gawo la cholowa chako.” 
Psalms105:12 Pamene iwo anali ngati anthu ochepa mʼchiwerengero, ochepa ndithu, ndiponso alendo mʼdzikolo," 
Psalms105:13 ankayendayenda kuchoka ku mtundu wina wa anthu ndi kupita ku mtundu wina, kuchoka mu ufumu wina kupita ku wina." 
Psalms105:14 Iye sanalole wina aliyense kuwapondereza; anadzudzula mafumu chifukwa cha iwo: 
Psalms105:15 “Musakhudze odzozedwa anga; musachitire choyipa aneneri anga.” 
Psalms105:16 Iye anabweretsa njala pa dziko ndipo anawononga chakudya chonse; 
Psalms105:17 Iyeyo anatumiza munthu patsogolo pawo, Yosefe anagulitsidwa ngati kapolo." 
Psalms105:18 Iwo anavulaza mapazi ake ndi matangadza, khosi lake analiyika mʼzitsulo," 
Psalms105:19 mpaka zimene Iye ananeneratu zitakwaniritsidwa, mpaka mawu a Yehova ataonetsa kuti Iye ananena zoona." 
Psalms105:20 Mfumu inatuma munthu kukamumasula, wolamulira wa mitundu ya anthu anamasula iyeyo." 
Psalms105:21 Anamuyika kukhala wolamulira nyumba yake, wolamulira zonse zimene iye anali nazo," 
Psalms105:22 kulangiza ana a mfumu monga ankafunira ndi kuphunzitsa nzeru akuluakulu. 
Psalms105:23 Tsono Israeli analowa mu Igupto; Yakobo anakhala monga mlendo mʼdziko la Hamu. 
Psalms105:24 Yehova anachulukitsa anthu ake; ndipo anachititsa kuti akhale ochuluka kwambiri kuposa adani awo; 
Psalms105:25 amene mitima yawo anayitembenuza kuti idane ndi anthu ake, kukonzera chiwembu atumiki ake." 
Psalms105:26 Yehova anatuma Mose mtumiki wake, ndi Aaroni amene Iye anamusankha." 
Psalms105:27 Iwo anachita zizindikiro zozizwitsa pakati pawo, zodabwitsa zake mʼdziko la Hamu." 
Psalms105:28 Yehova anatumiza mdima nasandutsa dziko kuti likhale la mdima. Koma anthuwo anakaniratu mawu a Yehova. 
Psalms105:29 Yehova anasandutsa madzi awo kukhala magazi, kuchititsa kuti nsomba zawo zife." 
Psalms105:30 Dziko lawo linadzaza ndi achule amene analowa mʼzipinda zogona za olamulira awo. 
Psalms105:31 Iye anayankhula, ndipo kunabwera ntchentche zochuluka ndi nsabwe mʼdziko lawo lonse." 
Psalms105:32 Iyeyo anatembenuza mvula yawo kukhala matalala, ndi zingʼaningʼani mʼdziko lawo lonse;" 
Psalms105:33 Anagwetsa mitengo yawo ya mpesa ndi mitengo yawo ya mkuyu, nawononganso mitengo ina ya mʼdziko lawolo." 
Psalms105:34 Iye anayankhula, ndipo dzombe linabwera, ziwala zosawerengeka;" 
Psalms105:35 zinadya chilichonse chobiriwira cha mʼdziko lawo, zinadya zonse zotuluka mʼnthaka yawo." 
Psalms105:36 Kenaka anakantha ana onse oyamba kubadwa a mʼdziko lawo, zipatso zoyamba za umunthu wawo wonse." 
Psalms105:37 Yehova anatulutsa Israeli, atatenga siliva ndi golide wambiri, ndipo pakati pa mafuko awo palibe mmodzi amene anafowoka." 
Psalms105:38 Dziko la Igupto linakondwa pamene iwo anachoka, pakuti kuopsa kwa Israeli kunawagwera iwo." 
Psalms105:39 Iye anatambasula mitambo ngati chofunda chawo, ndi moto owawunikira usiku." 
Psalms105:40 Iwo anapempha, ndipo Iye anawabweretsera zinziri ndipo anawakhutitsa ndi chakudya chochokera kumwamba." 
Psalms105:41 Iye anatsekula thanthwe, ndipo madzi anatuluka; ngati mtsinje anayenda mʼchipululu." 
Psalms105:42 Pakuti anakumbukira lonjezo lake loyera limene linaperekedwa kwa Abrahamu mtumiki wake. 
Psalms105:43 Iye anatulutsa anthu ake akukondwera, osankhika ake akufuwula mwachimwemwe;" 
Psalms105:44 Iye anawapatsa mayiko a anthu a mitundu ina ndipo anakhala olowamʼmalo a zimene ena anazivutikira," 
Psalms105:45 kuti iwo asunge malangizo ake ndi kutsatira malamulo ake. Tamandani Yehova. 
Psalms106:1 	Tamandani Yehova. Yamikani Yehova chifukwa ndi wabwino; pakuti chikondi chake ndi chosatha. 
Psalms106:2 Ndani angathe kufotokoza za ntchito zamphamvu za Yehova kapena kumutamanda mokwanira? 
Psalms106:3 Odala ndi amene amasunga chilungamo, amene amachita zolungama nthawi zonse." 
Psalms106:4 Mundikumbukire Yehova, pamene mukuonetsa kukoma mtima kwanu kwa anthu anu, bwerani mudzandithandize pamene mukuwapulumutsa iwo," 
Psalms106:5 kuti ndidzasangalale ndi chuma cha anthu anu osankhika, kuti ndidzakhale nacho chimwemwe cha anthu anu ndi kukhala pamodzi ndi cholowa chanu pa kukutamandani." 
Psalms106:6 Ife tachimwa monga momwe anachitira makolo athu; tachita zolakwa ndipo tachita moyipa. 
Psalms106:7 Pamene makolo athu anali mu Igupto, sanalingalire za zozizwitsa zanu; iwo sanakumbukire kukoma mtima kwanu kochuluka, ndipo anawukira Inu pa Nyanja Yofiira." 
Psalms106:8 Komabe Iye anawapulumutsa chifukwa cha dzina lake, kuti aonetse mphamvu zake zazikulu." 
Psalms106:9 Anadzudzula Nyanja Yofiira, ndipo inawuma; anawatsogolera mʼnyanja yakuya ngati akuyenda mʼchipululu." 
Psalms106:10 Anawapulumutsa mʼdzanja la amaliwongo; anawawombola mʼdzanja la mdani. 
Psalms106:11 Madzi anamiza adani awo, palibe mmodzi wa iwo anapulumuka." 
Psalms106:12 Kenaka iwo anakhulupirira malonjezo ake ndi kuyimba nyimbo zamatamando. 
Psalms106:13 Koma posachedwa anayiwala zimene Iye anachita, ndipo sanayembekezere uphungu wake." 
Psalms106:14 Mʼchipululu, anadzipereka ku zilakolako zawo; mʼdziko lopanda kanthu anayesa Mulungu." 
Psalms106:15 Choncho Iye anawapatsa chimene anapempha, koma anatumiza nthenda yowondetsa." 
Psalms106:16 Mʼmisasa, anachitira nsanje Mose ndi Aaroni, amene Yehova anadzipatulira." 
Psalms106:17 Nthaka inatsekuka ndipo inameza Datani; inakwirira gulu la Abiramu. 
Psalms106:18 Moto unayaka pakati pa otsatira awo; lawi lamoto linapsereza anthu oyipa. 
Psalms106:19 Iwo anapanga mwana wangʼombe pa Horebu ndi kulambira fano loyengedwa kuchokera ku chitsulo. 
Psalms106:20 Anasinthanitsa ulemerero wawo ndi fano la ngʼombe yayimuna imene imadya udzu. 
Psalms106:21 Anayiwala Mulungu amene anawapulumutsa, amene anachita zinthu zazikulu mu Igupto," 
Psalms106:22 zozizwitsa mʼdziko la Hamu ndi machitidwe ake woopsa pa Nyanja Yofiira. 
Psalms106:23 Choncho Iye anawawuza kuti adzawawononga, pakanapanda Mose, mtumiki wake wosankhidwa, kuyima pamaso pake, ndi kuletsa mkwiyo wake kuti usawawononge." 
Psalms106:24 Motero iwo ananyoza dziko lokoma; sanakhulupirire malonjezo ake. 
Psalms106:25 Anangʼungʼudza mʼmatenti mwawo ndipo sanamvere Yehova. 
Psalms106:26 Kotero Iye analumbira atakweza dzanja lake, kuti adzachititsa kuti iwowo afere mʼchipululu," 
Psalms106:27 kuchititsa kuti zidzukulu zawo zifere pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina ndi kuwabalalitsa mʼdziko lonse. 
Psalms106:28 Iwo anayamba kupembedza Baala-Peori ndi kudya nsembe zoperekedwa kwa milungu yopanda moyo; 
Psalms106:29 anaputa mkwiyo wa Yehova pa machitidwe awo oyipa, ndipo mliri unabuka pakati pawo." 
Psalms106:30 Koma Finehasi anayimirira ndi kulowererapo, ndipo mliri unaleka." 
Psalms106:31 Chimenechi ndicho chinayesedwa chilungamo chake, kwa mibado yosatha imene ikubwera." 
Psalms106:32 Pa madzi a ku Meriba iwo anakwiyitsa Yehova ndipo mavuto anabwera kwa Mose chifukwa cha anthuwo," 
Psalms106:33 pakuti iwowo anawukira mzimu wa Mulungu, ndipo pa milomo ya Mose panatuluka mawu osayenera." 
Psalms106:34 Aisraeliwo sanawononge mitundu ya anthu monga momwe Yehova anawalamulira. 
Psalms106:35 Koma anasakanizana ndi anthu a mitundu inayo ndi kuphunzira miyambo yawo. 
Psalms106:36 Ndipo anapembedza mafano awo, amene anakhala msampha kwa iwowo." 
Psalms106:37 Anapereka nsembe ana awo aamuna ndi ana awo aakazi kwa ziwanda. 
Psalms106:38 Anakhetsa magazi a anthu osalakwa, magazi a ana awo aamuna ndi a ana awo aakazi, amene anawapereka nsembe kwa mafano a ku Kanaani, ndipo dziko linayipitsidwa ndi magazi awo." 
Psalms106:39 Iwo anadzidetsa okha ndi zimene anachita; ndi machitidwe awo amakhala ngati munthu wachigololo. 
Psalms106:40 Tsono Yehova anakwiya ndi anthu ake ndipo ananyansidwa ndi cholowa chake. 
Psalms106:41 Iye anawapereka kwa anthu a mitundu ina, ndipo adani awo anawalamulira." 
Psalms106:42 Adani awo anawazunza ndi kuwakhazika pansi pa mphamvu yawo. 
Psalms106:43 Iye ankawapulumutsa nthawi zambiri, koma iwo ankatsimikiza za kuwukira ndipo anawonongeka mʼmachimo awo." 
Psalms106:44 Koma Iye anaona kuzunzika kwawo pamene anamva kulira kwawo; 
Psalms106:45 Chifukwa cha iwo Iye anakumbukira pangano lake ndipo anawalezera mtima chifukwa cha kukula kwa chikondi chake. 
Psalms106:46 Iye anachititsa kuti amene anawagwira iwo ukapolo awamvere chisoni. 
Psalms106:47 Tipulumutseni Inu Yehova Mulungu wathu, ndipo mutisonkhanitse kuchoka kwa anthu a mitundu ina kuti tithe kuyamika dzina lanu loyera ndi kunyadira mʼmatamando anu." 
Psalms106:48 Atamandike Yehova, Mulungu wa Israeli, Kuyambira muyaya mpaka muyaya. Anthu onse anene kuti, “Ameni!” Tamandani Yehova." 
Psalms107:1 Yamikani Yehova chifukwa ndi wabwino; pakuti chikondi chake ndi chosatha. 
Psalms107:2 Owomboledwa a Yehova anene zimenezi amene Iyeyo anawawombola mʼdzanja la mdani," 
Psalms107:3 iwo amene anawasonkhanitsa kuchokera ku mayiko, kuchokera kumadzulo ndi kummawa, kuchokera kumpoto ndi kummwera." 
Psalms107:4 Ena anayendayenda mʼchipululu mopanda kanthu, osapeza njira yopitira ku mzinda kumene akanakakhazikikako." 
Psalms107:5 Iwo anamva njala ndi ludzu, ndipo miyoyo yawo inafowokeratu." 
Psalms107:6 Pamenepo analirira Yehova mʼmavuto awo ndipo Iye anawapulumutsa ku masautso awo. 
Psalms107:7 Iye anawatsogolera mʼnjira yowongoka kupita ku mzinda umene anakakhazikikako. 
Psalms107:8 Ayamike Yehova chifukwa cha chikondi chake chosatha ndi chifukwa cha machitidwe ake odabwitsa kwa anthu onse," 
Psalms107:9 pakuti Iye wapha ludzu la munthu womva ludzu ndipo wakhutitsa wanjala ndi zinthu zabwino. 
Psalms107:10 Ena anakhala mu mdima ndi mʼchisoni chachikulu, amʼndende ovutika mʼmaunyolo achitsulo," 
Psalms107:11 pakuti iwowo anawukira mawu a Mulungu ndi kunyoza uphungu wa Wammwambamwamba. 
Psalms107:12 Kotero Iye anawapereka kuti agwire ntchito yakalavulagaga; anagwa pansi ndipo panalibe woti awathandize. 
Psalms107:13 Pamenepo analirira Yehova mʼmasautso awo ndipo Iye anawapulumutsa ku masautso awo. 
Psalms107:14 Yehova anawatulutsa mu mdima ndi mʼchisoni chachikulu ndipo anadula maunyolo awo. 
Psalms107:15 Ayamike Yehova chifukwa cha chikondi chake chosatha ndi machitidwe ake odabwitsa kwa anthu onse," 
Psalms107:16 pakuti Iye amathyola zipata zamkuwa ndi kudula pakati mipiringidzo yachitsulo. 
Psalms107:17 Ena anakhala zitsiru chifukwa cha njira zawo zowukira, ndipo anamva zowawa chifukwa cha mphulupulu zawo." 
Psalms107:18 Iwo ananyansidwa ndi chakudya chilichonse ndipo anafika pafupi ndi zipata za imfa. 
Psalms107:19 Pamenepo analirira Yehova mʼmasautso awo ndipo Iye anawapulumutsa ku masautso awowo. 
Psalms107:20 Iye anatumiza mawu ake ndi kuwachiritsa; anawalanditsa ku manda. 
Psalms107:21 Ayamike Yehova chifukwa cha chikondi chake chosatha ndi machitidwe ake odabwitsa kwa anthu. 
Psalms107:22 Apereke nsembe yachiyamiko ndi kufotokoza za ntchito zake ndi nyimbo zachimwemwe. 
Psalms107:23 Ena anayenda pa nyanja mʼsitima zapamadzi; Iwo anali anthu amalonda pa nyanja yayikulu. 
Psalms107:24 Anaona ntchito za Yehova, machitidwe ake odabwitsa mʼnyanja yakuya." 
Psalms107:25 Pakuti Iye anayankhula ndi kuwutsa mphepo yamkuntho imene inabweretsa mafunde ataliatali. 
Psalms107:26 Sitima za pamadzizo zinatukulidwa mmwamba ndi kutsikira pansi pakuya; pamene amawonongeka, kulimba mtima kwawo kunasungunuka." 
Psalms107:27 Anachita chizungulire ndi kudzandira ngati anthu oledzera; anali pa mapeto a moyo wawo. 
Psalms107:28 Pamenepo analirira Yehova mʼmasautso awo ndipo Iyeyo anawapulumutsa ku masautso awo. 
Psalms107:29 Yehova analetsa namondwe, mafunde a mʼnyanja anatontholetsedwa." 
Psalms107:30 Anali osangalala pamene kunakhala bata, ndipo Iye anawatsogolera ku dooko limene amalifuna." 
Psalms107:31 Ayamike Yehova chifukwa cha chikondi chake chosatha ndi machitidwe ake odabwitsa kwa anthu. 
Psalms107:32 Akuze Iye mu msonkhano wa anthu ndi kumutamanda pabwalo la akuluakulu. 
Psalms107:33 Iye anasandutsa mitsinje kukhala chipululu, akasupe otuluka madzi kukhala nthaka yowuma," 
Psalms107:34 ndiponso nthaka yachonde kukhala nthaka yamchere, chifukwa cha kuyipa kwa amene amakhala kumeneko." 
Psalms107:35 Anasandutsa chipululu kukhala mayiwe a madzi ndi nthaka yowuma kukhala akasupe a madzi oyenda; 
Psalms107:36 kumeneko Iye anabweretsa anthu anjala kuti azikhalako, ndipo iwo anamanga mzinda woti akhazikikeko." 
Psalms107:37 Anafesa mbewu mʼminda ndi kudzala mipesa ndipo anakolola zipatso zochuluka; 
Psalms107:38 Yehova anawadalitsa, ndipo chiwerengero chawo chinachuluka kwambiri, ndipo Iye sanalole kuti ziweto zawo zithe." 
Psalms107:39 Kenaka chiwerengero chawo chinachepa ndipo iwo anatsitsidwa chifukwa cha mazunzo, mavuto ndi chisoni;" 
Psalms107:40 Iye amene amakhuthulira mʼnyozo pa olemekezeka anawachititsa kuyendayenda mʼmalo owumawo wopanda njira. 
Psalms107:41 Koma Iyeyo anakweza anthu osowa kuchoka ku masautso awo ngati magulu a nkhosa. 
Psalms107:42 Anthu olungama mtima amaona ndi kusangalala, koma anthu onse oyipa amatseka pakamwa pawo." 
Psalms107:43 Aliyense wanzeru asamalitse zinthu zimenezi ndi kuganizira za chikondi chachikulu cha Yehova. 
Psalms108:1 Nyimbo. Salimo la Davide. Mtima wanga ndi wokhazikika, Inu Mulungu; ndidzayimba nyimbo, inde ndidzayimba nyimbo zotamanda ndi moyo wanga wonse." 
Psalms108:2 Dzukani, zeze ndi pangwe! Ine ndidzadzutsa mʼbandakucha." 
Psalms108:3 Ndidzakutamandani Yehova, pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina; ndidzayimba za Inu pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina." 
Psalms108:4 Pakuti chikondi chanu nʼchachikulu, kutalika kwake kuposa kumwamba; kukhulupirika kwanu kumafika mlengalenga." 
Psalms108:5 Kwezekani Inu Mulungu, kuposa mayiko akumwamba, ndipo ulemerero wanu uphimbe dziko lonse lapansi." 
Psalms108:6 Tipulumutseni ndi kutithandiza ndi dzanja lanu lamanja kuti iwo amene mumawakonda apulumutsidwe. 
Psalms108:7 Mulungu wayankhula kuchokera ku malo ake opatulika: “Mwachipambano Ine ndidzagawa Sekemu ndipo ndidzayesa chigwa cha Sukoti. 
Psalms108:8 Giliyadi ndi wanga, Manase ndi wanganso; Efereimu ndi chipewa changa chodzitetezera, Yuda ndi ndodo yanga yaufumu." 
Psalms108:9 Mowabu ndi mbale yanga yosambiramo ndidzaponya nsapato zanga pa Edomu; ndidzafuwula mopambana pa Filisitiya.” 
Psalms108:10 Ndani adzandifikitsa ku mzinda wotetezedwa? Ndani adzanditsogolera ku Edomu? 
Psalms108:11 Kodi sindinu Mulungu, Inu amene mwatikana ndipo simuperekezanso magulu athu ankhondo?" 
Psalms108:12 Tithandizeni ife kulimbana ndi mdani, pakuti thandizo la munthu ndi lopanda pake." 
Psalms108:13 Chifukwa cha Mulungu wathu, ife tidzapeza chipambano, ndipo adzapondereza pansi adani athu." 
Psalms109:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wamayimbidwe. Salimo la Davide. Mulungu amene ndimakutamandani, musakhale chete," 
Psalms109:2 pakuti anthu oyipa ndi achinyengo atsekula pakamwa pawo kutsutsana nane; iwo ayankhula motsutsana nane ndi malilime abodza. 
Psalms109:3 Andizungulira ndi mawu audani, amandinena popanda chifukwa." 
Psalms109:4 Mʼmalo mwa chikondi changa amandineneza, koma ine ndine munthu wapemphero." 
Psalms109:5 Iwo amandibwezera zoyipa mʼmalo mwa zabwino, ndi udani mʼmalo mwa chikondi changa." 
Psalms109:6 Sankhani munthu woyipa kuti amutsutse iye; lolani wotsutsa ayime ku dzanja lake lamanja. 
Psalms109:7 Pamene aweruzidwa, apezeke kuti ndi wolakwa, ndipo mapemphero ake amutsutse." 
Psalms109:8 Masiku ake akhale owerengeka; munthu wina atenge malo ake a utsogoleri. 
Psalms109:9 Ana ake akhale amasiye ndipo mkazi wake akhale wopanda mwamuna. 
Psalms109:10 Ana ake akhale oyendayenda ndi opemphapempha; apirikitsidwe kuchoka pa mabwinja a nyumba zawo. 
Psalms109:11 Wokongoza alande zonse zimene ali nazo; alendo afunkhe ntchito za manja ake. 
Psalms109:12 Pasapezeke ndi mmodzi yemwe womukomera mtima kapena kumvera chisoni ana ake amasiye. 
Psalms109:13 Zidzukulu zake zithe nʼkufa, mayina awo afafanizidwe mu mʼbado wotsatirawo." 
Psalms109:14 Mphulupulu za makolo ake zikumbukiridwe pamaso pa Yehova; tchimo la amayi ake lisadzafafanizidwe. 
Psalms109:15 Machimo awo akhale pamaso pa Yehova nthawi zonse, kuti Iye achotse chikumbutso chawo pa dziko lapansi." 
Psalms109:16 Pakuti iye sanaganizirepo zochita chifundo, koma anazunza mpaka kuwapha anthu osauka ndi osweka mtima." 
Psalms109:17 Anakonda kutemberera, matembererowo abwerere kwa iye; sanakondwe nʼkudalitsa anthu ena, choncho madalitso akhale kutali naye." 
Psalms109:18 Anavala kutemberera ngati chovala; kutemberera kunalowa mʼthupi lake ngati madzi, kulowa mʼmafupa ake ngati mafuta." 
Psalms109:19 Matemberero akhale ngati chofunda chodzikutira nacho, ngati lamba wovala tsiku ndi tsiku." 
Psalms109:20 Awa akhale malipiro ochokera kwa Yehova pa onditsutsa anga, kwa iwo amene amayankhula zoyipa za ine." 
Psalms109:21 Koma Inu Ambuye Wamphamvuzonse, muchite nane molingana ndi dzina lanu, chifukwa cha ubwino wa chikondi chanu, pulumutseni." 
Psalms109:22 Pakuti ndine wosauka ndi wosowa, ndipo mtima wanga ukuwawa mʼkati mwanga." 
Psalms109:23 Ndikuzimirira ngati mthunzi wa kumadzulo, ndapirikitsidwa ngati dzombe." 
Psalms109:24 Mawondo anga afowoka chifukwa cha kusala zakudya, thupi langa lawonda ndi mutu wanga womwe." 
Psalms109:25 Ndine chinthu chotonzedwa kwa otsutsana nane; akandiona, amapukusa mitu yawo." 
Psalms109:26 Thandizeni Inu Yehova Mulungu wanga; pulumutseni molingana ndi chikondi chanu. 
Psalms109:27 Adaniwo adziwe kuti limeneli ndi dzanja lanu, kuti Inu Yehova mwachita zimenezi." 
Psalms109:28 Angathe kutemberera, koma Inu mudzadalitsa; pamene iwo andiputa adzachititsidwa manyazi, koma mtumiki wanu adzasangalala." 
Psalms109:29 Onditsutsa adzavekedwa mnyozo, ndipo adzadzifunditsa manyazi ngati chovala." 
Psalms109:30 Ndi pakamwa panga ndidzathokoza Yehova kwambiri; ndidzamutamanda mʼgulu lalikulu la anthu. 
Psalms109:31 Popeza Iye amayima ku dzanja lamanja la munthu wosowayo, kupulumutsa moyo wake kwa iwo amene agamula molakwa." 
Psalms110:1 Salimo la Davide. Yehova akuwuza Mbuye wanga kuti, “Khala ku dzanja langa lamanja mpaka nditasandutsa adani ako kukhala chopondapo mapazi ako.”" 
Psalms110:2 Yehova adzakuza ndodo yamphamvu ya ufumu wako kuchokera mʼZiyoni; udzalamulira pakati pa adani ako. 
Psalms110:3 Ankhondo ako adzakhala odzipereka pa tsiku lako la nkhondo. Atavala chiyero chaulemerero, kuchokera mʼmimba ya mʼbandakucha, udzalandira mame a unyamata wako." 
Psalms110:4 Yehova walumbira ndipo sadzasintha maganizo ake: “Ndiwe wansembe mpaka muyaya monga mwa unsembe wa Melikizedeki.” 
Psalms110:5 Ambuye ali kudzanja lako lamanja; Iye adzaponda mafumu pa tsiku la ukali wake. 
Psalms110:6 Adzaweruza anthu a mitundu ina, adzadzaza dziko lapansi ndi mitembo ndipo adzaphwanya olamulira a pa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Psalms110:7 Iye adzamwa mu mtsinje wa mʼmbali mwa njira; choncho adzaweramutsa mutu wake. 
Psalms111:1 	Tamandani Yehova. Ndidzathokoza Yehova ndi mtima wanga wonse mʼbwalo la anthu olungama mtima ndi pa msonkhano. 
Psalms111:2 Ntchito za Yehova nʼzazikulu; onse amene amakondwera nazo amazilingalira. 
Psalms111:3 Zochita zake ndi za ulemerero ndi zaufumu, ndipo chilungamo chake ndi chosatha." 
Psalms111:4 Iye wachititsa kuti zodabwitsa zake zikumbukirike; Yehova ndi wokoma mtima ndi wachifundo. 
Psalms111:5 Amapereka chakudya kwa amene amamuopa Iye; amakumbukira pangano lake kwamuyaya. 
Psalms111:6 Waonetsa anthu ake mphamvu ya ntchito zake, kuwapatsa mayiko a anthu a mitundu ina." 
Psalms111:7 Ntchito za manja ake ndi zokhulupirika ndi zolungama; malangizo ake onse ndi odalirika. 
Psalms111:8 Malamulo ndi okhazikika ku nthawi za nthawi, ochitidwa mokhulupirika ndi molungama." 
Psalms111:9 Iyeyo amawombola anthu ake; anakhazikitsa pangano lake kwamuyaya dzina lake ndi loyera ndi loopsa. 
Psalms111:10 Kuopa Yehova ndicho chiyambi cha nzeru; onse amene amatsatira malangizo ake amamvetsa bwino zinthu. Iye ndi wotamandika mpaka muyaya. 
Psalms112:1 	Tamandani Yehova. Wodala munthu amene amaopa Yehova, amene amakondwera kwambiri ndi malamulo ake." 
Psalms112:2 Ana ake adzakhala amphamvu mʼdziko; mʼbado wa olungama mtima udzadalitsidwa. 
Psalms112:3 Kulemera ndi chuma zili mʼnyumba yake, ndipo chilungamo chake ndi chosatha." 
Psalms112:4 Ngakhale mu mdima kuwala kumatulukira olungama mtima; wokoma mtima, wachifundo ndi wowongoka mtima." 
Psalms112:5 Zinthu zabwino zidzabwera kwa iye amene amapereka mowolowamanja ndi wokongoletsa mwaufulu, amene amachita ntchito yake mwachilungamo." 
Psalms112:6 Ndithu sadzagwedezeka; munthu wolungama sadzayiwalika mpaka muyaya. 
Psalms112:7 Saopa akamva zoyipa zimene zachitika; mtima wake ndi wokhazikika ndipo amadalira Yehova. 
Psalms112:8 Mtima wake ndi wotetezedwa, sadzakhala ndi mantha; potsiriza pake adzayangʼana adani ake mwachipambano." 
Psalms112:9 Wopereka mphatso zake mowolowamanja kwa osauka, chilungamo chake chimanka mpaka muyaya; nyanga yake idzakwezedwa mwaulemu." 
Psalms112:10 Munthu woyipa adzaona zimenezi ndipo adzapsa mtima; adzakukuta mano ake ndipo adzasungunuka. Zolakalaka za anthu oyipa sizidzachitika konse. 
Psalms113:1 	Tamandani Yehova. Mutamandeni, inu atumiki a Yehova, tamandani dzina la Yehova." 
Psalms113:2 Yehova atamandidwe, kuyambira tsopano mpaka muyaya." 
Psalms113:3 Kuyambira ku matulukiro a dzuwa mpaka ku malowero ake, dzina la Yehova liyenera kutamandidwa." 
Psalms113:4 Yehova wakwezeka pa anthu a mitundu yonse, ulemerero wake ndi woposa mayiko akumwamba." 
Psalms113:5 Ndani wofanana ndi Yehova Mulungu wathu, Iye amene amakhala mwaufumu mmwamba?" 
Psalms113:6 amene amawerama pansi kuyangʼana miyamba ndi dziko lapansi? 
Psalms113:7 Iye amakweza munthu wosauka kuchoka pa fumbi ndi kutukula munthu wosowa kuchoka pa dzala; 
Psalms113:8 amawakhazika pamodzi ndi mafumu, pamodzi ndi mafumu a anthu ake." 
Psalms113:9 Amakhazikitsa mayi wosabereka mʼnyumba yake monga mayi wa ana wosangalala. Tamandani Yehova. 
Psalms114:1 Pamene Israeli anatuluka mu Igupto, nyumba ya Yakobo kuchoka ku mtundu wa anthu a chiyankhulo chachilendo," 
Psalms114:2 Yuda anasanduka malo opatulika a Mulungu, Israeli anasanduka ufumu wake." 
Psalms114:3 Nyanja inaona ndi kuthawa, mtsinje wa Yorodani unabwerera mʼmbuyo;" 
Psalms114:4 mapiri analumphalumpha ngati nkhosa zazimuna, timapiri ngati ana ankhosa." 
Psalms114:5 Nʼchifukwa chiyani iwe unathawa? iwe mtsinje wa Yorodani unabwereranji mʼmbuyo? 
Psalms114:6 inu mapiri, munalumphalumphiranji ngati nkhosa zazimuna, inu timapiri, ngati ana ankhosa?" 
Psalms114:7 Njenjemera pamaso pa Ambuye iwe dziko lapansi, pamaso pa Mulungu wa Yakobo," 
Psalms114:8 amene anasandutsa thanthwe kukhala chitsime, thanthwe lolimba kukhala akasupe a madzi." 
Psalms115:1 Kwa ife ayi Yehova, kwa ife ayi koma ulemerero ukhale pa dzina lanu, chifukwa cha chikondi chanu chosasinthika ndiponso chifukwa cha kukhulupirika kwanu." 
Psalms115:2 Chifukwa chiyani anthu a mitundu ina akunena kuti, “Mulungu wawo ali kuti?”" 
Psalms115:3 Mulungu wathu ali kumwamba; Iye amachita chilichonse chimene chimamukondweretsa. 
Psalms115:4 Koma mafano awo ndi siliva ndi golide, opangidwa ndi manja a anthu." 
Psalms115:5 Pakamwa ali napo koma sayankhula, maso ali nawo koma sapenya;" 
Psalms115:6 makutu ali nawo koma samva, mphuno ali nazo koma sanunkhiza;" 
Psalms115:7 manja ali nawo koma akakhudza samva kanthu; mapazi ali nawo koma sayenda; kapena pakhosi pawo kutulutsa mawu. 
Psalms115:8 Anthu amene amapanga mafanowo adzafanana nawo, chimodzimodzinso onse amene amadalira mafanowo." 
Psalms115:9 Inu Aisraeli, dalirani Yehova; Iye ndiye thandizo lanu ndi chishango chanu." 
Psalms115:10 Iwe nyumba ya Aaroni, dalira Yehova; Iye ndiye thandizo lako ndi chishango chako." 
Psalms115:11 Inu amene mumaopa Iye, dalirani Yehova; Iye ndiye thandizo lanu ndi chishango chanu." 
Psalms115:12 Yehova watikumbukira ndipo adzatidalitsa: adzadalitsa nyumba ya Israeli, adzadalitsa nyumba ya Aaroni," 
Psalms115:13 adzadalitsa iwo amene amaopa Yehova; aangʼono ndi aakulu omwe. 
Psalms115:14 Yehova akuwonjezereni madalitso; inuyo pamodzi ndi ana anu. 
Psalms115:15 Mudalitsidwe ndi Yehova, Wolenga kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi." 
Psalms115:16 Kumwamba ndi kwa Yehova, koma dziko lapansi Iye walipereka kwa anthu." 
Psalms115:17 Si anthu akufa amene amatamanda Yehova, amene amatsikira kuli chete;" 
Psalms115:18 ndi ife amene timatamanda Yehova, kuyambira tsopano mpaka muyaya. Tamandani Yehova." 
Psalms116:1 Ndimakonda Yehova pakuti Iyeyo amamva mawu anga; Iye amamva kulira kwanga kopempha chifundo. 
Psalms116:2 Pakuti ananditchera khutu, ndidzayitana Iye masiku onse a moyo wanga." 
Psalms116:3 Zingwe za imfa zinandizinga, zoopsa za ku dziko la anthu akufa zinandigwera; ndinapeza mavuto ndi chisoni." 
Psalms116:4 Pamenepo ndinayitana dzina la Yehova: “Inu Yehova, pulumutseni!”" 
Psalms116:5 Yehova ndi wokoma mtima ndi wolungama Mulungu wathu ndi wodzaza ndi chifundo. 
Psalms116:6 Yehova amateteza munthu wodzichepetsa mtima; pamene ndinali ndi chosowa chachikulu, Iye anandipulumutsa." 
Psalms116:7 Pumula iwe moyo wanga, pakuti Yehova wakuchitira zokoma." 
Psalms116:8 Pakuti Inu Yehova mwapulumutsa moyo wanga ku imfa, maso anga ku misozi, mapazi anga kuti angapunthwe," 
Psalms116:9 kuti ine ndiyende pamaso pa Yehova mʼdziko la anthu amoyo. 
Psalms116:10 Ine ndinakhulupirira; choncho ndinati, “Ndasautsidwa kwambiri.”" 
Psalms116:11 Ndipo ndili mʼnkhawa yanga ndinati, “Anthu onse ndi abodza.”" 
Psalms116:12 Ndingamubwezere chiyani Yehova, chifukwa cha zokoma zake zonse zimene wandichitira?" 
Psalms116:13 Ndidzakweza chikho cha chipulumutso ndipo ndidzayitana dzina la Yehova. 
Psalms116:14 Ndidzakwaniritsa malonjezo anga kwa Yehova pamaso pa anthu ake onse. 
Psalms116:15 Imfa ya anthu oyera mtima ndi yamtengowapatali pamaso pa Yehova. 
Psalms116:16 Inu Yehova, zoonadi ndine mtumiki wanu: ndine mtumiki wanu, mwana wa mdzakazi wanu; Inu mwamasula maunyolo anga." 
Psalms116:17 Ndidzapereka nsembe yachiyamiko kwa Inu ndipo ndidzayitanira pa dzina la Yehova. 
Psalms116:18 Ndidzakwaniritsa malonjezo anga kwa Yehova pamaso pa anthu ake onse," 
Psalms116:19 mʼmabwalo a nyumba ya Yehova, mʼkati mwako iwe Yerusalemu. Tamandani Yehova." 
Psalms117:1 Tamandani Yehova, inu anthu a mitundu yonse; mulemekezeni Iye, inu mitundu ya anthu." 
Psalms117:2 Pakuti chikondi chake pa ife ndi chachikulu, ndipo kukhulupirika kwa Yehova nʼkosatha. Tamandani Yehova." 
Psalms118:1 Yamikani Yehova chifukwa ndi wabwino; pakuti chikondi chake chosasinthika ndi chosatha. 
Psalms118:2 Israeli anene kuti: “Chikondi chake ndi chosatha.” 
Psalms118:3 Banja la Aaroni linene kuti, “Chikondi chake ndi chosatha.”" 
Psalms118:4 Iwo amene amaopa Yehova anene kuti: “Chikondi chake ndi chosatha.” 
Psalms118:5 Ndili mʼmasautso anga ndinalirira Yehova, ndipo Iye anayankha pondichotsa mʼmasautsowo." 
Psalms118:6 Yehova ali nane; sindidzachita mantha. Munthu angandichite chiyani? 
Psalms118:7 Yehova ali nane; Iye ndiye thandizo langa. Ndidzayangʼana adani anga mwachipambano. 
Psalms118:8 Nʼkwabwino kuthawira kwa Yehova kusiyana ndi kudalira munthu. 
Psalms118:9 Nʼkwabwino kuthawira kwa Yehova kusiyana ndi kudalira mafumu. 
Psalms118:10 Anthu a mitundu yonse anandizinga, koma mʼdzina la Yehova ndinawawononga." 
Psalms118:11 Anandizinga mbali zonse, koma mʼdzina la Yehova ndinawawononga." 
Psalms118:12 Anandizinga ngati njuchi, koma anatha msanga ngati moto wapaminga; mʼdzina la Yehova ndinawawononga." 
Psalms118:13 Anandikankha uku ndi uko ndipo ndinali pafupi kugwa, koma Yehova anandithandiza." 
Psalms118:14 Yehova ndiye mphamvu yanga ndi nyimbo yanga; Iye wakhala chipulumutso changa. 
Psalms118:15 Mfuwu wachimwemwe ndi chipambano ukumveka mʼmatenti a anthu olungama mtima kuti: “Dzanja lamanja la Yehova lachita zamphamvu! 
Psalms118:16 Dzanja lamanja la Yehova latukulidwa mmwamba Dzanja lamanja la Yehova lachita zamphamvu!” 
Psalms118:17 Sindidzafa koma ndidzakhala ndi moyo ndipo ndidzalalika za ntchito ya Yehova. 
Psalms118:18 Yehova wandilanga koopsa, koma sanandipereke ku imfa." 
Psalms118:19 Tsekulireni zipata zachilungamo, kuti ndifike kudzayamika Yehova." 
Psalms118:20 Ichi ndicho chipata cha Yehova chimene olungama mtima okha adzalowerapo. 
Psalms118:21 Ndidzakuyamikani chifukwa Inu munandiyankha; mwakhala chipulumutso changa. 
Psalms118:22 Mwala umene amisiri omanga nyumba anawukana wasanduka wapangodya; 
Psalms118:23 Yehova ndiye wachita zimenezi ndipo nʼzodabwitsa pamaso pathu. 
Psalms118:24 Lero ndiye tsiku limene Yehova walipanga; tiyeni tikondwere ndi kusangalala nalo. 
Psalms118:25 Inu Yehova, tipulumutseni; Yehova, tipambanitseni." 
Psalms118:26 Wodala amene akubwera mʼdzina la Yehova. Tikukudalitsani kuchokera ku nyumba ya Yehova. 
Psalms118:27 Yehova ndi Mulungu, ndipo kuwala kwake kwatiwunikira Ife. Lowani nawo pa mʼdipiti wa ku chikondwerero mutanyamula nthambi mʼdzanja lanu, mpaka ku nyanga za guwa." 
Psalms118:28 Inu ndinu Mulungu wanga, ndipo ndidzakuyamikani; Inu ndinu Mulungu wanga, ndipo ndidzakukwezani." 
Psalms118:29 Yamikani Yehova chifukwa ndi wabwino; pakuti chikondi chake chosasinthika ndi chosatha. 
Psalms119:1 Odala ndi amene moyo wawo ulibe cholakwa, amene amayenda monga mwa malamulo a Yehova." 
Psalms119:2 Odala ndi amene amasunga malamulo ake, amene amafunafuna Iyeyo ndi mtima wawo wonse." 
Psalms119:3 Sachita cholakwa chilichonse; amayenda mʼnjira zake. 
Psalms119:4 Inu mwapereka malangizo ndipo ayenera kutsatidwa kwathunthu. 
Psalms119:5 Aa! Ndikanakonda njira zanga zikanakhala zokhazikika pa kumvera zophunzitsa zanu! 
Psalms119:6 Pamenepo ine sindikanachititsidwa manyazi, poganizira malamulo anu onse." 
Psalms119:7 Ndidzakutamandani ndi mtima wolungama, pamene ndikuphunzira malamulo anu olungama." 
Psalms119:8 Ndidzamvera zophunzitsa zanu; musanditaye kwathunthu. 
Psalms119:9 Kodi mnyamata angathe bwanji kuyeretsa mayendedwe ake? Akawasamala potsata mawu anu. 
Psalms119:10 Ndimakufunafunani ndi mtima wanga wonse; musalole kuti ndisochere kuchoka pa malamulo anu. 
Psalms119:11 Ndasunga mawu anu mu mtima mwanga kuti ndisakuchimwireni. 
Psalms119:12 Mutamandike Inu Yehova; phunzitseni malamulo anu. 
Psalms119:13 Ndi milomo yanga ndimafotokoza malamulo anu onse amene amachokera pakamwa panu. 
Psalms119:14 Ndimakondwera potsatira malamulo anu monga momwe munthu amakondwera akakhala ndi chuma chambiri. 
Psalms119:15 Ndimalingalira malangizo anu ndipo ndimaganizira njira zanu. 
Psalms119:16 Ndimakondwera ndi malamulo anu; sindidzayiwala konse mawu anu. 
Psalms119:17 Chitirani zokoma mtumiki wanu, ndipo ndidzakhala ndi moyo; kuti tsono ndisunge mawu anu." 
Psalms119:18 Tsekulani maso anga kuti ndithe kuona zinthu zodabwitsa mʼmalamulo anu. 
Psalms119:19 Ine ndine mlendo pa dziko lapansi; musandibisire malamulo anu. 
Psalms119:20 Moyo wanga wafowoka polakalaka malamulo anu nthawi zonse. 
Psalms119:21 Inu mumadzudzula onyada, otembereredwa, amene achoka pa malamulo anu." 
Psalms119:22 Mundichotsere chitonzo ndi mnyozo pakuti ndimasunga malamulo anu. 
Psalms119:23 Ngakhale mafumu akhale pamodzi kundinyoza, mtumiki wanu adzalingalirabe zophunzitsa zanu." 
Psalms119:24 Malamulo anu amandikondweretsa; ndiwo amene amandilangiza. 
Psalms119:25 Moyo wanga wakangamira fumbi; tsitsimutseni molingana ndi mawu anu. 
Psalms119:26 Ndinafotokoza njira zanga ndipo Inu munandiyankha; phunzitseni malamulo anu. 
Psalms119:27 Mundidziwitse chiphunzitso cha malangizo anu; pamenepo ndidzalingalira zodabwitsa zanu. 
Psalms119:28 Moyo wanga wafowoka ndi chisoni; limbikitseni monga mwa mawu anu. 
Psalms119:29 Mundichotse mʼnjira zachinyengo; mundikomere mtima pondiphunzitsa malamulo anu. 
Psalms119:30 Ndasankha njira ya choonadi; ndayika malamulo anu pa mtima panga. 
Psalms119:31 Ndagwiritsitsa umboni wanu, Inu Yehova; musalole kuti ndichititsidwe manyazi." 
Psalms119:32 Ndimathamanga mʼnjira ya malamulo anu, pakuti Inu mwamasula mtima wanga." 
Psalms119:33 Yehova, phunzitseni kutsatira zophunzitsa zanu; ndipo ndidzazisunga mpaka kumapeto." 
Psalms119:34 Mundipatse mtima womvetsa zinthu ndipo ndidzasunga malamulo anu ndi kuwamvera ndi mtima wanga wonse. 
Psalms119:35 Munditsogolere mʼnjira ya malamulo anu, pakuti mʼmenemo ndimapezamo chikondwerero changa." 
Psalms119:36 Tembenuzani mtima wanga kuti uzikonda malamulo anu, osati chuma." 
Psalms119:37 Tembenuzani maso anga kuchoka ku zinthu zachabechabe; sungani moyo wanga monga mwa mawu anu. 
Psalms119:38 Kwaniritsani lonjezo lanu kwa mtumiki wanu, kuti Inu muopedwe." 
Psalms119:39 Mundichotsere chipongwe chimene ndikuchiopa, pakuti malamulo anu ndi abwino." 
Psalms119:40 Taonani, ndimalakalakatu malangizo anu! Sungani moyo wanga mʼchilungamo chanu." 
Psalms119:41 Chikondi chanu chosasinthika chibwere kwa ine, Inu Yehova, chipulumutso chanu monga mwa lonjezo lanu;" 
Psalms119:42 ndipo ndidzayankha amene amandinyoza, popeza ndimadalira mawu anu." 
Psalms119:43 Musakwatule mawu a choonadi mʼkamwa mwanga, pakuti ndakhazikitsa chiyembekezo changa mʼmalamulo anu." 
Psalms119:44 Ndidzasunga malamulo anu nthawi zonse, ku nthawi za nthawi." 
Psalms119:45 Ndidzayendayenda mwaufulu, chifukwa ndinafunafuna malangizo anu." 
Psalms119:46 Ndidzayankhula za umboni wanu pamaso pa mfumu ndipo sindidzachititsidwa manyazi," 
Psalms119:47 popeza ndimakondwera ndi malamulo anu chifukwa ndimawakonda. 
Psalms119:48 Ndikweza manja anga ku malamulo anu, ku malamulo amene ndimawakonda, ndipo ndimalingalira malangizo anu." 
Psalms119:49 Kumbukirani mawu anu kwa mtumiki wanu, popeza mwandipatsa chiyembekezo." 
Psalms119:50 Chitonthozo changa pa masautso anga ndi ichi: lonjezo lanu limasunga moyo wanga. 
Psalms119:51 Odzikuza amandinyoza popanda chowaletsa, koma sindichoka pa malamulo anu." 
Psalms119:52 Ndimakumbukira malamulo anu Yehova akalekale, ndipo mwa iwo ndimapeza chitonthozo." 
Psalms119:53 Ndayipidwa kwambiri chifukwa cha oyipa amene ataya malamulo anu. 
Psalms119:54 Zophunzitsa zanu ndi mitu ya nyimbo yanga kulikonse kumene ndigonako. 
Psalms119:55 Usiku ndimakumbukira dzina lanu Yehova, ndipo ndidzasunga malamulo anu." 
Psalms119:56 Ichi ndicho ndakhala ndikuchita: ndimasunga malangizo anu. 
Psalms119:57 Yehova, Inu ndiye gawo langa; ndalonjeza kumvera mawu anu." 
Psalms119:58 Ndimafunafuna nkhope yanu ndi mtima wanga wonse; mundikomere mtima monga mwa lonjezo lanu. 
Psalms119:59 Ndinalingalira za njira zanga ndipo ndatembenuza mayendedwe anga kutsatira umboni wanu. 
Psalms119:60 Ndidzafulumira ndipo sindidzazengereza kumvera malamulo anu. 
Psalms119:61 Ngakhale oyipa andimange ndi zingwe, sindidzayiwala lamulo lanu." 
Psalms119:62 Ndimadzuka pakati pa usiku kuyamika Inu chifukwa cha malamulo anu olungama. 
Psalms119:63 Ine ndine bwenzi la onse amene amakukondani, kwa onse amene amatsatira malangizo anu." 
Psalms119:64 Dziko lapansi ladzaza ndi chikondi chanu chosasinthika, phunzitseni malamulo anu." 
Psalms119:65 Inu Yehova, chitirani chabwino mtumiki wanu molingana ndi mawu anu." 
Psalms119:66 Phunzitseni nzeru ndi chiweruzo chabwino, pakuti ndimakhulupirira malamulo anu." 
Psalms119:67 Ndisanayambe kuzunzika ndinasochera, koma tsopano ndimamvera mawu anu." 
Psalms119:68 Inu ndinu abwino ndipo zimene mumachita ndi zabwino; phunzitseni malamulo anu. 
Psalms119:69 Ngakhale odzikuza andipaka mabodza, ine ndimasunga malangizo anu ndi mtima wanga wonse." 
Psalms119:70 Mitima yawo ndi yowuma ndi yosakhudzidwa, koma ine ndimakondwera ndi malamulo anu." 
Psalms119:71 Ndi bwino kuti ndinasautsidwa kuti ndithe kuphunzira malamulo anu. 
Psalms119:72 Lamulo lochokera mʼkamwa mwanu limandikomera kwambiri kuposa ndalama zambirimbiri za siliva ndi golide. 
Psalms119:73 Manja anu anandilenga ndi kundiwumba; patseni nzeru zomvetsa zinthu kuti ndiphunzire malamulo anu. 
Psalms119:74 Iwo amene amakuopani akondwere akandiona, chifukwa chiyembekezo changa chili mʼmawu anu." 
Psalms119:75 Ine ndikudziwa, Inu Yehova, kuti malamulo anu ndi olungama ndipo mwandizunza chifukwa cha kukhulupirika kwanu." 
Psalms119:76 Chikondi chanu chosasinthika chikhale chitonthozo changa, molingana ndi lonjezo lanu kwa mtumiki wanu." 
Psalms119:77 Chifundo chanu chindifikire kuti ndikhale ndi moyo, popeza malamulo anu ndiye chikondwerero changa." 
Psalms119:78 Odzikuza achititsidwe manyazi chifukwa cha kundilakwira popanda chifukwa; koma ine ndidzalingalira malangizo anu. 
Psalms119:79 Iwo amene amakuopani atembenukire kwa ine, iwo amene amamvetsetsa umboni wanu." 
Psalms119:80 Mtima wanga ukhale wopanda cholakwa pa chiphunzitso chanu kuti ndisachititsidwe manyazi. 
Psalms119:81 Moyo wanga wafowoka ndi kufunafuna chipulumutso chanu, koma chiyembekezo changa chili mʼmawu anu." 
Psalms119:82 Maso anga alefuka pofunafuna lonjezo lanu; Ine ndikuti, “Kodi mudzanditonthoza liti?”" 
Psalms119:83 Ngakhale ndili ngati thumba lachikopa la vinyo pa utsi sindiyiwala zophunzitsa zanu. 
Psalms119:84 Kodi mtumiki wanu ayenera kudikira mpaka liti? Kodi mudzawalanga liti amene amandizunza? 
Psalms119:85 Anthu osalabadira za Mulungu, odzikuza amandikumbira dzenje motsutsana ndi malamulo anu." 
Psalms119:86 Malamulo anu onse ndi odalirika; thandizeni, pakuti anthu akundizunza popanda chifukwa." 
Psalms119:87 Iwo anatsala pangʼono kundichotsa pa dziko lapansi koma sindinataye malangizo anu. 
Psalms119:88 Sungani moyo wanga molingana ndi chikondi chanu chosasinthika, ndipo ndidzamvera umboni wa pakamwa panu." 
Psalms119:89 Mawu anu Yehova ndi amuyaya; akhazikika kumwambako. 
Psalms119:90 Kukhulupirika kwanu kumakhala mpaka ku mibado yonse; Inu munakhazikitsa dziko lapansi ndipo lilipobe. 
Psalms119:91 Malamulo anu alipobe mpaka lero lino, pakuti zinthu zonse zimatumikira Inu." 
Psalms119:92 Malamulo anu akanapanda kukhala chikondwerero changa, ndikanawonongeka mʼmasautso anga." 
Psalms119:93 Ine sindidzayiwala konse malangizo anu, pakuti ndi malangizo anuwo munasunga moyo wanga." 
Psalms119:94 Ndine wanu, ndipulumutseni; pakuti ndasamala malangizo anu." 
Psalms119:95 Anthu oyipa akudikira kuti andiwononge, koma ndidzalingalira umboni wanu." 
Psalms119:96 Ndadziwa kuti zinthu zonse zili ndi malire, koma malamulo anu alibe malire konse." 
Psalms119:97 Ndithu, ine ndimakonda malamulo anu! Ndimalingaliramo tsiku lonse." 
Psalms119:98 Malamulo anu amachititsa kuti ndikhale wanzeru kuposa adani anga, popeza malamulowo ali ndi ine nthawi zonse." 
Psalms119:99 Ndimamvetsa zinthu kwambiri kuposa aphunzitsi anga onse popeza ndimalingalira umboni wanu. 
Psalms119:100 Ndili ndi nzeru zochuluka zomvetsera zinthu kuposa anthu okalamba, popeza ndimamvera malangizo anu." 
Psalms119:101 Ndimaletsa miyendo yanga kuyenda mʼnjira iliyonse yoyipa kuti ndithe kumvera mawu anu. 
Psalms119:102 Sindinapatuke kuchoka pa malamulo anu, pakuti Inu mwini munandiphunzitsa." 
Psalms119:103 Mawu anu ndi otsekemera ndikawalawa, otsekemera kuposa uchi mʼkamwa mwanga!" 
Psalms119:104 Ndimapeza nzeru zodziwira zinthu kuchokera mʼmalangizo anu; kotero ndimadana ndi njira iliyonse yoyipa. 
Psalms119:105 Mawu anu ndi nyale ya kumapazi kwanga ndi kuwunika kwa pa njira yanga. 
Psalms119:106 Ndalumbira ndipo ndatsimikiza, kuti ndidzatsatira malamulo anu olungama." 
Psalms119:107 Ndazunzika kwambiri; Inu Yehova, sungani moyo wanga molingana ndi mawu anu." 
Psalms119:108 Inu Yehova, landirani matamando aufulu ochokera pakamwa panga, ndipo ndiphunzitseni malamulo anu." 
Psalms119:109 Ngakhale moyo wanga umakhala mʼzoopsa nthawi ndi nthawi, sindidzayiwala malamulo anu." 
Psalms119:110 Anthu oyipa anditchera msampha, koma sindinasochere kuchoka pa malangizo anu." 
Psalms119:111 Umboni wanu ndiye cholowa changa kwamuyaya; Iwo ndiye chimwemwe cha mtima wanga. 
Psalms119:112 Mtima wanga wakhazikika pa kusunga zophunzitsa zanu mpaka kumapeto kwenikweni. 
Psalms119:113 Ndimadana ndi anthu apawiripawiri, koma ndimakonda malamulo anu." 
Psalms119:114 Inu ndinu pothawirapo panga ndi chishango changa; chiyembekezo changa chili mʼmawu anu. 
Psalms119:115 Chokani kwa ine, inu anthu ochita zoyipa, kuti ndisunge malamulo a Mulungu wanga!" 
Psalms119:116 Mundichirikize molingana ndi lonjezo lanu, ndipo ndidzakhala ndi moyo; musalole kuti chiyembekezo changa chipite pachabe." 
Psalms119:117 Gwirizizeni, ndipo ndidzapulumutsidwa; nthawi zonse ndidzasamalira zophunzitsa zanu." 
Psalms119:118 Inu mumakana onse amene amasochera kuchoka pa zophunzitsa zanu, pakuti chinyengo chawo ndi chopanda phindu." 
Psalms119:119 Anthu onse oyipa a pa dziko lapansi mumawayesa ngati zinthu zakudzala; nʼchifukwa chake ndimakonda umboni wanu. 
Psalms119:120 Thupi langa limanjenjemera chifukwa cha kuopa Inu; ndimachita mantha ndi malamulo anu. 
Psalms119:121 Ndachita zolungama ndi zabwino; musandisiye mʼmanja mwa ondizunza. 
Psalms119:122 Onetsetsani kuti mtumiki wanu akukhala bwino, musalole kuti anthu odzikuza andipondereze." 
Psalms119:123 Maso anga alefuka, kufunafuna chipulumutso chanu, kufunafuna lonjezo lanu lolungama." 
Psalms119:124 Muchite naye mtumiki wanu molingana ndi chikondi chanu chosasinthika, ndipo mundiphunzitse malamulo anu." 
Psalms119:125 Ine ndine mtumiki wanu; patseni mzimu wondizindikiritsa, kuti ndimvetsetse umboni wanu." 
Psalms119:126 Yehova, ndi nthawi yoti muchitepo kanthu; malamulo anu akuswedwa." 
Psalms119:127 Chifukwa choti ndimakonda malamulo anu kuposa golide, kuposa golide woyengeka bwino," 
Psalms119:128 ndiponso chifukwa choti ndimaona kuti malangizo anu onse ndi wowongoka, ndimadana ndi njira iliyonse yoyipa." 
Psalms119:129 Maumboni anu ndi odabwitsa nʼchifukwa chake ndimawamvera. 
Psalms119:130 Mawu anu akamaphunzitsidwa amapereka kuwunika; ngakhale anthu wamba amamvetsetsa. 
Psalms119:131 Ndimatsekula pakamwa panga ndi kupuma wefuwefu, kufunafuna malamulo anu." 
Psalms119:132 Tembenukirani kwa ine ndipo mundichitire chifundo, monga mumachitira nthawi zonse kwa iwo amene amakonda dzina lanu." 
Psalms119:133 Tsogolerani mayendedwe anga molingana ndi mawu anu; musalole kuti tchimo lizindilamulira. 
Psalms119:134 Ndiwomboleni mʼdzanja la anthu ondizunza, kuti ndithe kumvera malangizo anu." 
Psalms119:135 Nkhope yanu iwalire mtumiki wanu ndipo mundiphunzitse malamulo anu. 
Psalms119:136 Mitsinje ya misozi ikuyenda kuchoka mʼmaso mwanga, chifukwa anthu sakumvera malamulo anu." 
Psalms119:137 Yehova ndinu wolungama, ndipo malamulo anu ndi abwino." 
Psalms119:138 Maumboni amene munatipatsa ndi olungama; ndi odalirika ndithu. 
Psalms119:139 Ndikusautsidwa kwambiri mʼkati mwanga chifukwa adani anu amanyalanyaza mawu anu. 
Psalms119:140 Mawu anu ndi woyera kwambiri nʼchifukwa chake mtumiki wanune ndimawakonda. 
Psalms119:141 Ngakhale ndili wamngʼono ndi wonyozeka, sindiyiwala malangizo anu." 
Psalms119:142 Chilungamo chanu nʼchamuyaya, ndipo malamulo anu nʼchoona." 
Psalms119:143 Mavuto ndi masautso zandigwera, koma ndimakondwera ndi malamulo anu." 
Psalms119:144 Umboni wanu ndi wabwino nthawi zonse; patseni nzeru zomvetsa zinthu kuti ine ndikhale ndi moyo. 
Psalms119:145 Ndimayitana ndi mtima wanga wonse; ndiyankheni Inu Yehova, ndipo ndidzamvera zophunzitsa zanu." 
Psalms119:146 Ndikuyitana kwa Inu; pulumutseni ndipo ndidzasunga umboni wanu. 
Psalms119:147 Ndimadzuka tambala asanalire kuti ndipemphe thandizo; chiyembekezo changa chili mʼmawu anu. 
Psalms119:148 Maso anga amakhala chipenyere nthawi yonse ya usiku, kuti ndithe kulingalira malonjezo anu." 
Psalms119:149 Imvani mawu anga molingana ndi chikondi chanu chosasinthika; Yehova sungani moyo wanga, molingana ndi malamulo anu." 
Psalms119:150 Iwo amene amakonza njira zoyipa andiyandikira, koma ali kutali ndi malamulo anu." 
Psalms119:151 Koma Inu Yehova muli pafupi, malamulo anu onse ndi woona." 
Psalms119:152 Ndinaphunzira kalekale kuchokera mʼmaumboni anu kuti maumboni amene munakhazikitsawo ndi amuyaya. 
Psalms119:153 Yangʼanani masautso anga ndipo mundipulumutse, pakuti sindinayiwale malamulo anu." 
Psalms119:154 Mundiyimirire pa mlandu wanga ndi kundiwombola; sungani moyo wanga molingana ndi lonjezo lanu. 
Psalms119:155 Chipulumutso chili kutali ndi anthu oyipa, pakuti iwowo safunafuna zophunzitsa zanu." 
Psalms119:156 Chifundo chanu Yehova nʼchachikulu; sungani moyo wanga molingana ndi malamulo anu. 
Psalms119:157 Adani amene akundizunza ndi ambiri, koma ine sindinatembenuke kuchoka pa umboni wanu." 
Psalms119:158 Ndimawayangʼana monyansidwa anthu opanda chikhulupiriro, popeza samvera mawu anu." 
Psalms119:159 Onani momwe ndimakondera malangizo anu; sungani moyo wanga, Inu Yehova, molingana ndi chikondi chanu chosanthika." 
Psalms119:160 Mawu anu onse ndi owona; malamulo anu onse olungama ndi amuyaya. 
Psalms119:161 Olamulira amandizunza popanda chifukwa, koma mtima wanga umanjenjemera ndi mawu anu." 
Psalms119:162 Ine ndimakondwa ndi lonjezo lanu, ngati munthu amene wapeza chuma chambiri." 
Psalms119:163 Ndimadana ndi chinyengo, kwambiri ndimanyansidwa nacho, koma ndimakonda malamulo anu." 
Psalms119:164 Ndimakutamandani kasanu ndi kawiri pa tsiku pakuti malamulo anu ndi olungama. 
Psalms119:165 Amene amakonda malamulo anu ali ndi mtendere waukulu, ndipo palibe chimene chingawapunthwitse" 
Psalms119:166 Ndikudikira chipulumutso chanu, Inu Yehova, ndipo ndimatsatira malamulo anu." 
Psalms119:167 Ndimamvera umboni wanu pakuti ndimawukonda kwambiri. 
Psalms119:168 Ndimamvera malangizo anu ndi umboni wanu, pakuti njira zanga zonse ndi zodziwika pamaso panu." 
Psalms119:169 Kulira kwanga kufike pamaso panu Yehova; patseni nzeru zomvetsa zinthu molingana ndi mawu anu. 
Psalms119:170 Kupempha kwanga kufike pamaso panu; pulumutseni molingana ndi lonjezo lanu. 
Psalms119:171 Matamando asefukire pa milomo yanga, pakuti Inu mumandiphunzitsa malamulo anu." 
Psalms119:172 Lilime langa liyimbe mawu anu, popeza malamulo anu onse ndi olungama." 
Psalms119:173 Dzanja lanu likhale lokonzeka kundithandiza pakuti ndasankha malangizo anu. 
Psalms119:174 Ndikufunitsitsa chipulumutso chanu Yehova, ndipo ndimakondwera ndi malamulo anu." 
Psalms119:175 Loleni kuti ndikhale ndi moyo kuti ndikutamandeni, ndipo malamulo anu andichirikize." 
Psalms119:176 Ndasochera ngati nkhosa yotayika, funafunani mtumiki wanu, pakuti sindinayiwale malamulo anu." 
Psalms120:1 Nyimbo yoyimba pokwera ku Yerusalemu. Ndimafuwulira kwa Yehova mʼmasautso anga, ndipo Iye amandiyankha." 
Psalms120:2 Pulumutseni Yehova ku milomo yabodza, ndi kwa anthu achinyengo." 
Psalms120:3 Kodi adzakuchitani chiyani, ndipo adzawonjezerapo zotani, inu anthu achinyengo?" 
Psalms120:4 Adzakulangani ndi mivi yakuthwa ya munthu wankhondo, ndi makala oyaka a mtengo wa tsanya." 
Psalms120:5 Tsoka ine kuti ndimakhala ku Mesaki, kuti ndimakhala pakati pa matenti a ku Kedara!" 
Psalms120:6 Kwa nthawi yayitali ndakhala pakati pa iwo amene amadana ndi mtendere. 
Psalms120:7 Ine ndine munthu wamtendere; koma ndikamayankhula, iwo amafuna nkhondo." 
Psalms121:1 Nyimbo yoyimba pokwera ku Yerusalemu. Ndikweza maso anga ku mapiri; kodi thandizo langa limachokera kuti? 
Psalms121:2 Thandizo langa limachokera kwa Yehova, wolenga kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi." 
Psalms121:3 Sadzalola kuti phazi lako literereke; Iye amene amakusunga sadzawodzera. 
Psalms121:4 Taonani, Iye amene amasunga Israeli sadzawodzera kapena kugona." 
Psalms121:5 Yehova ndiye amene amakusunga; Yehova ndiye mthunzi wako ku dzanja lako lamanja. 
Psalms121:6 Dzuwa silidzakupweteka nthawi ya masana, kapena mwezi nthawi ya usiku." 
Psalms121:7 Yehova adzakuteteza ku zoyipa zonse; adzasunga moyo wako. 
Psalms121:8 Yehova adzayangʼanira kutuluka kwako ndi kulowa kwako; kuyambira tsopano mpaka muyaya. 
Psalms122:1 Salimo la Davide. Nyimbo yoyimba pokwera ku Yerusalemu. Ndinakondwera atandiwuza kuti, “Tiyeni ku nyumba ya Yehova.”" 
Psalms122:2 Mapazi athu akuyima mʼzipata zako, Iwe Yerusalemu." 
Psalms122:3 Yerusalemu anamangidwa ngati mzinda umene uli wothithikana pamodzi. 
Psalms122:4 Kumeneko ndiye kumene kumapita mafuko, mafuko a Yehova, umboni wa kwa Israeli, kuti atamande dzina la Yehova." 
Psalms122:5 Kumeneko anayikako mipando yaufumu yachiweruzo, mipando yaufumu ya nyumba ya Davide." 
Psalms122:6 Pemphererani mtendere wa Yerusalemu: “Iwo amene amakukonda iwe zinthu ziwayendere bwino. 
Psalms122:7 Mukhale mtendere mʼkati mwa makoma ako, ndipo mʼnyumba zako zaufumu mukhale chitetezo.”" 
Psalms122:8 Chifukwa cha abale anga ndi abwenzi anga ndidzati, “Mtendere ukhale mʼkati mwako.”" 
Psalms122:9 Chifukwa cha Nyumba ya Yehova Mulungu wathu, ndidzakufunira zabwino." 
Psalms123:1 Nyimbo yoyimba pokwera ku Yerusalemu. Ndikweza maso anga kwa Inu, kwa Inu amene mumakhala kumwamba." 
Psalms123:2 Taonani, monga momwe maso a akapolo amayangʼana mʼdzanja la mbuye wawo, monga momwenso maso a mdzakazi amayangʼana mʼdzanja la dona wake, choncho maso athu ali kwa Yehova Mulungu wathu, mpaka atichitire chifundo." 
Psalms123:3 Mutichitire chifundo, Inu Yehova mutichitire chifundo, pakuti tapirira chitonzo chachikulu." 
Psalms123:4 Ife tapirira mnyozo wambiri kuchokera kwa anthu odzikuza, chitonzo chachikulu kuchokera kwa anthu onyada." 
Psalms124:1 Salimo la Davide. Nyimbo yoyimba pokwera ku Yerusalemu. Akanapanda kukhala mbali yathu Yehova, anene tsono Israeli," 
Psalms124:2 akanapanda kukhala mbali yathu Yehova, potiwukira anthuwo," 
Psalms124:3 iwo atatipsera mtima, akanatimeza amoyo;" 
Psalms124:4 chigumula chikanatimiza, mtsinje ukanatikokolola," 
Psalms124:5 madzi a mkokomo akanatikokolola. 
Psalms124:6 Atamandike Yehova, amene sanalole kuti tikhale chakudya cha mano awo." 
Psalms124:7 Moyo wathu wawonjoka ngati mbalame yokodwa mu msampha wa mlenje; msampha wathyoka, ndipo ife tapulumuka." 
Psalms124:8 Thandizo lathu lili mʼdzina la Yehova wolenga kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi. 
Psalms125:1 Nyimbo yoyimba pokwera ku Yerusalemu. Amene amadalira Yehova ali ngati phiri la Ziyoni, limene silingagwedezeke koma ndi lokhala mpaka muyaya." 
Psalms125:2 Monga mapiri azungulira Yerusalemu, momwemonso Yehova azungulira anthu ake kuyambira tsopano mpaka muyaya." 
Psalms125:3 Ndodo yaufumu ya anthu oyipa sidzakhala pa dziko limene lapatsidwa kwa anthu olungama, kuti anthu olungamawo angachite nawonso zoyipa." 
Psalms125:4 Yehova chitirani zabwino amene ndi abwino, amene ndi olungama mtima" 
Psalms125:5 Koma amene amatembenukira ku njira zokhotakhota, Yehova adzawachotsa pamodzi ndi anthu ochita zoyipa. Mtendere ukhale pa Israeli." 
Psalms126:1 Nyimbo yoyimba pokwera ku Yerusalemu. Yehova atabwezera akapolo ku Ziyoni, tinali ngati amene akulota." 
Psalms126:2 Pakamwa pathu panadzaza ndi kuseka; malilime athu ndi nyimbo zachimwemwe. Pamenepo kunanenedwa pakati pa anthu kuti, “Yehova wawachitira zinthu zazikulu.”" 
Psalms126:3 Yehova watichitira zinthu zazikulu, ndipo tadzazidwa ndi chimwemwe." 
Psalms126:4 Tibwezereni madalitso athu, Inu Yehova, monga mitsinje ya ku Negevi." 
Psalms126:5 Iwo amene amafesa akulira, adzakolola akuyimba nyimbo zachimwemwe." 
Psalms126:6 Iye amene amayendayenda nalira, atanyamula mbewu yokafesa, adzabwerera akuyimba nyimbo zachimwemwe, atanyamula mitolo yake." 
Psalms127:1 Nyimbo yoyimba pokwera ku Yerusalemu. Salimo la Solomoni. Yehova akapanda kumanga nyumba, omanga nyumbayo agwira ntchito pachabe. Yehova akapanda kulondera mzinda, mlonda akanangolondera pachabe." 
Psalms127:2 Mumangodzivuta nʼkulawirira mmamawa ndi kusagona msanga madzulo, kuvutikira chakudya choti mudye, pakuti Iye amapereka tulo kwa amene amawakonda." 
Psalms127:3 Ana ndiye cholowa chochokera kwa Yehova, ana ndi mphotho yochokera kwa Iye." 
Psalms127:4 Ana a pa unyamata ali ngati mivi mʼmanja mwa munthu wankhondo. 
Psalms127:5 Wodala munthu amene motengera mivi mwake mwadzaza. Iwo sadzachititsidwa manyazi pamene alimbana ndi adani awo pa zipata. 
Psalms128:1 Nyimbo yoyimba pokwera ku Yerusalemu. Odala ndi onse amene amaopa Yehova, amene amayenda mʼnjira zake." 
Psalms128:2 Udzadya chipatso cha ntchito yako; madalitso ndi chuma zidzakhala zako. 
Psalms128:3 Mkazi wako adzakhala ngati mpesa wobereka mʼkati mwa nyumba yako; ana ako adzakhala ngati mphukira za mitengo ya olivi kuzungulira tebulo lako. 
Psalms128:4 Ameneyu ndiye munthu wodalitsidwa amene amaopa Yehova. 
Psalms128:5 Yehova akudalitse kuchokera mʼZiyoni masiku onse a moyo wako; uwone zokoma za Yerusalemu," 
Psalms128:6 	ndipo ukhale ndi moyo kuti udzaone zidzukulu zako. Mtendere ukhale ndi Israeli. 
Psalms129:1 Nyimbo yoyimba pokwera ku Yerusalemu. “Andizunza kwambiri kuyambira ubwana wanga,” anene tsono Israeli;" 
Psalms129:2 “Andizunza kwambiri kuyambira ubwana wanga, koma sanandipambane." 
Psalms129:3 Anthu otipula analima pa msana panga ndipo anapangapo mizere yayitali: 
Psalms129:4 Koma Yehova ndi wolungama; Iye wandimasula ku zingwe za anthu oyipa.” 
Psalms129:5 Onse amene amadana ndi Ziyoni abwezedwe pambuyo mwamanyazi. 
Psalms129:6 Akhale ngati udzu womera pa denga la nyumba, umene umafota usanakule;" 
Psalms129:7 sungadzaze manja a owumweta kapena manja a omanga mitolo. 
Psalms129:8 Odutsa pafupi asanene kuti, “Dalitso la Yehova lili pa inu; tikukudalitsani mʼdzina la Yehova.”" 
Psalms130:1 Nyimbo yoyimba pokwera ku Yerusalemu. Ndikulirira kwa Inu Yehova ndili mʼdzenje lozama; 
Psalms130:2 Ambuye imvani mawu anga. Makutu anu akhale tcheru kumva kupempha chifundo kwanga. 
Psalms130:3 Inu Yehova, mukanamawerengera machimo, Inu Yehova, akanayima chilili ndani wopanda mlandu?" 
Psalms130:4 Koma kwa Inu kuli chikhululukiro; nʼchifukwa chake mumaopedwa. 
Psalms130:5 Ndimayembekezera Yehova, moyo wanga umayembekezera, ndipo ndimakhulupirira mawu ake." 
Psalms130:6 Moyo wanga umayembekezera Ambuye, kupambana momwe alonda amayembekezera mmawa, inde, kupambana momwe alonda amayembekezera mmawa," 
Psalms130:7 Yembekeza Yehova, iwe Israeli, pakuti Yehova ali ndi chikondi chosasinthika ndipo alinso ndi chipulumutso chochuluka." 
Psalms130:8 Iye mwini adzawombola Israeli ku machimo ake onse. 
Psalms131:1 Nyimbo yoyimba pokwera ku Yerusalemu. Salimo la Davide. Inu Yehova, mtima wanga siwodzikuza, maso anga siwonyada; sinditengeteka mtima ndi zinthu zapamwamba ndi zodabwitsa." 
Psalms131:2 Koma moyo wanga ndawutontholetsa ndi kuwukhalitsa chete ngati mwana amene amayi ake amuletsa kuyamwa, moyo wanga mʼkati mwanga uli ngati mwana amene amuletsa kuyamwa." 
Psalms131:3 Yembekeza Yehova, iwe Israeli, kuyambira tsopano mpaka muyaya." 
Psalms132:1 Nyimbo yoyimba pokwera ku Yerusalemu. Inu Yehova, kumbukirani Davide ndi mavuto onse anapirira." 
Psalms132:2 Iye analumbira kwa Yehova ndi kulonjeza kwa Wamphamvu wa Yakobo kuti," 
Psalms132:3 “Sindidzalowa mʼnyumba mwanga kapena kugona pa bedi langa: 
Psalms132:4 sindidzalola kuti maso anga agone, kapena zikope zanga ziwodzere," 
Psalms132:5 mpaka nditamupezera malo Yehova, malo okhala a Wamphamvu wa Yakobo.”" 
Psalms132:6 Zoonadi, tinamva za Bokosi la Chipangano ku Efurata, tinalipeza mʼminda ya ku Yaara:" 
Psalms132:7 “Tiyeni tipite ku malo ake okhalamo; tiyeni tikamulambire pa mapazi ake. 
Psalms132:8 ‘Dzukani Yehova, ndipo bwerani ku malo anu opumulira, Inuyo ndi Bokosi la Chipangano limene limafanizira mphamvu zanu." 
Psalms132:9 Ansembe anu avekedwe chilungamo; anthu anu oyera mtima ayimbe nyimbo mwachimwemwe.’ ” 
Psalms132:10 Chifukwa cha Davide mtumiki wanu, musakane wodzozedwa wanu." 
Psalms132:11 Yehova analumbira kwa Davide, lumbiro lotsimikizika kuti Iye sadzasintha: “Mmodzi wa ana ako ndidzamuyika pa mpando waufumu;" 
Psalms132:12 ngati ana ako azisunga pangano langa ndi malamulo amene ndiwaphunzitsa, pamenepo ana awo adzakhala pa mpando wako waufumu kwamuyaya ndi muyaya.”" 
Psalms132:13 Pakuti Yehova wasankha Ziyoni, Iye wakhumba kuti akhale malo ake okhalamo:" 
Psalms132:14 “Awa ndi malo anga opumapo ku nthawi za nthawi; ndidzakhala pano pa mpando waufumu, pakuti ndakhumba zimenezi." 
Psalms132:15 Ndidzadalitsa mzindawu ndi zinthu zambiri; anthu ake osauka ndidzawakhutitsa ndi chakudya. 
Psalms132:16 Ndidzaveka ansembe ake chipulumutso, ndipo anthu ake oyera mtima adzayimba nthawi zonse nyimbo zachimwemwe." 
Psalms132:17 “Pano ndidzachulukitsa mphamvu za Davide ndi kuyikapo nyale ya wodzozedwa wanga. 
Psalms132:18 Ndidzaveka adani ake manyazi, koma chipewa chaufumu pamutu pake chidzakhala chowala.”" 
Psalms133:1 Salimo la Davide. Nyimbo yoyimba pokwera ku Yerusalemu. Onani, nʼkokoma ndi kokondweretsa ndithu pamene abale akhala pamodzi mwachiyanjano!" 
Psalms133:2 Zili ngati mafuta amtengowapatali othiridwa pa mutu, otsikira ku ndevu, ku ndevu za Aaroni, oyenderera mpaka mʼkhosi mwa mkanjo wake." 
Psalms133:3 Zili ngati mame a ku Heremoni otsikira pa Phiri la Ziyoni. Pakuti pamenepo Yehova amaperekapo dalitso, ndiwo moyo wamuyaya." 
Psalms134:1 Nyimbo yoyimba pokwera ku Yerusalemu. Bwerani, mutamande Yehova, inu atumiki onse a Yehova, amene mumatumikira usiku mʼnyumba ya Yehova." 
Psalms134:2 Kwezani manja anu mʼmalo opatulika ndipo mutamande Yehova. 
Psalms134:3 Yehova wolenga kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi, akudalitseni kuchokera mʼZiyoni." 
Psalms135:1 	Tamandani Yehova. Tamandani dzina la Yehova; mutamandeni, inu atumiki a Yehova," 
Psalms135:2 amene mumatumikira mʼnyumba ya Yehova, mʼmabwalo a nyumba ya Mulungu wathu." 
Psalms135:3 Tamandani Yehova, pakuti Yehova ndi wabwino; imbani nyimbo zotamanda dzina lake, pakuti nʼkokoma kutero," 
Psalms135:4 Pakuti Yehova wasankha Yakobo kuti akhale wake, Israeli kuti akhale chuma chake chapamtima." 
Psalms135:5 Ndikudziwa kuti Yehova ndi wamkulu, kuti Ambuye athu ndi wamkulu kuposa milungu yonse." 
Psalms135:6 Yehova amachita chilichonse chimene chimamukomera, kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi, ku nyanja zazikulu ndi ku malo ake onse akuya." 
Psalms135:7 Iye amatulutsa mitambo kuchokera ku malekezero a dziko lapansi, amatumiza zingʼaningʼani pamodzi ndi mvula ndipo amatulutsa mphepo ku malo ake osungiramo." 
Psalms135:8 Anakantha ana oyamba kubadwa a Igupto, ana oyamba kubadwa a anthu ndi nyama." 
Psalms135:9 Iye anatumiza zizindikiro zozizwitsa ndi zodabwitsa pakati pako, iwe Igupto, kutsutsana ndi Farao pamodzi ndi atumiki ake onse." 
Psalms135:10 Iye anakantha mitundu yambiri ya anthu ndi kupha mafumu amphamvu: 
Psalms135:11 Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori, Ogi mfumu ya Basani, ndi maufumu onse a ku Kanaani;" 
Psalms135:12 ndipo anapereka dziko lawo ngati cholowa, cholowa cha anthu ake Aisraeli." 
Psalms135:13 Dzina lanu, Inu Yehova, ndi losatha mpaka muyaya, mbiri yanu, Inu Yehova, idziwika mibado yonse." 
Psalms135:14 Pakuti Yehova adzaonetsa kuti anthu ake ngosalakwa, ndipo adzachitira chifundo atumiki ake." 
Psalms135:15 Mafano a mitundu ya anthu ndi siliva ndi golide, opangidwa ndi manja a anthu." 
Psalms135:16 Pakamwa ali napo koma sayankhula maso ali nawo, koma sapenya;" 
Psalms135:17 makutu ali nawo, koma sakumva ndipo mʼkamwa mwawo mulibe mpweya uliwonse." 
Psalms135:18 Iwo amene amapanga mafanowo adzakhala ngati mafanowo, chimodzimodzinso iwo amene amadalira mafanowo." 
Psalms135:19 Inu nyumba ya Israeli, tamandani Yehova; inu nyumba ya Aaroni, tamandani Yehova;" 
Psalms135:20 Inu nyumba ya Levi, tamandani Yehova; Inu amene mumaopa Iye, tamandani Yehova." 
Psalms135:21 Wodalitsika ndi Yehova kuchokera mʼZiyoni, amene amakhala mu Yerusalemu. Tamandani Yehova." 
Psalms136:1 	Yamikani Yehova chifukwa ndi wabwino. Pakuti chikondi chake chosasinthika nʼchamuyaya. 
Psalms136:2 	Yamikani Mulungu wa milungu. Pakuti chikondi chake chosasinthika nʼchamuyaya. 
Psalms136:3 	Yamikani Ambuye wa ambuye, pakuti chikondi chake chosasinthika nʼchamuyaya." 
Psalms136:4 	Iye yekhayo amene amachita zodabwitsa zazikulu, pakuti chikondi chake chosasinthika nʼchamuyaya." 
Psalms136:5 	Amene mwachidziwitso chake anapanga mayiko akumwamba, pakuti chikondi chake chosasinthika nʼchamuyaya." 
Psalms136:6 	Amene anayala dziko lapansi pamwamba pa madzi, pakuti chikondi chake chosasinthika nʼchamuyaya." 
Psalms136:7 	Amene anapanga miyuni ikuluikulu, pakuti chikondi chake chosasinthika nʼchamuyaya." 
Psalms136:8 	Dzuwa lilamulire usana, pakuti chikondi chake chosasinthika nʼchamuyaya." 
Psalms136:9 	Mwezi ndi nyenyezi zilamulire usiku, pakuti chikondi chake chosasinthika nʼchamuyaya." 
Psalms136:10 	Amene anakantha ana woyamba kubadwa a Igupto, pakuti chikondi chake chosasinthika nʼchamuyaya." 
Psalms136:11 	Natulutsa Israeli pakati pawo, pakuti chikondi chake chosasinthika nʼchamuyaya." 
Psalms136:12 	Ndi dzanja lamphamvu ndi mkono wotambasuka, pakuti chikondi chake chosasinthika nʼchamuyaya." 
Psalms136:13 	Amene anagawa Nyanja Yofiira pakati, pakuti chikondi chake chosasinthika nʼchamuyaya." 
Psalms136:14 	Nadutsitsa Israeli pakati pa nyanjayo, pakuti chikondi chake chosasinthika nʼchamuyaya." 
Psalms136:15 	Koma anakokolola Farao ndi ankhondo ake mʼNyanja Yofiira, pakuti chikondi chake chosasinthika nʼchamuyaya." 
Psalms136:16 	Amene anatsogolera anthu ake mʼchipululu pakuti chikondi chake chosasinthika nʼchamuyaya. 
Psalms136:17 	Amene anakantha mafumu akuluakulu, pakuti chikondi chake chosasinthika nʼchamuyaya." 
Psalms136:18 	Napha mafumu amphamvu, pakuti chikondi chake chosasinthika nʼchamuyaya." 
Psalms136:19 	Siloni mfumu ya Aamori, pakuti chikondi chake chosasinthika nʼchamuyaya." 
Psalms136:20 	Ogi mfumu ya Basani, pakuti chikondi chake chosasinthika nʼchamuyaya." 
Psalms136:21 	Napereka dziko lawo ngati cholowa, pakuti chikondi chake chosasinthika nʼchamuyaya."
