Psalms136:22 	Cholowa cha mtumiki wake Israeli; pakuti chikondi chake chosasinthika nʼchamuyaya. 
Psalms136:23 	Amene anatikumbukira ife anthu opeputsidwa, pakuti chikondi chake chosasinthika nʼchamuyaya." 
Psalms136:24 	Amene anatimasula kwa adani athu, pakuti chikondi chake chosasinthika nʼchamuyaya." 
Psalms136:25 	Amene amapereka chakudya kwa cholengedwa chilichonse, pakuti chikondi chake chosasinthika nʼchamuyaya." 
Psalms136:26 	Yamikani Mulungu wakumwamba, pakuti chikondi chake chosasinthika nʼchamuyaya." 
Psalms137:1 Mʼmbali mwa mitsinje ya ku Babuloni tinakhala pansi ndi kulira pamene tinakumbukira Ziyoni. 
Psalms137:2 Kumeneko, pa mitengo ya misondozi tinapachika apangwe athu," 
Psalms137:3 pakuti anthu otigwira ukapolo anatipempha kuti tiyimbe nyimbo. Otizunza athu anafuna nyimbo zachisangalalo; iwo anati, “Tiyimbireni imodzi mwa nyimbo za ku Ziyoni!”" 
Psalms137:4 Tingayimbe bwanji nyimbo za Yehova mʼdziko lachilendo? 
Psalms137:5 Ndikakuyiwala iwe Yerusalemu, dzanja langa lamanja liyiwale luso lake." 
Psalms137:6 Lilime langa limamatire ku nkhama za mʼkamwa mwanga ndikapanda kukukumbukira iwe Yerusalemu, ngati sindiyesa iwe chimwemwe changa chachikulu." 
Psalms137:7 Kumbukirani, Inu Yehova, zimene Aedomu anachita pa tsiku limene Yerusalemu anagonja. Iwowo anafuwula kuti, “Mugwetseni pansi, mugwetseni pansi mpaka pa maziko ake!”" 
Psalms137:8 Iwe mwana wa mkazi wa Babuloni, woyenera kuwonongedwa, wodalitsika ndi yemwe adzakubwezera pa zimene watichitira." 
Psalms137:9 Amene adzagwira makanda ako ndi kuwakankhanthitsa pa miyala. 
Psalms138:1 Salimo la Davide. Ndidzakuyamikani Yehova ndi mtima wanga wonse; ndidzayimba nyimbo zokutamandani pamaso pa “milungu.” 
Psalms138:2 Ndidzagwada kuyangʼana ku Nyumba yanu yoyera ndipo ndidzayamika dzina lanu chifukwa cha chikondi chanu ndi kukhulupirika kwanu, pakuti Inu mwakuza dzina lanu ndi mawu anu kupambana zinthu zonse." 
Psalms138:3 Pamene ndinayitana, munandiyankha; munandisandutsa wamphamvu ndi wolimba mtima." 
Psalms138:4 Mafumu onse a dziko lapansi akuyamikeni Yehova, pamene amva mawu a pakamwa panu." 
Psalms138:5 Iwo ayimbe za njira za Yehova, pakuti ulemerero wa Yehova ndi waukulu." 
Psalms138:6 Ngakhale kuti Yehova ngokwezeka, amasamalira odzichepetsa, koma anthu onyada amawadziwira chapatali." 
Psalms138:7 Ngakhale ndiyende pakati pa masautso, mumasunga moyo wanga; mumatambasula dzanja lanu kutsutsana ndi mkwiyo wa adani anga, mumandipulumutsa ndi dzanja lanu lamanja." 
Psalms138:8 Yehova adzakwaniritsa cholinga chake pa ine; chikondi chanu chosasinthika Yehova, ndi chosatha musasiye ntchito ya manja anu." 
Psalms139:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Salimo la Davide. Inu Yehova, mwandisanthula ndipo mukundidziwa." 
Psalms139:2 Inu mumadziwa pamene ndikhala pansi ndi pamene ndidzuka; mumazindikira maganizo anga muli kutali. 
Psalms139:3 Mumapenyetsetsa pamene ndikutuluka ndi kugona kwanga; mumadziwa njira zanga zonse. 
Psalms139:4 Mawu asanatuluke pa lilime langa mumawadziwa bwinobwino, Inu Yehova." 
Psalms139:5 Mumandizinga kumbuyo ndi kutsogolo komwe; mwasanjika dzanja lanu pa ine. 
Psalms139:6 Nzeru zimenezi ndi zopitirira nzeru zanga, ndi zapamwamba kuti ine ndizipeze." 
Psalms139:7 Kodi ndingapite kuti kufuna kuzemba Mzimu wanu? Kodi ndingathawire kuti kuchoka pamaso panu? 
Psalms139:8 Ndikakwera kumwamba, Inu muli komweko; ndikakagona ku malo a anthu akufa, Inu muli komweko." 
Psalms139:9 Ngati ndiwulukira kotulukira dzuwa, ngati ndikakhala ku malekezero a nyanja," 
Psalms139:10 kumenekonso dzanja lanu lidzanditsogolera, dzanja lanu lamanja lidzandigwiriziza." 
Psalms139:11 Ndikanena kuti, “Zoonadi, mdima udzandibisa ndithu ndipo kuwunika kukhale mdima mondizungulira,”" 
Psalms139:12 komabe mdimawo sudzakhala mdima kwa Inu; usiku udzawala ngati masana, pakuti mdima uli ngati kuwunika kwa Inu." 
Psalms139:13 Pakuti Inu munalenga za mʼkati mwanga; munandiwumba pamodzi mʼmimba mwa amayi anga. 
Psalms139:14 Ndimakuyamikani chifukwa ndinapangidwa mochititsa mantha ndi modabwitsa; ntchito zanu ndi zodabwitsa, zimenezi ndimazidziwa bwino lomwe." 
Psalms139:15 Mapangidwe anga sanabisike pamaso panu pamene ndimapangidwa mʼmalo achinsinsi, pamene ndinkawumbidwa mwaluso mʼmimba ya amayi anga." 
Psalms139:16 Maso anu anaona thupi langa lisanawumbidwe. Masiku onse amene anapatsidwa kwa ine, analembedwa mʼbuku lanu asanayambe nʼkuwerengedwa komwe." 
Psalms139:17 Zolingalira zanu pa ine ndi zamtengowapatali, Inu Mulungu, ndi zosawerengeka ndithu!" 
Psalms139:18 Ndikanaziwerenga, zikanakhala zochuluka kuposa mchenga; pamene ndadzuka, ndili nanube." 
Psalms139:19 Ndi bwino mukanangopha anthu oyipa, Inu Mulungu! Chokereni inu anthu owononga anzanu!" 
Psalms139:20 Amayankhula za Inu ndi zolinga zoyipa; adani anu amagwiritsa ntchito dzina lanu molakwika. 
Psalms139:21 Kodi ine sindidana nawo amene amakudani, Inu Yehova? Kodi sindinyansidwa nawo amene amakuwukirani?" 
Psalms139:22 Ndimadana nawo kwathunthu; ndi adani anga. 
Psalms139:23 Santhuleni, Inu Mulungu ndipo mudziwe mtima wanga; Yeseni ndipo mudziwe zolingalira zanga." 
Psalms139:24 Onani ngati muli mayendedwe aliwonse oyipa mwa ine, ndipo munditsogolere mʼnjira yanu yamuyaya." 
Psalms140:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Salimo la Davide. Landitseni Yehova kwa anthu oyipa; tetezeni kwa anthu ankhanza," 
Psalms140:2 amene mu mtima mwawo amakonza zinthu zoyipa ndi kuyambitsa nkhondo tsiku lililonse. 
Psalms140:3 Iwo amanola malilime awo kukhala akuthwa ngati a njoka; pa milomo yawo pali ululu wa mamba. Sela 
Psalms140:4 Tetezeni Inu Yehova, kwa anthu oyipa; tchinjirizeni kwa anthu ankhanza amene amakonza zokola mapazi anga." 
Psalms140:5 Anthu odzikuza anditchera msampha mobisika; iwo atchera zingwe za maukonde awo ndipo anditchera misampha pa njira yanga. Sela 
Psalms140:6 Inu Yehova, ine ndikuti, “Ndinu Mulungu wanga.” Imvani kupempha kwanga Yehova." 
Psalms140:7 Inu Ambuye Wamphamvuzonse, Mpulumutsi wanga wamphamvu, mumateteza mutu wanga tsiku lankhondo." 
Psalms140:8 Musawapatse anthu oyipa zokhumba zawo, Inu Yehova; musalole kuti zokonza zawo zitheke, mwina iwo adzayamba kunyada. Sela" 
Psalms140:9 Mitu ya amene andizungulira iphimbidwe ndi masautso amene milomo yawo yayambitsa. 
Psalms140:10 Makala amoto agwere pa iwo; aponyedwe pa moto, mʼmaenje amatope, asatulukemonso." 
Psalms140:11 Musalole kuti anthu achipongwe akhazikike mʼdziko; choyipa chilondole anthu ankhanza. 
Psalms140:12 Ndikudziwa kuti Yehova amapereka chiweruzo cholungama kwa anthu osauka, ndipo amateteza zolinga za anthu osowa." 
Psalms140:13 Zoonadi anthu olungama adzatamanda dzina lanu, ndipo anthu owongoka mtima adzakhala pamaso panu." 
Psalms141:1 Salimo la Davide. Inu Yehova ndikukuyitanani; bwerani msanga kwa ine. Imvani mawu anga pamene ndiyitana Inu. 
Psalms141:2 Pemphero langa lifike kwa Inu ngati lubani; kukweza manja kwanga kukhale ngati nsembe yamadzulo. 
Psalms141:3 Yehova ikani mlonda pakamwa panga; londerani khomo la pa milomo yanga. 
Psalms141:4 Musalole kuti mtima wanga ukokedwere ku zoyipa; kuchita ntchito zonyansa pamodzi ndi anthu amene amachita zoyipa; musalole kuti ndidye nawo zokoma zawo. 
Psalms141:5 Munthu wolungama andikanthe, chimenecho ndiye chifundo; andidzudzule ndiye mafuta pa mutu wanga. Mutu wanga sudzakana zimenezi. Komabe pemphero langa nthawi zonse ndi lotsutsana ndi ntchito za anthu ochita zoyipa." 
Psalms141:6 Olamulira awo adzaponyedwa pansi kuchokera pa malo okwera kwambiri, ndipo anthu oyipa adzaphunzira kuti mawu anga anayankhulidwa bwino." 
Psalms141:7 Iwo adzati, “Monga momwe nkhuni zimamwazikira akaziwaza, ndi momwenso mafupa athu amwazikira pa khomo la manda.”" 
Psalms141:8 Koma maso anga akupenyetsetsa Inu Ambuye Wamphamvuzonse; ndimathawira kwa Inu, musandipereke ku imfa." 
Psalms141:9 Mundipulumutse ku misampha imene anditchera, ku makhwekhwe amene anthu oyipa andikonzera." 
Psalms141:10 Anthu oyipa akodwe mʼmaukonde awo, mpaka ine nditadutsa mwamtendere." 
Psalms142:1 Ndakatulo ya Davide, pamene iyeyo anali mʼphanga. Pemphero. Ndikulirira Yehova mofuwula; ndikukweza mawu anga kwa Yehova kupempha chifundo." 
Psalms142:2 Ndikukhuthula madandawulo anga pamaso pake; ndikufotokoza za masautso anga pamaso pake. 
Psalms142:3 Pamene mzimu wanga walefuka mʼkati mwanga, ndinu amene mudziwa njira yanga. Mʼnjira imene ndimayendamo anthu anditchera msampha mobisa." 
Psalms142:4 Yangʼanani kumanja kwanga ndipo onani; palibe amene akukhudzika nane. Ndilibe pothawira; palibe amene amasamala za moyo wanga. 
Psalms142:5 Ndilirira Inu Yehova; ndikuti, “Ndinu pothawirapo panga, gawo langa mʼdziko la anthu amoyo.”" 
Psalms142:6 Mverani kulira kwanga pakuti ndathedwa nzeru; pulumutseni kwa amene akundithamangitsa pakuti ndi amphamvu kuposa ine. 
Psalms142:7 Tulutseni mʼndende yanga kuti nditamande dzina lanu. Ndipo anthu olungama adzandizungulira chifukwa cha zabwino zanu pa ine. 
Psalms143:1 Salimo la Davide. Yehova imvani pemphero langa, mvetserani kulira kwanga kopempha chifundo; mwa kukhulupirika kwanu ndi chilungamo chanu bwerani kudzandithandiza." 
Psalms143:2 Musazenge mlandu mtumiki wanu, pakuti palibe munthu wamoyo amene ndi wolungama pamaso panu." 
Psalms143:3 Mdani akundithamangitsa, iye wandipondereza pansi; wachititsa kuti ndikhale mu mdima ngati munthu amene anafa kale." 
Psalms143:4 Choncho mzimu wanga ukufowoka mʼkati mwanga; mʼkati mwanga, mtima wanga uli ndi nkhawa." 
Psalms143:5 Ndimakumbukira masiku amakedzana; ndimalingalira za ntchito yanu yonse, ndimaganizira zimene manja anu anachita." 
Psalms143:6 Ndatambalitsa manja anga kwa Inu; moyo wanga uli ndi ludzu lofuna Inu monga nthaka yowuma. Sela 
Psalms143:7 Yehova ndiyankheni msanga; mzimu wanga ukufowoka. Musandibisire nkhope yanu, mwina ndidzakhala ngati iwo amene atsikira ku dzenje." 
Psalms143:8 Lolani kuti mmawa ubweretse mawu achikondi chanu chosasinthika, pakuti ine ndimadalira Inu. Mundisonyeze njira yoti ndiyendemo, pakuti kwa Inu nditukulira moyo wanga." 
Psalms143:9 Pulumutseni kwa adani anga, Inu Yehova, pakuti ndimabisala mwa Inu." 
Psalms143:10 Phunzitseni kuchita chifuniro chanu, popeza ndinu Mulungu wanga; Mzimu wanu wabwino unditsogolere pa njira yanu yosalala." 
Psalms143:11 Sungani moyo wanga Inu Yehova chifukwa cha dzina lanu; mwa chilungamo chanu tulutseni mʼmasautso anga. 
Psalms143:12 Mwa chikondi chanu chosasinthika khalitsani chete adani anga; wonongani adani anga, pakuti ndine mtumiki wanu." 
Psalms144:1 Salimo la Davide. Atamandike Yehova Thanthwe langa, amene amaphunzitsa manja anga kuchita nkhondo; zala zanga kumenya nkhondo." 
Psalms144:2 Iye ndiye Mulungu wanga wachikondi ndi malo anga otetezedwa, linga langa ndi mpulumutsi wanga, chishango changa mmene ine ndimathawiramo, amene amagonjetsa mitundu ya anthu pansi panga." 
Psalms144:3 Inu Yehova, munthu nʼchiyani kuti mumamusamalira, mwana wa munthu kuti muzimuganizira?" 
Psalms144:4 Munthu ali ngati mpweya; masiku ake ali ngati mthunzi wosakhalitsa. 
Psalms144:5 Ngʼambani mayiko akumwamba, Inu Yehova, ndipo tsikani pansi; khudzani mapiri kuti atulutse utsi." 
Psalms144:6 Tumizani zingʼaningʼani ndi kubalalitsa adani; ponyani mivi yanu ndi kuwathamangitsa. 
Psalms144:7 Tambasulani dzanja lanu kuchokera kumwamba; landitseni ndi kundipulumutsa, ku madzi amphamvu, mʼmanja mwa anthu achilendo," 
Psalms144:8 amene pakamwa pawo ndi podzala ndi mabodza, amene dzanja lawo lamanja ndi lachinyengo." 
Psalms144:9 Ndidzakuyimbirani nyimbo yatsopano Inu Mulungu; ndidzakuyimbirani nyimbo pa zeze wa nsambo khumi," 
Psalms144:10 kwa Iye amene amapambanitsa mafumu, amene amapulumutsa Davide mtumiki wake ku lupanga loopsa." 
Psalms144:11 Landitseni ndi kundipulumutsa, mʼmanja mwa anthu achilendo, amene pakamwa pawo ndi podzaza ndi mabodza, amene dzanja lawo lamanja ndi lachinyengo." 
Psalms144:12 Ndipo ana aamuna pa chinyamata chawo adzakhala ngati mbewu yosamalidwa bwino, ana athu aakazi adzakhala ngati zipilala zosemedwa bwino, zokongoletsera nyumba yaufumu." 
Psalms144:13 Nkhokwe zathu zidzakhala zodzaza ndi zokolola za mtundu uliwonse. Nkhosa zathu zidzaswana miyandamiyanda pa mabusa athu. 
Psalms144:14 Ngʼombe zathu zidzanyamula katundu wolemera. Sipadzakhala mingʼalu pa makoma, sipadzakhalanso kupita ku ukapolo, mʼmisewu mwathu simudzakhala kulira chifukwa cha mavuto." 
Psalms144:15 Odala anthu amene adzalandira madalitso awa; odala anthu amene Mulungu wawo ndi Yehova. 
Psalms145:1 Salimo la matamando la Davide. Ndidzakukwezani Mulungu wanga, Mfumu yanga; ndidzatamanda dzina lanu ku nthawi za nthawi." 
Psalms145:2 Ndidzakutamandani tsiku ndi tsiku ndi kulemekeza dzina lanu ku nthawi za nthawi. 
Psalms145:3 Yehova ndi wamkulu ndi woyenera matamando onse; ukulu wake palibe angawumvetsetse. 
Psalms145:4 Mʼbado wina udzayamikira ntchito yanu kwa mʼbado wina; Iwo adzafotokoza za machitidwe anu amphamvu. 
Psalms145:5 Adzayankhula ulemerero wokongola waufumu wanu, ndipo ine ndidzalingalira za ntchito zanu zodabwitsa." 
Psalms145:6 Iwo adzafotokoza za mphamvu ya ntchito zanu zoopsa kwambiri, ndipo ine ndidzalengeza za ntchito zanu zazikulu." 
Psalms145:7 Adzakondwerera kuchuluka kwa ubwino wanu, ndi kuyimba mwachimwemwe za chilungamo chanu." 
Psalms145:8 Yehova ndi wokoma mtima ndi wachifundo, wosakwiya msanga ndi wodzaza ndi chikondi chosasinthika." 
Psalms145:9 Yehova ndi wabwino kwa onse; amachitira chifundo zonse zimene anazipanga. 
Psalms145:10 Zonse zimene munazipanga zidzakutamandani, Inu Yehova; oyera mtima adzakulemekezani." 
Psalms145:11 Iwo adzafotokoza za ulemerero wa ufumu wanu ndi kuyankhula za mphamvu yanu," 
Psalms145:12 kuti anthu onse adziwe za machitidwe anu amphamvu ndi ulemerero wokongola wa ufumu wanu. 
Psalms145:13 Ufumu wanu ndi ufumu wamuyaya, ndipo ulamuliro wanu ndi wosatha pa mibado yonse. Yehova ndi wokhulupirika pa malonjezo ake onse ndi wokonda zonse zimene Iye anazipanga." 
Psalms145:14 Yehova amagwiriziza onse amene akugwa ndipo amakweza onse otsitsidwa. 
Psalms145:15 Maso a onse amayangʼana kwa Inu, ndipo Inu mumawapatsa chakudya chawo pa nthawi yoyenera." 
Psalms145:16 Mumatsekula dzanja lanu ndi kukwaniritsa zokhumba za chamoyo chilichonse. 
Psalms145:17 Yehova ndi wolungama mʼnjira zake zonse, ndi wokonda zonse zimene anazipanga." 
Psalms145:18 Yehova ali pafupi ndi onse amene amamuyitana, onse amene amamuyitana Iye mʼchoonadi." 
Psalms145:19 Iye amakwaniritsa zokhumba za iwo amene amamuopa; amamva kulira kwawo ndi kuwapulumutsa. 
Psalms145:20 Yehova amayangʼana onse amene amamukonda koma adzawononga anthu onse oyipa. 
Psalms145:21 Pakamwa panga padzayankhula zotamanda Yehova. Cholengedwa chilichonse chitamande dzina lake loyera ku nthawi za nthawi. 
Psalms146:1 	Tamandani Yehova. Tamanda Yehova, iwe moyo wanga." 
Psalms146:2 Ndidzatamanda Yehova ndi moyo wanga wonse; ndidzayimba nyimbo zamatamando kwa Mulungu wanga nthawi yonse ya moyo wanga. 
Psalms146:3 Musamadalire mafumu, anthu osakhalitsa, amene sangathe kupulumutsa." 
Psalms146:4 Pamene mizimu yawo yachoka, iwo amabwerera ku dothi; zimene ankafuna kuchita zimatha tsiku lomwelo." 
Psalms146:5 Wodala ndi amene thandizo lake ndi Mulungu wa Yakobo. 
Psalms146:6 Wolenga kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi, nyanja ndi zonse zili mʼmenemo; Yehova, amene ndi wokhulupirika kwamuyaya." 
Psalms146:7 Iye amachitira chilungamo anthu oponderezedwa ndipo amapereka chakudya kwa anthu anjala. Yehova amamasula amʼndende," 
Psalms146:8 Yehova amatsekula maso anthu osaona, Yehova amadzutsa onse amene awerama pansi, Yehova amakonda anthu olungama." 
Psalms146:9 Yehova amasamalira alendo ndipo amathandiza ana ndi akazi amasiye, koma amasokoneza njira za anthu oyipa." 
Psalms146:10 Yehova ndiye Mfumu mpaka muyaya, Mulungu wako iwe Ziyoni, pa mibado yonse. Tamandani Yehova." 
Psalms147:1 	Tamandani Yehova. Nʼkwabwino kwambiri kuyimba nyimbo zamatamando kwa Mulungu wathu, nʼkokondweretsa ndi koyenera kumutamanda!" 
Psalms147:2 Yehova akumanga Yerusalemu; Iye akusonkhanitsa amʼndende a Israeli. 
Psalms147:3 Akutsogolera anthu osweka mtima ndi kumanga mabala awo. 
Psalms147:4 Amadziwa chiwerengero cha nyenyezi, ndipo iliyonse amayitchula dzina." 
Psalms147:5 Yehova ndi wamkulu ndi wamphamvu kwambiri; nzeru zake zilibe malire. 
Psalms147:6 Yehova amagwiriziza anthu odzichepetsa, koma amagwetsa pansi anthu oyipa." 
Psalms147:7 Imbirani Yehova ndi mayamiko; imbani nyimbo kwa Mulungu ndi pangwe. 
Psalms147:8 Iye amaphimba mlengalenga ndi mitambo; amapereka mvula ku dziko lapansi ndi kumeretsa udzu mʼmapiri. 
Psalms147:9 Iye amapereka chakudya kwa ngʼombe ndi kwa ana a makwangwala pamene akulira chakudya. 
Psalms147:10 Chikondwerero chake sichili mʼmphamvu za kavalo, kapena mʼmiyendo ya anthu amphamvu." 
Psalms147:11 Yehova amakondwera ndi amene amamuopa, amene chiyembekezo chawo chili mʼchikondi chake chosasinthika." 
Psalms147:12 Lemekeza Yehova, iwe Yerusalemu; tamanda Mulungu wako, iwe Ziyoni," 
Psalms147:13 pakuti Iye amalimbitsa mipiringidzo ya zipata zako ndi kudalitsa anthu ako mwa iwe. 
Psalms147:14 Iye amabweretsa mtendere mʼmalire mwako ndi kukukhutitsa ndi ufa wa tirigu wosalala. 
Psalms147:15 Iyeyo amapereka lamulo pa dziko lapansi; mawu ake amayenda mwaliwiro. 
Psalms147:16 Amagwetsa chisanu ngati ubweya ndi kumwaza chipale ngati phulusa. 
Psalms147:17 Amagwetsa matalala ngati miyala. Kodi ndani angathe kupirira kuzizira kwake? 
Psalms147:18 Amatumiza mawu ake ndipo chisanucho chimasungunuka; amawombetsa mphepo ndipo madzi amayenda. 
Psalms147:19 Iye anawulula mawu ake kwa Yakobo, malamulo ake ndi zophunzitsa zake kwa Israeli." 
Psalms147:20 Sanachitepo zimenezi kwa mtundu wina uliwonse wa anthu; anthu enawo sadziwa malamulo ake. Tamandani Yehova. 
Psalms148:1 	Tamandani Yehova. Tamandani Yehova, inu a kumwamba, mutamandeni Iye, inu a mlengalenga." 
Psalms148:2 Mutamandeni, inu angelo ake onse, mutamandeni, mutamandeni, inu zolengedwa za mmwamba." 
Psalms148:3 Mutamandeni, inu dzuwa ndi mwezi, mutamandeni, inu nonse nyenyezi zowala." 
Psalms148:4 Mutamandeni, inu thambo la kumwambamwamba ndi inu madzi a pamwamba pa thambo." 
Psalms148:5 Zonse zitamande dzina la Yehova pakuti Iye analamula ndipo zinalengedwa. 
Psalms148:6 Iye anaziyika pa malo ake ku nthawi za nthawi; analamula ndipo sizidzatha. 
Psalms148:7 Tamandani Yehova pa dziko lapansi, inu zolengedwa zikuluzikulu za mʼnyanja, ndi nyanja zonse zakuya," 
Psalms148:8 inu zingʼaningʼani ndi matalala, chipale ndi mitambo, mphepo yamkuntho imene imakwaniritsa mawu ake," 
Psalms148:9 inu mapiri ndi zitunda zonse, inu mitengo ya zipatso ndi mikungudza yonse," 
Psalms148:10 inu nyama zakuthengo ndi ngʼombe zonse, inu zolengedwa zingʼonozingʼono ndi mbalame zowuluka." 
Psalms148:11 Inu mafumu a dziko lapansi ndi anthu a mitundu yonse, inu akalonga ndi olamulira a dziko lapansi." 
Psalms148:12 Inu anyamata ndi anamwali, inu nkhalamba ndi ana omwe." 
Psalms148:13 Onsewo atamande dzina la Yehova pakuti dzina lake lokha ndi lolemekezeka; ulemerero wake ndi woopsa pa dziko lapansi pano ndi kumwamba komwe. 
Psalms148:14 Iye wakwezera nyanga anthu ake, matamando a anthu ake onse oyera mtima, Aisraeli, anthu a pamtima pake. Tamandani Yehova." 
Psalms149:1 	Tamandani Yehova. Imbirani Yehova nyimbo yatsopano, matamando ake mu msonkhano wa oyera mtima." 
Psalms149:2 Israeli asangalale mwa mlengi wake; anthu a ku Ziyoni akondwere mwa Mfumu yawo. 
Psalms149:3 Atamande dzina lake povina ndi kuyimbira Iye nyimbo ndi tambolini ndi pangwe. 
Psalms149:4 Pakuti Yehova amakondwera ndi anthu ake; Iye amaveka chipulumutso odzichepetsa. 
Psalms149:5 Oyera mtima asangalale mu ulemu wake ndi kuyimba mwachimwemwe pa mabedi awo. 
Psalms149:6 Matamando a Mulungu akhale pakamwa pawo, ndi lupanga lakuthwa konsekonse mʼmanja mwawo," 
Psalms149:7 kubwezera chilango anthu a mitundu ina, ndi kulanga anthu a mitundu yonse," 
Psalms149:8 kumanga mafumu awo ndi zingwe, anthu awo otchuka ndi unyolo wachitsulo," 
Psalms149:9 kuchita zimene zinalembedwa zotsutsana nawo Uwu ndi ulemerero wa oyera mtima ake onse. Tamandani Yehova. 
Psalms150:1 	Tamandani Yehova. Tamandani Mulungu mʼmalo ake opatulika; mutamandeni ku thambo lake lamphamvu. 
Psalms150:2 Mutamandeni chifukwa cha machitidwe ake amphamvu; mutamandeni chifukwa cha ukulu wake wopambana. 
Psalms150:3 Mutamandeni poyimba malipenga, mutamandeni ndi pangwe ndi zeze." 
Psalms150:4 Mutamandeni ndi matambolini ndi kuvina, mutamandeni ndi zingwe ndi zitoliro." 
Psalms150:5 Mutamandeni ndi ziwaya zolira za malipenga, mutamandeni ndi ziwaya zolira kwambiri." 
Psalms150:6 	Chamoyo chilichonse chopuma chitamande Yehova. Tamandani Yehova. 
Proverbs1:1 Iyi ndi miyambi ya Solomoni mwana wa Davide, mfumu ya Israeli:" 
Proverbs1:2 Ndi yothandiza kuti munthu adziwe nzeru ndi malangizo; kuti amvetse mawu a matanthauzo ozama; 
Proverbs1:3 kuti alandire malangizo othandiza kuti achite zinthu mwanzeru, akhale wangwiro, wachilungamo ndiponso wosakondera." 
Proverbs1:4 Ndi yothandiza munthu wamba kuti aphunzire nzeru za kuchenjera, achinyamata kudziwa zinthu bwino ndi kulingalira." 
Proverbs1:5 Munthu wanzeru amvetse bwino miyamboyi kuti awonjezere kuphunzira kwake, ndi munthu womvetsa zinthu bwino apatepo luso," 
Proverbs1:6 kuti azimvetsa miyambi ndi mafanizo, mawu a anthu anzeru ndi mikuluwiko." 
Proverbs1:7 Kuopa Yehova ndiye chiyambi cha nzeru. Zitsiru zimanyoza nzeru ndi malangizo. 
Proverbs1:8 Mwana wanga, mvera malangizo a abambo ako ndipo usakane mawu okuwongolera a amayi ako." 
Proverbs1:9 Ali ngati sangamutu yokongola ya maluwa pamutu pako ndiponso ali ngati mkanda mʼkhosi mwako. 
Proverbs1:10 Mwana wanga, ngati anthu oyipa afuna kukukopa usamawamvere." 
Proverbs1:11 Akadzati, “Tiye kuno; tikabisale kuti tiphe anthu, tikabisalire anthu osalakwa;" 
Proverbs1:12 tiwameze amoyo ngati manda, ndi athunthu ngati anthu otsikira mʼdzenje." 
Proverbs1:13 Motero tidzapeza zinthu zosiyanasiyana zamtengowapatali ndi kudzaza nyumba zathu ndi zolanda; 
Proverbs1:14 Bwera, chita nafe maere, ndipo tidzagawana chuma chathu tonse.”" 
Proverbs1:15 Mwana wanga, usayende nawo pamodzi, usatsagane nawo mʼnjira zawozo." 
Proverbs1:16 Iwowatu amangofuna zoyipa zokhazokha, amathamangira kukhetsa magazi." 
Proverbs1:17 Nʼkopanda phindu kutchera msampha mbalame zikuona! 
Proverbs1:18 Koma anthu amenewa amangobisalira miyoyo yawo yomwe; amangodzitchera okha msampha! 
Proverbs1:19 Awa ndiwo mathero a anthu opeza chuma mwankhanza; chumacho chimapha mwiniwake. 
Proverbs1:20 Nzeru ikufuwula mu msewu, ikuyankhula mokweza mawu mʼmisika;" 
Proverbs1:21 ikufuwula pa mphambano ya misewu, ikuyankhula pa zipata za mzinda kuti," 
Proverbs1:22 “Kodi inu anthu osachangamukanu, mudzakondwera ndi kusachangamuka mpaka liti? Nanga anthu onyogodola adzakondabe kunyogodola mpaka liti? Kapena opusa adzadana ndi nzeru mpaka liti?" 
Proverbs1:23 Tamverani mawu anga a chidzudzulo. Ine ndikukuwuzani maganizo anga ndi kukudziwitsani mawu anga. 
Proverbs1:24 Popeza ndinakuyitanani koma inu munakana kumvera. Ndinayesa kukuthandizani koma panalibe amene anasamala. 
Proverbs1:25 Uphungu wanga munawunyoza. Kudzudzula kwanga simunakusamale. 
Proverbs1:26 Ndiye inenso ndidzakusekani mukadzakhala mʼmavuto; ndidzakunyogodolani chikadzakugwerani chimene mumachiopacho. 
Proverbs1:27 Chiwonongeko chikadzakugwerani ngati namondwe, tsoka likadzakufikirani ngati kamvuluvulu, mavuto ndi masautso akadzakugwerani." 
Proverbs1:28 “Tsono mudzandiyitana koma sindidzayankha; mudzandifunafuna, koma simudzandipeza." 
Proverbs1:29 Popeza iwo anadana ndi chidziwitso ndipo sanasankhe kuopa Yehova," 
Proverbs1:30 popeza iwo sanasamale malangizo anga ndipo ananyoza chidzudzulo changa. 
Proverbs1:31 Tsono adzadya zipatso zoyenera mayendedwe awo ndi kukhuta ndi ntchito zimene anachita kwa ena. 
Proverbs1:32 Pakuti anthu osachangamuka amaphedwa chifukwa cha kusochera kwawo, ndipo zitsiru zimadziwononga zokha chifukwa cha mphwayi zawo." 
Proverbs1:33 Koma aliyense wondimvera adzakhala mwa bata; adzakhala mosatekeseka posaopa chilichonse.” 
Proverbs2:1 Mwana wanga, ngati ulandira mawu anga ndi kusunga malamulo anga mu mtima mwako," 
Proverbs2:2 ndiponso kutchera khutu lako ku nzeru ndi kuyikapo mtima pa kumvetsa zinthu; 
Proverbs2:3 ngati upempha kuti uzindikire zinthu inde kupempha ndi mtima wonse kuti ukhale womvetsa zinthu," 
Proverbs2:4 ngati ufunafuna nzeruyo ngati siliva ndi kuyisakasaka ngati chuma chobisika," 
Proverbs2:5 ndiye udzamvetsa bwino tanthauzo la kuopa Yehova; ndipo udzapezanso tanthauzo la kumudziwa Yehova. 
Proverbs2:6 Pakuti Yehova ndiye amapereka nzeru, ndipo mʼkamwa mwake mumachokera chidziwitso ndi kumvetsa zinthu." 
Proverbs2:7 Anthu olungama zinthu zimawayendera bwino chifukwa Yehova amakhala nawo. Paja Yehova ndiye chishango cha amene amayenda mwangwiro," 
Proverbs2:8 pakuti ndiye mlonda wa njira zolungama. Iye amasamala mayendedwe a anthu ake okhulupirika. 
Proverbs2:9 Choncho udzamvetsa tanthauzo la ungwiro, chilungamo, kusakondera ndi njira iliyonse yabwino." 
Proverbs2:10 Pakuti nzeru idzalowa mu mtima mwako, kudziwa zinthu kudzakusangalatsa." 
Proverbs2:11 Kuganizira bwino za mʼtsogolo kudzakusunga; kumvetsa zinthu bwino kudzakuteteza. 
Proverbs2:12 Nzeru idzakupulumutsa ku mayendedwe oyipa, kwa anthu amabodza," 
Proverbs2:13 amene amasiya njira zolungama namayenda mʼnjira zamdima," 
Proverbs2:14 amene amakondwera pochita zoyipa namasangalala ndi kuyipa kwa ntchito zawo zonyansa. 
Proverbs2:15 Amenewa ndi anthu a njira zawo zokhotakhota, ndipo makhalidwe awo ndi achinyengo." 
Proverbs2:16 Nzeruyo idzakupulumutsanso kwa mkazi wachigololo; kwa mkazi wachilendo woyankhula moshashalika," 
Proverbs2:17 amene wasiya mwamuna wa chitsikana wake ndi kuyiwala pangano limene anachita pamaso pa Mulungu wake. 
Proverbs2:18 Pakuti nyumba yake imatsetserekera ku imfa; njira zake zimamufikitsa ku manda. 
Proverbs2:19 Opita kwa iye palibe ndi mmodzi yemwe amabwerera kapena kupezanso njira zamoyo. 
Proverbs2:20 Choncho iwe uziyenda mʼnjira za anthu abwino, uzitsata njira za anthu ochita chilungamo." 
Proverbs2:21 Pakuti anthu olungama ndiwo ati adzakhale mʼdziko ndipo anthu angwiro ndiwo ati adzakhazikike mʼmenemo; 
Proverbs2:22 Koma anthu oyipa adzachotsedwa mʼdzikomo, ndipo anthu onyenga adzachotsedwamo." 
Proverbs3:1 Mwana wanga, usayiwale malangizo anga, mtima wako usunge malamulo anga." 
Proverbs3:2 Ukatero zaka za moyo wako zidzachuluka ndipo udzakhala pa mtendere. 
Proverbs3:3 Makhalidwe ochitira ena chifundo ndi owonetsa kukhulupirika asakuchokere. Uwamangirire mʼkhosi mwako ngati mkanda ndi kuwalemba pa mtima pako. 
Proverbs3:4 Ukatero udzapeza kuyanja ndi mbiri yabwino pamaso pa Mulungu ndi anthu. 
Proverbs3:5 Uzikhulupirira Yehova ndi mtima wako wonse ndipo usadalire nzeru zako za kumvetsa zinthu. 
Proverbs3:6 Pa zochita zako zonse uvomereze kuti Mulungu alipo, ndipo Iye adzawongola njira zako." 
Proverbs3:7 Usamadzione ngati wa nzeru. Uziopa Yehova ndi kupewa zoyipa. 
Proverbs3:8 Ukatero thupi lako lidzakhala la moyo wabwino ndi mafupa ako adzakhala olimba. 
Proverbs3:9 Uzilemekeza Yehova ndi chuma chako chonse; zokolola zonse zoyamba kucha uzilemekeza nazonso Yehova. 
Proverbs3:10 Ukatero nkhokwe zako zidzadzaza ndi zinthu zambiri, ndiponso mitsuko yako idzadzaza ndi vinyo." 
Proverbs3:11 Mwana wanga usanyoze malangizo a Yehova, ndipo usayipidwe ndi chidzudzulo chake." 
Proverbs3:12 Paja Yehova amadzudzula amene amamukonda, monga abambo achitira mwana amene amakondwera naye." 
Proverbs3:13 Wodala munthu amene wapeza nzeru, munthu amene walandira nzeru zomvetsa zinthu," 
Proverbs3:14 pakuti phindu la nzeru ndi labwino kuposa la siliva, phindu lakelo ndi labwino kuposanso golide." 
Proverbs3:15 Nzeru ndi yoposa miyala yamtengowapatali; ndipo zonse zimene umazikhumba sizingafanane ndi nzeru. 
Proverbs3:16 Mʼdzanja lake lamanja muli moyo wautali; mʼdzanja lake lamanzere muli chuma ndi ulemu. 
Proverbs3:17 Njira zake ndi njira zosangalatsa, ndipo mu njira zake zonse muli mtendere." 
Proverbs3:18 Nzeru ili ngati mtengo wopatsa moyo kwa oyigwiritsitsa; wodala munthu amene amayigwiritsa kwambiri. 
Proverbs3:19 Yehova anakhazikitsa dziko lapansi pogwiritsa ntchito nzeru. Anagwiritsanso ntchito nzeru zakudziwa bwino zinthu pamene ankakhazikitsa zakumwamba. 
Proverbs3:20 Mwa nzeru zake Yehova anatumphutsa madzi kuchokera mʼnthaka ndiponso mitambo inagwetsa mvula. 
Proverbs3:21 Mwana wanga usunge nzeru yeniyeni ndi khalidwe lomalingarira zinthu bwino. Zimenezi zisakuchokere. 
Proverbs3:22 Zimenezi zidzakupatsa moyo, moyo wake wosangalatsa ndi wabwino ngati mkanda wa mʼkhosi." 
Proverbs3:23 Choncho udzayenda pa njira yako mosaopa kanthu, ndipo phazi lako silidzapunthwa;" 
Proverbs3:24 pamene ugona pansi, sudzachita mantha; ukadzagona pansi tulo tako tidzakhala tokoma." 
Proverbs3:25 Usaope tsoka lobwera mwadzidzidzi kapena chiwonongeko chimene chidzagwera anthu oyipa," 
Proverbs3:26 pakuti Yehova adzakulimbitsa mtima ndipo adzasunga phazi lako kuti lisakodwe mu msampha. 
Proverbs3:27 Usaleke kuchitira zabwino amene ayenera kulandira zabwino, pamene uli nazo mphamvu zochitira zimenezi." 
Proverbs3:28 Usanene kwa mnansi wako kuti, “Pita, uchite kubweranso. Ndidzakupatsa mawa” pamene uli nazo tsopano." 
Proverbs3:29 Usamukonzere chiwembu mnansi wako, amene anakhala nawe pafupi mokudalira." 
Proverbs3:30 Usakangane ndi munthu wopanda chifukwa pamene iye sanakuchitire zoyipa. 
Proverbs3:31 Usachite naye nsanje munthu wachiwawa kapena kutsanzira khalidwe lake lililonse. 
Proverbs3:32 Pakuti Yehova amanyansidwa ndi munthu woyipa koma amayanjana nawo anthu olungama. 
Proverbs3:33 Yehova amatemberera nyumba ya munthu woyipa, koma amadalitsa nyumba ya anthu olungama." 
Proverbs3:34 Anthu onyoza, Iye amawanyoza, koma amakomera mtima anthu odzichepetsa." 
Proverbs3:35 Anthu anzeru adzalandira ulemu, koma zitsiru adzazichititsa manyazi." 
Proverbs4:1 Ananu, mverani malangizo a abambo anu; tcherani khutu kuti mupeze nzeru zodziwira zinthu." 
Proverbs4:2 Zimene ndikukuphunzitsani ndi zabwino. Choncho musasiye malangizo anga. 
Proverbs4:3 Paja ndinalinso mwana mʼnyumba mwa abambo anga; mwana mmodzi yekha wapamtima pa amayi anga. 
Proverbs4:4 Ndipo abambo anandiphunzitsa ndi mawu akuti, “Ugwiritse mawu anga pa mtima pako, usunge malamulo anga kuti ukhale ndi moyo." 
Proverbs4:5 Upeze nzeru, upeze nzeru zomvetsa zinthu; usayiwale mawu anga kapena kutayana nawo." 
Proverbs4:6 Usasiye nzeru ndipo idzakusunga. Uziyikonda ndipo idzakuteteza. 
Proverbs4:7 Fundo yayikulu pa za nzeru ndi iyi: upeze nzeru. Kaya pali china chilichonse chimene ungapeze, koma upeze nzeru yomvetsa bwino zinthu." 
Proverbs4:8 Uyilemekeze nzeruyo ndipo idzakukweza; ikumbatire nzeruyo ndipo idzakupatsa ulemu. 
Proverbs4:9 Idzayika sangamutu yokongola yamaluwa pamutu pako; idzakupatsa chipewa chaufumu chaulemu.” 
Proverbs4:10 Mwana wanga, umvere ndi kuvomereza zimene ndikunena, ndipo zaka za moyo wako zidzakhala zochuluka." 
Proverbs4:11 Ndakuphunzitsa njira yake ya nzeru. Ndakutsogolera mʼnjira zolungama. 
Proverbs4:12 Pamene ukuyenda, mapazi ako sadzawombana; ukamadzathamanga, sudzapunthwa." 
Proverbs4:13 Ugwiritse zimene ndikukuphunzitsazi osazitaya ayi. Uwasamale bwino pakuti moyo wako wagona pamenepa. 
Proverbs4:14 Usayende mʼnjira za anthu oyipa kapena kuyenda mʼnjira ya anthu ochimwa. 
Proverbs4:15 Pewa njira zawo, usayende mʼmenemo; uzilambalala nʼkumangopita." 
Proverbs4:16 Pakuti iwo sagona mpaka atachita zoyipa; tulo salipeza mpaka atapunthwitsa munthu wina. 
Proverbs4:17 Paja chakudya chawo ndicho kuchita zoyipa basi ndipo chakumwa chawo ndi chiwawa. 
Proverbs4:18 Koma njira ya anthu olungama ili ngati kuwala kwa mʼbandakucha kumene kumanka kuwalirawalira mpaka dzuwa litafika pa mutu. 
Proverbs4:19 Koma njira ya anthu oyipa ili ngati mdima wandiweyani; iwo sadziwa chomwe chimawapunthwitsa. 
Proverbs4:20 Mwana wanga, mvetsetsa zimene ndikunena; tchera khutu ku mawu anga." 
Proverbs4:21 Usayiwale malangizo angawa, koma uwasunge mu mtima mwako." 
Proverbs4:22 Pakuti amapatsa moyo kwa aliyense amene awapeza ndipo amachiritsa thupi lake lonse. 
Proverbs4:23 Ndipotu mtima wako uziwuyangʼanira bwino ndithu pakuti ndiwo magwero a moyo. 
Proverbs4:24 Usiyiretu kuyankhula zokhotakhota; ndipo ulekeretu kuyankhula zinthu zonyansa. 
Proverbs4:25 Maso ako ayangʼane patsogolo; uziyangʼana kutsogolo molunjika. 
Proverbs4:26 Uzilingalira bwino kumene kupita mapazi ako ndipo njira zako zonse zidzakhala zosakayikitsa. 
Proverbs4:27 Usapatukire kumanja kapena kumanzere; usapite kumene kuli zoyipa. 
Proverbs5:1 Mwana wanga, mvetsera bwino za nzeru zimene ndikukuwuzazi, tchera khutu ku mawu odziwitsa bwino zinthu ndikukupatsa," 
Proverbs5:2 kuti uthe kuchita zinthu mochenjera ndi mwanzeru ndiponso kuti utetezedwe ku mayankhulidwe a mkazi wachilendo. 
Proverbs5:3 Pakuti mkazi wachigololo ali ndi mawu okoma ngati uchi. Zoyankhula zake ndi zosalala ngati mafuta," 
Proverbs5:4 koma kotsirizira kwake ngowawa ngati ndulu; ngakuthwa ngati lupanga lakuthwa konsekonse. 
Proverbs5:5 Mapazi ake amatsikira ku imfa; akamayenda ndiye kuti akupita ku manda. 
Proverbs5:6 Iye saganizirapo za njira ya moyo; njira zake ndi zokhotakhota koma iye sadziwa izi. 
Proverbs5:7 Tsopano ana inu, mundimvere; musawasiye mawu anga." 
Proverbs5:8 Uziyenda kutali ndi mkazi wotereyo, usayandikire khomo la nyumba yake," 
Proverbs5:9 kuopa kuti ungadzalanditse ulemerero wako kwa anthu ena; ndi zaka zako kwa anthu ankhanza," 
Proverbs5:10 kapenanso alendo angadyerere chuma chako ndi phindu la ntchito yako kulemeretsa anthu ena. 
Proverbs5:11 Potsiriza pa moyo wako udzabuwula, thupi lako lonse litatheratu." 
Proverbs5:12 Ndipo udzati, “Mayo ine, ndinkadana ndi kusunga mwambo! Mtima wanga unkanyoza chidzudzulo!" 
Proverbs5:13 Sindinamvere aphunzitsi anga kapena alangizi anga. 
Proverbs5:14 Ine ndatsala pangʼono kuti ndiwonongeke pakati pa msonkhano wonse.” 
Proverbs5:15 Imwa madzi a mʼchitsime chakochako, madzi abwino ochokera mʼchitsime chako." 
Proverbs5:16 Kodi akasupe ako azingosefukira mʼmisewu? Kodi mitsinje yako izingoyendayenda mʼzipata za mzinda? 
Proverbs5:17 Mitsinjeyo ikhale ya iwe wekha, osati uyigawireko alendo." 
Proverbs5:18 Yehova adalitse kasupe wako, ndipo usangalale ndi mkazi wa unyamata wako." 
Proverbs5:19 Iye uja ali ngati mbalale yayikazi yokongola ndiponso ngati gwape wa maonekedwe abwino. Ukhutitsidwe ndi mawere ake nthawi zonse, ndipo utengeke ndi chikondi chake nthawi zonse." 
Proverbs5:20 Mwana wanga, nʼchifukwa chiyani ukukopeka ndi mkazi wachigololo? Bwanji ukukumbatira mkazi wachilendo?" 
Proverbs5:21 Pakuti mayendedwe onse a munthu Yehova amawaona, ndipo Iye amapenyetsetsa njira zake zonse." 
Proverbs5:22 Ntchito zoyipa za munthu woyipa zimamukola yekha; zingwe za tchimo lake zimamumanga yekha. 
Proverbs5:23 Iye adzafa chifukwa chosowa mwambo, adzasocheretsedwa chifukwa cha uchitsiru wake waukulu." 
Proverbs6:1 Mwana wanga, ngati wamuperekera mnansi wako chikole, ngati walonjeza kumulipirira mlendo," 
Proverbs6:2 ngati wagwidwa ndi zimene iwe unanena, wakodwa ndi mawu a mʼkamwa mwako." 
Proverbs6:3 Tsono popeza iwe mwana wanga wadziponya mʼmanja mwa mnansi wako, chita izi kuti udzipulumutse: pita msanga ukamupemphe mnansi wako; kuti akumasule!" 
Proverbs6:4 Usagone tulo, usawodzere." 
Proverbs6:5 Dzipulumutse monga imachitira mphoyo mʼdzanja la mlenje, ndi monga imachitira mbalame mu msampha wa munthu wosaka." 
Proverbs6:6 Pita kwa nyerere, mlesi iwe; kaonetsetse njira zake kuti uphunzirepo kanthu!" 
Proverbs6:7 Zilibe mfumu, zilibe woyangʼanira kapena wolamulira," 
Proverbs6:8 komabe zimasungiratu chakudya chake nthawi ya chilimwe ndipo zimatuta chakudyacho nthawi yokolola. 
Proverbs6:9 Kodi uzingogonabe pamenepo mpaka liti mlesi iwe? Kodi tulo tako tidzatha liti? 
Proverbs6:10 Ukati ndingogona pangʼono, ndingowodzera pangʼono ndingopinda manjawa pangʼono kuti ndipumule," 
Proverbs6:11 umphawi udzakugwira ngati mbala ndipo usiwa udzafika ngati munthu wachifwamba. 
Proverbs6:12 Munthu wachabechabe, munthu woyipa, amangoyendayenda ndi kumayankhula zoyipa," 
Proverbs6:13 amatsinzinira maso ake, namakwakwaza mapazi ake ndi kulozaloza ndi zala zake," 
Proverbs6:14 amalingalira zoyipa ndi mtima wake wachinyengo ndipo nthawi zonse amangokhalira kuyambitsa mikangano pakati pa anthu. 
Proverbs6:15 Nʼchifukwa chake tsoka lidzamugwera modzidzimutsa; adzawonongeka msangamsanga popanda chomupulumutsa. 
Proverbs6:16 Pali zinthu zisanu ndi chimodzi zimene Yehova amadana nazo, zinthu zisanu ndi ziwiri zimene zimamunyansa:" 
Proverbs6:17 maso onyada, pakamwa pabodza, manja akupha munthu wosalakwa," 
Proverbs6:18 mtima wokonzekera kuchita zoyipa, mapazi othamangira msanga ku zoyipa," 
Proverbs6:19 mboni yonama yoyankhula mabodza komanso munthu amene amayambitsa mikangano pakati pa abale. 
Proverbs6:20 Mwana wanga, usunge malamulo a abambo ako; ndipo usataye zimene anakuphunzitsa amayi ako." 
Proverbs6:21 Zimenezi uzimatirire pa mtima pako masiku onse, uzimangirire mʼkhosi mwako." 
Proverbs6:22 Ukamayenda, zidzakulozera njira; ukugona, zidzakulondera; ukudzuka, zidzakuyankhula." 
Proverbs6:23 Paja malamulo awa ali ngati nyale, malangizowa ali ngati kuwunika, ndipo chidzudzulo cha mwambo ndiwo moyo weniweni," 
Proverbs6:24 kukupulumutsa kwa mkazi wadama, zimenezi zidzakutchinjiriza kwa mkazi wadama, ndi kukuthandiza kuti usamvere mawu oshashalika a mkazi wachiwerewere." 
Proverbs6:25 Mu mtima wako usakhumbire kukongola kwake, asakukope ndi zikope zake," 
Proverbs6:26 paja mkazi wadama amakusandutsa kukhala ngati nyenyeswa za buledi ndipo mkazi wa mwini wake amasokonezeratu moyo wako wonse. 
Proverbs6:27 Kodi munthu angathe kutenga moto zovala zake osapsa? 
Proverbs6:28 Kodi munthu angathe kuyenda pa makala amoto mapazi ake osapserera? 
Proverbs6:29 Ndizo zimachitikira munthu amene amagonana ndi mkazi wa munthu wina. Aliyense wokhudza mkazi wotere adzalangidwa. 
Proverbs6:30 Paja anthu sayinyoza mbala ikaba chifukwa chakuti ili ndi njala. 
Proverbs6:31 Komabe ngati mbalayo igwidwa iyenera kulipira kasanu nʼkawiri, ngakhale kulandidwa katundu wa mʼnyumba mwake." 
Proverbs6:32 Munthu wochita chigololo ndi wopanda nzeru. Wochita zimenezi amangodziwononga yekha. 
Proverbs6:33 Adzalandira mabala ndi mʼnyozo, ndipo manyazi ake sadzamuchokera." 
Proverbs6:34 Paja nsanje imachititsa mwini mkaziyo kukalipa, ndipo sadzachita chifundo pobwezera." 
Proverbs6:35 Iye savomera dipo lililonse; sangapepeseke ngakhale umupatse mphatso zochuluka motani. 
Proverbs7:1 Mwana wanga, mvera mawu anga; usunge bwino malamulo angawa." 
Proverbs7:2 Utsate malamulo anga ndipo udzakhala ndi moyo; samala malangizo angawa monga uchitira ndi maso ako. 
Proverbs7:3 Uchite ngati wawamangirira pa zala zako, ndiponso ngati kuti wawalemba pa mtima pako." 
Proverbs7:4 Nzeru uyiwuze kuti, “Iwe ndiwe mlongo wanga,” ndipo khalidwe lomvetsa bwino zinthu ulitchule kuti, “Bwenzi langa lapamtima.”" 
Proverbs7:5 Zidzakuteteza kwa mkazi wachigololo ndiponso zidzakuthandiza kusamvera mawu oshashalika a mkazi wachilendo. 
Proverbs7:6 Tsiku lina pa zenera la nyumba yanga ndinasuzumira pa zenera. 
Proverbs7:7 Ndinaona pakati pa anthu opusa, pakati pa anyamata, mnyamata wina wopanda nzeru." 
Proverbs7:8 Iye ankayenda njira yodutsa pafupi ndi nyumba ya mkaziyo, kuyenda molunjika nyumba ya mkaziyo." 
Proverbs7:9 Inali nthawi yachisisira madzulo, nthawi ya usiku, kuli mdima." 
Proverbs7:10 Ndipo mkaziyo anadzakumana naye, atavala ngati munthu wachiwerewere wa mtima wonyenga." 
Proverbs7:11 (Mkaziyo ndi wolongolola ndiponso nkhutukumve, iye ndi wosakhazikika pa khomo." 
Proverbs7:12 Mwina umupeza pa msewu, mwina umupeza pa msika, ndipo amadikirira munthu pa mphambano iliyonse)." 
Proverbs7:13 Tsono amagwira mnyamatayo ndi kupsompsona ndi nkhope yake yopanda manyazi amamuwuza kuti," 
Proverbs7:14 “Ndinayenera kupereka nsembe zachiyanjano. Lero ndakwaniritsa malumbiro anga. 
Proverbs7:15 Choncho ndinabwera kudzakumana nawe; ndinkakufunafuna ndipo ndakupeza! 
Proverbs7:16 Pa bedi panga ndayalapo nsalu zosalala zokongola zochokera ku Igupto. 
Proverbs7:17 Pa bedi panga ndawazapo zonunkhira za mure, mafuta onunkhira a aloe ndi sinamoni." 
Proverbs7:18 Bwera, tiye tikhale malo amodzi kukondwerera chikondi mpaka mmawa; tiye tisangalatsane mwachikondi!" 
Proverbs7:19 Mwamuna wanga kulibe ku nyumbako; wapita ulendo wautali: 
Proverbs7:20 Anatenga thumba la ndalama ndipo adzabwera ku nyumba mwezi ukakhwima.” 
Proverbs7:21 Ndi mawu ake onyengerera amamukakamiza mnyamatayo; amukopa ndi mawu ake oshashalika. 
Proverbs7:22 Nthawi yomweyo chitsiru chimamutsatira mkaziyo ngati ngʼombe yopita kukaphedwa, monga momwe mbawala ikodwera mu msampha," 
Proverbs7:23 mpaka muvi utalasa chiwindi chake, chimakhala ngati mbalame yothamangira mʼkhwekhwe, osadziwa kuti moyo wake uwonongeka." 
Proverbs7:24 Tsono ana inu, ndimvereni; mvetsetsani zimene ndikunena." 
Proverbs7:25 Musatengeke mtima ndi njira za mkazi ameneyu; musasochere potsata njira zake. 
Proverbs7:26 Paja iye anagwetsa anthu ambiri; wapha gulu lalikulu la anthu. 
Proverbs7:27 Nyumba yake ndi njira yopita ku manda, yotsikira ku malo a anthu akufa." 
Proverbs8:1 Kodi nzeru sikuyitana? Kodi nzeru yomvetsa zinthu sinakweze mawu ake? 
Proverbs8:2 Nzeru imayima pa zitunda mʼmbali mwa njira, imayima pa mphambano ya misewu." 
Proverbs8:3 Imafuwula pafupi ndi zipata zolowera mu mzinda, pa makomo olowera imafuwula kuti," 
Proverbs8:4 Inu anthu, ndikuyitana inu; ndikuyitanatu anthu onse." 
Proverbs8:5 Inu amene simudziwa kanthunu khalani ochenjera; inu amene ndi opusa, khalani ndi mtima womvetsa zinthu." 
Proverbs8:6 Mverani, pakuti ndikukuwuzani zinthu zofunika kwambiri; ndatsekula pakamwa panga ndipo payankhula zolungama." 
Proverbs8:7 Pakamwa panga pamayankhula zoona ndimanyansidwa ndi kuyankhula zoyipa. 
Proverbs8:8 Mawu onse a pakamwa panga ndi olungama; mʼmawu angawo mulibe zokhotakhota kapena zopotoka. 
Proverbs8:9 Kwa anthu ozindikira, mawu anga onse ndi woona; kwa anthu amene ali ndi nzeru zomvetsa zinthu, mawu angawo ndi okhoza." 
Proverbs8:10 Landirani malangizo anga mʼmalo mwa siliva, nzeru zomvetsa zinthu mʼmalo mwa golide wabwino." 
Proverbs8:11 Paja nzeru ndi yabwino kwambiri kuposa miyala yamtengowapatali, ndipo zonse zimene ungazifune sizingafanane ndi nzeru." 
Proverbs8:12 Ine nzeru, ndimakhala pamodzi ndi kuchenjera. Ine ndimadziwa zinthu ndiponso ndimalingalira zinthu bwino." 
Proverbs8:13 Kuopa Yehova ndiko kudana ndi zoyipa. Ine ndimadana ndi kunyada, kudzitama, kuchita zoyipa, ndiponso kuyankhula zonyenga." 
Proverbs8:14 Ndine mwini uphungu ndi maganizo abwino; ndili ndi nzeru yomvetsa zinthu ndiponso mphamvu. 
Proverbs8:15 Ndine amene ndimathandiza mafumu kulamulira. Ndimawathandiza olamulira kukhazikitsa malamulo olungama. 
Proverbs8:16 Ndine amene ndimathandiza akalonga polamula. Ndinenso amene ndimathandiza akuluakulu onse kulamulira bwino dziko. 
Proverbs8:17 Ndimakonda amene amandikonda, ndipo amene amandifunafuna amandipeza." 
Proverbs8:18 Ine ndili ndi chuma ndi ulemu, chuma ndi kupindula pa ntchito kokhazikika." 
Proverbs8:19 Chipatso changa ndi chabwino kuposa golide, ngakhale golide wosalala; zimene ine ndimabereka zimaposa siliva wabwino kwambiri." 
Proverbs8:20 Ndimachita zinthu zolungama. Ine sindipatuka mʼnjira za chilungamo. 
Proverbs8:21 Ndimapereka chuma kwa amene amandikonda ndi kudzaza nyumba zawo zosungiramo chuma. 
Proverbs8:22 “Yehova anandilenga ine nzeru monga ntchito yake yoyamba. Mwa ntchito zake zakalekale yoyamba ndinali ine. 
Proverbs8:23 Ndinapangidwa kalekalelo, pachiyambi penipeni dziko lapansi lisanalengedwe." 
Proverbs8:24 Nyanja, akasupe odzaza ndi madzi, zonsezi kulibe pamene ine ndinkabadwa." 
Proverbs8:25 Mapiri asanakhazikitsidwe pa malo awo, mapiri angʼonoangʼono asanakhalepo, ine ndinali nditabadwa kale," 
Proverbs8:26 lisanalengedwe dziko lapansi ndi minda yake; lisanalengedwe dothi loyamba la dziko lapansi. 
Proverbs8:27 Ine ndinalipo pamene Yehova ankakhazikitsa mlengalenga, pamene ankalemba malire a nyanja yozama," 
Proverbs8:28 pamene anakhazikitsa mitambo ya mlengalenga ndi kukhazikitsa akasupe a madzi ozama," 
Proverbs8:29 pamene anayikira nyanja malire kuti madzi asadutse malirewo, ndiponso pamene ankayika malire a dziko lapansi." 
Proverbs8:30 Tsono ine ndinali pambali pake ngati mmisiri; ndikumukondweretsa tsiku ndi tsiku, kusangalala nthawi zonse pamaso pake." 
Proverbs8:31 Ndinkasangalala ndi dziko lake lonse ndiponso kumakondwera nawo anthu onse.” 
Proverbs8:32 “Ndiye tsono ana inu, ndimvereni; odala anthu amene amasunga njira zanga." 
Proverbs8:33 Mverani malangizo anga kuti mukhale ndi nzeru; musanyozere mawu anga. 
Proverbs8:34 Wodala munthu amene amandimvera, amene amakhala pa khomo panga tsiku ndi tsiku, kudikirira pa chitseko changa." 
Proverbs8:35 Paja aliyense amene apeza ine wapeza moyo ndipo Yehova amamukomera mtima. 
Proverbs8:36 Koma amene alephera kundipeza, amadzipweteka yekha; onse amene amandida amakonda imfa.”" 
Proverbs9:1 Nzeru inamanga nyumba yake; inayimika nsanamira zake zisanu ndi ziwiri. 
Proverbs9:2 Inapha ziweto zake ndipo yasakaniza vinyo wake; inasakaniza vinyo wake ndi kuyala tebulo lake. 
Proverbs9:3 Nzeruyo inatuma adzakazi ake, kuti akakhale pamwamba penipeni pa mzinda ndi kukalengeza kuti," 
Proverbs9:4 “Aliyense amene ali munthu wamba, abwere kuno!” Kwa onse opanda nzeru inkanena kuti," 
Proverbs9:5 “Bwerani, dzadyeni chakudya changa ndipo dzamweni vinyo amene ndakonza." 
Proverbs9:6 Lekani zopusa zanu kuti mukhale ndi moyo; yendani njira ya nzeru yomvetsa zinthu.” 
Proverbs9:7 Aliyense amene amayesa kukonza munthu wonyoza amadziputira minyozo; aliyense amene amadzudzula munthu woyipa amadetsa mbiri yake. 
Proverbs9:8 Usadzudzule munthu wonyoza kuti angadzadane nawe; dzudzula munthu wanzeru ndipo adzakukonda. 
Proverbs9:9 Ukalangiza munthu wanzeru ndiye adzapitirira kukhala wanzeru; ukaphunzitsa munthu wolungama ndiye adzawonjezera kuphunzira kwake. 
Proverbs9:10 Kuopa Yehova ndiye chiyambi cha nzeru; kudziwa Woyerayo ndiko kukhala womvetsa bwino zinthu. 
Proverbs9:11 Chifukwa cha ine nzeru, masiku ako adzachuluka, ndipo zaka za moyo wako zidzawonjezeredwa." 
Proverbs9:12 Ngati ndiwe wanzeru, nzeru yakoyo idzakupindulitsa; ngati ndiwe wonyoza ena, udzavutika wekha." 
Proverbs9:13 Uchitsiru ndi mkazi waphokoso, wopulikira ndiponso wosadziwa zinthu." 
Proverbs9:14 Iye amakhala pa mpando, pa khomo la nyumba yake, pamalo aatali a mu mzinda," 
Proverbs9:15 kuti aziyitana anthu ongodutsa, amene akunka nayenda njira zawo." 
Proverbs9:16 Amati, “Onse amene ndi anthu wamba abwere kuno,” ndipo kwa wopanda nzeru amati," 
Proverbs9:17 “Madzi akuba ndiye amatsekemera; chakudya chodya mobisa ndi chokoma!” 
Proverbs9:18 Koma amunawo sadziwa kuti akufa ali kale komweko, ndi kuti alendo ake alowa kale mʼmanda akuya." 
Proverbs10:1 Miyambo ya Solomoni: Mwana wanzeru amakondweretsa abambo ake, koma mwana wopusa amamvetsa amayi ake chisoni." 
Proverbs10:2 Chuma chochipeza mwachinyengo sichipindulitsa, koma chilungamo chimapulumutsa ku imfa." 
Proverbs10:3 Yehova salola kuti munthu wolungama azikhala ndi njala; koma amalepheretsa zokhumba za anthu oyipa. 
Proverbs10:4 Wochita zinthu mwaulesi amasauka, koma wogwira ntchito mwakhama amalemera." 
Proverbs10:5 Amene amakolola nthawi yachilimwe ndi mwana wanzeru, koma amene amangogona nthawi yokolola ndi mwana wochititsa manyazi." 
Proverbs10:6 Madalitso amakhala pa mutu wa munthu wolungama, koma pakamwa pa munthu woyipa pamaphimba chiwawa." 
Proverbs10:7 Munthu wolungama anzake adzamukumbukira ngati mdalitso, koma dzina la munthu woyipa lidzayiwalika." 
Proverbs10:8 Munthu wa mtima wanzeru amasamala malamulo, koma chitsiru chomangolongolola chidzawonongeka." 
Proverbs10:9 Munthu woyenda mwangwiro amayenda mosatekeseka; koma amene amayenda njira yokhotakhota adzadziwika. 
Proverbs10:10 Aliyense wotsinzinira maso mwachinyengo amabweretsa mavuto, koma wodzudzula chitsiru molimba mtima amabweretsa mtendere." 
Proverbs10:11 Pakamwa pa munthu wolungama ndi kasupe wamoyo, koma pakamwa pa munthu woyipa pamabisa chiwawa." 
Proverbs10:12 Udani umawutsa mikangano, koma chikondi chimaphimba zolakwa zonse." 
Proverbs10:13 Nzeru imapezeka pa milomo ya munthu wozindikira zinthu, koma pa msana pa munthu wopanda nzeru sipachoka chikwapu." 
Proverbs10:14 Anzeru amasunga chidziwitso koma pakamwa pa chitsiru pamatulutsa zowononga. 
Proverbs10:15 Chuma cha munthu wolemera ndiye chitetezo chake; koma umphawi ndiye chiwonongeko cha osauka. 
Proverbs10:16 Moyo ndiye malipiro a munthu wolungama, koma phindu la anthu oyipa ndi uchimo ndi imfa." 
Proverbs10:17 Wosamalira malangizo amayenda mʼnjira ya moyo, koma wonyoza chidzudzulo amasochera." 
Proverbs10:18 Amene amabisa chidani chake ndi munthu wonama, ndipo amene amafalitsa miseche ndi chitsiru." 
Proverbs10:19 Mawu akachuluka zolakwa sizisowa, koma amene amasunga pakamwa pake ndi wanzeru." 
Proverbs10:20 Mawu a munthu wolungama ali ngati siliva wabwino kwambiri, koma mtima wa munthu woyipa ndi wopanda phindu." 
Proverbs10:21 Milomo ya anthu olungama imalimbikitsa ambiri; koma chitsiru chimafa chifukwa chosowa nzeru. 
Proverbs10:22 Mdalitso wa Yehova ndiwo umabweretsa chuma, ntchito za munthu siziwonjezerapo kanthu." 
Proverbs10:23 Kwa chitsiru kuchita zinthu zoyipa ndiye chinthu chomusangalatsa, koma kwa munthu womvetsa bwino zinthu nzeru ndiyo imamusangalatsa." 
Proverbs10:24 Chimene munthu woyipa amachiopa chidzamuchitikira; chimene munthu wolungama amachilakalaka adzachipeza. 
Proverbs10:25 Pamene namondwe wawomba, anthu oyipa amachotsedwa, koma anthu olungama amakhazikika mpaka muyaya." 
Proverbs10:26 Momwe amakhalira vinyo wosasa mʼkamwa ndi momwe umakhalira utsi mʼmaso, ndi momwenso amakhalira munthu waulesi kwa amene amutuma." 
Proverbs10:27 Kuopa Yehova kumatalikitsa moyo; koma zaka za anthu oyipa zidzafupikitsidwa. 
Proverbs10:28 Chiyembekezo cha olungama chimapatsa chimwemwe, koma chiyembekezo cha anthu ochimwa chidzafera mʼmazira." 
Proverbs10:29 Njira za Yehova ndi linga loteteza anthu ochita zabwino, koma wochita zoyipa adzawonongeka." 
Proverbs10:30 Munthu wolungama sadzachotsedwa, pamalo pake koma oyipa sadzakhazikika pa dziko." 
Proverbs10:31 Pakamwa pa munthu wolungama pamatulutsa za nzeru, koma lilime lokhota lidzadulidwa." 
Proverbs10:32 Milomo ya anthu olungama imadziwa zoyenera kuyankhula, koma pakamwa pa anthu ochimwa pamatulutsa zokhota zokhazokha." 
Proverbs11:1 Muyeso wachinyengo Yehova umamunyansa, koma amakondwera ndi muyeso woyenera." 
Proverbs11:2 Kunyada kukalowa, pamafikanso manyazi, koma pamene pali kudzichepetsa pameneponso pali nzeru." 
Proverbs11:3 Ungwiro wa anthu olungama umawatsogolera, koma anthu osakhulupirika amawonongeka ndi chinyengo chawo." 
Proverbs11:4 Chuma sichithandiza pa tsiku lawukali wa Mulungu, koma chilungamo chimapulumutsa ku imfa." 
Proverbs11:5 Chilungamo cha anthu angwiro chimawongolera moyo wawo, koma ntchito zoyipa zimagwetsa mwini wake yemweyo." 
Proverbs11:6 Chilungamo cha anthu oyera mtima chimawapulumutsa, koma anthu onyenga adzagwidwa ndi zilakolako zawo zomwe." 
Proverbs11:7 Pamene munthu woyipa wafa, chiyembekezo chake chimathanso. Chiyembekezo cha munthu wosalungama chimawonongeka." 
Proverbs11:8 Munthu wolungama amapulumutsidwa ku mavuto, koma mʼmalo mwake amagwa mʼmavutomo ndi anthu oyipa." 
Proverbs11:9 Munthu wosapembedza amawononga mnansi wake ndi pakamwa pake, koma munthu wolungama amapulumuka chifukwa cha kudziwa zinthu." 
Proverbs11:10 Anthu olungama zinthu zikamawayendera bwino, mzinda wonse umakondwera, ndipo oyipa akamawonongeka anthu amafuwula mwachimwemwe." 
Proverbs11:11 Mzinda umakwezeka chifukwa cha madalitso a anthu oyera mtima, koma umawonongedwa chifukwa cha pakamwa pa anthu oyipa." 
Proverbs11:12 Munthu wonyoza mnzake ndi wopanda nzeru, koma munthu wanzeru zomvetsa zinthu amakhala chete." 
Proverbs11:13 Amene amanka nachita ukazitape amawulula zinsinsi; koma munthu wokhulupirika amasunga pakamwa pake. 
Proverbs11:14 Pakasoweka uphungu mtundu wa anthu umagwa; koma pakakhala aphungu ambiri pamakhalanso chipulumutso. 
Proverbs11:15 Woperekera mlendo chikole adzapeza mavuto, koma wodana ndi za chikole amakhala pa mtendere." 
Proverbs11:16 Mkazi wodekha amalandira ulemu, koma amuna ankhanza amangopata chuma." 
Proverbs11:17 Munthu wachifundo amadzipindulira zabwino koma munthu wankhanza amadzibweretsera mavuto. 
Proverbs11:18 Munthu woyipa amalandira malipiro wopanda phindu, koma wochita chilungamo amakolola mphotho yeniyeni." 
Proverbs11:19 Munthu wochita za chilungamo amapeza moyo, koma wothamangira zoyipa adzafa." 
Proverbs11:20 Yehova amanyansidwa ndi anthu a mtima wokhotakhota koma amakondwera ndi anthu a makhalidwe angwiro. 
Proverbs11:21 Zoonadi, anthu oyipa adzalangidwa, koma anthu olungama adzapulumuka." 
Proverbs11:22 Monga imaonekera mphete yagolide ikakhala pa mphuno ya nkhumba, ndi momwenso amaonekera mkazi wokongola wamʼkamwa." 
Proverbs11:23 Zokhumba za anthu olungama zimathera pa zabwino zokhazokha, koma chiyembekezo cha anthu oyipa chimathera mu ukali wa Mulungu." 
Proverbs11:24 Munthu wina amapatsako anzake zinthu mwaufulu nʼkumangolemererabe; wina amamana chomwe akanatha kupereka, koma kumanka nasawukabe." 
Proverbs11:25 Munthu wopereka mowolowamanja adzalemera; iye amene amathandiza ena iyenso adzathandizidwa. 
Proverbs11:26 Anthu amatemberera womana anzake chakudya, koma madalitso amakhala pamutu pa munthu amene amagulitsa chakudyacho." 
Proverbs11:27 Iye amene amafunafuna zabwino mwakhama amapeza zabwinozo, koma wofunafuna zoyipa zidzamupeza." 
Proverbs11:28 Aliyense amene amadalira chuma chake adzafota, koma wolungama adzaphukira ngati tsamba lobiriwira." 
Proverbs11:29 Wovutitsa a mʼnyumba mwake adzalowa mʼmavuto, ndipo chitsiru chidzakhala kapolo wa munthu wa nzeru." 
Proverbs11:30 Chipatso cha ntchito zabwino ndi moyo, ndipo kusatsata malamulo kumawonongetsa moyo." 
Proverbs11:31 Ngati anthu olungama amalandira mphotho zawo pa dziko lapansi, kuli bwanji anthu osapembedza ndi ochimwa!" 
Proverbs12:1 Munthu amene amakonda mwambo amakonda kudziwa zinthu, koma amene amadana ndi chidzudzulo ndi wopusa." 
Proverbs12:2 Munthu wabwino amapeza kuyanja pamaso pa Yehova, koma Yehova amatsutsa munthu wochita chinyengo." 
Proverbs12:3 Munthu sangakhazikike bwino pochita zoyipa, koma maziko a anthu olungama sadzatekeseka." 
Proverbs12:4 Mkazi wakhalidwe labwino ali ngati chipewa chaufumu kwa mwamuna wake, koma mkazi wochititsa manyazi ali ngati chilonda cha mafinya kwa mwamuna wake." 
Proverbs12:5 Maganizo a anthu olungama ndi owongoka, koma malangizo a anthu oyipa ndi achinyengo." 
Proverbs12:6 Mawu a anthu oyipa ndi ophetsa, koma mawu a anthu olungama amapulumutsa." 
Proverbs12:7 Anthu oyipa amagonjetsedwa ndipo amayiwalika, koma nyumba ya anthu olungama idzakhalabe." 
Proverbs12:8 Munthu amatamandidwa malinga ndi nzeru zake, koma anthu amitima yokhota amanyozedwa." 
Proverbs12:9 Nʼkwabwino kukhala munthu wonyozeka koma wodzigwirira ntchito nʼkukhala ndi zonse zofunika, kuposa kukhala wodzikuza koma ulibe ndi chakudya chomwe." 
Proverbs12:10 Munthu wolungama amasamalira moyo wa ziweto zake, koma chifundo cha munthu woyipa ndi chakhanza." 
Proverbs12:11 Wolima mʼmunda mwake mwakhama adzakhala ndi chakudya chochuluka, koma wotsata zopanda pake alibe nzeru." 
Proverbs12:12 Munthu woyipa amalakalaka zofunkha za anthu oyipa, koma mizu ya anthu olungama imabereka zipatso." 
Proverbs12:13 Munthu woyipa amakodwa mu msampha wa mayankhulidwe ake oyipa; koma munthu wolungama amatuluka mʼmavuto. 
Proverbs12:14 Munthu amakhala ndi zabwino zambiri chifukwa cha mawu ake ndipo ntchito zimene munthu agwira ndi manja ake zimamupindulira. 
Proverbs12:15 Zochita za chitsiru mwini wakeyo amaziona ngati zabwino, koma munthu wanzeru amamvera malangizo." 
Proverbs12:16 Mkwiyo wa chitsiru umadziwika nthawi yomweyo, koma munthu wanzeru sasamala kunyozedwa." 
Proverbs12:17 Woyankhula zoona amapereka umboni woona, koma mboni yabodza imafotokoza zonama." 
Proverbs12:18 Munthu woyankhula mosasamala mawu ake amalasa ngati lupanga, koma mawu a munthu wanzeru amachiritsa." 
Proverbs12:19 Mawu woona amakhala mpaka muyaya koma mawu abodza sakhalitsa. 
Proverbs12:20 Mʼmitima ya anthu amene amakonza zoyipa muli chinyengo; koma anthu olimbikitsa za mtendere amakhala ndi chimwemwe. 
Proverbs12:21 Palibe choyipa chimene chimagwera munthu wolungama, koma munthu woyipa mavuto samuthera." 
Proverbs12:22 Pakamwa pa bodza pamamunyansa Yehova, koma amakondwera ndi anthu oyankhula zoona." 
Proverbs12:23 Munthu wochenjera amabisa nzeru zake, koma munthu wopusa amaonetsa uchitsiru wake poyera." 
Proverbs12:24 Ogwira ntchito mwakhama adzalamulira, koma aulesi adzakhala ngati kapolo." 
Proverbs12:25 Nkhawa imakhala ngati katundu wolemera mu mtima mwa munthu, koma mawu abwino amamusangalatsa." 
Proverbs12:26 Munthu wolungama amatsogolera mnansi wake, koma ntchito za anthu oyipa zimawasocheretsa." 
Proverbs12:27 Munthu waulesi sapeza chimene akufuna, koma munthu wakhama amapeza chuma chamtengo wapatali." 
Proverbs12:28 Mʼnjira yachilungamo muli moyo; koma njira ya munthu woyipa imafikitsa ku imfa. 
Proverbs13:1 Mwana wanzeru amamvera malangizo a abambo ake, koma mwana wonyoza samamvetsera chidzudzulo." 
Proverbs13:2 Munthu amapeza zinthu zabwino chifukwa cha mawu ake, koma anthu osakhulupirika amalakalaka zachiwawa basi." 
Proverbs13:3 Iye amene amagwira pakamwa pake amateteza moyo wake, koma amene amayankhula zopanda pake adzawonongeka." 
Proverbs13:4 Munthu waulesi amakhumbira zinthu koma sapeza kanthu, koma munthu wakhama adzalemera." 
Proverbs13:5 Munthu wolungama amadana ndi zabodza, koma zochita za munthu woyipa zimanyansa ndiponso zimachititsa manyazi." 
Proverbs13:6 Chilungamo chimateteza munthu wangwiro, koma tchimo limagwetsa munthu wochimwa." 
Proverbs13:7 Wina amadziyesa kuti ndi wolemera chonsecho alibe kanthu kalikonse; munthu wina amaoneka ngati wosauka chonsecho ali ndi chuma chambiri. 
Proverbs13:8 Chuma cha munthu wolemera chitha kuwombola moyo wake, koma munthu wosauka amamva chidzudzulo." 
Proverbs13:9 Nyale ya munthu wolungama ndi yokondweretsa, koma nyale ya munthu woyipa imazimitsidwa." 
Proverbs13:10 Chipongwe chosamalabadirako za anthu ena chimadzetsa mikangano, koma womva malangizo a anzawo ndiwo ali ndi nzeru." 
Proverbs13:11 Chuma chochipeza mofulumira chidzatha pangʼonopangʼono koma chuma chosonkhanitsidwa pangʼonopangʼono chidzachulukirachulukira. 
Proverbs13:12 Chinthu chochiyembekezera chikalephereka chimalefula mtima, koma chinthu chochilakalaka chikachitikadi chimakhala ngati mtengo wamoyo." 
Proverbs13:13 Amene amanyoza malangizo adzawonongeka, koma amene amasamala lamulo amalandira mphotho." 
Proverbs13:14 Malangizo a munthu wanzeru ali ngati kasupe wamoyo; amathandiza munthu kuti asakondwe mu msampha wa imfa. 
Proverbs13:15 Munthu wa nzeru zabwino amapeza kuyanja pakati pa anthu, koma munthu wosakhulupirika adzawonongeka." 
Proverbs13:16 Munthu wochenjera amachita zinthu mwanzeru, koma chitsiru chimaonetsa poyera uchitsiru wake." 
Proverbs13:17 Wamthenga woyipa amagwetsa anthu mʼmavuto, koma nthumwi yodalirika imabweretsa mtendere." 
Proverbs13:18 Wokana mwambo adzasauka ndi kunyozedwa, koma wosamala chidzudzulo adzalemekezedwa." 
Proverbs13:19 Chinthu chochilakalaka chikachitika chimasangalatsa mtima, koma zitsiru zimadana ndi kuleka zoyipa." 
Proverbs13:20 Woyenda ndi anthu anzeru nayenso adzakhala wanzeru; koma woyenda ndi zitsiru adzapwetekeka. 
Proverbs13:21 Choyipa chitsata mwini, koma wochita zolungama adzalandira mphotho yabwino." 
Proverbs13:22 Munthu wabwino amasiyira zidzukulu zake cholowa, koma chuma cha munthu wochimwa amachilandira ndi olungama." 
Proverbs13:23 Tsala la munthu wosauka limalola chakudya chambiri, koma anthu opanda chilungamo amachilanda." 
Proverbs13:24 Amene sakwapula mwana wake, ndiye kuti amamuda, koma wokonda mwana wake sazengereza kumulanga." 
Proverbs13:25 Munthu wolungama amakhala ndi zakudya zoti adye nʼkukhuta, koma mʼmimba mwa munthu woyipa mumakhala pululu ndi njala." 
Proverbs14:1 Mkazi wanzeru amamanga banja lake, koma mkazi wopusa amalimasula ndi manja ake omwe." 
Proverbs14:2 Amene amayenda molungama amaopa Yehova, koma amene njira zake ndi zoyipa amanyoza Yehova." 
Proverbs14:3 Kuyankhula kwa chitsiru kumamuyitanira ndodo pa msana, koma milomo ya munthu wanzeru imamuteteza." 
Proverbs14:4 Pakasowa ngʼombe zolima gome limakhala lopanda chakudya, koma pakakhala ngʼombe zamphamvu zakudya zimachulukanso." 
Proverbs14:5 Mboni yokhulupirika sinama, koma mboni yonyenga imayankhula zabodza." 
Proverbs14:6 Wonyoza anzake amafunafuna nzeru koma osayipeza, koma munthu womvetsa bwino amadziwa zinthu msanga." 
Proverbs14:7 Khala kutali ndi munthu wopusa chifukwa sudzapeza mawu a nzeru. 
Proverbs14:8 Nzeru za munthu wochenjera zagona pakuzindikira njira zake. Koma uchitsiru wa zitsiru umapusitsidwa ndi chinyengo chawo chomwe. 
Proverbs14:9 Zitsiru zimanyoza za kulapa machimo, awo, koma kufuna kwabwino kumapezeka mwa anthu olungama." 
Proverbs14:10 Mtima uliwonse umadziwa wokha zowawa zake, ndipo palibe wina aliyense angadziwe kukondwa kwake." 
Proverbs14:11 Nyumba ya munthu woyipa idzapasuka, koma tenti ya munthu wowongoka mtima idzakhazikika." 
Proverbs14:12 Pali njira ina yooneka ngati yabwino kwa munthu, koma kumatsiriziro kwake ndi ku imfa." 
Proverbs14:13 Ngakhale poseka mtima utha kumva kuwawa, ndipo mathero achimwemwe akhoza kukhala chisoni." 
Proverbs14:14 Munthu wosakhulupirika adzalandira zogwirizana ndi ntchito yake, koma munthu wabwino adzalandira mphotho ya ntchito yake." 
Proverbs14:15 Munthu wopusa amakhulupirira chilichonse, koma munthu wochenjera amaganizira bwino mayendedwe ake." 
Proverbs14:16 Munthu wanzeru amaopa Mulungu ndipo amapewa zoyipa, koma munthu wopusa ndi wokula mtima amakhala wosasamala." 
Proverbs14:17 Munthu wopsa mtima msanga amachita zinthu za uchitsiru, ndipo anthu amadana ndi munthu wachinyengo." 
Proverbs14:18 Anthu opusa amalandira uchitsiru, koma anthu ochenjera amavekedwa chipewa cha ulemerero wa kudziwa zinthu." 
Proverbs14:19 Anthu oyipa adzagwada pamaso pa anthu abwino, ndipo anthu oyipa adzapempha thandizo kwa anthu olungama." 
Proverbs14:20 Munthu wosauka ngakhale anansi ake omwe amamuda, koma munthu wolemera ali ndi abwenzi ambiri." 
Proverbs14:21 Wonyoza mnansi wake ndi wochimwa koma ndi wodala amene amachitira chifundo anthu osowa. 
Proverbs14:22 Kodi amene amakonzekera zoyipa sasochera? Koma amene amakonzekera zabwino anthu amawaonetsa chikondi ndi kukhulupirika. 
Proverbs14:23 Ntchito iliyonse imakhala ndi phindu, koma kuyankhulayankhula kumabweretsa umphawi." 
Proverbs14:24 Chipewa chaulemu cha anthu a nzeru ndi chuma chawo chomwe, koma malipiro a zitsiru ndi uchitsiru." 
Proverbs14:25 Mboni yokhulupirika imapulumutsa miyoyo, koma mboni yabodza imaphetsa." 
Proverbs14:26 Amene amaopa Yehova ali ndi chitetezo chokwanira ndipo iye adzakhala pothawira pa ana ake. 
Proverbs14:27 Kuopa Yehova ndiye kasupe wamoyo, kumathandiza munthu kuti apewe msampha wa imfa." 
Proverbs14:28 Gulu lalikulu la anthu ndiye ulemerero wa mfumu, koma popanda anthu kalonga amawonongeka." 
Proverbs14:29 Munthu wosapsa mtima msanga amamvetsa zinthu kwambiri, koma munthu wopsa mtima msanga amaonetsa uchitsiru wake." 
Proverbs14:30 Mtima wodekha umapatsa thupi moyo, koma nsanje imawoletsa mafupa." 
Proverbs14:31 Amene amapondereza mʼmphawi amanyoza mlengi wake, koma wochitira chifundo munthu wosowa amalemekeza Mulungu." 
Proverbs14:32 Anthu oyipa adzakanthidwa chifukwa cha ntchito zawo zomwe, koma olungama adzatetezedwa mwa imfa yawo." 
Proverbs14:33 Nzeru zimakhala mu mtima mwa anthu omvetsa zinthu, koma nzeru sipezeka mu mtima mwa zitsiru." 
Proverbs14:34 Chilungamo chimakweza mtundu wa anthu, koma uchimo umachititsa manyazi mtundu uliwonse." 
Proverbs14:35 Mfumu imasangalatsidwa ndi wantchito wanzeru, koma imachitira ukali wantchito wochititsa manyazi." 
Proverbs15:1 Kuyankha kofatsa kumathetsa mkwiyo, koma mawu ozaza amautsa ukali." 
Proverbs15:2 Munthu wanzeru amayankhula zinthu za nzeru, koma pakamwa pa zitsiru pamatulutsa za uchitsiru." 
Proverbs15:3 Maso a Yehova ali ponseponse, amayangʼana pa oyipa ndi abwino omwe." 
Proverbs15:4 Kuyankhula kodekha kuli ngati mtengo wopatsa moyo, koma kuyankhula kopotoka kumapweteka mtima." 
Proverbs15:5 Chitsiru chimanyoza mwambo wa abambo ake, koma wochenjera amasamala chidzudzulo." 
Proverbs15:6 Munthu wolungama amakhala ndi chuma chambiri, zimene woyipa amapindula nazo zimamugwetsa mʼmavuto." 
Proverbs15:7 Pakamwa pa anthu anzeru pamafalitsa nzeru; koma mitima ya zitsiru sitero. 
Proverbs15:8 Nsembe za anthu oyipa zimamunyansa Yehova, koma amakondwera ndi pemphero la anthu owona mtima." 
Proverbs15:9 Ntchito za anthu oyipa zimamunyansa Yehova koma amakonda amene amafunafuna chilungamo. 
Proverbs15:10 Amene amasiya njira yabwino adzalangidwa koopsa. Odana ndi chidzudzulo adzafa. 
Proverbs15:11 Manda ndi chiwonongeko ndi zosabisika pamaso pa Yehova, nanji mitima ya anthu!" 
Proverbs15:12 Wonyoza sakonda kudzudzulidwa; iye sapita kwa anthu anzeru. 
Proverbs15:13 Mtima wokondwa umachititsa nkhope kukhala yachimwemwe, koma mtima wosweka umawawitsa moyo." 
Proverbs15:14 Mtima wa munthu wozindikira zinthu umafunafuna nzeru, koma pakamwa pa zitsiru pamadya uchitsiru wawo." 
Proverbs15:15 Munthu woponderezedwa masiku ake onse amakhala oyipa, koma mtima wachimwemwe umakhala pa chisangalalo nthawi zonse." 
Proverbs15:16 Kuli bwino kukhala ndi zinthu pangʼono nʼkumaopa Yehova, kusiyana ndi kukhala ndi chuma chambiri uli pamavuto." 
Proverbs15:17 Kuli bwino kudyera ndiwo zamasamba pamene pali chikondi, kusiyana ndi kudyera nyama yangʼombe yonenepa pamene pali udani." 
Proverbs15:18 Munthu wopsa mtima msanga amayambitsa mikangano, koma munthu woleza mtima amathetsa ndewu." 
Proverbs15:19 Njira ya munthu waulesi ndi yowirira ndi mtengo waminga, koma njira ya munthu wolungama ili ngati msewu waukulu." 
Proverbs15:20 Mwana wanzeru amakondweretsa abambo ake, koma mwana wopusa amanyoza amayi ake." 
Proverbs15:21 Uchitsiru umakondweretsa munthu wopanda nzeru, koma munthu womvetsa zinthu amayenda mowongoka." 
Proverbs15:22 Popanda uphungu zolinga zako munthu zimalephereka, koma pakakhala aphungu ambiri zolinga zimatheka." 
Proverbs15:23 Munthu amakondwera ndi kuyankha koyenera, ndipo mawu onena pa nthawi yake ndi okoma." 
Proverbs15:24 Munthu wanzeru amatsata njira yopita ku moyo kuti apewe malo okhala anthu akufa. 
Proverbs15:25 Yehova amapasula nyumba ya munthu wonyada koma amasamalira malo a mkazi wamasiye. 
Proverbs15:26 Maganizo a anthu oyipa amamunyansa Yehova, koma mawu a anthu oyera mtima amamusangalatsa." 
Proverbs15:27 Munthu wofuna phindu mwachinyengo amavutitsa banja lake, koma wodana ndi ziphuphu adzakhala ndi moyo." 
Proverbs15:28 Munthu wolungama amaganizira za mmene ayankhire, koma pakamwa pa munthu woyipa pamatulutsa mawu oyipa." 
Proverbs15:29 Yehova amakhala kutali ndi anthu oyipa, koma amamva pemphero la anthu olungama." 
Proverbs15:30 Kuwala kwa maso kumasangalatsa mtima ndipo uthenga wabwino umalimbitsa munthu. 
Proverbs15:31 Womvera mawu a chidzudzulo amene apatsa moyo adzakhala pakati pa anthu anzeru. 
Proverbs15:32 Amene amanyoza mwambo amadzinyoza yekha, koma womvera mawu a chidzudzulo amapeza nzeru zomvetsa zinthu." 
Proverbs15:33 Kuopa Yehova kumaphunzitsa munthu nzeru, ndipo kudzichepetsa ndi ulemu chili patsogolo ndi kudzichepetsa." 
Proverbs16:1 Zolinga za mu mtima ndi za munthu, koma kwa Yehova ndiye kumachokera yankho." 
Proverbs16:2 Zochita zonse za munthu zimaoneka zabwino pamaso pake, koma Yehova ndiye amasanthula zolinga zako." 
Proverbs16:3 Pereka ntchito zako zonse mʼmanja mwa Yehova, ndipo zolinga zako zidzachitikadi." 
Proverbs16:4 Yehova amachita zonse ndi cholinga chake, ngakhale anthu oyipa kuti aone tsiku latsoka." 
Proverbs16:5 Munthu aliyense wodzikuza amamunyansa Yehova. Koma dziwani izi: Iwo sadzakhala osalangidwa. 
Proverbs16:6 Chifukwa cha chikondi chosasinthika ndi kukhulupirika, munthu amakhululukidwa machimo ake; chifukwa cha kuopa Yehova munthu amapewa zoyipa." 
Proverbs16:7 Pamene makhalidwe a munthu akondweretsa Yehova, ngakhale adani ake amakhala naye mwa mtendere." 
Proverbs16:8 Kuli bwino kukhala ndi zinthu pangʼono zozipeza mwachilungamo, kusiyana ndi kukhala ndi zinthu zambiri zozipeza popanda chilungamo." 
Proverbs16:9 Mtima wa munthu umalingalira zochita, koma Yehova ndiye amakhazikitsa njira zake." 
Proverbs16:10 Mawu a mfumu ali ngati mawu ochokera kwa Mulungu; ndipo pakamwa pake sipalakwa poweruza mlandu. 
Proverbs16:11 Miyeso ndi masikelo achilungamo zimachokera kwa Yehova; miyala yonse yoyesera ya mʼthumba anayipanga ndi Yehova. 
Proverbs16:12 Kuchita zoyipa kumanyansa mafumu, pakuti chilungamo ndiye maziko a ufumu wake." 
Proverbs16:13 Mawu owona amakondweretsa mfumu. Iyo imakonda munthu woyankhula choonadi. 
Proverbs16:14 Ukali wa mfumu ndi mthenga wa imfa, koma munthu wanzeru amawupepesa ukaliwo." 
Proverbs16:15 Kuwala kwa nkhope ya mfumu kumapatsa moyo; ndipo kukoma mtima kwake kuli ngati mitambo ya mvula nthawi ya chilimwe. 
Proverbs16:16 Nʼkwabwino kwambiri kupeza nzeru kupambana golide. Kukhala womvetsa bwino zinthu nʼkwabwino kupambana ndi kukhala ndi siliva. 
Proverbs16:17 Msewu wa munthu wowongoka mtima umapewa zoyipa; wopenyetsetsa kumene akupita amasunga moyo wake. 
Proverbs16:18 Kunyada kumafikitsa ku chiwonongeko, ndipo munthu wodzikuza adzagwa." 
Proverbs16:19 Nʼkwabwino kukhala ndi mtima wodzichepetsa pakati pa anthu oponderezedwa, kusiyana ndi kugawana zolanda ndi anthu onyada." 
Proverbs16:20 Munthu womvera malangizo zinthu zimamuyendera bwino, ndipo wodala ndi amene amadalira Yehova." 
Proverbs16:21 A mtima wanzeru amatchedwa ozindikira zinthu, ndipo mawu ake okoma amawonjezera nzeru." 
Proverbs16:22 Kumvetsa zinthu ndi kasupe wa moyo kwa iwo amene ali nako, koma uchitsiru umabweretsa chilango kwa zitsiru." 
Proverbs16:23 Mtima wanzeru umathandiza munthu kuyankhula mwa nzeru, ndipo mawu ake amawonjezera nzeru." 
Proverbs16:24 Mawu okometsera ali ngati chisa cha njuchi, amakoma mu mtima ndipo amalimbitsa thupi." 
Proverbs16:25 Pali njira ina yooneka ngati yowongoka kwa munthu koma kumatsiriziro kwake ndi imfa. 
Proverbs16:26 Njala ya munthu wantchito imamuthandiza kulimbikira; njalayo imamukakamiza kuchitapo kanthu. 
Proverbs16:27 Munthu wopanda pake amakonzekera kuchita zoyipa ndipo mawu ake ali ngati moto wopsereza. 
Proverbs16:28 Munthu woyipa mtima amayambitsa mikangano, ndipo miseche imalekanitsa anthu okondana kwambiri." 
Proverbs16:29 Munthu wandewu amakopa mnansi wake, ndipo amamuyendetsa njira imene si yabwino." 
Proverbs16:30 Amene amatsinzinira maso ake amalingalira zinthu zokhota; amene amachita msunamo amakonzeka kuchita zoyipa. 
Proverbs16:31 Imvi zili ngati chipewa chaufumu chaulemerero; munthu amazipeza akakhala moyo wolungama. 
Proverbs16:32 Munthu wosapsa mtima msanga amaposa munthu wankhondo, munthu wowugwira mtima wake amaposa amene amalanda mzinda." 
Proverbs16:33 Maere amaponyedwa pa mfunga, koma ndiye Yehova amene amalongosola zonse." 
Proverbs17:1 Nʼkwabwino kudya mkute koma pali mtendere, kuposa kuchita madyerero mʼnyumba mʼmene muli mikangano." 
Proverbs17:2 Kapolo wanzeru adzalamulira mwana wochititsa manyazi, ndipo kapoloyo adzagawana nawo cholowa ngati mmodzi mwa abale." 
Proverbs17:3 Siliva amamuyesa mʼngʼanjo ndipo golide amamuyesa mʼngʼanjo, koma Yehova amayesa mitima." 
Proverbs17:4 Munthu woyipa amamvera malangizo oyipa; munthu wabodza amatchera khutu mawu osakaza. 
Proverbs17:5 Iye amene amalalatira mʼmphawi amanyoza mlengi wake; amene amakondwerera tsoka la mnzake sadzakhala osalangidwa. 
Proverbs17:6 Zidzukulu ndiye ulemu wa anthu okalamba, ndipo makolo ndiye ulemerero wa ana." 
Proverbs17:7 Kuyankhula bwino sikuyenerana ndi chitsiru, nanji kuyankhula bodza kungayenerane kodi ndi mfumu?" 
Proverbs17:8 Chiphuphu chili ngati mankhwala amwayi kwa wochiperekayo; kulikonse kumene amapita zinthu zimamuyendera. 
Proverbs17:9 Iye amene amakhululukira zolakwa za wina, amafunitsitsa chikondi; wobwerezabwereza nkhani amapha chibwenzi." 
Proverbs17:10 Munthu wanzeru amamva kamodzi kokha, munthu wopanda nzeru ndi samvamkunkhu." 
Proverbs17:11 Munthu woyipa maganizo ake ali pa kuwukira basi; ndipo bwana adzamutumizira wamthenga wankhanza. 
Proverbs17:12 Nʼkwabwino kukumana ndi chimbalangondo cholandidwa ana ake kusiyana ndi kukumana ndi chitsiru mu uchitsiru wake. 
Proverbs17:13 Ngati munthu abwezera choyipa kusinthana ndi zabwino, ndiye choyipa sichidzachoka mʼnyumba mwake." 
Proverbs17:14 Chiyambi cha mikangano chili ngati kukhamulira madzi, choncho uzichokapo mkangano usanayambe." 
Proverbs17:15 Kumasula munthu wolakwa kapena kumanga munthu wosalakwa, zonse ziwirizi Yehova zimamunyansa." 
Proverbs17:16 Ndalama zogulira nzeru zili ndi phindu lanji mʼmanja mwa chitsiru poti iyeyo mutu wake sumayenda bwino? 
Proverbs17:17 Bwenzi lako limakukonda nthawi zonse, ndipo mʼbale wako anabadwa kuti azikuthandiza pamavuto." 
Proverbs17:18 Munthu wopanda nzeru amavomereza zopereka chikole ndipo iyeyo amasanduka chikole cha mnansi wake. 
Proverbs17:19 Wokonda zolakwa amakonda mkangano, ndipo wokonda kuyankhula zonyada amadziyitanira chiwonongeko." 
Proverbs17:20 Munthu wamtima woyipa zinthu sizimuyendera bwino; ndipo woyankhula zachinyengo amagwa mʼmavuto. 
Proverbs17:21 Mwana wopusa amamvetsa chisoni abambo ake, abambo a chitsiru sakhala ndi chimwemwe." 
Proverbs17:22 Mtima wosangalala uli ngati mankhwala abwino, koma mtima wokhumudwa umafowoketsa mafupa." 
Proverbs17:23 Munthu woyipa amalandira chiphuphu chamseri kuti apotoze chiweruzo cholungama. 
Proverbs17:24 Munthu wozindikira zinthu, maso ake amakhala pa nzeru, koma chitsiru chimwazamwaza maso ake pa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Proverbs17:25 Mwana wopusa amamvetsa chisoni abambo ake ndipo amapweteketsa mtima amayi ake. 
Proverbs17:26 Sibwino kulipitsa munthu wosalakwa, kapena kulanga anthu osalakwa." 
Proverbs17:27 Munthu wosunga pakamwa ndiye wodziwa zinthu, ndipo wodekha mtima ndiye womvetsa bwino zinthu." 
Proverbs17:28 Ngakhale chitsiru chimakhala ngati chanzeru chikakhala chete; ndipo chikatseka pakamwa chimakhala ngati munthu wochenjera. 
Proverbs18:1 Munthu wokonda kukhala yekha amafunafuna zomukomera yekha; iye amatsutsana ndi malangizo onse anzeru. 
Proverbs18:2 Chitsiru chilibe chidwi chomvetsa zinthu, koma chimakondwera ndi kuyankhula maganizo ake okha." 
Proverbs18:3 Kuyipa mtima kukabwera, manyozonso amabwera. Manyazi amabwera pamodzi ndi kunyozeka." 
Proverbs18:4 Mawu a munthu ali ngati madzi akuya, kasupe wa nzeru ndiye mtsinje wotumphuka." 
Proverbs18:5 Si kwabwino kukondera munthu woyipa pa milandu; kapena kupondereza munthu wosalakwa. 
Proverbs18:6 Mawu a chitsiru amautsa mkangano; pakamwa pake pamayitana mkwapulo. 
Proverbs18:7 Pakamwa pa chitsiru ndipo pamabweretsa chiwonongeko chake, ndipo milomo yake ili ngati msampha wa moyo wake." 
Proverbs18:8 Mawu a miseche ali ngati chakudya chokoma; amalowa mʼmimba mwa munthu. 
Proverbs18:9 Munthu waulesi pa ntchito yake ali pachibale ndi munthu amene amawononga zinthu. 
Proverbs18:10 Dzina la Yehova lili ngati nsanja yolimba; wolungama amathawiramo napulumuka. 
Proverbs18:11 Chuma cha anthu olemera chili ngati mzinda wake wolimba; chili ngati khoma lalitali limene amaganiza kuti limutchinjiriza. 
Proverbs18:12 Chiwonongeko chisanafike, mtima wa munthu umakhala wonyada, koma ulemu umatsatira kudzichepetsa." 
Proverbs18:13 Ukayankha usanamvetse bwino nkhani, umenewo ndi uchitsiru ndipo umachita manyazi." 
Proverbs18:14 Mtima wa munthu utha kupirira pa matenda, koma munthu akataya mtima ndani angathe kumulimbitsanso." 
Proverbs18:15 Munthu wanzeru amawonjezera nzeru zina; amafunafuna kudziwa bwino zinthu. 
Proverbs18:16 Mphatso ya munthu imamutsekulira njira yomufikitsa pamaso pa anthu akuluakulu. 
Proverbs18:17 Amene amayamba kufotokoza mlandu wake amaoneka ngati wolungama ndiye mpaka mnzake atabwera ndi kumufunsa bwino. 
Proverbs18:18 Kuchita maere kumathetsa mikangano; amalekanitsa okangana amphamvu. 
Proverbs18:19 Mʼbale amene wamuthandiza amakhala ngati mzinda wolimba, koma kukangana naye kumatsekereza thandizo." 
Proverbs18:20 Munthu amapeza bwino malingana ndi zoyankhula zake. Adzakhuta ndi zipatso za pakamwa pake. 
Proverbs18:21 Mawu ako angathe kukuphetsa kapena kukukhalitsa moyo. Wokonda kuyankhulayankhula adzadya zipatso zake. 
Proverbs18:22 Wapeza mkazi wapeza chinthu chabwino ndipo Yehova amamukomera mtima. 
Proverbs18:23 Munthu wosauka amapempha koma munthu wolemera amayankha mwaukali. 
Proverbs18:24 Pali abwenzi amene chibwenzi chawo nʼchapamaso, koma pali bwenzi limene limakukangamira kuposa mʼbale wako." 
Proverbs19:1 Ndi wabwino munthu wosauka amene amayenda mu ungwiro, aposa munthu wopusa woyankhula zokhota." 
Proverbs19:2 Si bwino kuti munthu akhale wopanda nzeru; ndipo munthu woyenda mofulumira amaphonya njira. 
Proverbs19:3 Uchitsiru wa munthu umamubweretsera zovuta, mtima wake umakwiyira Yehova." 
Proverbs19:4 Chuma chimachulukitsa abwenzi; koma munthu wosauka bwenzi lake limamuthawa. 
Proverbs19:5 Mboni yonama sidzalephera kulangidwa; ndipo iye amene amanena mabodza sadzapulumuka. 
Proverbs19:6 Anthu ambiri amafuna munthu wopatsa kuti awakomere mtima, ndipo munthu amene amapereka mphatso ndi bwenzi la munthu aliyense." 
Proverbs19:7 Ngati munthu wosauka abale ake omwe amadana naye, nanji abwenzi ake tsono! Iwo adzamuthawa kupita kutali. Amayesa kuwatsatira mowapembedza koma iwo samapezeka konse." 
Proverbs19:8 Iye amene amapeza nzeru ndiye kuti amakonda moyo wake. Wosamalitsa kukhala wanzeru, zinthu zimamuyendera bwino." 
Proverbs19:9 Mboni yonama sidzalephera kulangidwa, ndipo iye amene amanena mabodza adzawonongeka." 
Proverbs19:10 Nʼkosayenera kuti chitsiru chizikhala ndi moyo wamanyado, nanjinso kuti kapolo azilamulira akalonga!" 
Proverbs19:11 Nzeru zimapangitsa munthu kukhala wosakwiya msanga; ulemerero wake uli posalabadira kuchitiridwa zoyipa. 
Proverbs19:12 Mkwiyo wa mfumu uli ngati kubangula kwa mkango, koma kukoma mtima kwake kuli ngati mame pa udzu." 
Proverbs19:13 Mwana wopusa ndiye tsoka la abambo ake ndipo mkazi wolongolola ndi wotopetsa ngati mvula yamvumbi. 
Proverbs19:14 Nyumba ndi chuma ndiye cholowa chochokera kwa makolo; koma mkazi wanzeru ndi wochokera kwa Yehova. 
Proverbs19:15 Ulesi umagonetsa tulo tofa nato ndipo munthu wosatakataka amakhala ndi njala. 
Proverbs19:16 Amene amamvera malangizo amasunga moyo wake, koma amene sasamala malamulo a Yehova adzafa." 
Proverbs19:17 Amene amakomera mtima osauka amachita ngati wakongoletsa Yehova, ndipo Yehovayo ndiye adzamubwezere." 
Proverbs19:18 Langa mwana wako, chiyembekezo chikanalipo; ngati sutero udzawononga moyo wake." 
Proverbs19:19 Munthu waukali woopsa ayenera kulandira chilango; pakuti akamulekelera ndiye zidzayipa kuposa kale. 
Proverbs19:20 Mvera uphungu ndipo landira malangizo; pa mapeto pake udzakhala wanzeru. 
Proverbs19:21 Munthu amakonzekera zambiri mu mtima mwake, koma cholinga cha Yehova ndiye chidzachitike." 
Proverbs19:22 Chimene munthu amafuna ndi chikondi chosatha; nʼkwabwino kukhala wosauka kusiyana ndi kukhala wabodza. 
Proverbs19:23 Kuopa Yehova kumabweretsa moyo; wotereyo amakhala mu mtendere; ndiye kuti choyipa sichidzamugwera. 
Proverbs19:24 Munthu waulesi amapisa dzanja lake mʼmbale; koma sangathe kufikitsa dzanja lakelo pakamwa pake. 
Proverbs19:25 Menya munthu wonyoza, ndipo anthu opanda nzeru adzachenjererapo; dzudzula munthu wozindikira zinthu, ndipo iye adzapezapo chidziwitso." 
Proverbs19:26 Mwana wochita ndewu ndi abambo ake ndi kuthamangitsa amayi ake, ndi mwana wochititsa manyazi ndi wonyozetsa." 
Proverbs19:27 Mwana wanga, ukaleka kumvera malangizo, udzapatukana ndi mawu opatsa nzeru." 
Proverbs19:28 Mboni yopanda pake imanyoza cholungama, ndipo pakamwa pa anthu oyipa pamameza zoyipa." 
Proverbs19:29 Chilango chakonzedwa kale kuti chigwere anthu oyipa, ndipo mkwapulo wakonzedwa kale kuti ukwapule misana ya anthu opusa." 
Proverbs20:1 Vinyo amachititsa munthu kukhala wonyoza ndipo chakumwa choledzeretsa chimachititsa munthu kukhala wolongolola; aliyense wosochera nazo zimenezi alibe nzeru. 
Proverbs20:2 Ukali wa mfumu uli ngati kubangula kwa mkango; amene amawuputa mkwiyowo amataya moyo wake.
